# ملا اسحاق ضیائی مضامین
*Source: KASHKOLE, Binder 28 (مسودے), Chapter 161. 5 topics. Language: ur.*

<!-- section 1 (id=5725, raw_sort=1): پہلا باب -->
السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Hadees e mubarak hae

 الدنيا جيفة وطلابها كلاب

Duniya ek murdaar (carcass) hae aur usko talab karne wale kutta (dog) hae

Rasoolallah ki shaan ye hae ke aap wohi kehte, jo "Wahi" kehti hae, yane wohi baat farmate jo Allah taala ki taraf se wahi وحي ke zareeyeh aapko milti, yane aap khud ki marzi aur dil se kuch bhi nahi kehte the

Nabi e kareem ne ek Duniya ki khaesh rakhne wale, Duniya ko talab karne wale lalji aur harees insaan ki misaal ek murdaar jaanwar ko khane wale kutte se di hae

Ab baat ye hae ki Hadees e shareef mae ek kutte ki misaal kiyu di jab keh murdaar (carcass) to bahut se jaanwar khate hae

Is Hadees ko aur kutte ke zikar ko puri tarah samajhne ke liye hum ko sab se pehle to kutte ki aadat aur khasiyat (nature & habits of the dog) ko samajhna hoga

Aap agar ghor (observe in detail) karenge to dekhenge ke kutte ko akele khane ki aadat hoti hae, jab usse koi raaste mae khane ki chez miljati hae to woh akela hi us chez ko khana chahta hae, agarche woh khana kitna bhi ziyada ho aur doosraun ko bhi kafi (sufficient) ho, magar kutta doosre kuttaun ko bhok bhok (by barking) karke wahan se bhaga dega

Ye baat theek issi tarah hae jis tarah ek insaan bhi apne maal aur daulat mae kissi aur insaan ko shareek nahi karna chahta hae, balkeh khud hi usko pura jama karna aur kharj karna chahta hae, jab ke woh maal aur daulat khud ke liya bhi kafi hae aur doosre zaroorat mand logoan ke liye bhi kaam a sakti hae

Kutte ke muqabil (comparison) mae kawa (crow) bhi hae jo murdaar khata hae magar kawa aisa hae ke usko jab koi murdaar khane ki chez milti hae to woh "kai" "kai" ka shor karke doosre kawaun ko bula leta hae aur phir sab milkar us murdaar ko khate hain

Doosri baat kawa (crow) apne jaise kawe ka murda gosht nahi khate magar kutta ek doosre murdaar kutte ka gosht bhi khata hae

Theek issi tarah ek maldaar (Rich) insaan ko doosre maaldaar insaan ka maal wa daulat achi nahi lagti aur woh hamesha doosre ke maal ko hasil karne, doosre ko tabah karne ki koshish karta hae, aur arzoo rakhta hae

Kutta doosre kutte ki maut per ghum nahi karta, balkeh khush hote hain aur usko khate bhi hae

Magar kawa (crow) ek kawa marne per shor karte hae aur sab doosre kawaun ko jama karte hae aur sab milkar uski maut per roote, afsoos wa ghum karte hain

Issi tarah aaj ka insaan bhi doosre insaan ki maut per ghum nahi karta balkeh uski nazar marne wale, ke maal aur daulat per rahti hae

Issi tarah ek duniya daar insaan bhi din aur raat maal aur daulat kamane mae laga rehta hae, jis tarah ek kutta din aur raat us murdaar ko khane ki fikar mae rehta hae, na kissi aur ko us murdaar ke khreeb aane deta hae na khud usko pura tarah kha sakta hae

In tammam khususiyat ki wajah se ek duniya daar insaan ki misaal Hadees mae ek kutte se di gayi hae, agar Allah taala koi aur jaanwar ki misaal deta to sahi nahi baethti

Allah taala Koran e kareem mae bhi kutte ki misaal di hae, aisa aadmi jo sirf duniya ko talab karta hae aur duniya aur uske maal aur daulat ka khaeshmand hae, uski misaal us kutte ki tarah hae, jisper saqti karo to bhi zabaan baher latkata hae aur usko chod bhi do to zabaan baher nikal kar hampta (panting) hae

Yane usko duniya ka maal aur daulat mil bhi jae to bhi zabaan baher nikal kar aur ziyada ki khaesh karta hae aur nahi milne per bhi zabaan lat'kata hae, usko kisi halat mae bhi chaen wa sukoon nahi, uska paet kabhi nahi bharta hae

Issi baat ko koran farmata hae       

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

وَاتَّبَعَ هَوَاهُ فَمَثَلُهُ كَمَثَلِ الْكَلْبِ إِن

 تَحْمِلْ عَلَيْهِ يَلْهَثْ أَوْ تَتْرُكْهُ يَلْهَث ذَّٰلِكَ مَثَلُ

 الْقَوْمِ الَّذِينَ كَذَّبُوا بِآيَاتِنَا فَاقْصُصِ الْقَصَصَ

 لَعَلَّهُمْ يَتَفَكَّرُونَ

انسان اپنی خواہش کے پیچھے چل پڑا۔ تو اس کی مثال کتے کی سی ہوگئی کہ اگر سختی کرو تو زبان نکالے رہے اور یونہی چھوڑ دو تو بھی زبان نکالے رہے۔  یہی مثال ان لوگوں کی ہے جنہوں نے ہماری آیتوں کو جھٹلایا

Ek waqt Rasulullah ek raaste se ja rahe the, dekha ke ek murda bakri padi huvi sadh (rotting) rahi thi aur badbo phel rahi thi (a dead goat was lying and decaying and giving bad odour)

Sahaba e kiraam ne karahiyat (with disgust) ki aur badbu ki wajeh se wahan se nikal jaane ki koshish kiye

Us waqt Risalat maab ne un Sahaba ko farmaya keh is bakri ki tumhare pass kiya wuqat aur haisiyat hae

Sahaba ne farmaya keh koi haisiyat aur wuqat nahi

Us waqt Rasulullah ne farmaya keh Allah taala ke pass is 'Duniya' ki us sadhi (rotting) bakri se bhi kam wuqat hae

Allah taala hum ko is duniya mae jo hasil huva usper itmenan ata kar aur qinayat pasand bana (give us contentment & satisfaction in whatever Allah taala has provided)

🌿🌹🌿🌹🌿🌹🌿🌹🌿

9/20/15, 8:59:45 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🌐🌐🌐🌐🌐🌐🌐🌐

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

جمعة مبارك

Mere aakhri mazmun per hamare ek navjavan bhai ne kha "Aap hamesha ye "Duniya" ko itna bura kiyu kehte hain, woh itni bhi buri nahi hae",

Unka kehna hae ke Duniya bhi dekhne ki chez hae, uski lazzatain hain, usme dekhne ke ajaebaat hain, saer wa tafreeh ke muqamaat hae, khel kud, khane pine aur enjoyment ke be hisaab zareeyeh hain, Duniya itni bhi buri nahi ke usko puri tarah dhutkar diya jae (ignore & reject)

Mera jawab us navjavan ko ye hae, jo aap sab ko bhi bhej raha

Hum agar sirf lafz e "Duniya" per qor kare to uske maane Arabi zabaan ke maher (experts) bahut se kiye hain, magar jo aam fahem maane (commen meaning) lafz "Dani" se "Duniya" ka lafz aya hae, aur "Dani" ke maane halke (lowly, cheap) ke hote hae, aur doosre maane khreeb (near) ke hote hain, Jaise ke hamari ye jismani zindagi woh pehle hae khreeb hae, aur aakherat ki roohani zindagi, jo haqeeqi zindagi hae woh baad aane wali hae, aakhir hae, aur aakher أخر Arabi zabaan mae baad aane wali chez ko kehte hae

Issi baat ko koran ne farmaya hae ;

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

اعْلَمُوا أَنَّمَا الْحَيَاةُ الدُّنْيَا لَعِبٌ وَلَهْوٌ وَزِينَةٌ وَتَفَاخُرٌ بَيْنَكُمْ وَتَكَاثُرٌ فِي الْأَمْوَالِ وَالْأَوْلَاد..................................... وَمَا الْحَيَاةُ الدُّنْيَا إِلَّا مَتَاعُ الْغُرُورِ

Ye jaan lo ke ye Duniya ki zindagi khel, kud, tamasha aur zeenat hae, aur tumhara ek doosre per fakher karna, aur maal aur aulad ko ek doosre se ziyada talab karne ki khaesh rakhna hae, aur aakher mae Allah taala farmata hae ke ye duniya ki zindagi, ek dhoke ka fareb ka samaan hae

Moulae Kaenat Moulana Ali ibn abi Talib Salawatullah ne farmaya tha ke "Ae Duniya tu mujh ko mat rijha (tempt, seduce) kar, mae tere dhoke mae nahi aunga" aur aap hi ne kha tha ke "Ae Duniya mae tujhe teen talaq deta hun"

Walid muqaddus farmate the agar koi is Duniya mae ye khe ke mae is Duniya mae, aur is Duniya se, khush hun to woh jhoota hae (he is a liar), kiya koi is maadi Duniya (materialistic world) mae khush bhi rahsakta hae ?

Hazrat e Essa Masih se riwayat hae keh aap ne ek martaba Duniya se pucha ke tumhare kitne shohar (husband) hae, (yane Duniya ko chahne wale aashiq), Duniya ne kha be'hisaab hain, unki koi ginti nahi, Essa ne kha kiya woh sab mar'gae (died) ya tu ne unko talaq de'di, Duniya ne kha "na woh khud mare aur na woh mujhe talaq diye (neither they have died nor they have divorced me) balkeh mae ne un sab ko maardala" (but I have killed them all)

Aur hamare issi nafs ke maamlaat ko samjhate huve jo is Duniya ki lazzataun aur shahwataun mae phas (trapped) kar apni aakherat ko tabah kardeti hae, ussi ki haqeeqat ko Essa Masih ne behtreen misaal dekar samjhaya hae

Aap ne dhobi ghat per khade hokar logoan se kha ke "tum dekh rahe ho ke ye kapde jo mael aur gandagi se saaf kiye ja rahe hain, kiya tum pasand karoge ke ye saaf suthre dhule (washed) huve kapde apne maele kuchele gande badbudaar (smelling) badan per phene (to wear)

Logoan ne jawab diya hargis nahi, aur jo aisa karega woh bewaquf aur jahel hoga

Us waqt Esa Masih ne kha ke yehi haal tumhare Nafs (soul) aur jism ka hae, tum apne badan to saaf rakhte ho, magar tumhara ye Nafs duniya ki tammam buraiyun aur khrabiyun mae mubtela hae, buri aadataun (habits) mae mulawas (involved) hae, raddi (useless) aqlaq ka hamil hae (habitual), 'Hasad', 'Hirs', 'Buqul', 'Kibar', aur bure khyalaat aur ghalat aeteqadaat rakhta hae, aur Duniya ki shahwataun ki taraf mael hae

Agar tum ko aakherat ki taraf jana hae, uski naemataun ko hasil karna hae, to phir tum ko is Nafs ko pak wa saaf karna hoga, sirf zaheri jism ko pak wa saaf karna kafi nahi hoga

Hamara haal us chote se bache ki tarah hae jo apne bachpan ke khilonaun (toys) ko sab kuch samajhta hae, uski sab se badi daulat woh khilone hain, magar jab woh bada hota hae to phir uski koi qadar aur ahmiyat baqi nahi rahti,  

Hamara bhi yehi haal hoga jab hum apni maut ke khreeb honge, us waqt ye Duniya ki daulat, ye zameen, ye jaedaad, ye paisa aur samaan, hamare saamne koi haisiyat nahi rakhega, uski koi khimat nahi hogi, ye sab kuch chodhkar jana hi hae

Wahan kaam aane wali chez woh sirf hamare nek amaal hain, hamara Ilm hae, taqwa hae, yehi hamare aakherat ka tosha hae

وَمَا هَٰذِهِ الْحَيَاةُ الدُّنْيَا إِلَّا لَهْوٌ وَلَعِبٌ وَإِنَّ الدَّارَ الْآخِرَةَ لَهِيَ الْحَيَوَانُ لَوْ كَانُوا يَعْلَمُونَ

اور یہ دنیا کی زندگی تو صرف کھیل اور تماشہ ہے اور (ہمیشہ کی) زندگی (کا مقام) تو آخرت کا گھر ہے۔ کاش یہ (لوگ) سمجھتے

🌐🌐🌐🌐🌐🌐🌐🌐

9/20/15, 8:59:45 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Allah taala koran e kareem mae irshad farmaya

وَإِنَّكَ لَعَلَىٰ خُلُقٍ عَظِيمٍ

اے نبئ، اخلاق تمہارے بہت (عالی) ہیں

Ae Nabi aap bahut hi aala aur azeem aqlaq per qaem ho

Adaab wa aqlaq ke taluq se Rasulullah Salallahu Alehe wa sallam ke irshadaat hain

Islam mae sab se acha wohi insaan hae, jiske "Aqlaq" (character) sabse ache  aur aala ho

احسن الناس اسلاما احسنهم خلقا

Aur Rasul e Khuda ka Qol hae

اكملهم إيمانا الطفهم باهله

 Us shaqs ka emaan kamil hae jo apne ahel wa aulad se lutf wa karam se pesh ae

Aur Nabi e kareem ne farmaya, Sharm wa Haya emaan ka ahem jus (part) hae

Aur farmaya ke tum apne bhai se kabhi bhi teen roz se ziyada qatte kalaam (baat na karna) mat karo, tum apne bhai ko jhidko mat, us'se hasad mat karo

Aur aulad ko chahye ke apne Maa Baap ke saath nek suluk kare, aur Allah taala aise Maa Baap per rahem farmata hae jo apni aulad ko neki karne mae, aur neki ki raah per lagane maddad karte hae

Har neki bhlai, achai ka kaam woh "Sadqa" hae

Rasulullah ne hukum farmaya ke tum apne naqun (nails) baal aur khoon ko dafan kardiya karo, aur dadhi (beard) ke baal ukhadne se mana farmaya, aur farmaya ki dadhi mommin ke chehre ka noor hae

Aap ne apni sawari ke jaanwar per baithe baithe guftagu karne se bhi mana farmaya

Jisne bhi apne bhai ke liye jazzakallahu khairan (Allah taala tum ko behtreen jaza de) kha usne uski behtreen tareef aur Sana (praise) kardi

Tum logoan ke aane jane ke raaste per mat baitho, aur agar tum baith'te ho, to aane jaane wale per salaam pesh karo, mazlum aur pareshan haal ki maddad karo, raasta bhatke huve ki hidayat karo, sahi raasta batao, aur apni nigaah na mehraam se neechi rakho

Aap ne farmaya keh jo bhi tum ko "Salaam" karne se pehle kalaam karna shru kare to usko jawab hargis na do, aur issi tarah koi tum se salaam karne se pehle ijazat talab kare to usko ijazat bhi na do

Aur Moulana Ali farmate hain ke khane se pehle aur khane ke baad haath ka dhona risq mae isafa karta hae

Aur kisi bhi Insaan ko baqaer taherat ke neend nahi lena chahye

Aur farmaya ke tum apne garam khane aur pine ke chez per mat phook maro, aur na hi apne Sajde ke muqam per

Tum kabhi bhi unchai se (from hight) hawa mae peshaab (urinate) mat karo aur na hi behte huve pani mae, aur jaano ye baat ko, ke pani mae bhi aur hawa mae bhi Allah ki maqlooq maujud hoti hae

Jab tum apne hii makan mae dakhil ho to apne ahel wa ayaal per salaam karo, aur agar makan mae koi bhi moujud na ho to kho

السلام علينا من ربنا

Salaam ho hum per hamare Rabb ki taraf se, aur dakhil ho to قل هوالله أحد ka sura padho, tumhare fakhiri ko dur karta hae

Tum apne mommin bhai ke pass farzand paida ho to usko mubarakbaad is tarah se do

بارك الله لك في هبته وبلغه أشده ورزقك بره

Barkat de Allah taala tum ko uske (Allah ke) diye huve hadiye mae, usko Jawaan aur masboot banae, aur usko behtreen risq ata kare

Aur ye mommin ke bade aqlaq mae se hae ke woh apne se bade se kabhi jhagda na kare, aur apne kamtar aur chote per badai wa fakher (Proudness) na dikhae

Aur tum ko chahye ke us baat ka jawab na de, jis baat ka tum ilm nahi rakhte, aur aisa kalaam na karo jo kisi ke faide ka na ho, aur na hi tum koi aisi baat mae qor wa fikar karo jismae kisi ki bhi bhlai nahi

Tum is baat ka khyal rakho ke tumhari zabaan tumhare Dil ke khilaaf baat na kare, yane tumhare Dil mae jo hae wohi zabaan per bhi ho

Aur na hi tumhara koi fael koi amal (action) tumhare Qol (sayings) ke khilaf ho

Tum Aalim ke saamne apni zabaan per lugaam (keep control) lagao

Tum kalaam karo bhi to Ilm ke khatir aur khamosh bhi raho to Ilm hi ke liye

Tum jawab dene mae bahut jald baazi na karo, aur na hi bahut ziyada aur ek saath musalsil sawal karo

Tum zabaan na chalao us baat mae jis baat ka tum Ilm nahi rakhte aur na hi us baat per behes (argument) karo jo baat tum khud puri tarah na samjhe ho

Allah taala humko in nasihataun ka paband banae, aur hum Paighambar ke aqlaq se apne aap ko aqlaqdaar karle

⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕

9/20/15, 8:59:45 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 😄😄😃😀😀😃😄😃

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

جمعة مبارك

Aaj Duniya kehti hae ke hasna aur khekha lagana (guffaws, laughter) sahet ke liye bahut mufeed hae, aur ab to har shaher mae "laughing Clubs" bhi form hogae hae aur log diwanaun ki tarah ba'qaer kisi wajeh aur sabab (without any reason) khe'khe lagate hae, hosakta hae ke unki jismani sahet behter hoti bhi ho, magar unki zaheni sahet khraab hone ki ye badi daleel zaroor hae aur uske barkhilaf 'Rone' aur 'Azurda' (sad & sorrowful) hone ko kamzoori ki nishaani samajhte hain, jab ke aaj science khud aeteraaf kar raha hae ke rona woh insaan mae emotional stability lata hae.

Crying relieves pressure on soul, & to much happiness always overflows into tears, and this brings emotional stability

Koran e majeed ek aisi jamme (complete) hidayat hae ke insaani zindagi ka koi pehlu (angle) nahi jiska zikar usme moujud na ho

Koran e kareem farmate hae

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

فَلْيَضْحَكُوا قَلِيلًا وَلْيَبْكُوا كَثِيرًا جَزَاءً بِمَا كَانُوا يَكْسِبُونَ

یہ (دنیا میں) تھوڑا سا ہنس لیں اور (آخرت میں) ان کو ان اعمال کے بدلے جو کرتے رہے ہیں بہت سا رونا ہوگا

Tum ko chahye ke tum duniya mae kam hanse (laugh) aur ziyada roye (weep), us baat ke jaza (returns, badla) mae jo tum kar chuke ho

To deeni nazriye se humko kam hasna chahye aur ziyada rona hae

Hamara, Allah taala ki is hikmat ki baat ko samajhna bahut mushkil hae, Hakim e ummat Rasulullah jo is hikmat se waqif the farmaya tha

لو تعلمون ما أعلم لضحكتم قليلا وبكيتم كثيرا  

Agar tum bhi wohi baat ko jante, jo mae janta hun, to Yaqeenan tum bhi is duniya mae ziyada rote aur kam haste

Moulae e Kaenaat bhi apne ek khutbe mae, Mard e mommin ke awsaaf (qualities) bayan karte huve farmaya tha

وان ضحك لم يعلو صوته

Jab mommin hasta hae to uski awaaz bulund nahi hoti, mommin woh hota hae jo hasta bhi hae to khekha (guffaws) nahi lagata hae balkeh uski hasi (laughter) tabassum manind hoti hae (its more like a smile)

Aur jab Nabi e kareem se "Rone" ke baare mae pucha gaya, to aap ne farmaya tha ke, rona aisa hona chahye

تحزن القلب وتدمع العين

Aankhaun se aansu (tears) nikle aur Dil mehzun ho (saddened & sorrowful), yane Rone ka ye matlab nahi ke shor pukar ya wawela machae ya matam kare

Aur Nabi e kareem ka ye bhi irshad hae ke Allah taala ko sab se ziyada azeez do hi khatre (drops) hain, ek woh khatre 'khoon' hae jo usne Allah ki raah mae bha'ya hae, aur doosra woh khatre 'aansu' hae jo Khoof e khuda mae raat ki tariki mae (in the dark of the night) bha'ya gaya ho

Hamare duaon ki qubuliat woh aankh se aansu behne se hi ziyada hoti hae, Isiliye humko mubarak raataun mae sajde mae aansu bahane ko kha jata hae, jahan Rone aur azurda hone se duaon ki, ibadat ki qabuliat hae, wahan hasna se namaz hi tut jati hae   

Jaise ke koran e kareem farmata hae

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

وَيَخِرُّونَ لِلْأَذْقَانِ يَبْكُونَ وَيَزِيدُهُمْ خُشُوعًا

اور وہ تھوڑیوں کے بل گر پڑتے ہیں (اور) روتے جاتے ہیں اور اس سے ان کو اور زیادہ عاجزی پیدا ہوتی ہے

Rona insaan mae inkesari, ajisi, hamdardi, burdbari wa sanjeedgi paida karti hae

 Hadees e shareef hae

البكاء من خشية الله مفتاح الرحمة

Khoof e khuda se rona, woh Allah ke Rehmat ke raastaun ki kunji hae

Aur wohi hasne (laughter) ke liye Nabi kareem ka irshad hae

كثرت الضحك تميت القلب

Ziyada hasna insaan ke Dil ko murda bana deti hae,

Aur Nabi e kareem ka ye bhi qol hae ke khekha (guffaws, loud burst of laughter) lagane wala ye nahi janta ke aya (whether) woh Allah ko khush kiya, ya Allah ko naraz kiya.

Aur Aulia Allah ka qol hae, ke ziyada hasne wala 10 musibataun mae mubtela hoga

Uska Dil murda hoga, uski sharm kam hogi, apni, aur na hi doosraun ki izzat ki parwah karega, shaitaan us se khush hoga aur Allah taala naraz rahega, Qiyamat ke roz hisaab ziyada hoga, malaeka bhi usko napasand karenge, yaadasht uski kamzoor hogi, aur tabiyat ka ujhad (arrogant & rough) hoga

Ab aakhir Rone ko kiyu pasandida amal qarar diya, aur beja hasne ko bura fael, jab ke khushi hi asal hae, khushi ka na hona woh ghum hae, Din hi asal hae, din ka na hona raat hae, sahet asal hae, sahet ka na hona bimari hae

Aulia Allah farmate hae ke is ki asal wajeh ye hae ke hum se us 'Aalam e Arwah' mae khata (ghalti, gunaah) sarsad huva tha, aur us gunaah ke saza mae humko is duniya mae jismani (3 dimensional) qaed (jail) mae dala gaya hae, issi baat ko Nabi e kareem ne farmaya hae

الدنيا سجن المومن وجنة الكافر

Ye duniya mommin ke liye qaed khana (jail) hae, aur kafir ke liye jannat, ye hamare deen ka bada ghera falsafa hae, jo deen ke batini Ilm se waqif hae woh is baat ko asani se samajh sakte hain

Ye duniya Allah ke narazgi ka ghar hae دارسخطالله hae, Isiliye hum per wajib hae ke hum is duniya mae apne gunaahaun se isteqfar kare, toba kare, apni ghalti per nadim ho, takeh humko is Dar e mahen, (takleef wa pareshani ke ghar) se najat mile

Aur ya baat bhi hae, ke ek qaed khane mae saza yafta (sentenced prisoner) qaedi ko khekha zeb (suits) nahi dete, rona isliye bhi hae ke hum qaed mae hae, hamara haqeeqi ghar jo roohani aalam hae woh hum se chooth gaya hae,

المومن ممتحن

Mommin imtehan mae hae, aazmaesh mae hae, Allah taala humko is aazmaesh mae kamiyab kare, aur hum jald us roohani ghar hamare haqeeqi ghar dar e baqa, dar e aakherat ki taraf kuch kare (hamesha rahne ke muqam)

پروں میں اتنی قوت دے کہ پہونچے ہم نشیمن تک

بہت مدت ہوئ چھوٹا هوا ہے آشیاں ہم سے

😥 😥 😥 😥 😥 😥 😥

9/20/15, 8:59:46 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹

 السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

الله تعالی آپکو پہلی ذي الحجة بهت مبارک کرے

Kiya Hasna bura hae, kiya khekha (guffaws) lagana ghalat hae ?

Mere last mazmun ke jawab mae, mujhe is kisim ke bahut se sawal aye, aur replies mille

Hasna hargis mana nahi, aur na hi insaan ko hamesha rote rehna hae

Magar har baat ke liye ek moqa hota hae, aur uska sahi muqam bhi hota hae, khushi ke jazbaat ka izhaar muskurahat aur hasi se hota hae, to ghum aur dukh ka izhaar rone se hae

Uloma aur falsafi log muskurahat se lekar khakhe tak (from a smile to laud burst of laughter) 12 muqtalif levels bayan karte hae jiske liye Arabi ke khaas khaas alfaz aye hae

Pehla tabussum hae yane muskurahat phir اهلاس hae, jo muskurahat ka halka se phelna hae, phir و انكلال ، افترار hae jisko hum keh sakte hae halki phulki khush gawar hasi (laughter) hae, jisko pasand kiya gaya hae, uske baad كتكته aur uske baad قهقه khekha hae jisme dant zaher bhi hote hae, kushada hasi hae, aur uska baad قرقرة aur كركرة aur uske baad استغراب hae, uske baad طخطخة hae, uske baad اهزاق hae, aur uske baad زهزقة

yeh 12 muqtalif hasi ke levels ko hamara samajhna bahut hi mushkil hae, agarche ke ulooma in ki tafzeel bayan ki hae, aur in ki wajeh se kiya saamne wale per asar hota hae woh bhi bayan farmaya hae

Halki phulki khush gawar hasi (light laughter) koi buri baat nahi, magar yaqinan be'thasha khekha (guffaws) marna Allah taala ko napasand hae

Allah tabaraka taala to koran mae hukum farmata hae ke tum khush dili qhanda peshani se logoan se mila karo, ke milne wale ko bhi ahsaas ho ke tum ko usse milkar khushi huvi, jaisa ke koran kehta hae,

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

وَلَا تُصَعِّرْ خَدَّكَ لِلنَّاسِ وَلَا تَمْشِ فِي الْأَرْضِ مَرَحًا إِنَّ اللَّهَ لَا يُحِبُّ كُلَّ مُخْتَالٍ فَخُورٍ

اور (ازراہ غرور) لوگوں سے گال نہ پھلانا اور زمین میں اکڑ کر نہ چلنا۔ کہ خدا کسی اترانے والے خود پسند کو پسند نہیں کرتا

Tum logoan se akad kar mu phoola kar mat milo, aur tum zameen mae akad kar na chalna Allah taala akad ne wale, khud pasand insaan ko napasand karta hae

Ek bahut hi sabaq amos ibrat wala tareeqi waqae ka zikar karna hae, jo be'tahasha hasi aur khekha marna se taluq rakhta hae

13 Ramazan ul mubarak 1016 hijri ka Ahmedabad ka waqea hae, Syedna Jaffar 22 saal ke navjavan the, aur Syedna Mohammed bin Fahad aapke "mustauda" (caretaker) Dai the, us roz ek mommin bhai ke janaze mae shareek the, kuch Dawoodi log bhi kandha dene shareek huve magar jaisa hi unko ahsaas huva ke Janaza Sulaimani ka hae to Janaza chodkar kar bhage, Syedna Jaffar aur aapke do saathiyun ko unki ye harkat per be'thasha hasi aagai,

Jab Janaza kabrastan pohuncha to Syedna Mohammed bin Fahad ne bahut hi qusse mae jalal ki halat mae pucha ke tum mae se kis ne hasa tha (laughed) aur aap ne ye Hadees e shareef padhi

  أن الله ينهاكم الضحك في المقابر أو هوا عند المقابر

 Allah taala kabrastan mae aur khabraun ke darmiyan hasne se mana farmate hae

Us waqt Syedna Jaffar jo mustaqar, hone wale Dai the apni ghalti ka aeteraaf kiye, us waqt Syedna Mohammed bin Fahad is khadar qusse mae the keh aap ne Syedna Jaffar ke chehre per tamacha mardiya (slapped)

Is waqae ke baad Syedna Jaffar ne apni ghalti ka bahut asar liye aur saqt bimar huve yahan tak ke aapki halat bahut hi nazuk hogai thi, aur Syedna Mohammed aap se naraz the aur aap se mil nahi rahe the

Jab aapko khabar huvi ke Syedna Jaffar ki halat bahut khrab hae, to us waqt aap foran ghar aye, aur Syedna Jaffar ki kaifiyat dekhkar aap Rone lage aur farmaya

" Ae Jaffar mujhe andaza nahi tha ke tum meri narazgi ka itna asar loge,  mae kal jo qusse kiya uske liye maafi chahta hun, aur aap be'sakhta rone mae aagae,

Syedna Jaffar ne farmaya

مولاي ما عليك تثريب

Koran ke alfaz hae, ae mere Moula aap per koi ilzam nahi.(you are not to be blamed)

Aur yehi woh mubarak din tha jab keh Syedna Mohammed bin Fahad ne Syedna Jaffar ko, woh tammam amanat jo Syedna Sulaiman saheb ne Syedna Mohammed bin Fahad ko saumpi thi woh aap ne Syedna Jaffar ke hawale kardiya aur khud Syedna Jaffar ke peeche hogaye, aur farmaya ke mae aaj se ae Jaffar aapke khadim aur gulamaun mae shummar karta hun

Aur ye wahi mubarak din tha ke ussi waqt Syedna Jaffar ne Syedna Mohammed bin Fahad per Nas farmadi aur apne baad Dai muqrar farmaya

Is waqae se humko ahsaas hota hae ke ghalat waqt per hasna, kitni buri, mayub aur khrab baat hae

Allah taala hum ko hamare jazbaat per qabu rakhna aur uska sahi waqt per ishar karne wala banae, aur hamare Moula Syedna Jaffar jaisa nasihat ko qabool karne wala aur asar lene wala banae

🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹

9/20/15, 8:59:46 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ♻♻♻♻♻♻♻♻

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Ek waqt Moulana Ali ibn Abi Talib Salawatullah alahe ne ek shaqs, jisne zor se استغفرلله kha usko farmaya

Kiya tujhe pata bhi hae ke ASTEQFERULLAH kisse kehte hain ?

Isteqfar (apne gunaah ke liye Allah taala se maafi talab karna) badi unchi aur aala chez hoti hae, aur woh 6 baataun per munhasir (dependent) hae, 6 pre requisite hae, jab hi jakar maqferat hogi

1) Pehle jo bhi gunaah kiye hain usper afsoos wa nadamat puri tarah Dil se karna hae

2) Jo bhi gunaah se Isteqfar chah raha hae, usko dobara kabhi na karne ka paka pura irada karna, wada karna hae.

3) Allah taala ki tammam maqlooq ke huquq ko puri tarah ada karna, takeh qiyamat ke roz usper koi maqlooq ke saath ke gunaah ka bojh (burden) baqi na rahe,   

4) Un tammam faraez ko ada karna jo Allah taala ki taraf se  wajib (farz) kiye gae the, jo usne zae (waste) kardiya tha (nahi ada kiye the)

5) Ghalat tariqe se, na'jaez tariqe se, haram zareeyah se, jo bhi kamiya, haram kha'kar, haram pi'kar, haram dekh'kar jo jism per gosht aur charbi (fats) banaya tha, ab us charbi aur gosht ko ghum, fikar, afsoos wa nadamat se ghulade (melt karde), is hadd tak keh chamdi (skin) hadi (bones) ko chipak jae (sara gosht khatam hojae)

6) Tum ne jo gunahaun ki lazzat uthae, jo maza kiye, jo duniya ke aesh wa aaram ke aadi huve, ab tum Allah aur Rasul ki taat mae (obedience) uske ahkam aur wajebat baja lane mae takleef aur mehnat wa mashaqat uthao (bear all the difficulties)

Ae shaqs to ye sab kar aur phir uske baad hi Allah Tabaraka wa taala se Isteqfar talab kar, yaqinan teri toba maqbool hogi

واغفرلناياخير الغافرين بحق سيدنا محمد واهل بيته الطيبين الطاهرين صلوات الله وسلام عليهم أجمعين

♻♻♻♻♻♻♻♻

5 Zilhaja inteqal ka din hae Hazrat Moulana Farhat Ali saheb muqaddus ka Aap ki seerat per ek mazmun 2 saal pehle likha tha jo padhna chahta hae woh request bheje to usko forward kardunga

♻♻♻♻♻♻♻♻

9/20/15, 8:59:46 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🌸🌿🌸🌿🌸🌿🌸🌿

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

جمعة مبارك

🌿🌸🌿🌸🌿🌸🌿🌸

Syedna wa Moulana Dai Gulam Husain Saheb ne kiya hi behtreen mukalema (dialogue) kitab Qutrun Neda, fi Faza'ele ahle Huda, mae bayan farmaya hae, ye mukalema Allah tabaraka wa Taala, Adam alehe salaam, aur Shaitaan ke darmiyan mae hae  

Iblis e laeen ne Allah taala se kha ke tu ne Adam ki wajeh se mujhe Jannat se nikala hae, ab tu hi mujhe kuch moqa de, takeh mae Adam aur aulad e Adam (mankind) per qalba, (control) hasil karsaku

Allah taala ne kha, ja, mae tujhe moqa diya aur Adam zaad (human kind) per tujhe  musalat (impose) kardiya

Shaitaan ne Allah se aur maanga

Allah taala ne kha ja agar Adam ki ek aulad hogi to teri 2 do hogi, teri aulad Adam ki aulad se dugni (double) hogi

Shaitaan ne aur maanga,

Allah taala ne kha, Ja aulad e Adam ke seene (chest) mae tera ghar hoga, aur un ke khoon ke saath tu unke tammam jism mae phirta rahega

Shaitaan ne aur maanga

Allah taala ne aur maherbani ki, kha tujhe mae pura moqa de raha hun, tu jaisa chahe Adam ki aulad per hamla kar, tu unke maalaun (money & wealth) mae ghul mil ja, unko jhuta wade karke behlaye rakh halankeh tera wada dhoke ka wada hae

Iblis ne Allah taala se farmaya tu ne mujhe jannat se nikala, mujh per lanat bheji, mujhe badsoorat banaya, mujhe zaleel wa ruswa kiya, mujhe dhutkar diya, mae ne sab suna aur bardasht kiya, tu mujhe bhi kuch ikhteyar de

tu ne aulad e Adam ke liye Rasul bheje, unki hidayat ke liye kitab bheja.

Mera Rasul kaun hoga ?

meri Kitab kiya hogi ?

mera Mauzin (azaan dene wala) kaun hoga ?

Allah taala ne farmaya ;

Tera Rasul kahen hoga (future teller) jo kabhi sach bhi kehte hae aur kabhi jhoot bhi kehte hae bhrose ke qabil hi nahi

Teri kitab woh الوشم tattoos honge

Teri hadees, (saying) jhut gaali galoj, qeebat, ayeb jui (false remarks) hogi,

Teri Qiraat woh shaer goi (songs and verses) gaana bajana hogi

Tera Mauzin woh musical instruments honge (specially baansri)

Teri Masjid woh bazaar honge

Tera ghar woh hammam honge

Tera khana woh, har woh khana hoga jis per "Bismillah" na padha gaya hoga

Tera pina (drink) har woh ches jo nashe wali hogi (intoxicating, alcoholic)

Iblees ne kha mera shikar kaun honge ?

Allah taala ne farmaya woh jahel aurtain (illiterate women) honge

[Hazrat Ziaali saheb muqaddus farmate the keh aurataun ka baal khule rakhna woh "invitation card" hae shaitaan ke liye, hum unko dawat dete hae aisa karne se]

Jab Adam ne dekha ke Shaitaan ki darkhast puri ki ja rahi hae, jiski wajeh se aulad e Adam kuchal di jaegi, aur tabah hojaegi, to Adam ne bhi Allah se ilteja ki,

 Ae Allah teri maddad baqaer mae aur meri aulad shaitaan ke phande se kaise nikal sakenge ?

Allah taala ne tasali dete huve farmaya  

Ae Adam tere har farzand ke saath ek mohafiz muqrar kiya jaega jo usko burai se bachaega (shaed ye uske zameer (conscience) ki taraf ishara hae, (Allah o alam)

Aur tumhari aulad mae jo bhi ek nek kaam karega uska10 guna ziyada sawab wa ajar donga, aur burai aur gunaah per utni hi saza dunga jitna uska gunaah hoga

Adam ne aur maanga to Allah taala ne basharat (khush khabri) di ki ae mera gunahgaar bande to Allah ki rehmat se kabhi bhi mayus aur na umeed na hona

قل يا عبادي الذين اسرفوا علي أنفسهم لا تقنطوا من رحمة الله  

Adam ne kha aur kuch ata kar, to Allah taala ne farmaya ke, sunn tum aur tumhari aulad ki zindagi ke aakhri saans (breath) tak bhi "toba" karne walaun ko maaf kardunga

Adam ne kha Ae mere Rabb aur kuch de

Us waqt Allah Subhanahu wa taala ne farmaya

اغفر ولا أبالي

Mae toba karne wale ko yaqinan maqferat karunga aur koi hisaab bhi nahi rakhunga

Shaitaani quwataun aur was'wasaun se bachne ka tariqa ek hi hae ke apne nafsani khaeshat ko qabu mae rakhe ya tark karde,

Allah taala ko, aur apni maut ko, har lamhe yaad kare

Duniya ki taraf kam se kam raqbat kare

Ahkaam e shariat e Mohammedi ka paband hojae

Allah, Rasul aur waliane Amar ki taat kare

Sach baat hamesha kho agar sunne wale ko kadwi hi kiyu na lage

Ek roti ke tukde per jis se tumhara jism baqi rahe, aur ek kapde ke tukde per jis'se tumhare jism dhap sake usper tum qinaat karo (be satisfied)

Duniya ki mohabbat wa khaesh hargis na karo, kiyunke yehi har gunaah ki buniyaad hae, jo shaqs bhi duniya se be parwah hoga be tawajuh hoga, us per tammam balae aur musibat asaan hojaeinge

  اعوذباللہ من الشيطان الرجيم

Mae panah maangta hun shaitan ne rajeem se

🌿🌸🌿🌸🌿🌸🌿🌸

9/20/15, 8:59:46 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🌹🍀🌹🍀🌹🍀🌹🍀

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Haj ke mausam ki ibteda hochuki, Allah taala un sab ko Mubarak kare jinhune ne Haj se musharaf hone ka irada kiya hae, inshallah hamare ikhwan kal subah 8 Zilhaja ko haram e Baitullah se ahram bandh kar mizaab e Rehmat ke saamne se niyat leker Mina tashreef le'jaeinge

HAJ ke Arabi zabaan mae maane (meaning) qasd ke, irade ke hote hain, magar Islami nukhte nazar se, Baitullah e Shareef ki ziyarat ke liye, Mecca jaana, aur ziyarat e Nabi e kareem se Medine munawara se musharaf hona, aur khaas arkaan jo muqrar hain, uska ada karna, woh "Haj" kehlata hae

Mukhtaser mae arkaan ye hain, Maqsoos din mae Ahram bandh kar Mecce mauzama mae aana, Khane Kaba ka saat martaba tawaaf dena, Safa wa Marwah ke darmiyan saat chakar lagana, 8 zilhaja ko Mina jana aur 9 tareeq ko muqam e Arafat per thedna mumkin ho to jabal e Rehmat per chadhna, 10 wi shab ko Musdalefa mae raat ka guzarna, youme Eid Mina mae, masjid e Kheef mae Eid ki Namaz se aur phir jaisa mumkin ho zabihat se qiyam karna 11, 12, aur 13 Zilhaja Mina mae guzarna aur Jumraun (teen Shaitaan) ko kankar (pebbles) maarna, un tammam ahkamaat aur lawazimat ke saath, jo Shariat e Mohammedi mae hukum aaya hae, unko pura karna "Haj" kehlata hae

Haj ke har amal mae badi badi hikmatain poshida hain, usme zahari aur bateeni wujuhaat poshida hain, har insaan apni aqal wa samajh ke hisaab se usko samajh sakta hae

Ye Haj deen e Islam ka bahut hi ahem rukun hae, jiske mamsool khud Rasulullah ki zaat hae

Haj har ek per farz hae, magar iske bhi kuch sharaet hain, pehli baat istetat ka hona, raaste ka aman (safety) hona, Safar ki taqat hona, zaad e safar yaane safar ke lawazimat ka hona aur apne ahel wa ayaal ke liye guzar basar ka intezam hona (provision for travel and providence for the family back home) tab hi insaan per Haj karna farz hota hae

Baitullah e Haram ki taraf Haj karna insaan ke liye ek bahut badi nek bakhti hae, woh Ambia ki zameen wa Ausia ka muqam hae, ibadat ka muqam hae aur bahut badi saadataun ka hasil hone ka sabbab hae, is muqam se badhkar koi azmat wali jagaah nahi, aasmanaun se fiyuzaat wa barkaat nazil hone ka muqam hae

Haj se musharaf hona aur in muqamat e muqaddusa ki ziyarat karna, insaan ko ek behtreen qalib (shape) mae dhal deta hae, usme har kisim ki umda khaslatain paida hojati hae, hamdardi, amanat dari, khushu wa khusu, sabar, dayanatdari, ya tammam baatain uske Nafs mae Haj ki barkat se paida hoti hae

Allah Tabaraka wa taala ne Ibrahim khaleelullah ko wahi وحي ke zareeyah ye hukum diya tha ke mera ek ghar banao, takeh usme meri ibadat ki jae, Hazrat e Ibrahim khaleelullah samajh na sake keh kahan banae, us waqt Allah taala ne do ruqh (two direction) wali hawa chalai jisko SAKINAT kehte hain, Woh sakinat us muqam per chali jhan Kissi waqt mae Malaeka ملائكة ne Allah ka ghar banaya tha, aur ussi jagah per Ibrahim alehe salaam ne Kabatullah banaya

Hajar e Aswad (black stone) ya Hajar e Asad (mubarak stone) ko janab e Gibrael e ameen ne lakar diya, aur janab Ibrahim ne usse nasab (install) kiya, Ibrahim khaleelullah ka banaya Allah ka ye ghar ek bahut muddat tak raha phir usko Amaeqa (tribe) ne dobara banaya, phir ek muddat ke baad ghar tut gaya, phir qabile "Jurhum" ne banaya aur phir ek baar usko qabile "Quraesh" ne banaya

Moulana Ali ibn abi Talib salawatullah Alehe se riwayat hae ke Rasulullah ne Hujjatul wida (the last Haj of Rasulullah) Arafat ke maidan mae khade hokar logoan ko teen martaba farmaya  "Ae Allah ki jamaat khush amadeed (welcome) tum woh ho jinko maangne per diya gaya, aur jinke kharaj karne ke badle (in return) mae pura diya gaya, aur jinko unke ek, ek, dirham ke badle mae hazar hazar nekiyun se nawaza jata hae

Phir Rasulullah ne logoan se kha ke tum ko ek achi khabar sunau ?

Sab ne kha haan Ae Rasul e khuda

Aap ne irshad farmaya

Ke jab aaj ki raat hoti hae, to Allah taala jo log Arafat per aaye hae unse khush hokar, bade fakher se malaeka ko khitab karta hae, ke "dekho mere in bandaun ko jo duniya ke muqtalif muqamat (from all corners of the world) se mere pas pareshan haal ae hain"

Malaeka ne kha ke woh tujh se apne gunahun ki toba chahte hain

Allah taala farmata hae, ke "ae Malaeka mae tum ko gawah (witness) banata hun ke mae ne un tammam ko maaf kardiya, Ae logoan tum jab is muqam se paltoge (return) to tumhare tammam gunaah maaf kardiye jainge

Rasulullah ne farmaya ke jo shaqs bhi duniya wa aakherat dono chahta hae woh is makan per zaroor ae, jo bhi banda is darwaze per aega aur maange ga, uska sawaal zaroor pura hoga, jo duniya maange ga usko duniya bhi milegi, aur jo aakherat talab karega uski aakhrat behtreen hogi

Phir aap ne farmaya ;

Ae logo Haj wa Umra karte raho, dono Gunahun ko dhokar is tarah saaf kardete hain jis tarah pani gandagi ko saaf kardeti hae, aur fakhiri ko is tarah mita deti hae, khatam kardeti hae, jis tarah aag lohe ke zang (rust) ko bilkul khatam kardeti hae

Allah taala tammam hajiun ko sahet wa salaamti ke saath apne watan, apne ahel wa ayal mae wapas le aa, aur hamari duain unke Haq mae maqbool ho, aur unki duain hum momineen ke haq mae Allah taala qabool farmae

بحق سيدنا ومولانا محمد وعلى آل بيته الطيبين الطاهرين

🍀🌹🍀🌹🍀🌹🍀🌹

Umeed ke aap khairiyat se honge

Aaj aapki zubaida zauje Padshah husain binte mulla Qasim saheb ka din gaya 1374 hijri mae inteqal kiye 45 saal umar thi unki waleda zainab binte Hazrat Fathullah saheb thi, magar unki waleda Hazrat Fathullah saheb ki pehli biwi ka naam nahi malum ho saka

Inshallah ammi se puchunga agar aapko malum hae to batana

Waise Mulla Qasim saheb ko bankok ka amil banaya gaya tha suna hun magar tafseel malum nahi huvi itna janta hun ke woh farsee aur Arabi ke maher the

Allah taala marhuma ko maqferat kare

Khyal aya to aapko likh diya

9/21/15, 10:51:11 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🍀🌺🍀🌺🍀🌺🍀🌺

Salaam alaikum !

Dawat e Hadiya Hind ki, bahut si shaqsiyataun ne badi khidmatain anjam di hae, unme se ek Mukaram wa Mohtaram Alhaj al Aalim, al Aamil Mulla Shafaqat Hussain saheb bhi hain

Mulla Shafaqat Hussain saheb karachi ki jamaat ke sab se pehle Aamil huve, aap ki ek multi faceted shaqsiyat thi, chand hi aise log huve honge jinke inteqal per buzrugaan e deen aur Jamaat ne itni shidat se unki kami ko mahsoos kiya hoga aur unki maut per itna ghum ka ishar huva hoga

Mulla Shafaqat Hussain saheb Bambai ke rahne wale the, aapke walid Sayeeduddin Saheb the aur waleda Rehmat bibi the, aapke ek bhai Mukarram Abbas Ghadiyali saheb the aur bhen allhura Rehana bibi thi

Aap science ke student the aur taalim ke baad aap weights & measures ke government department mae inspector ki naukri ki aur Hindustan ke mukhtalif shaher mae Inspector ki haisiyat se phirte rahe aur phir India aur Pakistan ke partition ke baad aap Karachi chale gaye

Karachi mae pehle aap ne ghadiyau (watches) ki dukan kholi, phir aapne ek dukan shru ki jiska naam tha "Meezan wa Awzan Corporation"

Marhum ki badi khubi ye thi ke aap ne duniya ke karobar ke saath Dawat e Hadiya aur momineen ki bhi bahut badi khidmat anjaam di

Aap deeni uloom ke bade aalim the, aala haqaeq mae bhi acha darak rakhte the (in depth knowledge) Arabi, Farsee, Urdu aur Angrazi zabaan ke maher the behtreen shaer (poet) bhi the, kehte hae ke Syedna Dai Moulana Gulam Hussain Saheb ne aap mae shaeri ka shoq paida kiya tha, aur Hazrat Moulana Almansoob Mohaammed Hussain saheb ne aapka takhalus (pen name) "Naseem" diya aur aapke shayari ke ustad mashoor e zamana shaer "Nazim" the

Shayari ke saath saath aap taqreer wa tahreer (eloquent speaker & profelic writer) mae bhi badi maharat rakhte the, aur aapke likhe huve khutoot (letters) urdu adab aur kitabat ka behtreen naumana hain, aapne hazaraun ki tadad mae letters likhe honge khususan aap ne jo mukaram al Hadd ul Fazil Moulvi Abbas saheb, Mukaram Mulla Ameeruddin saheb, Hazrat Ishak saheb, Hazrat Shakir saheb, Hazrat Nasrullah saheb muqadaseen ke naam per jo likhe the

Aap ka kalaam bhi bahut lateef hota, adabi latifau se mehfil ko khub hansate, to doosre hi lamhe aap science ke mushkil batain samjhate, to kabhi aap Allama Iqbal ke falsafe ke nukaat samjhate, aap ek 'bagh u bahar' tabiyat ke maalik the, barjasta goi aur hazir jawabi mae aapka koi muqabela nahi tha, aap har mehfil mae jaan dal dete

Aapki shaqsiyat (personality) bhi badi shandaar thi, unja (tall) khad, choudi peshani (broad forehead) gandumi rang (wheatish complexion) kali ghani dadhi (black thick beard) hamesha kali sherwani aur sar per kali jinnah cap aankhaun per ainak aur hamesha khush bashash chehra, aur hontaun per muskurahat, aapki personality foran logoan ko mutasir kardeti

Aapne Syedna Dai ke kalemaat e hikmat ko bhi jama kiye hae, aur hamari Dawat ke mashoor, Ilm e Mabda Maad ki kitab jo Arabi ashar mae hae "Simtul Haqaeq" aur doosri kitaab woh bhi ashar mae hi hae "Saf'ul Musafa" dono kitab ka, ashar hi mae urdu tarjuma kiye hain,

Aap ne Hazrat Moulana Ishak Saheb ke hukum se munajaataun ka muntakhib majmua (collection of munajaats " verses " of duwaats  & manaseebs) har bilaad mae aapke haath se likhwakar rakhwaya hain, aaj bhi hum mubarak raataun mae usme se hi munajaat padhte hae

Aap hamesha koi na koi angrezi kitab padhte rahte, 'Time' magazine hamesha aapke haath mae hota magar saath hi saath deen ke haqaeq ki kitab bhi hamesha aapke mutalae (study) mae rahti

Aap ne Dawat ki bahut si Arabi kitabae khud ke haath se naqal (copy) ki hae, aapka behtreen Arabi khat (writing) tha, aur bahut hi tezi (fast) se aap likhte the

Aap ne Urdu shaeri bahut ki hae, aur apne inteqal se kuch hi waqt pehle ek majmua (collection) publish kiya "khandeel Anwaar e khamsatul Athar" jisme naat e Nabi aur Manaqabat e Ali wa Ahle Baet e kiraam hae, jinme se aksar ashar hamari aulad Moharum ke Majalis mae aqeedat ke tor per padhte hain, aapne Syedna Hummam Syedna Sulaiman saheb ki shaan mae bhi bahut ashar likhe hain

Aap ek Aamil ki hasiyat se karachi ke momineen ke badi khidmat ki, jitna mumkin hota unke masael hal karte unko waas wa nasihat karte rahte, taalim ki taraf khas tawjuh karte, apni sab hi aulad ko aala se aala taalim dilwai, aur aulad ne bhi aapka bada naam roshan kiya

Namaz Salaat ke be inteha paband the, aur aksar raat mae tatawaat se bhi qiyam karte, aap inteqal se 15 roz khabal tak masjid mae namaz ki imamat bhi karwai, Karachi ki Masjid e Jamali ki tameer bhi aap hi ki koshish ka natija hae

Aapko badi arzoo thi ki duniyawi masroofiyatain khatam ho to Syedna Dai ke pas Najran jae aur deeni taalim hasil kare, jo Allah ko manzoor na tha

Aap chand din bahut bimar rahe, inteqal ke do roz pehle aap ne apne farzand Mulla DR Inayat Husain, jo baad mae America ke Aamil bhi huve aur mashoor cardiologist bhi the, unko bulakar wasiyat ki aur apne khabar ke liye jagaah bhi batai

Aap shab e Jumua 29 jamadus sani 1386 Hijri mutabiq 18 october1966 AD ko inteqal kiye, aapki paedaesh 8 shahre Rajab 1327 hijri ki thi

aapki inteqal per umar taqriban 59 saal ki thi

Aapki tariq e wafat ka misra (verse), Hazrat Moulana Shakir Saheb ne nikala hae, woh yeh hae

"Dakhil e Jannat huve Shafaqat Hussain"

Allah taala marhum ko Jannaat e aaliyat mae aala se aala muqam ata kare

والحمدلله والصلاة والسلام على محمد الرسول الله صلى الله عليه وآله وسلم

🌺🍀🌺🍀🌺🍀🌺🍀

9/22/15, 12:54:28 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: □■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته   🌹

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم  🌹

ليلة العيد الأضحى و يوم العيد الأضحئ مبارك 🌹

■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□

Jo shaqs ek waqt Haj e Baitullah se musharaf hota hae, phir uske Dil mae dobara, balkeh mutawatir (repeatedly) har saal Haj per jane ki khaesh, paida hojati hae

Agarche ki Mecce Mauzama ki sar'zameen banjar (dry) hae, khud Koran kehta hae ke "qaer e zi zar'a hae" jahan koi chez ki paidawaar nahi, na hi khet hae, na hi darakht, na hi nadi wa na'le, magar phir bhi Allah taala ne aisi jazebiyat (attraction) us muqam mae rakha hae ki har musalman ki khaesh hoti hae ke us mubarak muqam ki ziyarat usko naseeb ho

Kiya hi behtreen manzar hota hae, jab tammam Haji safaed ahram ke kapde pahen kar Haram e Baitullah ka ruq karte hain, dil wa dimaag per ajeeb kaefiyat chah'jati hae, jab ke har Haji TALBIH kehna shru karta hae, aur Mecce ki sar zameen is mubarak alfaz se gunj uthti hae

 اللهم لبيك، لبيك لا شريك لك، لبيك ان الحمد ونعمة لك، والملك لا شزيك لك

Ya bada hi rikhat amez manzar hota hae jab ke lakhaun Haji ek saath talbiha kehta huve Baitullah ki taraf aage badhte hain,

Har Haji ko us waqt tak ye char kalemat 'Talbih' kehte rahna hae jab tak ke woh kabatullah na dekh le

Aur jaise hi Kabatullah ko dekh le usko talbiha khatam karna hae aur ye kehna shru karna hae

لا اله الا الله الله أكبر

 Aur ye Dua bhi padhte jae

    اللهم زد هذا البيت تشريفا وتعظيماوزد من شزفه وعظمته

Ya Allah, to is ghar ki azmat wa sharafat ko aur ziyada kar

In char kalemat e Talbih woh sunnat e Nabawi hae,

Aur Ahle baet e kiraam ne is Dua me aur isafa (additions) kiya hae

لبيك ذالمعارج، لبيك داعيا الي دار السلام، لبيك غفار الذنوب، لبيك مرعوب والمزغوب اليك، لبيك ذوجلال والاكرام، لبيك اله الخلق، لبيك كاشف الكرب

Imam e Jaffar e Sadiq salwatullah alehe farmate hain ke tum har namaz e farz wa sunnat ke baad labaek kho, aur jab tum ko sawari lekar uthe, ya phir tum bulundi per chadho, ya phir wadi mae utro, ya phir jab tum neend se bedar ho

Imam e Jafar e Sadiq farmate hain ke Allah taala tak pohunchne ke jitne bhi raaste hain unme Haj se badhkar koi raasta nahi, siwae iske keh koi shaqs Allah ki raah mae shaheed hojae

Aur imam e Jafar e Sadiq farmate hain ke Allah taala ne Ibrahim alehe salaam per wahi nazil ki

ان طهرا بيتي للطاءفين والعاكفين والركع والسجود

Is ayaat ke nuzul ke waqt Allah taala ne 170 Rahmatain Baitullah e mubarak per nazil ki

 Usme se 60 Tawaf dene walaun ke liye

50 Aakefeen ke liye (aetekaf baithne walaun ke liye)

40 Namaz padhne walaun ke liye

20 Kabatullah ko dekhne walaun ke liye, ye Allah taala ki rahimi aur kareemi hae ke Kabatullah ko sirf dekhne walaun ke liye bhi Rahmatain ata ki hain

Haji ke liye Rasulullah ka qol e mubarak hae, jab tum tamman manasik e Haj ada karlo, ab tum ek imarat bana chuke ho, (ek achi surat ki tashkil de chuke ho, image create kiye ho) isko munhaddim (destroy) na karna, ab tum maazi (past) ki fikar na karo, aur mustaqbil (future) mae nek amal karo

Allah Tabaraka wa taala ka lakh, lakh, shukur wa ahsaan hae, ke usne aise asbab banae hamare gunahaun ki maqferat ke liye

Allah taala hum sabko ye ahem fareeze "Haj" ke ada karne ki tawfeeq de aur uske karne ki iste'taat paida karde

Walid e muqaddus Hazrat Moulana Ziaali Saheb muqaddus ke alfaz kaan mae gunjte hae, Jab bhi aap Haj ke asbaq lete to ye alfaz se bayan ki ibteda karte

"Ek mommin ka inteqal karke, kafan pehen kar khabar mae jana, aur ek Haji ka Ahram ke do kapde pehen kar Haj per jana dono barabar hain"

Allah taala hum ko is hikmat ki baat aur uske peeche poshida raaz, uski haqeeqat se waqif karae takeh hamara zahari Haj, woh batini Haj bhi hojae.

والحمد لله رب العالمين والصلاة والسلام على سيدنا محمد وعلى آله الطيبين الطاهرين وسلم عليهم أجمعين

■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■

9/24/15, 1:05:20 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 💢💦💢💦💢💦💢💦

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته  

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

جمعة مبارك

Ayaam e tashreeq ka doosra roz hae 12 Zilhaja ka, Haji aaj ya phir 13 ko Mina se Haj mukamil karke wapis laut'ta hae

Bayan kiya gaya hae ke Imam Ali e Zainul Abedin ke zamane mae Janab Shibli naam ke shaqs, Haj se musharaf hokar Madine munawara wapis aye, us waqt Imam Alehe salaam, ne janab e Shibli se pujha "kiya ae Shibli tum Haj karke aye ?"

Shibli ne kha ji haan ae farzand e Dukhtar e Rasulallah

Imam ne pucha kiya tum ne Meeqat (jahan hum Ahram pehnte hain) per apne sile (stitched clothes) huve kapde utar kar gusul kiya tha ?

Aur us waqt kiya tu ne niyat ki thi ke gunahaun ke kapde utarkar, taat ke kapde pehen raha hun ?

Shibli ne kha, ji nahi ae Moula aisa to nahi kiya

Phir imam ne pucha kiya tu ne sille (stitched) huve kapde utarte huve ye irada kiya tha keh, tu Riya, (dikhawa) Nifaq, (dil mae kuch zabaan per kuch) Shukook wa Shubhaat se apne aap ko dur kar raha hae ?

Kiya tu ne Ghusul karte waqt ye niyat ki thi ke khata'aun aur gunahaun se puri tarah pak kar raha hae

Shibli ne kha ji nahi ae Moula

Phir Imam ne kha Kiya tu ne Haj ki niyat karte waqt yeh niyat ki thi ke Allah taala ke siwae jo kuch bhi tere Dil mae aqeeda tha woh nikal diya hae

Kiya tum ne Meeqat per do rakat namaz padhte waqt ye niyat ki thi ke tum namaz jo sab se behtreen amal hae, aur bahut hi badi neki hae Tum uske zareeyeh Allah taala se qurbat (closeness) hasil kar rahe ho

Kiya tu, Talbih kehte waqt ye niyat ki thi ke ainda, tu har baat, Allah ki taat mae khega, aur har (masiyat) gunaah ki baat per chup rahega ?

Kiya tu Haram e Baitullah mae dakhil hote waqt ye niyat ki thi ke ainda tu kissi ki qibat (backbiting) aur na peeth peeche burai karega ?

Tum ne Hajar Aswad ko chuma, woh aisa hi hae jaisa ke tum ne Allah taala se musafah kiya hae, aur is musafe ke saath tum ne ek mohaida (agreement) kiya aur tum yaad rakho ke haram kamai se us agreement ko tod na do

Kiya tu saei (Safa wa Marwa ke darmiyan chalna) karte waqt ye niyat kiya tha keh tu gunahaun se bhaag kar Allah taala ki taraf panah leta hae

Kiya tu ne Safa wa Marwah ke darmiyan chala aur bhaga bhi ?

Kiya tu ne us waqt ye khyal kiya, keh tu Raza e Elahi aur khoof e Bari taala ke darmiyan chal raha hae

Shibli ne kha nahi ae Moula aisa to nahi khyal kiya tha

Ae Shibli kiya tum Zamzam ke kuwe (well) per gaye the, aur kiya wahan ka pani piye the ?

Kiya tu ne Zamzam ka pani pete waqt ye aqd e niyat (firm commitment) ki thi keh, tu apne Dil se was'wasau aur bad'gumaniyun ko nikal dega, aur tu Haram Pinne ki chezaun se bachega

Shibli ne badi mayusi ke saath kha ke ji nahi ae Moula ye Sab to mae ne nahi khyal kiya tha

Imam ne kha ae Shibli kiya tu Mina ke maidan mae gaya tha ?

Shibli ne kha, haan ae Moula

Imam ne farmaya Kiya tu Mina ke maidan mae, ye niyat ki thi keh tu logoan ko apni Dil, zabaan, haath, se, Aman wa Amaan mae rakhega

Kiya to ne Arafat ke maidan mae, jabal e Rehmat per chadha ?

Shibli ne kha haan ae Moula mae Arafat per gaya tha

Kiya ae shibli tu Arfe ke Maidan mae khada hokar ye qor kiya, ke Allah taala ki marefat tammam uloom (knowledge) mae sab se aala aur badhkar hae, aur kiya tu ne us waqt ye yaqeen hasil kiya ke tera Sahife Aamal, (record of deeds) Allah taala ke qabse aur qudrat mae hae, aur woh tere zameer ki poshida baataun se bhi waqif aur ba'khabar hae

Aur ae Shibli kiya tu ne Jabal e Rehmat per chadhte huve, ye niyat aur irada kiya tha, ke tu har mommin mard aur aurat per rahem karega, har muslim mard wa aurat se mohabbat wa ulfat karega

Kiya tu ne Musdalefa per raat guzari aur wahan se kankar (pebbles) chun kar uthaya, kiya tu ne us waqt ye azm aur irada kiya tha ke tu har masiyat (gunaah) jahalat aur bekar ilm aur bure amal se apne aap ko dur rakhega

Aur kiya tu jumraun (3 shaitaan) ko marte waqt ye aqeeda rakha tha ke tu tere dushman Iblees ko maar raha hae

Aur kiya tu ne sar mundate waqt ye aqeeda rakha ke, ab tere sa're gunaah maaf hogae, aur ab tu aisa hi be gunaah hogaya jaisa ke tu apni paedaesh ke waqt tha

Is tarah Imam ne sa're arkaan e Haj aur Mauqaf (places where Haji had to stop for certain deeds) bayan kardiye, aur har baat per janab e Shibli afsoos karte rahgae, aur kehte rahe, Ae Imam, mae ne aisa tu niyat nahi kiya aur aisa aqeeda nahi rakha

Imam ne kha, na tu ne, na ahram bandha, na hi tawaf kiya, na hi sa'ee ki, na muqam e Ibrahim per namaz padhi, na hi Hajar e Aswad ko chuma, na Mina gaya, na Arafat per gaya, na hi jumraun ko mara na hi sar mundwaya,

Ae Shibli tu ne in tammam arkan ko ada hi nahi kiya, ja palat ja, tu ne to HAJ hi nahi kiya

Janab e Shibli ne apni sari kothaiyun (mistakes) per bahut azurda huve, bahut afsoos kiya, bahut roye aur phir Imam Alehe Salaam ke pas taleem hasil karke dobara doosre saal pure yaqeen aur marefat ke saath Haj e maqbool ada kiya

Allah taala humko bhi woh marefat ata ho jo Shibli ne hasil ki, takeh hamara bhi Haj e maqbool ho

(Khabre Shibli Hazrat Moulana Almansub syedi Abdullah saheb ata'lallahu baqa'hu ne Arabi se urdu tarjuma kiya tha jo kitab ki shakal mae print bhi huvi thi (booklet form) mae, aur mansak e Haj mae bhi moujud hae  

Allah taala aapko sahet wa aafiyat se rakhe aur aapka saya hum per daras kare, aur humko dono manaseeb e kiraam ki taat mae rakhe

9/26/15, 1:26:31 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🍁🍁🍁🍁🍁🍁🍁🍁

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Aaj 18 shawal ul kareem hae aur kal 19 Shawal ul kareem ko ek jaleel ul qadar Mansub e Mukaram ka youm e wafat (death anniversary) hae, aapka san e wafaat (year) 1330 Hijri hae

Hazrat Moulana Ziaali saheb muqaddus ibne Almansub Moulana Sheikh Ibrahim bin Sabah Ali saheb ki wiladat 12 Jamadil Awal 1259 hijri mae huvi

Aapke walid Mansub e waqt the, aur waleda alhura al fazela Shareefunisa ibne Mulla Turab Ali ibne Syedna Dai Moulana Izzat Ali saheb (Dai e qaer munfareed) ki beti thi, jo badi aalema, fazela aur mafzuha thi, aap teen saal Najran mae apne farzand ke saath rahi aur wahan aurarataun ko aur duwat ki aswaj ko namaz padhati thi

Hazrat Almansub Sheikh Ibrahim saheb ne 1275 Hijri mae Apne Farzand moulana Ziaali saheb ki shaadi apni bhetiji Salehunisa se hyderabad mae kardi aur uske baad hi Hyderabad ko chod kar Barode mae mustaqil (permanent) qiyam ke liye ahle khandaan ke saath irada kiye, aur apne muqam mae, Hyderabad mae Hazrat Moulana Farhat Ali saheb ko tammam hudood e Dawat mae fauq (promote) kardiya

Sheikh Ibrahim saheb Barode mae hi teen saal qiyam kiye aur phir 4 Jamadil Awal 1278 mae 54 saal umar mae inteqal kiye

Hazrat Moulana Ziaali saheb muqaddus ki umar 15/16 saal ki thi jab aap walid ke saath Baroda aaye the, aap us waqt "Hafiz e Quran" ho chuke the, aapki Barode mae teen saal tak musalsil aapke walid aur awaam ke uloma ke pas taleem hoti rahi

Walid ke inteqal ke baad aap ahle khandaan ke saath Hyderabad wapis a'gae, teen saal aapke bahut saqt guzre phir aapne 1281 Hijri mae khud ki dukan khole

Waise aapke walid ki bhi ek waqt tak tijarat (business) thi jo khatam hochuki thi, jo us zamane ki bahut hi mashoor kapde ki dukan thi,

Hazrat moulana Sheikh Ibrahim saheb ki tijarat ki khaas baat yeh thi keh aap apne karobar mae appropriation of profits mae do accounts maintain karte the ek musaferat khata, (travellers account) jisse aap za'ereen e Syedna Hummam ke khane pine aur rahne ka khyal rakhte the, aur doosra account 'Nasrallah', 'Fathullah', jisse aap jamaat ki aur Dawat shareef ki maddad farmate (from the personal income of his business)

Isiliye Jamaat e Baroda ne jab Hazrat Moulana Ziaali saheb ko mansubiat ki tahniyat (Mubarakbad) pesh ki to aapke walid ke liye usme likha tha, keh aaapke walid HATIM E WAQT the, jinhune deen ke alawa duniyavi umur (matters) mae bhi apni zaati karobar ki aamdani (income) ko apne ahel wa ayal,(family) rakhte huve bhi jamaat ke ikhwan ke liye kharj kardali

Hazrat Moulana Ziaali saheb 3 teen saal apne chote bhai Saeedudin ki shirakat (partnership) mae karobar kiye, magar aapka mansha (aim) walid ki tarah Dawat ki khidmat ka tha, waise aapki deeni taleem Hazrat moulana Farhat Ali saheb ke pass bhi jari rahi

1284 mae Mansub waqt Hazrat Moulana Farhat Ali saheb ki ijazat se Dai Syedna Hasan bin Ismail ki khidmat mae Hijrat (travelled for education) farmaye, aapke saath, aapki waleda Mohtarama Shareefunisa aur aapke Mamu Alhadd ul Fazil Mulla Qasim saheb aur do ikhwan the

Aap teen saal Dai ki khidmat mae Ilm hasil farmaye, 1287 mae Hazrat Almansub Moulana Farhat Ali saheb Haj per tashreef le gaye us waqt hazrat Ziaali saheb bhi aapke saath pehla Haj kiye, wapasi mae Hazrat Farhat Ali saheb Syedna Dai ki khidmat mae gaye aur us waqt mohajereen, Moulana Ziaali saheb bhi aapke saath hi the aur aap hi ke saath Hindustan bhi wapas huve

Syedna Saheb ne tammam Hujjaj aur mohajereen ko hadiye waqera diye, laikin hazrat Ziaali Saheb ko kuch na diya, magar Hazrat Almansub Farhat Ali saheb ko ek bandh lifafa diya aur kha ke ye lifafa Hindustan mae, isteqbali majlis (welcome function) mae sabke saamne kholna

Hindustan mae Hazrat Almansub Moulana Farhat Ali saheb ne Jamaat ki majlis mae lifafa khola to us mae Hazrat Moulana Ziaali Saheb Muqaddus per "Nas e Mansubiat" thi

Aap 27 saal ki umar mae 1287 Hijri taqreeben 1870 AD mae Mansub Hind wa Sindh muqrar kiye gae.

Aap Arabi zabaan per zabardast ubur (mastery) rakhte the, aap ne 1306 Hijri mae Syedna Dai Ahmed bin ismail ke inteqal per ek 72 ashar ka marsiya likha tha jiska kuch ashar tabruk ke tor per pesh hae

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

له ملك ينادي كل يوم

لدوا للموت وانبوا للزوال

Har insaan ke liye ek farishta hae jo usko har din pukarta hae

"Paida ho marne ke liye aur banao zawal ke liye"

امانيها جميعا قل سراب

بحاري الظماء درك المحال

Keh do keh duniya ki tammam tammanain, (desires) khaeshat, woh saraab (mirage) ki tarah hain

Jisme piyasaun ka sairaab hona na mumkin baat hae

وفئ حيواتها ظل غرور

وظل العمر ينقبض الظلال

Duniya ki zindagi ka saya dhoke ka saya hae

Umar ka saya dhire dhire dhal raha hae

فهو أن طلت الأيام فيها

فما منها لنا غير ارتحال

Farz karlo ke zamana (zindagi ka) kitna lamba bhi hojae

Magar humko ye duniya chod kar, ek din zaroor jana hi hae.

Aapka Arabi khat (writing) bahut khubsurat thi, uske do namune (sample) mazmun ke saath tabaruk ke tor per pesh hae

Inshallah aapka zikar e mubarak aur bhi hoga......................

9/26/15, 1:26:32 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🍂🍂🍂🍂🍂🍂🍂🍂

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Zikre mubarak ho raha tha Moulana Almansub Hazrat Ziaali Saheb ibne Almansub Sheikh Ibrahim saheb Muqaddus ka

Hazrat muqaddus bahut zabardast aalim the, Arabi aur Farsee zabaan per bahut ubur (mastery) hasil tha, aap aur aapke chote bhai Mukaram Saeedudin saheb Hafiz e Quran the, aur taqiyatan (to hide ones aqeeda from sunni muslim) aap awaam ki Chowk ki masjid mae taraweeh ki Namaz bhi padhate the, aap bahut hi khush khat (excellent calligrapher) the, aur behtreen Qari e Quran the

Aap ne do kitabain aala haqaeq (batini Ilm) mae tasneef (authored) ki hain, "ATIYE RABANIA" aur "DURRAR UL KHUDSIA" in mae ki pehli kitab Najran mae darsan padhate hae (in the course prescribed for mohajereen & other students)

Kitab "Zia ul Akhbaar" Tariq e manaseeb (history of the indian manaseeb) bhi aap hi ne Arabi aur Urdu mae likhi huvi hae

Aap ne taqriban apni puri zindagi ka, roz ka ahwal qalam band kiya hae (had written), uske alawa aapke be shumaar Arabi khuttut (letters) hain jo aap ne Duwaat ko likhe hae aur Duwaat ki taraf se aapko mile hain, us zamane ke bade bade awaam ke uloma ko aap likhte the (aur aap khud hi uske copies apne haath se likh kar record rakhte the), aur jiske jawab aapko milte the, jinme Dawoodi qom ke Dai Najmuddin ke bhi khutut hain

Aap Arabi mae behtreen Shayeri bhi karte the aapka Syedna Ahmed bin Ismail ke inteqal per Syedna Abdullah bin Ali ko jo taziyati ashar likhe the, bahut hi shandar 72 sher ka qasida hae jisme aapne is duniyavi zindagi ki be subati (temporary life) aur aakhrat ki hameshgi ki zindagi ki madah (praise) mae likhi hae, jiske chand ashar mae ne kal likha tha

Aap ne Mubarak Raataun mae padhne ke liye ek Dua bhi likhi hae, jo keh hamare Sahifatus Salaat mae page number 360 per moujud hae jo aksar washiqaun mae aur mubarak raataun mae padhi jati hae

Hazrat Muqaddus ka dosra Haj Janab Mulla Tayab Ali bin Miyan khan (father of Badruddin Tayabji saheb) ke saath huva, jinhune apne istefade ilmi (deen ki taleem hasil karne) ke liye aapko Haj per saath liye aur dauran e safar aapke pas uloom e Dawat ke sabaq padhte rahe, aur baad mae aap ne Ilm e Mabda Maad jo aap ne padha tha, usko farsee zabaan mae kitab ki shakal di thi

Hazrat muqaddus ki chand roza sohbat aur taleem se Janab Badruddin Tayabji saheb Bambai mae "Badr Bagh" jaisi property Jamaat e Sulaimani ke liye Waqf kardi (donate)

Hazrat muqaddus bahut se funoon (art) se waqif the, Ilme Jaffar ke aalim the, aapke taweez bhi mashoor the, us zamane ke bade bade Hakim (doctor of unani medicine) se aapke dostana taluqat the, Hakim 'kale' aur Hakim 'Nabina' (blind) aapke khaas milne walaun mae se the jo us waqt ke bahut mashoor hakim the, aap khud bhi Hikmat mae kafi malumat rakhte the

Jild sazi (book binding) aqeeq (agate) per likhne ka fun (art) aur sab se badhkar to ALCHEMY jisko ilme kimiya kehte hae, usse bhi aap waqif the

aap ne awaam ke uloma ke darmiyan Chowk ki masjid mae, Alchemy mumkin hae kehte huve challenge qabool kiya tha, aur ne usko kar'kar bhi bataya, aap ne awaam ke Uloma ko ye kha tha ke jo "Mutaqi" hae, woh zaroor ye karsakta hae, aur masjid ke sahen (courtyard) se kuch jhad ke patte tode haath mae 2 copper coins ko liye aur kuch Dua padhkar mas'le (rubbed) woh dono copper coins,  silver coins mae convert hogae, aaj bhi hamare pas ek coin maujud hae

Aapki, us zamane ke bade, bade uloma se mulaqat thi aur woh bhi aapke Ilm wa Fazal ki badi khadar karte, jinme Shia Aalim Moulana Shustari saheb, Aga Khan, Dawoodi Dai Najmuddin, Deoband ke Madrese ke Moulvi Qasim saheb, inke alawa Nizam e Hyderabad ke pass aapki badi khadar thi aur hukumat ki taraf se har mehfil mae aapko bulaya jata, Nawab Salarjung se bhi aapke khreebi taluqat the

Aap ne 1304 Hijri mae Ahmedabad mae, Syedna Ahmed bin Ismail ke naam se "Madrese Ahmediya" qaem kiya, aur uske Sadar Mudaris (Head Master) Moulvi Yaqoob Ali Saheb Muqaddus ko muqrar kiya,

Is madrese se bade, bade, talib e Ilm faiz pa'kar dawat ki badi khidmat anjaam di, jinme Faiz Mohammed saheb Nizami, Mulla Fakhruddin Saheb Halim (Mulla Ameeruddin saheb Muqaddus ke walid, Surat) Hazrat Moulana Shakir Saheb Muqaddus, Mukarram ustad e mohtaram moulvi Akbar saheb, ye tammam Madrese Ahmedia ke Shagird rahe hain

Allah taala in tammam marhumeen ko muqaddus kare, apni Rehmat mae aala se aala muqam ata kare, Ameen  !

Aaj aapke inteqal ka din hae aapke roze mubarak aur khabre shareef ki kuch tasaveer bhej raha hun takeh aap bhi qaebana tor per ziyarat ka sharaf hasil karsake

Allah taala Hazrat muqaddus ke nazraat aur taidaat hum sab per jari rakhe

Inshallah Hazrat Ziaali saheb ka aur bhi bayan hae...............

9/26/15, 1:26:33 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ●○●○●○●○●○●○●○●○●○●○●

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Zikar ho raha tha Moulana Almansub Hazrat Ziaali Saheb Muqaddus ka.........

 Aap ne Madrese Ahmediya qaem karne ke baad ek aala taleem ka madd (higher education fund) qaem kiye ye fund Rs 10000 / = ke corpus se establish huva jisme aap ne Rs 1000 /=  zaati diye aur badi raqam Rs 5000 /= Alhaj Mulla Gowhar Ali Palijwala ne ata ki aur ikhwan ne shirkat ki

Aap hi koshish se Bambai mae "Zakhira" ki committee qaem huvi, jo jamaat ke aur khandaan wale (Badi wale) yane tayabjees fathehallyes waqaera bhi us committee mae shammil the

Syedna Ali bin Syedna Sulaiman Saheb ka Roze mubarak aap hi ke haath per tameer huva  

Jamaat e Baroda mae 130 saal pehle aapko tahniyat pesh karte huve likha tha;

"Aap har saal itni dur se hum ikhwan ki khabar giri ke liye tashreef la'te hain, ye aisa ahsaan hae hum per jiske shukriye se hum kabhi sabok'dosh (exempt) nahi hosakte, aap ne ikhwan ke liye jo jamaat khana tameer kiya hae usme aap ne apne zaati khataun (accounts) mae se Rs 6000 / =  ki maqul (substantial) raqam (amount) kharj ki hae, yeh itni badi raqam hae ke filhal hum mae se koi ek to kiya sab milkar bhi kharj karne se dur hain"

Us zamane mae "Indian National Congress" establish ho chuki thi aur Badruddin Tayabji saheb active member the, aur 3rd Madras session ko preside kiya tha, shaed aap hi ke dawat per Hazrat Ziaali saheb muqaddus bhi 14th Madras session 1898 mae shareek huve the, aapko badi izzat aur karamat mili thi, uski ek tasveer mae, aap saamne hi baithe the, us photograph se kisi ne painting kiya hae, jo aaj moujud hae, Hazrat ki ye ek hi tasveer moujud hae

Is tasveer mae congress ke members hain aur Altaf Hussain Hali (Musaddas e madd O Jazr e Islam ke author aur poet) bhi hae jo kheda hokar taqreer kar rahe hain,

Is painting mae Hazrat muqaddus hare (green) rang ka jalaya aur sufaed Amama pehne baithe hain, aur Dadabhoy Navroji aur Badruddin Tayabji saheb bhi moujud hain magar identify nahi huve, tasveer mazmun ke saath bhej raha hun    

Hazrat ne teesra Haj aapki ahliya Alhaja Salehunisa ke saath 1292 hijri mae kiya

Hazrat ne 4 chotha Haj aur aapki doosri Hijrat saath mae farmaya, aap Hindustan se 13 rajab 1303 ko nikle, Is Haj, wa Hijrat mae aapke saath Syedna Dai Gulam Husain saheb bhi the, jo us waqt 27 saal ke the aur aapke bhai Saeedudin saheb, Moulvi Yaqoob Ali Saheb Muqaddus, Mulla Vali Mohammed saheb (walid Hazrat Shakir Saheb) aur aapke farzand Haji Mohammed Ibrahim saheb saath the

Aap is safar mae Badr Yemen (jo us waqt markaz e dawat tha) mae pohunchte hi aapki tabiyat bahut khraab hogai, aap ne Syedna Dai se ilteja ki keh aap, ya to sahet yaab hojain aur Haj naseeb ho, ya phir Allah mujhe apni Rehmat mae le, Syedna Dai roz aapke liye Dua farmate, magar aapki tabiyat bheter na hoti, phir ek roz Syedna Saheb ne farmaya ke mae aaj ek aise shaqs ko aapke pas Dua ke liye bhejunga jiski Dua Allah ki bargaah mae kabhi radd (reject) nahi hoti hae

Syedna Dai ne us Waqt ustad Syedi Saleh bin Rukbaan ko bheja jinhune bahut si Duain wa Munajaat aapke sirhane baithkar padhi, aapki Dua maqbool huvi, aap kuli tor per sahet pae aur Hazrat Ziaali saheb muqaddus Haj ke safar per rawana hosake

Hazrat Ziaali saheb ne Syedi Saleh bin Rukbaan se daryaft farmaya, ke aap ne konsi Munajaat padhi thi jo itna tez asar huva aur sahet hasil huvi

Syedi Saleh ne farmaya ke ye Syedna Hasan Bin Hibathullah ki tazmeen, Moulana Ameer ul Momineen Moulana Ali ibn abi Talib ki mashoor munajat

ان الامور وان ضاقت لها فرج

Per thi, us waqt Hazrat ne woh munajat hasil karli, aur Hazrat Ishak saheb ke zamane mae jab Sahifatus Salaat print huve to us munajaat ko Hazrat ne Sahife mae shammil karliya

Ye munajaat page number 674 per hae jis ka pehla shaer hae

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

قل للذي امتلءت من همه مهج

إذ عاقها عن مناها البوس والحرج  

 Ye ek behtreen munajaat hae hum wa ghum ko dur karne ke liye aur halaat ki kushadgi ke liye

Allah taala humko is munajaat ke padhna ki aur barkataun ko hasil karne ki tawfeeq de aur uske maane aur mafhum samajhne ki qabiliyat ata kare

9/26/15, 1:26:33 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ■●■●■●■●■●■●■●■●■●■●■

السلام علیکم و رحمة الله و بركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

جمعة مبارك

Zikar jari hae, Hazrat Moulana Ziaali saheb muqaddus ka,

Hazrat ne chotha 4th Haj apni bimari se, Syedi ustad Saleh bin Rukban ki Dua se shifa hasil karke mukamil kiya

Hazrat 1310 mae, us waqt ke Dai Syedna Alfakhri Abdullah bin Ali ke naam se Hyderabad mae ek Madresa "Fakhriya" qaem kiya, jisme Hind, Sind aur Yemen ke log padhne ke liye aate, is Madrese ki puri zimmedari Syedna wa Moulana Gulam Husain saheb wa Hazrat moulana Fathullah saheb ke ziimme thi

Bahut se Sindh wa Yemen ke talib e ilm ko Hazrat Moulana Fathullah saheb ne apne hi ghar mae thedaya tha

Aap apne bhai ki partnership mae kapde ka karobar karte aur Allah ne karobar mae badi barkat bhi ata ki thi, dukan ka naam "Haji Ziaali Haji Saeedudin" tha jo char kaman hyderabad mae thi

Hazrat Moulana Farhat Ali saheb aur aap ne Choti Sara mae 1310 mae ek Jamaat khana banaya, issi jagaah per Jamaat ke tammam taqareeb bhi hote, aur ye jamaat khana "Farhat Bagh" ke naam se mashoor hogaya kiyunke Hazrat Moulana Farhat Ali saheb ne us imarat ke saamne ki khuli jagaah mae bahut acha bagh lagaya tha is bagh ki dekh raekh aur pani dalna sab Hazrat Moulana Farhat Ali saheb khud hi farmate

1314 hijri mae Hazrat Ziaali Saheb Muqaddus ne apne farzand ki shaadi bahut hi aala paimane per ki, tammam bilad se Hudood e Dawat tashreef laye the, us waqt bhi Hazrat ne scholarships ke liye ek Fund qaem kiya jisme Gowhar Ali Fayaz Ali saheb ne 5 hazaar diye aur Hazrat ne apni aulad ke naam se ek hazaar rupae diye

1314 hijri mae purre Hindustan mae qhet (famine) hogaya bohut hi burre halaat hogae the, aap ne bahut koshish se Bambai ki jamaat se 7000 /= rupae jama kiye aur apni waleda Shareefunisa ke taraf se ek hazar rupae diye jisse ghreebaun ki bahut maddad hosaki

1316 mae Hazrat ke chote (younger) bhai Haji Saeedudin saheb ka achanak inteqal huva jiska aap ne bahut sadma liya

1317 hijri shab e Ashoora aap ki dukhtar Safia Zauje Syedna Gulam Husain saheb muqaddus ka inteqal huva, doosre roz tadfeen ke baad aap'ne Ashoore ki majlis ki, us waqt saqt taqia tha aur us zamane mae awaam ke bahut bade bade log majalis mae shareek hote, aap us roz ghum se bahut mutasir the, jab mimber per baith kar majlis ki to 3 khulofa (caliphs) ke khilaf bahut kha, aur us waqt kisi ki himmat aur juraat nahi huvi ki aapko rok sa'ke, ek awaam ke sunni aalim jiske haath mae ek talwaar thi uth kheda huve aur kha ke "aap kisko bura aur ghalat keh rahe hain", Aap ne usko bahut josh mae kha, ke ae shaqs tu baith ja, mae ne Rasulallah ka kalema padha hae teeno khalifa ka nahi, woh aapke jalal aur ro'ab se ghabra kar khamoosh baith gaya, ye aapki juraat aur himmat saalaun tak log yaad karte rahe

Barode mae aap hi ne teen Duwat ka Roza banaya jisme ek janib Syedna Izzat Ali bin Mohammed Husain saheb hain, darmiyaan mae aapke Walid Sheikh Ibrahim saheb hain aur doosri janib Sindh ke Mansub Abdul Halim Multani hain

Ahmedabad mae Syedna Hummam ke roze ki peeche ka kamra bhi aap hi ka banaya huva hae

Ahmedabad ki Haveli aapke walid Hazrat Sheikh Ibrahim saheb ne zaati raqam se khreed kar waqf farmadi thi, aap ne phir usko todkar naye sirre se tamir kiya aur usme zaereen ke rahne ke liye kamre banaye

Hazrat muqaddus ne hi us  zamane mae pehli waqt logoan ko Arabi, Adab (literature) falsafa, hadees, tafseer ki taleem ke liye Deoband ke Madrese bhejne ka intezam kiya, jinme Syedna Gulam Husain saheb, Hazrat Fathullah saheb, Moulvi Yaqoob Ali Saheb jakar taleem hasil ki

Hyderabad mae sheher e Ramazan mae Iftari ke shorbe ka bhi intezam 1308 Hijri se aap hi ki taraf se ibteda huvi aur hota aya, aur Allah taala ka Fazal hae keh chand saal ke waqfe (gap) ke baad aap hi ke khandaan ki taraf se hota hae

Hazrat ka bahut bulund khad (height) tha, bhut surq (reddish) rang tha, Chehre per bahut jalal tha, aankhoon mae qaer mamuli chamak thi, aur awaaz bahut hi roobdar aur dab'dabe wali thi, aap paidal chalne ke bahut ziyada aadi the, aur Moula Ali ke pahad paidal Shia uloma ko milne jate  (Hyderabad mae ek pahad hae jahan Shia log kehte hain ke Moulana Ali ke haath ka nishaan hae, Bahut unchai per hae, aur fiza bahut achi hae, khadim se manaseeb wahan tafreeh ke liye jate rahe jo taqriban ghar se 18 km hae Hazrat Moulana Qassam saheb ki "Nas" bhi wahan kholi gai thi)

Aap Yemen mae Zaidi qom ke aalimaun se bahut behaz ki aur unko lajawab kardiya

Hazrat Qibla ke pas ek naukar tha, jiska ek chota bacha bhi tha, woh bacha ek waqt bahut shararat kiya to aap ne usko gusse mae danta (scolded) aur tamacha maarna chaha woh bacha gadbad mae lakdi ki sidhi (wooden stairs) se first floor se neeche ground floor tak gir gaya, us waqt aap ne farmaya ke "Ye bacha jitna uper se neeche gira hae utna hi zindagi mae neeche se oper aega" aur huva bhi aisa hi, woh aap hi ki sarpasti mae behtreen taleem hasil kiya aur hyderabad ke "electricity Board"  ka first chief engineer bana, aur jab hyderabad shaher mae electrification shru huva to unhune Hazrat Ziaali saheb ke farzand ke makan ko sab se pehle electric provide kiya, aur hamesha qadar karte aur kehte ke Hazrat ki ek maar ne meri zindagi hi badal di, unka naam Arif tha, aur unka Hazrat Ishak saheb ke zamane tak taluq tha

Hazrat Moulana Almansub Farhat Ali saheb ka inteqal 1324 Hijri mae huva, uske baad Syedna Dai ne Syedna Gulam Husain saheb ko Mansub muqrar kiya

Aap ki 1327 se sahet khrab rahne lagi Dawat aur Jamaat ke aksar intezamat Syedna Gulam Husain saheb aur Hazrat moulana Fathullah saheb ke supurd kardiye the

1229 mae Hazrat ne Shujuauddin saheb Sufi ko jo Bambai mae Anjuman E Islam high school mae padhate the unko hyderabad madrase fakhriya ki sadarat pesh ki, aur aapne usko qabool kiya

Shujauddin Sufi saheb Madrese Fakhriya mae Angrazi, Farsee aur Urdu padhate aur kuch ibtedai Arabi bhi aap hi padhate

1330 hijri, Shawal mae Hazrat ki tabiyat bahut khrab hogai tammam bilad se sab hudood e kiraam tashreef le aye Moulvi Yaqoob Ali Saheb Muqaddus bhi aagaye, Syedna Gulam Husain saheb Sindhi ke dawre per the, aapko bhi bulaliya gaya

19 shawal 1330 hijri ko aap inteqal kiye, Allah taala Muqaddus kare aapki rooh e pak ko

Aapke janaze mae, Jamaat ke alawa, awaam ke aur Dawoodi ashaab bhi bahut ziyada shareek huve

Hazrat Muqaddus ke Farzand Mukarram Alhaj Ibrahim saheb ne Ajmer ke karigaraun (marble workers) ke zareeyah bahut hi khubsurat safeed sang e marmar ka roza tameer karwaya, jo1333 hijri mae mukamil huva

Aur Syedna Moulana Gulam Husain saheb ne bahut hi behtreen ashar aapki shaan mae likhe hain woh aapke roze mubarak per likhae gae jo Mulla hakim Gayasuddin saheb (pote Syedna Izzat Ali saheb) ne apne haath se likha hae

Allah taala in tammam buzrugaane deen ko jannaat e aaliyat mae aala se aala muqam ata kare aur hum per unke nazraat jari rakhe

Hamare liye unki zindagiyaun mae ibrat wa sabaq hae   

وأخردعوانا والحمد لله رب العالمين

•••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••

Aapke zamane ke chand post cards ki tasveer bhej raha hun, aap itne mashoor the ke address mae sirf aapka naam aur hyderabad Deccan likha hota to letters miljate
