9/26/15, 1:26:33 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ✨✨✨✨✨✨✨✨

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Hazrat Moulana Ziaali ibne Hazrat Ishak saheb muqaddus apne Hijrat ke roz naamche (travelogue) mae Syedna Ali bin Hussain Almakrami ke ek khawab aur uski tabeer (interpretation) ka ajeeb waqae ka zikar farmae hae.

Ye waqae Syedi Abdullah bin Hameed jo mansub e Najran the unhune walid ko sunaya tha

Ek raat Syedna Dai Ali bin Hussain Almakrami ne ek khawab dekha aur aur us khawab mae aap ne "Hisne Mansoora" jo ek bada compound hae, jisme hamari Dawat ki badi masjid aur doosre imarat hain, uske do bade gates hain, woh aap ne khawab mae dekha, ke dono gates tut kar zameen per gir gae hain (saw it in dream that both the gates had broken & fallen down)

Jab aap subah shafa ke waqt bedaar huve to aap ke angothi (finger ring) ka nag (gem) tut gaya tha (had broken)

Us waqt aap ne Syedna Hussain bin Hasan jo hudood mae se the aur ainda Dai huve, unko bulaya aur azurda (sorrowfully) hote huve unse khawab ka farmaya aur kha ke is khawab ki "tabeer" (interpretation) mae ne ye li hae ke "aaj raat meri Dawat ke do bade hudood inteqal kiye hain"

Phir aapne farmaya Syedi almansub Hameed, aur Syedi Almansub Abdus Samad jo Yemen ke do alag alag muqam ke Mansub the inteqal kiye

Syedna Hussain bin Hasan (jo us waqt Dai nahi huve the) ne farmaya ke kiye unke farzand Abdullah ko khabar di jae ? To aap ne mana farmaya ke shaam tak tar (telegram) se khabar miljaegi, abhi mat khabar karo, magar aap ne un dono ke liye koran kareem ka khatam farmaya, aur Fateha padhi

Koran e kareem bahut se muqam per "khawab" ka zikar kiya hae, khawab ke liye teen muqtalif alfaz koran e kareem mae istemal mae aye hae

Ek "manaam منام aya hae, ek lafz "ruya" روياء aur ek lafz, Asqaaz o ahlam أضغاث أحلام aya hae, teeno alag alag maanaun mae hae, pehla aur doosra to bareek se farq ke saath khawab (dream) ke maane mae hae, "Ruya" ko hum "vision" bhi keh sakte hain aur Asqaz O ahlam woh jhute khawab ke liye aya, yane shaitaan ke was wase se aate hain.

Koran mae khawab ki bahut si misaal ayi hain

Surre Anfaal mae Allah taala ne Islami fauj ko Mushrekeen ke fauj ko khawab mae kam dikha ne ka zikar kiya hae ke "tum ko, hum ne saamne wale ki fauj ko kam dikhaya Warna tum ghabra jate"

Issi tarah Ibrahim alehe salaam ko khawab mae hi Allah taala ka hukum huva ki apne farzand Ismail ko zabah karne ka

Issi tarah Surre Yusuf mae,  Yusuf alehe salaam ke khawab ka zikar hae ke aap ne apne walid Yakoob ko zikar kiya ke "mae na 11 tare (stars) ko dekha aur Suraj wa Chaand ko ke mujhe sajda kar rahe"

Phir aur bhi khawab ke zikar hae, jisme ek prisoners kehte hae ke mae ne khawab mae dekha ke "mae sar (head) per roti uthae huve hun aur parinde us mae se kha rahe hain"

Phir badshah ke khawab ka bhi zikar hae jisme, saat 7 moti aur 7 saat dubli gae ka zikar hae, aur Yusuf alehe salaam ne uski 'tabeer' interpretation bayan kiya hae, jiska zikar Koran ne tafseel se kiya hae

Syedna Sulaiman saheb ka bhi waqae hae ke jis hakim (ruler) ne aapko Yemen mae qaed (prisoned) kiya tha usko Syedna Sulaiman ek raat khawab mae aye the aur aap khawab mae hi apne paer ke chains ko khole (removed) the aur us hakim (ruler) ke chehre per mara tha, aur jab hakim subah utha to uska chehra zakhmi tha

Nubuwat ke 46 خصائل signs mae se ek روياء صادقه sache khawab aana hae

Ye baat to koran aur Duwaat ke waqaet se sabit hae ke khawab ki bahut ahmiyat hae, aur khawab sache bhi hote hain, khawab jhoote bhi hote hain, khawab mae Allah taala ka hukum bhi hota hae, khawab ko Allah taala apne kisi khaas maqsad ko pura karne ke liye bhi dikhata hae, aur khawab shaitaani bhi hote hain

Aakhir khawab kiyu aate hain ?

Aakhir kaun se khawab sach hote hain ?

Kaun se jhute hote hain ?

Kiya khawab ki tabeer (interpretation) hoti hae?

Kaun log khawab ki tabeer janta hae ?

Kisko sache khawab aate hain ?

Kaun se waqt aane wale khawab sache hote hae ?

Kaun se din ke khawab ko bayan karna chahye aur kaunsa nahi, ya phir usko kab bayan karna chahye ?

Sawal bahut hain, aur Allah ka ahsaan hae ke Aulia Allah Aima aur Duwaat ne jawab bhi bahut diye hain

Haqeer ne bahut saal pehle sabaq ke dauran hudood e kiraam se ye bhi suna tha ke kisi Dai ne khawab ki 46 kisim type bayan farmaya hae, (Allah behter janta hae, tafseel yaad nahi hae)

Aaj science bhi bahut koshish mae hae, aur bahut kuch samajh rahi hae, jaan gai hae, magar in bataun ko sachane ke liye unke pas proof nahi daleel nahi hae

Inshallah haqeer ainda in sawalat ke jawab un Aulia Allah ke bayanaat se, kuch dene ki koshish karega, aur kuch zaheri baatain khawab ke taluq se bayan karne ki koshish karega ............

✨✨✨✨✨✨✨✨✨

9/26/15, 1:26:33 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🌹🌿🌹🌿🌹🌿🌹🌿

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

کل جمعة هے مبارکباد قبول کیجئے 🌹

Zikar huva tha khawab (dreams) ka, aakhir humko khawab kiyu aate hae ?

Aulia Allah aur hokoma (plural of Hakim) ne bhi khawab aane ki 6 asbab (reason) bayan farmae hain

Pehli wajeh jiska zikar Koran e Majeed bhi kiya hae aur usko أضغاث الاحلام kha hae, woh, woh khawab hain jo aam tor per har insaan ko nazar aate hain, insaan jo din wa raat mae kaam karta hae, jaise ke agar dukandar hae to jo karobar karta hae, agar karigar hae to woh jo banata hae, jo logoan se guftagu wa kalam kiya, jo waqeat aur hadesaat pesh aye, jo suna ya dekha, jo ghum wa khushi aur doosre ahsasaat hasil huve aur halaat jo uske Nafs per asar andaaz huve, jis'se woh mutasir huva, woh unhi tammam baataun ko apne khawab mae dekhta hae

For example;

Agar kisan hae to woh hare bhare khet (green fields) ko khawab mae dekhega, ya agar barish ki qilat (scarcity) hae, to woh barish ko dekhega, ya bhete huve pani ko dekhega, jo bhi uski fikar aur soch mae hae wohi dekhega, aise khawab ki koi haqeeqat nahi hoti woh Asqaaz o Ahlaam أضغاث أحلام kehlate hae.(a confused medley of dreams)

Doosri wajeh woh insaan ke jism ke akhlaat اخلاط ka badh jana, ek doosre se ziyada hojana hae, insaan ke jism mae char khilate hain (four humours) سودا، صفرا، بلغم، دم

Sauda, woh kala madda (matter) hota hae (black bile), Safra (yellow bile) jiske badhne se aksar insaan ko sar ka dard (migraine) aur vomits bhi hote hain, Dam woh khoon (blood) hae aur Balqam (phlegm) hae

insaan ke jism mae in char ka aetedal balance hona zaroori hae, agar inme balance na ho to insaan bimar hojata hae, aur ye bhi ek wajeh banti hae muqtalif khawab aane ki

For example;

agar Sauda (black bile) badhta hae to dhuwe (smoke) ke, ya ghere badal (dark black clouds) ke, andhera (dark places) ya phir shidat ka huzun (sadness, melancholy) ya uske jaisa khawab ainge.

Agar khoon ki ziyadati hogi to khushi wa inbesaat ke moqe aur mehfil ke, khel kud, ya phir uske jaise khawab ainge

Agar Balgam (phlegm) ziyada hoga to samundar, talaab, barish, ya phir uske jaise milte huve khawab ainge,

Agar Safra (yellow bile) badhe ga to aag lagne, jalne ke, ye phir aise khawab jisme pele (yellowish colour) maujud ho waise khawab ate hain.

Insaan ki jaisi tabiyat, wa kaifiyat hogi, uske hisaab se khawab bhi aate hain.

Aur ek wajeh, woh              أحكام نجوم"Ahkaam e Nujum"   بروج Buruj (Zodiac) aur Siyaraun (planets), yane astrological positions of planets in the 12 Zodiac signs ka asar hae, aur yehi sab ki asal hae (main reason) aur baqi sab uske branches hain.

"Astronomy" branch of science which deals with Celestial bodies & physical universe as whole, aur "Astrology" study of effects of planetary positions on human affairs & the whole creation, ye ek bahut hi vast subject hae, jisko samjhana bahut hi mushkil hae, jo kuch thode bahut bhi jante hae woh samajh sakte hain uski depth aur vastness ko, log is Ilm ko jaan'ne ke liye apni puri zindagi waqf (dedicate) kardete hae jab jakar kuch samajh pa'te hae,  

For example;

"Zohra" زهره planet Venus, ka ek particular Buruj (Zodiac sign) mae particular angle aur degree mae hoga, aur agar uska asar hoga to insaan ke khawab aksar shaadi biha, aur jinsi taluqat (sexual pleasures) ya aurataun ke taluq se, ya khubsoorti wa nazakat ke khawab ainge.

 Issi tarah agar "Mushtri"  مشتري Jupiter, ke taluq se hoga to uske khawab karobar, business, trade & commerce, ya dene lene ke agreements se related honge, aur issi tarah Jupiter ke kisi aur position mae khawab Ibadat, Namaz, Salaat ya Haj waqaera ke honge.

Agar "Mireeq" مريخ Mars, ka asar (effect) se khawab hoga to phir usme jung, hathyaar (arms), tabahi, ladai, jhagde, se related khawab honge

issi tarah agar "Atarad" عطارد yane Mercury, ke effect se khawab honge to woh hisaab (accounts) related honge, issi liye Mercury ko Munshi e falak (accountant of heavenly bodies) bhi kehte hain

Issi tarah agar "Shams"شمس sun,se related honge to woh Badshah, Rulers ya leaders se related khawab honge, issi tarah uski kisi aur position mae, masajid, jamaat khane Eid ya bade ijtema ke khawab ainge

Issi tarah agar "Zohol" زحل saturn, ka asar hoga to khawab purane zamane ke, purane khandar (ruins) dur daraaz ki jagain (far off places) ke taluq se honge

Ye bilkul ek general outline hae, Planets aur Zodiac signs ke hazaraun (thousands of permutations & combination hain) jo is ilm per havi hae, authority hae, wahi khawab ki sahi tabeer aur haqeeqat ko jaan sakta hae, bayan karsakta hae

Khawab ki ek wajeh woh Malaeka ke "Ilhaam" hae, is baat ko samajhna bahut mushkil hae, pehle to humko ye samajhna hoga ke Malaeka kaun hain, aur kaise Malaeka (good spirits) wajud mae aate hain, woh kaise hum per "Ilhaam" karte hain, ye bade ghere raaz hain.

Maleka mae bhi do kisim hae "Malaeka bil quwa" (pasive) woh abhi insaan hi hain, magar unme woh tammam sifat (qualities) hae jo ek "malak" (farishta) mae hote hae, wohi inteqal ke baad "Malaeka bil fael" (active) hojate hain, in baataun ko ek aalim e deen hi samajh sakta hae, aur samjha sakta hae

Aur ek khawab woh Shayateen ki taraf se "Wass wasse" (evil whispers of the devil) hain jo hum per warid karte hae, shaiyateen (evil spirits, devil) bhi 2 do hae, ek shaiyateen ul Ins (insaan) hae, to doosra shaiyateen ul Jins (Jinnat), in ki bhi tafzeelat Moulana Imam Jaffar e Sadiq aur Rasael e Ahmedia ke musanif (author) Imam Ahmed Bin Abdullah salaam ullah alehe ne  bahut tafseel se bayan ki hae

Aur aakhri kisim woh Ambia aur Rasulaun per neend ki halat mae wahi وحى ka nazil hona hae, jaisa ke khud Nabi e kareem Mohammed e Mustafa ki Hadees hae

الروياء الصادقة جزء من أجزاء النبوة

Sache khawab aana nubuwat ke ek jus (part) mae se hae, aksar Ambia aur Rasul neend ki halat mae jab ke unka Nafs hawaas (senses) ko istemal karna chod deta hae, us waqt woh khawab ke zareeyeh wahi وحي ko qabool karte hae  

Jis tarah se koran farmata hae

لقد صدق الله ورسوله الروياء بالحق لتدخلن المسجد الحرام أن شاءالله أمنين

Allah taala ne sach kar dikhaya Rasul ke khawab ko, keh aap "Masjid e Haram" mae aman ke saath dakhil honge.

Aur jis tarah se khawab mae Janab Ibrahim alehe salaam ko hukum huva ke aap Ismail alehe salaam ko zabah karo, aur Janab Ismail ne bhi kha tha ke "ae walid aap wohi kijiye jo Allah taala ne aapko hukum diya hae", to in koran ki ayaataun se ye waaze aur sabit hae ke Nabi wa Rasul ko khawab mae وحى wahi hoti hae, aur unke khawab sache hote hain

Khawab ki tabeer (taweel) teen kisim se hoti hae

Pehla khawab woh hae jo ke insaan dekhta hae, aur wohi baat hoti bhi hae, jaisa ke insaan khawab mae dekhta hae ke woh kisi jagah safar per ja raha hae, aur jab woh hoshyaar hota hae to ussi muqam per safar per jata bhi hae aur woh jagah bhi dekhta hae jo usne khawab mae dekha tha jo pehle kabhi nahi dekha tha, ya phir khawab mae kisi ajnabi insaan ko dekhta hae, aur jab hoshyaar hota hae to ussi insaan se uski mulaqat hoti hae

Ek khawab woh hae jo insaan dekhta hae uski tabeer bilkul ulti (opposite) hoti hae, jaise ke koi shaqs khawab mae bahut rota hae, magar jab woh uthta (wakes) hae to usko bahut khushi wa masarat hasil hoti hae

Aur ek khawab woh hota hae jiski taweel ya tabeer, (interpretation) ki jati hae, jaisa ke ek insaan khawab mae ek parinde (bird) ko dekhta hae, jiski tabeer ye ki jati hae ke khawab dekhne wala safar per jaega,

ya phir ye ki, woh insaan ka gosht kha raha hae, to uski tabeer ye hogi ki woh us insaan ki qibat karta hae (backbiting),

ya phir khawab mae dekha ke woh bahut garam khana kha raha hae, uski tabeer ye kii jasakti hae ke uska kisi se jhagda hoga, ladai hogi

ya phir woh khawab jiska mae ne do roz pehle zikar kiya tha, Syedna Ali bin hussain saheb ne uski tabeer ye ki ke aap ke do bade hudood inteqal kiye.

(ittefaq se aaj hi dono hudood Syedi Ali bin Abdus Samad mansub e Araas, aur Syedi Hameed bin Saeed Mansub e Udain Yemen mae 28 shawal 1367 Hijri ko inteqal kiye)

Imam e Jafar e Sadiq ka ye bhi qol hae ke woh khawab jo insaan shru raat dekhta hae woh shaitaani hote hae, aur jo raat ke aakhri hisse mae fajar se pehle dekhte hae, woh malaeka ke zareeyeh dikhae dete hain aur woh aam tor per sache hote hae

Khawab ki Tabeer per bahut si kitabain likhi gayi hain, ahle Haq mae bhi aur awaam un'naas mae bhi aur har mazhab mae, har qom mae is khawab ki tabeer karne wale log maujud hae, magar jo mazhab Islam ne uski wazahat (detailed explaination) diya hae aur jo tabeerat bayan farmae hain woh kisi aur mazhab mae nahi milegi

ziyada tar is Ilm ko jaan'ne wale Koran aur Ahadees aur Aulia Allah ke aqwal ki maddad se tabeer karte, koran e kareem mae 360 misaal ki ayaat hae jiski maddad li jati hae, humko bhi chahye keh ek aalim deen, jo "Ilm e Nujum" (astrology) aur "Tabeerat e roya" ke ilm se achi tarah waqif hae, aur saath hi woh mutaqi wa parhezgar, Sadiq (sacha) aalim e deen ho, ussi se khawab ko bayan kare aur tabeer bhi daryaft karain.

Imam e Jafar e Sadiq ne aksar roz (days) ke liye bayan farmaya hae ke kis roz khawab bayan karna ya nahi karna chahye, ya phir doosre roz bayan karna chahye, aur kis din ke khawab sahi hote hain, ya jhute hote hae

Jaise ke aapne farmaya, mahine ke pehle din agar khawab dekho to usko ek roz guzarne ke baad hi bayan karo, aur doosri 2nd tariq ke liye aap farmate hae ke us roz ke khawab sache honge, teesri 3rd tariq ke liye pasand kiya gaya hae ke ussi roz khawab ko bayan kare, aur 5 tariq ke liye farmaya ke us roz ka khawab sacha hoga aur mubarak hoga aur tum jisko chaho usko bayan karo, is tarah purre 30 din ke liye aap ne bayan kiya hae

"Khawab" ki, deen e Islam mae badi ahmiyat hae, ye ek mukamil science hae, hamari zindagi mae bahut ahmiyat rakhta hae, issi wajeh se kha gaya hae ke insaan ko taharat ki halat mae wazu karke sona chahye, pak aur saaf libaas  phene aur duain padhkar soya kare, takeh khawab aye to ache aye, basharat liye huve ho, aur agar neend mae maut ae, to uska Nafs pak aur saaf halat mae jism ko chode

Insaan jaise, jaise, maut ke khreeb hota hae, uski ye jismani zindagi ek khawab ki tarah hote jati hae, aur humko is baat ka ahsaas hota jata hae, ke hum ne jo duniya ke liye kiya, duniya ka maal aur daulat jama kiya woh koi mane (value) nahi rakhta tha, aur ye duniya koi kaam ki nahi, jaisa ke  أضغاث أحلام be matlab ke khawab hote hain, jo subah uthne ke thodi der mae insaan bhul bhi jata hae, asal chez to woh uski "aakherat" (life after death) hi hae

Kaash ke hum waqt a'ne se pehle is khawab, aur ghaflat ki neend se bedaar hojae

Allah hum sab ko tawfeeq de

 وما توفيقى الا بالله العلي العظيم

🌹🌿🌹🌿🌹🌿🌹🌿

9/26/15, 1:26:33 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ♢♢♢♢♢♢♢♢♢♢♢♢

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Rasulullah Salallahu Alehe wa sallam ka Qol e mubarak hae

أن ربي أمرني أن يكون نطقي ذكرا، وصمتي فكرا، ونظري عبرة.

Mere Rabb ne mujhe hukum diya hae ke mera kalaam karna, guftagu karna Allah ke zikar aur yaad mae ho, meri khamoshi Allah ki fikar mae ho (Allah taala ki khilkhat mae qor aur fikar karne mae) aur meri nazar ibrat wali ho, duniya ke halaat ko dekhkar sabaq lene wali ho.

Imam e Jaffar e Saddiq farmate hain ke khamoshi, (mohaqeqeen) jo duniya aur aakherat ke maamlaat ko gehrai se samajh chuke hain, unki aadat aur tareeqa hojati hae (who knows the realities of this life & life after death)

Khamoshi rahat ki kunji (key) hae, duniya mae bhi aur aakherat mein.

من صمت نجا

Jo khamoosh raha najat paya

khamoshi mein Allah taala ki khushnudi aur razamandi hae, aur khamoshi se insaan ke hisaab mae kami hoti hae aur khata aur laqzish (errors & mistakes) se uski hifazat hae

من سره أن يسلم فيلزم الصمت

Jo salaamti chahta hae usko chahye khamoshi ikhteyar kare

Allah taala ne khamoshi ko purdah banaya hae ek jahel ki jhalat ke liye, aur ek aalim ke liye ussi ko zeenat dene wali chez (its a veil for the ignorant & adornment for man of knowledge) jab tak jahel apna mu bandh rakhta hae uski jahalat nahi malum hoti,

 hadees e shareef  hae ;

ومن كثر كلامه كثر سقطه ،ومن كثر سقطه كثرت ذنوبه ،ومن كثرت ذنوبه كانت النار أولي بها

Jiski baatain ziyada hogi uski ghaltiyaan bhi ziyada hogi, jiske ghaltiyaan ziyada honge uske gunaah bhi ziyada honge aur jiske gunaah ziyada honge, jahannam uske liye ziyada munasib hae

Aur Moulana Ali ibne Abi Talib farmate hain ;

صمت الجاهل ستره

Jahel ki khamoshi uska purdah hae, yane uski jahalat ka izhaar hone se usko bachaleti hae.

Aur khamoshi se insaan, nafsani khaeshat se bach sakta hae, apne nafs ki achi tarbiyat karsakta hae, khamoshi hi se ibadat ka lutf (enjoyment) hae,

Moulana Ali ka qol hae ;

أفضل العبادة الصمت

Khamoshi sab se behter ibadat hae

khamoshi dil ki sakhti ko dur karti hae, aur khamoshi hi se aqlaq ki bulundi aur Nafs ki paki hae

الصمت يكسبك الوقار

Tumhari khamoshi wiqar (dignity) ko le ati hae, tumko ba wiqar banati hae

Tum apne zabaan ke darwaze ko bandh hi rakho, jab tak ke tum ko kalaam karne ke siwae koi chara na rahe (no way out) khusasan jab tum tumhare kalaam ka koi ahel na pau, (until you dont find a person worthy of talking to) siwae yeh ke tumhara kalaam, Allah ke liye ho, ya Allah ke baare mae ho.

Ek sahebi e Rasool hamesha apne saath ek takhti (slate) rakhte, aur phir har woh baat jo unhune kha usko likh lete, aur raat mae us kalaam ko jo unhune din bhar mae kha, usper qor wa fikar karte ke, kiya sahi, kiya ghalat kha, aur ainda ke liye sabaq lete aur ahtiyat karte.

Aur ek waqt Imam ne farmaya " Yaqeenan khamosh rahne wala kamiyab hogaya "

Baaz (few) sahaba e Rasulullah, apne mu (mouth) mae pather (stones) rakh lete aur jab kalaam karne ka irada karte to pehle qor karte kiya hum jo kehne ja rahe hain woh Allah ke haq mae sahi hae ya nahi, aur agar woh baat lillah fillah hoti to mu se pather nikalte aur phir kalaam karte

Insaan ka najat pana, aur insaan ka halaak hona, kalaam karne aur na karne per hi munahasir hae, kiya hi behter kamiyabi us insaan ke liye hae jisko is baat ki marefat hae ke kab kalaam karna hae, aur kab khamosh rahna hae, aur khamoshi ke kiya faide hae

Khamoshi Ambia ke aqlaq mein se hae aur jisne kalaam ki qadar jana aur khamoshi ko tarjeeh di (preferences) aur khamoshi ke khazane se faida uthaya us ne itmenaan hasil kiya (People destruction & salvation lies in speech & silence, good fortune belongs to those who has knowledge of what is correct & what is incorrect in speech & the science of silence & its advantages and benifits)

Insaan ka kalaam karna aur khamosh rahna, dono bhi ibadat ka darja hasil karlenge, agar woh in tammam baataun ka lihas kare, aur uski is ibadat se sirf Allah taala ki buzrug wa barter zaat ke alawa koi nahi waqif hae.

قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم؛

واملاء الخير، خير من السكوت، والسكوت خير من إملاء الشر

Khair ke baataun mae, taawun (support) karna mashora dene, khamoshi se behter hae, aur khamoshi bure kaamaun se behter hae

♢♢♢♢♢♢♢♢♢♢♢♢

9/26/15, 1:26:33 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ⚪⚫⚪⚫⚪⚫⚪⚫⚪

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Maut ka koi waqt aur na hi koi jagaah muqrar hae

Aaj raat jamaat ke ek mukhlis, deendar, hamdard bhai achanak inteqal farmaye, jo ek roz pehle hi shaadi ki mehfil mae, bahut hi mohabbat wa khloos se hum sabko khana khila rahe the, Allah taala unper rehmat wa maqferat kare aur unki mohabbat ka behtreen ajar ata kare  

Agar hum maut se ghafil bhi hojae, to Iska matlab ye nahi keh maut humko bhul gai hae

Ek waqt Rasulullah ke saamne logoan ne kisi ek aadmi ki bahut tareef ki, Rasulullah ne farmaya, woh shaqs maut ki yaad mae kaisa tha ?

Logoan ne kha ke hum ne usko maut ko yaad karte huve kabhi suna nahi, to aap ne farmaya ke to usko woh darja nahi jisper tum usko samajhte ho

Navsherwaan e Adil ko ek aadmi ne mubarakbaad di ke " tumhare ek dushman ko Allah ne utha liya",

Navsherwaan ne kha, "kiya tum ye samajhte ho ke khuda mujhe zinda chod dega" ?

Shahi mahelaat mae rahne wale badshah, jab woh maut ke khreeb hote hae, aur unki saans (breath) ukhadne lagti hae, to us waqt ke unke alfaz hamare liye ibrat ka muqam rakhte hae,

Duniya ki haqeeqat uski besubati (temperory existence) uska maal aur daulat kitna aarzi hae, aur usme rehna kitna mukhtasar hae, is baat ka andaza in alfaz se hota hae,

Sikander e Azam ne kha tha, "Mae duniya ko fatah karna chahta tha, magar maut ne mujhe fatah karliya, Mae ne kitne insanaun ka khatal kiya, bahut se mulkaun ko loota magar aaj mae duniya se kiya le ja raha hun, afsoos mujhe zindagi mae sukoon mil na saka jo ek mamuli insaan ko hasil hae, acha huva ke mae duniya fatah na kiya agar duniya fatah bhi karleta to kuch hasil na hota, sirf apne gunaah mae isasfa karke duniya se jata, mujhe fauji libaas mae dafan karna, mae fauji tha aur fauji ki haisiyat se duniya se jana chahta hun"

Napoleon jo qaid (prison) mae akele jaan di marte waqt kha;

"Mayusi mere pass gunaah thi, magar aaj duniya mae mujh se ziyada mayus insaan koi nahi, mae do chezaun ka bhuka (hungry) tha, ek hukumat doosra mohabbat, hukumat bahut koshish se mili laikin mera saath na de saki aur agar saath deti bhi to kitna ?

"Mohabbat bahut talash kiya magar mil na saki, mae ne mohabbat ki magar usne daqa di (she cheated me)  shaed mohabbat ka naam hi dhoka dena hae agar kisi insaan ke zindagi ka maqsad yehi hae jo meri zindagi ka raha to phir zindagi be'mane (meaning less) hae mere nasdik zindagi mayusi hi mayusi hae",

Abbasi Khalifa Haroon Rashid marte waqt apni khabar mahal mae hi khudwai aur phir usne hafiz e koran ko khabar mae koran padhne ki hidayat ki, phir usne kha keh "mae ek gunaah ka pekar (body) hun mae ek niha'yat ghum aur fikar ki zindagi guzari, aur aksar khuda aur mazhab se qafil (forgetful) raha Allah mujhe maaf kare mae ab maut ke kinare kheda hun aur yeh khabar (grave) mu khole (open mouth) mere saamne hae, mere jism ko nigal legi yehi har insaan ka anjaam hae".

Khalifa Wasiq Billah marte waqt ashar padha jiska matlab ye hae ;

Maut mae sab barabar shareek hain, na ghreeb bachega, na badshah,

Ghreeb ko uski ghreebi khabar mae koi nuksaan na pohunchaegi na amir ki amiri usko koi faida degi,

phir usne zameen per gaal rakhkar chilakar kha;

"Ae woh jiski badshahi la zawal (hamesha rahne wali) hae tu usper raham kar jiski badshahi ab khatam ho rahi hae" aur phir woh margaya

Badshaah Abdul Malik ne marte waqt kha ;

"Mae hamesha khush rahna chaha, magar khushi kabhi bhi hasil na huvi, mae ne badshahat ko insaani taraqi ki meraj (ultimate goal) samjha, magar mujhe dhoka huva, mae ne jo kuch bhi kiya usper mae saqt sharminda hun, aur afsoos hae, magar nadamat (repentence) ka waqt guzar chuka, aaj mae na'kaam, na murad aur gunaah ka bojh uthaya huva duniya se ja raha hun, mae ne jo raasta ikhteyar kiya woh ghalat tha, much se ae log tum ibrat hasil karo" aur woh mar'gaya

Khalifa Haroon Rashid, marte waqt kha;

"Ae woh jiski badshahi kabhi khatam na hogi, raham farma usper jiski badshahi khatam hone ja rahi hae, ae woh jisko maut na aati ho, Rahem wa karam farma usper jo mar raha hae, Logo meri tandrusti (bètter health) ki Dua na karo balkeh meri maqferat ki dua mangao, Ae Allah tu ne hum ko hukum diya aur hum ne nafarmani ki, (disobey) tu mujhe baksh de (accept our opologies) tu bada raheem hae"

Allah taala hum ko tawfeeq de ke in ibrat ke aur nasihat ke alfaz sunkar sabaq le, ibrat le, aur aakherat ke liye amal kare

ہر کام کو ہے، ہر وقت نے گہرا

پر نہیں اے موت وقت مقرر تیرا

⚫⚪⚫⚪⚫⚪⚫⚪

9/26/15, 1:26:33 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

11 ziqadatul haraam 939 Hijri, youme wafaat hae ek bahut aalim, saqi Hadd e azeem ka jinka mubarak naam "Syedi moulai al'Ajal Badruddin Hasan bin Noah al hindi al Bhrochi" tha

Aap qaleban (probably) bhroch Gujrat ke rahne wale the aur taleem ke liye Hijrat farmakar Yemen gae the

Aap Yemen mae Syedna Dai  Mohammed bin Hasan bin Idrees ke zamane mae sab se bade hudood mae the

Aapko Syedna Dai ne teeno jazeeraun ka pura itlaq diya tha, aap apne Ilm aur fazal mae ekta e zamana the, aur uloom e Dawat se puri tarah waqfiyat rakhte the, Syedna Dai ne aapko teeno jazeeraun mae taleem wa tadrees ki puri ijazat ata ki thi

Aap hujjat (debate) mae bahut darak (expertise) rakhte the, Syedna Dai ne bahut se kaam aap ke supurd kardiye the, Ahed e shareef lena, taleem ka intezam mohajereen ka khyal rakhna unko tarteeb dena, Zakat ki wasuli aur uski taqseem karna

Syedna Dai ne apne Khalifa Syedna Ali bin Jafar bin Hasan ka aapko maazid (madagaar) muqrar kiya,

Syedi Hasan bin Noah ki khaas baat yeh thi ke aap bahut bade tajir (businessmen) the, aur bahut hi maaldar the, unke karobar ke bahut se mulkaun mae branches the, Hindustan mae bahut se shaher mae dukan thi aur bahut se khadeem port city's mae bhi branch the, Mecce Mauzama, Egypt aur Baet ul Maqdas mae aapka business tha

Itni daulat ke baujud aap bahut hi narm dil, momineen per meherbani karne wale, aur tabiyat mae zara bhi quroor na tha, aap Dawat ke aur momineen ke liye be hisaab daulat kharj karte

Ek waqt Zaidi firqe (sub sect of Shias) ke Imam Shamsuddin ne Syedna Dai Mohammed Husain ko ek dhamki bhra khat (threatening letter) bete ka saath bheja, likha tha ke tum mujhe Imam aur badshah tasleem karlo aur meri taat karlo aur inkar karne per mae jung karunga  

Syedna Dai ke halaat bahut khrab the, us waqt aapke bahut se Hudood aur momineen kisi epidemic mae inteqal kar gae the aur jung karne ki bilkul taqat na thi, aap ne mashoore ke liye hudood e Dawat ko bulaya, sab ne kha, hum uske hukum ko manne ke badle jung karke izzat ki maut ko tarjih (preferences) dete hain, faisla aapka hae.

Us waqt moulai Al'ajal Badruddin Hasan bin Noah ne garaj kar kha ke "Ae Syedna aap dushman ke safeer (badshah ke bete) se saaf keh dijiye ke jitna woh aage aye hae hum usko kuch nahi kehta hae, magar ab agar aur agae badhega to hum uski umeedaun ko puri nahi hone Daenga, agar woh apni bandooq (guns) mae lohe ke goliyaan dalenge to hum usko jawab sone aur chandi ki goliyaun se dainge aur phir aap ne apne Arab bhaiyun ko khitab karke kha, ke tum ko jung ke liye jitna bhi maal aur daulat chahye mujh se le lo, logoan ko fauj mae bharti karo aur jitna hathyaar chahye khreedo

Moulai Hasan ki ye baat jab badshah ke qasid (bete) ne suna to to usko yaqeen hogaya ke aisa jaan nisar pur khloos saathiyun ke hote huve unse ladna asaan na hoga aur usne apna irada badal diya

Moulai Hasan ki teen betiyaan bhi thi unme do to bahut hi alema fazela aur bahut aala darje per qaem thi  

Syedi Hasan bin Noah ne ek kitab bhi taleef ki hae jo ziyada tar hujjataun per hae, jiska naam كتاب الأزهار hae aur jiske saat 7 parts hae, ye aapke haath ki likhi kitab Hindustan ki dawat mae moujud hae

Moulai Hasan bin Noah bahut se salahyitaun ke hamil the, jitni daulat thi utne hi saqi the, aapne inteqal se pehle apna aksar maal wa daulat Dawat e Hadiya ke liye Waqf kardi thi, aur khud ke waris aulad ke liye sirf utna hi choda jis se unki guzar basar hosake

Syedna Yusuf bin Sulaiman Najmuddin bhi jab Dai ki Hijrat mae gae to Syedi Hasan bin Noah ko Syedna Dai ne aapka ustad muqrar kiya tha, aur baad mae Syedna Yusuf aur Syedi Hasan bin Noah dono, Syedna mohammed bin Hussain ke pas istefade karte (padhte the) aap dono ki taleem ka haal ye tha ke Syedna Mohammed ne Syedna Yusuf aur Syedi Hasan ko kitab "Al Anwaar ul latifa" saat waqt padhai aur aap dono Syedna Dai ke pas subah namaz ke baad se padhne baithte to raat tak padhte hi rahte aur ye silsila taqriban 6 mahine tak chala

Aapke inteqal ka tafzeeli ahwaal jamaluddin Saif ul hujjat Syedi Ali bin khutbuddin ne apni kitab  "seerat ud Duwaat ul muwahedeen" mae farmaya hae, Syedi Hasan bin Noah ka Yemen mae hi aag ke jalne ke waqae se inteqal huva

Allah taala aapke rooh ko muqaddus kare aur aapke Dawat per aur momineen per kiye gae ahsaanat ka behtreen ajar ata kare

aapki wafat ko 500 saal taqriban huve aur angrezi hisaab se 485 years huve yane 1530 AD ke waqeat hae

من أيقن بالخلف جاد بالعطية

Jo shaqs bhi Allah taala ke pas jaza aur inam ka yaqeen karega, utna hi saqi hota jaiga, yane jis kisi ko bhi aakherat aur usme sawab, jaza, ajar aur inam ka yaqeen hota jaiga woh utna hi is duniya mae khair wa khairaat karega

⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕

Syedi  "Jamaluddin" Ali bin Khutbuddin "Saif ul hujjat" ka bhi youme wafat pehli ziqadatul haraam 1195 hae, aapke waqaet bahut hi dilchasp hae mae ne last year aap per mazmun likha tha, agar koi padhna chahta hae to request bheja mae bhej dunga

⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕

9/26/15, 1:26:34 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Kiya hi behtreen nasihat ka zikar hamare Imam Ahmed bin Abdullah salwatullah alehe ne apni kitab Rasael e Ahmedia mae kiya hae

Imam zikar farmate hae ke Hindustan ka ek Adil (just) Mommin Badshah apne inteqal ka khreeb apne Wali e ahad (crown prince) ko wasiyat (nasihataun) karta hae

Badshah apne farzand se farmata hae ke

"Ae farzand mae tujhe wasiyat karta hun ke Allah ka taqwa kar, Allah Rasul aur waliane Amar (a person of authority appointed by Imam or his appointee) ki taat kar, aur hamesha Duniya aur uske mamlaat mae qor wa fikar kar"

Mae tujhe 30 khaslataun se waqif karta hun jo 10 teri Duniya mae nafa degi,10 teri aakherat mae faida pohunchaegi aur 10 woh teri mumlekat (kingdom) mae nafa baksh sabit hongi

10 baatain jinse teri aakherat achi hogi woh ye hain

1) Sab se pehli aur ahem tareen baat, woh Allah taala ka iqrar aur uski towheed hae, وابتهال اليه Allah taala ki khushnudi wa razamandi ki taraf aage badhna, duaon ke zareeyeh se, tazaro zari ke zareeyeh se, uski bandagi wa ibadat ke zareeyeh se.

2) Tammam Rasuluon ko sachana aur Allah Subhanahu wa taala ki taraf se jo kuch woh le aye hain usko dil se qabool karna.

3) Tammam Ambia ki kitabaun ki tasdeeq karna ki woh Allah ki taraf se nazil huvi hain, yane Injeel, Zaboor, Torat, aur Koran e kareem aur uske alawa muqtalif sahife.

4)  Rasulullah ki Shariat ki hifazat karna, uska paband rahna, aur "siyasat un naas" yane logoan ke saath sahi mamlaat ka karna

5) Allah ke khatir logoan ke saath tawazu (due respect and humbleness) se pesh aana, logoan se acha saluk rakhna, mael milap rakhna, fakher, akad pan, badai, in tammam burai ko chod dena

6) "Zulum wa Jor" ko bilkul chod dena, zulum kehte hae ke kisi bhi chez ka uske ghalat muqam per rakhna, aur "Jor" ziyadati ko kehte hain, jis kisi ne bhi Allah ke bande per zulum kiya, uska dushman Allah taala hoga, aur jis ka dushman Allah ki zaat hogi, uske liye siwae ruswayi aur zillat ke kuch nahi

7) Tum aurataun ki mehfilaun mae baithna, aur unse mael milap, tark (discard) kardo, unki bataun ki taraf kaan leh'kana chod do, woh mardaun ki aqal mae fasaad paida karti hae

 ترك شرب المسكرفانه عدو العقل   (8

Har nasha (intoxicating) wali chez ko chod do, kiyunke woh aqal ki dushman hae

 والعقل خليفة الله في الباطن

Aqal Allah taala ka khilafa hae batin mae, jis kisi ne bhi Allah ke Khalifa per uske dushman ko musalit (dominance) kiya, Allah taala usko tabah wa taraj (destroy) kardega, jab aqal ka dushman usper qalib (overtakes) ajaega, to uski aqal chale jaegi

Kiya hi saqt jumle us Badshah e Adil ne "Nashe" ke liye kha hae

فإذا ذهب العقل فلا دين، ولا علم، ولا مروة، ولا حياء، ولا مراقبة

Bas jiski aqal hi chale gai, to na uska deen baqi raha, na Ilm, na murawat, na sanjeedgi, na haya, na sharafat, aur na kisi baat mae qor wa fikar karne ki quwat

Aur kisi insaan mae ye khaslatain (characteristics) khatam hogae to, uski maut hi behter hae sabke haq mae

* الكرم واسخاء، وسماحة النفس، والتفضل علي سائر الناس صديق أو عدو

9) Logoan se izzat wa karamat ke saath pesh ana, sakawat karna, nafs mae itni kushadgi paida karna ke kisi ko bhi maaf karsako chahe woh tumhara dost ho, ya phir dushman hi kiyu na ho

Aur aakhri nasihat Badshah ne farmaya

* صدق القول، وإدا الاماناة

10) Qol ka Sadiq hona, har baat hamesha sach hi kehna, aur amanataun ka ada karne wala hona, chahe woh nek shaqs ki amanat ho ya phir badd fajir (bad character) ki hi kiyu na ho

 اللهم هب لي قلبا تقيا، وحكما مستقيما، ولسانا صادقا، وعقلا يعقل عنك جميع الخطاب.

Ae allah mujhe mutaqi dil ata kar, sahi aur durust faisle ki hikmat ata kar, sachi zabaan Inayat farma, aur aisi pukhta (mature firm) aqal ki, tere har khitab (address) ko mae samajh saku, yane tera jo asal maqsad hae, humko is duniya mae lane ka usko samajh saku, jo koran kehta hae

وما خلقت الجن و الإنس إلا ليعبدون

 Nahi paida kiya Jinn wa Ins ko siwae uski (Allah) ibadat ke liye

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

9/26/15, 1:26:34 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🍂🌷🍂🌷🍂🌷🍂🌷

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Zikar huva tha ek Adil wa Hakim mommin Badshah ka, jisne apne Wali e ahad (crown prince) ko apni maut ke khreeb kuch nasihatain ki thi

Badshah ne 10 nasihat aakherat ki behtari ki liye kehne ke baad, 10 nasihat duniya ki behtari ke liye apne farzand se kha

Badshah ne kha ke in nasihataun se teri Duniya behter hogi, khair wa barkat aegi, aur rozi mae ziyadati hogi

1) Sab se pehle ache aqhlaq ka hona

أولها حسن الخلق

2) doosre ache aadaab ka hona

[Aqlaq aur aadaab mae faraq hae, inshallah uski tafzeel mazmun ke baad likhunga]

3) wade ka sacha hona, yane wada wafa hona, yane har wade ka pura karne wala hona

4) badle wa inteqam ki puri taqat aur qudrat rakhte huve bhi maaf karne wala hona, darguzar karne wala  hona

5) اصطناع الرجال وترك الحسد

Yane hasad ko tark kardena, aur jis baat per jis chez ke liye tum doosre se hasad karte ho, jalte ho, jis khubi ki wajeh se tum hasad karte ho, woh khubi woh achai tum apne mae paida karo, aur doosre per hasad karna chod'do

6 ) Tum is baat per حرص "Hirs wa lalaj" karo, yane puri tarah koshish kar keh tera koi dushman na ho, aur uske ba'wajud bhi koi tera dushman hota hae to uske saath hamesha ahsaan kar takeh tera ahsaan uski dushmani ki saza hojae, aur uski dushmani se tujh ko jo takleef pohunchi uske liye Allah taala teri kifayat karega, teri hifazat karega

7) jo maal wa daulat Allah taala ne tujh ko وديعت wadiyat ki hae

(wadiyat means something which is given to you for safe custody or usage as per the givers wishes or instructions, in this case Allah Subhanahu wa taala)

tum usko Allah ki qurbat (closeness) aur khushnudi ko hasil karne ke liye kharch karo, woh sab Allah ki milek (asset) hae, woh aarzi hae, woh hamare pas amanat hae jo humko wapas dena hae

7) teri murawat teri shahwataun per qalib rahe, yane teri sharafat wa sanjeedgi aur tere aqlaq wa kirdar se tu duniya ki shahwataun per qabu rakh

9 )  to tere duniya ke mamlaat ko aakherat per tarjeeh na de, aur agar to aisa karega to Allah taala tujhe duniya ke hawale kardega, aur uske baad to duniya ki tammam musibataun, pareshaniyu, aur aalaishaun (unproductive wordly matters) mae phas jaega (will get trapped)

Allah tabaraka wa Taala ne duniya ki taraf wahi ki thi

يا دنيا من خدمك فاستخدميه، ومن خدمتي فاخدميه

Kiya hi baleeq kalaam hae, Allah taala ka qol hae, ae duniya jo teri khidmat ki jo tere peeche pada raha bas to us'se puri khidmat le, aur phir Allah taala farmata hae jo meri (yane Allah ki) khidmat kiya, bas ae duniya ab to uski puri khidmat kar

10 ) Aur phir aakhri wasiyat ( nasihat ) farmate hain, Ae farzand tum un mamlaat mae nazar karna chod do jisme tere liye koi behteri koi faida nahi, yane doosraun ke un mamlaat mae dakhel na de jo tujh se taluq nahi rakhte, aur ye ke tu koi aisa shaqul (activity) ko ikhteyar na kar, siwae uske jisme Allah taala tujh ko mashqul rakhna chahta ho

Allah taala humko bhi in behtreen nasihataun per amal karne ki tawfeeq de

وما توفيقى الا بالله العلي العظيم  وآخر دعونا والحمدلله رب العالمين

 والصلاة والسلام على رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Allah taala ka bada ahsaan aur karam hae ke Haj mukamil huva aur hamare Ikhwan ki khair ki khabar hae, hum bhi har roz Dua e Ratib mae unki sahet wa aafiyat, wa salaamti ke saath watan lautne ki Dua karte hain

Haji, apne do chadar ke Ahram se hil (complete his arkan of removing hair & performing zabihat) huva hoga aur apne roz ke libaas ko ikhteyar kiya hoga

Ye libaas bhi badi hi ajeeb chez hae, insaan ki soch, fikar, khyalaat, mood, uska uthna, baithne (actions) sab hi baataun per asar andaz hota hae, balkeh insaan ko saamne wale ki jo chez sab se ziyada mutazir karti hae, woh uski surat wa shakal ke baad uska libaas hi hae,

Allah taala ki kiya hi badi hikmat aur raaz, is baat mae poshida hoga, ke jo Haj ke liye hukum kiya gaya keh do safaed kapde pehne aur woh bhi baqaer sile huve ho

Ye baat ek Haji hi batasakta hae jo woh in do kapdaun ko pehen kar mehsoos karta hae, yaqinan, inkesari, bandagi, Allah ke saamne ajisi, tammam ikhwan ke saath barabari wa hamdardi ko mehsoos to karta hi hoga, aur batin, to Allah ke Aulia hi batasakte hain ki kiya uske saath pesh aata hae is Ahram ke pehen'ne se

Moulana Ali ibn Abi Talib salawatullah alehe, jab bhi libaas pehnte to ye irshad farmate

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

الحمد لله الذي رزقني من الرياش ما اتجمل به في الناس ووارى سوءتى وستر عورتى الحمد لله رب العالمين

Tammam Hamd wa tareef Allah hi ke liye hae, jis ne mujhe yeh kimti libaas ata farmaya, jis mae, mein logoan ke samne acha nazar aunga, aur tammam Hamd us Allah ke liye hae, jisne meri sitter poshi (covered my nakedness) ki hae aur tammam Hamd wa tareef us Allah ke liye hae jo sa're jahan ka Rabb hae

Aur Moulana Ali ne farmaya ke Rasul e khuda bhi yehi padhte the jab aap libaas pehnte the

Moulana Ali ne ek waqt ek libaas khreeda, jab aap ne aasteen (sleeves) ko dekha ke woh wrist se ziyada lambi hain aur issi tarah uski lambai ankle se ziyada lambi hae to aap ne usko kaat dala (trimmed its length)

Imam e Baqaer Salwatullah alehe farmate, keh jo bhi libaas takhnau (wrist & ankle) se neeche hoga to woh hissa jahanam mae hoga

Moulana Ali hamesha do libaas ek saath khreedte the aur dono libaas mae se ek ko pehle pasand karne ka ikhteyar apne gulam (slave Moulana Cumber) ko dete, woh apni marzi se pasand karleta to phir aap doosra khud ke liye rakh lete

Rasulullah ki mashoor Hadees hae

من اتخذ شعرافليحسن اليه، من اتخذ زوجة فليكرمها، ومن اتخذ نعلا فليستجدها، ومن اتخذ دابة فليستفرهها، ومن اتخذ ثوبا فلينضفه

Jo shaqs bhi lambe baal rakhe to wo usko acha rakhe, saaf suthre aur jama kar rakhe

Jo biwi ikhteyar kare, yaane shaadi kare to usko izzat se rakhe, karamat de

Jo shaqs bhi juta (shoes) rakhe to woh usko naya rakhe, yaane saaf polished aur bilkul nai condition mae rakhe

Aur jo jaanwar rakhe to acha kisim ka rakhe (a good breed)

Aur jo libaas rakhe to usko saaf suthra (neat, clean & tidy) rakhe

Allah taala hum ko is zaheri ahkam per amal karne wala banae aur shoq paida kare ki inki taweel aur haqeeqat ko bhi hum samjhe

Allah taala hamare tamman Hajiyun ko sahet wa afiyat se apne watan wapis lautae

والحمد لله رب العالمين

9/27/15, 11:21:55 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🍃🍁🍃🍁🍃🍁🍃🍁

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Zikar huva tha libaas ka, Imam e Jafar e Sadiq farmate hain ke saaf suthre kapde, dushman ko mutasir kardete hain, aur usper qalba (control) hasil hota hae, aur apne kapdaun ko dhone se هم و غم hamm wa ghum (sorrow & sadness) dur hota hae

Imam e Jafar e Sadiq farmate hain ke tum apne libaas ko zameen per lidhta huva,  latakta huva, mat rakho (sweeping & hanging on the floor), aur aap ne is ayaat ki tafseer mae farmaya

فثيابك فطهر

Ka matlab yehi hae ke kapdaun ko khreeb rakho zameen per lidhta huva, girta huva, mat chod do

Rasulullah ne farmaya ke kapde ki rahat aur karamat usko ghadi (fold) karke rakhne mae hae, aur ghar ke rahat usme jha'du dene mae hae (sweeping)

.

Moulana Ali ibn abi Talib ek waqt pai'wand lage kapde (darned clothes) pehen rakhe the, kisi ne uske mutaliq kuch arz kiya to aap'ne farmaya ke pai'wand laga kapda pehen'ne se Dil mae khushu paida hota hae

Imam e Jafar e Sadiq farmate hain ke naram wa nazuk (soft & delicate) libaas pehen'ne se insaan ka dil baqi (rebellious) hojata hae

Imam ke pass do mo'te khurdure (thick rough & hard) libaas the, Imam unko pehen kar, ghar mae namaz padhte, aur aapko jab bhi Allah se koi hajat hoti aur dua maangna hota to aap inhi khurdure mo'te libaas ko pehen kar Allah taala se Dua maangte, hajat talab karte

Haqeer (myself) apne paer (polio of legs) ki kamzoori ki wajeh se bachpan mae khelte huve aksar gir (fall) jata aur aksar izar (pyjama) phat jati (torn) to us izar ko waleda pai'wand (darning) lagadeti, mere sab hi izar mae paiwand (cloth patches) lage hote

Bachpan ka zamana tha ek waqt mae ne zidd (tantrums) kiya, ke aise patches lage huve izar mae ab nahi pehnunga mera sab mazaaq udate hae (ridiculed & poked fun)

Us waqt Walid e muqaddus ne mujh se kha ke hamare aur tumhare Moula, Moulana Ali ibne Abi Talib bhi pai'wand laga, sila huva kapda pehente the, to tumhari aur hamari kiya haisiyat

Aur phir aapne ne kiya hi baleeq baat irshad farmai, "ke beta kal tum ko acha libaas mayasar (even if you are able to afford) bhi ho to kabhi kabhar (once in a while) aise pai'wand laga huve, sile huve kapde pehen lo, takah tumhari tabiyat  mae inkesari aajisi paida ho (humility & sympathy for such people)

Aur Moula ki ye baat sach hae ke aisa pehen'ne ke baad insaan ki soch khyalaat, aur tabiyat mae farq aa hi jata hae

Allah hum ko tawfeeq de ke hum apni pareshaniyun ko, humm wa ghum ko in hidayataun per amal karke dur kare, aur apni ibadataun ko, duaon ko, aisa libaas pehen kar khalis banae, takeh Allah ki bargaah mae unko qabuliat hasil ho

9/29/15, 12:36:27 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🍂🍃🍁🌿🍂🍃🍁🌿

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Do roz pehle مشركين mushrekeen e Hind ka ek ajeeb tahwaar (festival) guzra, ek ajeeb wa ghreeb shakal ki murti (idol Ganesh) ki dus roz puja karne ke baad us'e pani ke hawala kardiya gaya

Hazrat muqaddus Moulana Ziaali saheb in murtiyun ke liye farmate ki jahannam ki gallery hae, aur phir ek bahut hakimana baat farmate ke insaan ke zahen mae koi nai baat aa nahi sakti siwae insaan ke, ya phir uska jo mushaheda hae (dekha ho) uska tasavur uski soch har chez wohi hogi jo usne dekha hae, isiliye woh haath zaroor banaega magar char ya ziyada kardega aankh banaega magar kam ziyada kardega

Insaan ki soch jitni khraab hote jaegi, girti jaegi, kasif hoti jaegi, maadi hoti jaegi, materialistic hogi, woh inhi chezaun ki taraf raqbat (inclined) karega shoq karega, usko woh chez achi lagegi

Aur wohi hum Mommin hae jo in idols ko dekhna bhi nahi pasand karte, hum ko wahshat hoti hae, ghin aati hae, nafrat hoti hae, kiyunke hamara Nafs pak hae, shafaf hae, aala hae, malakuti hae woh in murtiyun ko dekhna kabhi gawara (tolerate) nahi karta

Syedna wa Moulana Gulam Husain saheb muqaddus ek waqt train ka safar kar rahe the, aapke saamne ek Hindu pandit baitha tha Pandit ke pas ajeeb, ajeeb, deotaun (Idols of god) ki tasveerain thi

Syedna dai ki nazar ek tasveer per gayi jis mae deota ke char haath the woh bada tan'kar akadkar (with pride) shaer (lion) per baitha tha aur uske mu (mouth) mae dantaun (teeths) ke darmiyan ek saanp (snake) ko dabakar pakad rakha hae

Syedna Dai ne Panditji se pucha keh is tarah ki tasveer ka kiya matlab hae?

Woh pareshaan hogaya aur la'ilmi (ignorance) zaher kardi ki mujhe nahi malum

Us waqt Syedna saheb ne us se kha ki is kisim ki deotaun ki tasveer se khadim (ancestors), aalim log hum ko kuch sabaq diye hain, kuch samjhaya hae, agar woh log hikmat ki badi badi baat bhi likh jate to woh baat na paida hoti jo in tasveer mae woh bayan kiye hain

Log is tasveer mae dilchaspi lete hain aur aqalmand aur danishwar (wisemen) us tasveer mae rakhe huve falsafe aur hikmat ki baat batate hain

Aap ne us Pandit se kha ke

Insaan ke jab ikhte'araat badh jate hain (increase of powers) to woh farishta ya aap ki zabaan mae deota (God) ban jata hae

Char haath uske ikhtearaat (powers) ki ziyadati ko zaher kar rahe hae

Woh tab deota banta hae jab woh apne Nafs e ammara yane woh Nafs jo bure kaam karne insaan ko uksata, entice, karta hae usko khabu mae yane control mae karleta hae aur woh Nafs e Ammara woh shaer (lion) hae jisko woh control mae karliya hae us per baith gaya hae

Aur saanp (snake) woh yeh bata raha hae ke zabaan jab be'khabu (uncontrolled) hojati hae to saanp ki tarah dasti (bites like a snake) aur teer (spear) ki tarah Dil aur Jigar per waar (attack) karti hae

Panditji is bulund nazriye aur falsafe se hairaan hogae aur kha aapne sach farmaya aisa hi hoga

Phir Moulana ne farmaya hamare Nabi e kareem ka irshad e mubarak hae

المرء باصغريه قلبه ولسانه

Insaan ka bulund martaba (position respect) uski do choti chezaun se hae, uska Dil (heart) aur Zabaan (tongue) se

 Agar Dil saaf ho, ilm wa hikmat se bhra huva ho

Aur Zabaan shireen (sweet ) ho aur narmi aur sadaqat (softness & truthfulness) se bhari huvi ho to woh insaan ke roop mae farishta, ya deota hae

Agar zabaan khraab ho aur jhooti ho to insaan ki koi izzat, na bande ke pas hogi aur na hi Allah ke nasdik hogi

Ek waqt hakim luqman ko unke maa'lik ne kha ke bakre (goat) ko zabah (slaughter) karo aur uski sab se achi chez pakakar lau,(cook & get it)

Luqman hakim ne bakre ki zabaan aur dil pakakar laye,

Doosre roz maa'lik ne phir kha ke jo bakre mae sab se khraab chez hae woh paka'kar lao, janab luqman hakim ne phir Zabaan aur Dil hi pakakar laya, jab maalik ne pujha keh sab se achi chez bhi Dil aur Zabaan hae aur sab se buri chez bhi Dil aur Zabaan hae ye kaisa mumkin hae ?

Luqman hakim ne kha keh yehi do azzo (organs) hain jo agar ache ho to insaan acha hota hae, aur agar khraab ho to insaan khraab hota hae

Allah taala hamare Dil aur Zabaan ko acha banaye

لسان صدق اور قلب سليم عطا كر

Sachi zabaan aur mutmaen Dil ata kar

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

وَإِذْ قَالَ إِبْرَاهِيمُ رَبِّ اجْعَلْ هَٰذَا الْبَلَدَ آمِنًا وَاجْنُبْنِي وَبَنِيَّ أَن نَّعْبُدَ الْأَصْنَامَ

AND [remember the time] when Abraham spoke [thus]: "O my Sustainer! Make this land secure, and preserve me and my children from ever worshipping idols

9/30/15, 9:54:56 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ♻♻♻♻♻♻♻♻♻

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

 عيد الغدير آپ سب کو بہت مبارک

Kiya hi behtreen Dua hae youm e Eid e Ghadeer ki sahife mae, kaash ki hum iske ma'ne aur mafhum, (meaning & explaination) taweel aur haqaeq jaan sakte

Allah taala ka Hamd wa shukur hae keh usne hum ko is din ke zareeh se karamat di aur humko momineen mae shammil kiya, yaqeen rakhne wala aur apne "Ahed" wa "Misaaq" (promise) ko pura karne wale banaya, aur nahi banaya hum ko "Nakeseen", "Jahedeen" aur  "Mukaz'zebeen" yane Qiyamat ke din ko jhootla'ne wala

Allah taala hum sab ko is mubarak din ki barkataun mae shammil rakhe aur hum jis baat ka "Ahed" liye hain yane Allah ki taat, Imam waqt ki taat, Dai e waqt, Manaseeb karam aur Hudood e deen sab hi ki taat mae rakhe aur unhi ki taat mae hamara khatema bil khair kare, aur saath hi hum ko apne waledain ka bhi puri tarah haq ada karna wala banae

Aaj Moula e Kaenaat Moulana Ali ibn abi Talib ki "Nas" ka din hae, saal ka mubarak tareen din hae, kuch Moula Ali ke aqwal se barkat hasil karain

•••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••

Panch adatain mommin ki alamatain (signs) hain,

1 ) har halat mae parhezgari karna

2) Qilat (shortage) e maal mae bhi sadqa wa khairaat karna

3) Har musibat per sabar karna

4) Qusse aur qazab mae bhi hilm (narmi) se pesh aana

5) Aur har halat mae apne kalam mae narmi rakhna

•••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••

Badtareen aadmi woh hae jo kissi ki laqzish wa qata (mistakes errors) ko maaf na karta ho

•••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••

Teen chezain emaan ke khazane se hain,

1) musibat ko poshida rakhna.

2) khamoshi se sadqa dena.

3) Sabar se bimari ko bardasht karna

••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••

Teen logoan ko beqair hisaab ke jannat mae dakhil kiya jaega

Imam e Adil (just and fair Imam)

Raast go tajir (fair practicing business man)

Woh budha aadmi jo apni saari umar taat e Khuda mae fana kardi (Allah ke faraez ka paband raha)

 •••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••

Teen chezain badtareen balau (problems) se hae

Kasrat e ayal (large family)

Karz ki ziyadati (loans)

Aur amraaz ki ziyadati

(Continues & multiple illness)

••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••

Musalmaan ka haq musalmaan per saat 7 qaslataun per hae 7 baatain har musalmaan ko doosre musalmaan ke liye farz hae

Jab bhi mommin bhai doosre mommin bhai ko dekhe to 'Salaam' kare

Mommin bhai Dawat de to usko qabool kare

Bimar ho to uski iyadat (misaaj pursi) kare

Aur agar inteqal kar jae to uske janaze mae shirkat kare

Aur woh jo khud ke liye  chahta hae, woh apne doosre mommin bhai ke liye bhi cha'he

Jo bhi baat woh khud ke liye buri (bad) samajhta hae woh apne doosre mommin bhai ke liye bhi buri samjhe

Apne maal aur jaan se uski maddad kare

•••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••

Jis tarah din aur raat ek jagah jama nahi hote ussi tarah Duniya ki mohabbat aur Allah ki mohabbat bhi ek jagah jama nahi hoti

•••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••

Insaan ki do fazilatain khas hain, "Aqal" aur "Nutq", Aqal se khud faida uthata hae aur Nutq (speech) se doosraun ko bhi faida deta hae

•••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••

Jo Maut ka zikar ziyada karega woh Duniya se kam (less) per razi rahega (will be satisfied with less in this world)

•••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••

Is Duniya mae fani (khatam hone wali) chezau ki taraf raqbat (desire) na karo aur is Duniya se aisi chezain lo jo us aakherat (maut ke baad) mae kaam aae

•••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••

Mommin ka emaan us waqt tak kamil nahi hota jab tak ke woh naemat ki ziyadati ko fitna, aur balau ko naemat maa shumar na kare (Moula Ali yahan maal aur daulat ki ziyadati ko fitna keh rahe hae, aur bimari jo hamare gunahun ko dho'deti usko naemat keh rahe hain)

••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••

Moula e kaenat farmate hain ke, ek zamana aisa aega ke aafiyat (peace) ke dus (ten) ajsa (parts) honge, jisme nau 9 hisse logoan se tanhai ikhteyar (seclusion) karne mae hae aur ek hissa khamoshi mae hoga

••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••

Jab kisi maangne wale ko khairaat do to tum us'se khaesh karo ke tumhare liye Dua karo kiyunke uski Dua tumhare liye qabool hogi agarche ke uski Dua uske liye qabool nahi bhi hoti hae kiyunke woh jhoot bhi bolta hae

•••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••

Amanat jis kisi ki bhi ho wapas zaroor karo agarche ke woh Paighambaraun ki aulad ke Qatil ki kiyu na ho

•••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••

Apne marhumeen ki ziyarat karo kiyunke woh tumhare ziyarat karne se khush hote hain

•••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••

Nashe char kisim ke hain

1) shrab ka nasha

2) maal ka nasha

3) neend ka nasha aur

4) baadshahat (power) ka nasha

••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••

Kale (black) ju'te (shoes) mat pehno kiyunke Firaun (Pharaoh) ne pehne tha, pharaon pehla shaqs tha jisne kale ju'te pehne the aur issi tarah kala libaas bhi mat pehno woh bhi pharaon ka libas tha

••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••

Khana khao to dastarkhan per jo gir gaya hae woh utha kar khalo, kiyunke usme tumhare liye shifa hae

••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••

Tum raat ke waqt sadqa karo, kiyunke raat ka diya huva sadqa Allah taala ke qusse ko thanda karta hae

•••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••

Kisi shaqs ko bhi aise safar per na jana chahye jis mae usko apne namaz aur deen ke jane ka khoof ho

•••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••

Jo shaqs bhi namaz ke liye khada rahe to usko chahye ke us namaz ko namaz e vida (aakhri) namaz ki tarah ada kare

•••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••

Tulu e fajar se Tulu e Shams (down to sunrise) ke darmiyan rozi ke liye Dua karo, ye baat, duniya mae din bhar rozi ke liye ma're ma're phirne se bahut behter hae, kiyunke ye woh waqt hae jab ke Allah taala rozi ko taqseem karta hae

Allah tabaraka taala hum ko in nasihataun ka paband banae

وما توفيقى الا بالله العلي العظيم

10/1/15, 12:35:41 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🍀🍁🍀🍁🍀🍁🍀🍁🍀

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

جمعة مبارك

Ye Moulana Ali ibn abi Talib ka bahut hi Dil ko mutazir karne wala qol hae jo Duniya ki sachi haqeeqat aur adna kaifiyat ko zaher karti hae, aur hum is Duniya ko hasil karne ke liye itni mehnat aur mashaqat uthate hain, maal aur daulat jama karte hain aur Duniya ki shohrat naam aur izzat chahte hain

Mae ne ye Qol is se qabal bhi teen waqt bheja hun magar mera ye khyal hae ke ye behtreen nasihat ki yaad dehani ki humko mutawatir (repeatedly) zaroorat hae

Allah taala hum sab ko tawfeeq de ke, is baleeq irshad ke asar ko qabool kare aur is duniya ki adna aur mamuli zindagi ke taluq se hamara nazriya aur khyalaat ko bad'le

Kiya hi behtreen pur'asar nasihat farmai hae Moulana Ali ibn abi Talib ne

Ek roz Moulana Ali ne ek sahabi e Rasulullah, Jabir bin Abdullah al Ansari ko lambi lambi saans (heavy breathing) lete dekh kar pucha

Ae Jabir tum ye lambi lambi thandi saans, kiya is duniya ke liye le rahe ho ? [Kehna ka matlab ye tha ke tum is duniya ki zindagi ko itna chahte ho]

Janab e Jabbir ne arz kiya, haan ae Moula yehi baat hae

Imam e Ali, Wasi e Rasulullah ne farmaya ae Jabir suno (listen)

Insaan ki puri zindagi ka daro madar (dependence) saat baataun per hae

Aur unhi saat 7 chezaun per lazataun (pleasures, Indulgences) ka khatema bhi hae, us se badhkar duniya mae koi lazzat (enjoyment satisfaction) nahi

1) khane ki chez

2) mashrubat, pi'ne ki chez (drinks)

3) libaas (clothes dress)

4) laz'zat e Nikah (sexual pleasures)

5) Sawari (ride)

6) Sunghne ki chez

 (perfume, smell)

7) Sunne ki chez

   (Hearing : music & songs)

Ae Jabir tum zara in chezaun ki haqeeqat per ghor karo (ponder & think on the realities of these things)

Zameen per khane ki chez mae sab se achi woh shehed (honey) hae jo ek makhi (insect) ka luab e dhen (saliva) hae

Pe'ne (drink) mae sab se achi chez pani hae jo ke aasman se nazil hota hae aur zameen per mara mara phirta (flows on the land) hae

Behtreen libas woh Dibaaj (silk) hae jo ek keede (insect, silk worm) ka luab (secretion) hae

Behtreen mankuhat (jisse nikah hota hae) woh aurat hae, duniya wale uski jis chez ko achi nigaah se dekhte hain, wohi uske jism ki sab se ziyada gandi jagah hae, jiski taraf dekhne se roka gaya hae

Sab se behtreen sawari (ride) ghoda (horse) hae jo khatal khital (used in wars and fights)

Behtreen sunghne (perfume) ki chez woh mushk (musk) hae jo ek janwar, haran (dear) ke naaf (naval, belly button) ka sukha huva khoon hae (dried blood) hae

Aur sunne ki (hearing) sab se achi chez woh gaana bajane (songs and music) hae jiska sunna Allah taala ke nasdik ek bahut bada gunah hae

Ae Jabir tum aisi chezaun ke liye aur aisi duniya ke liye thandi saans (cold breaths) le rahe ho

Jabbir bin Abdullah al Ansari farmate hain keh is irshad e mubarak ke sunne ke baad mae kabhi is duniya ka khyal aur uski khaesh nahi kiya

Allah taala hum ko is duniya ki haqeeqat ko samajhne ki tawfeeq de

Hadees e shareef hae

الدنيا جيفة وطلابها كلابا

 Duniya ek murdaar (carcass) hae aur uska talab karne wala woh kutta hae

Allah' ta'ala hum ko aisi Duniya se mehfuz rakh jo sirf aur sirf hamari zindagi mae zawal (downfall) lasakti

10/3/15, 7:22:23 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🍂🍁🍂🍁🍂🍁🍂🍁

 Salaam alaikum !

 بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Allah taala ka karam hae ki Nisf (half) Ramazan ul mubarak khair wa khubi se mukamil huva, aur ab layali e fazela (mubarak raataun) ki amad hae

Allah taala hamare naqis (incomplete) aamal aur tuti phuti duaon ko qabool farmae

Allah taala ek bande mommin ki tutti phuti Dua ke liye farmata hae, "tum Dua mae takaluf na karo aur Muqafa wa Musajja kalam ke bajae ek fitri wa tabai (natural) kalaam Allah taala ki bargaah mae pesh karo.

( Do not decorate or use fancy and difficult words but use normal language & simple words which comes naturally from heart)

Zillat, Inkesari wa a'jisi se Dua karna bahut behter hae us'se ki fasahat wa rawani ke saath Dua ki jae

Dua karne mae koi chez muqrar nahi, Dua karne wala jo chahe Dua kare aur Allah taala se jo chahe maange, laikin zulum aur khate rahem ki Dua hargis na maange (breaking of blood relations, ya kisi ka bura chahte huve dua karna)

Dua karne wale ko chahye ke Dua se pehle kisi nek kaam, ya phir khair khairat zaroor kare

Khalis niyat se Allah taala se apne gunahun se toba wa maqferat talab kare

Allah taala ke doosre bandaun ke saath jo usne zulum wa haq talafi (deprived of their rights & dues) ki hae, jo takleef wa izza aur pareshan (pain, hurt & agony) kiya hae us'se maafi maange

Dua mae sab se pehle Allah taala ka Hamd (praise) wa shukoor (thanks) baja lae

Dua ke pehle beech mae aur aakhir mae Rasulullah aur aapke Ahle Baet e Kiraam per Durood wa salaam bheje (salwaat padhe)

Farz Namaz ke baad Dua karna bahut behter hae doosre Awqat  (timing) ke muqabil, Fajar ke waqt se leker tulu e aftab (sunrise) tak Dua mae mashqul rahna apni hajatain puri hone ka baas hota hae

Allah taala hum tammam ki duain, jo is maah e mubarak mae Allah taala ki bargaah mae hum kiye hae, aur karne wale hain, usko darje qabuliat ata farma

[Hazrat Moulana Nasrullah saheb muqaddas ka bayan inshallah kuch waqt ke baad karunga]

🍁🍂🍁🍂🍁🍂🍁🍂

10/3/15, 7:22:23 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: □■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

الله تعالی آپکو شہراللہ کی 17 شب مبارک کرے اور جمعة بهی مبارک هو

اللہ تعالٰی هماری نمازوں کو قبول کرے اور گناہوں کو معاف فرما  أمين

Kitab taweel us Sharia mae Roze ki ahmiyat ka zikar karte huve likha hae, ke Roza bache per us waqt farz hojata hae jab ke bacha seedhe aur baye mae farq karsake  (left from right) aur ye baat bache mae 5 ya 6 saal mae hojati hae

[ye baat tadiban, adab sikhana, adat karwane ke liye hae, roze ki ahmiyat batane ke liye hae, waisa farz nahi, jaisa ke Ahed e shareef ke baad farz hota hae]

Moulana Imam Maad al Mustansir Billah apne Majalis mae bayan farmate hain ke Roze bhi 7 Farz aur 12 Sunataun mae taqseem hain, aur jumla 19 hote hain jo ke bismillah ke addad (numbers) hote hain

Saat Farayaz ye hain;

1 ] har saal sheher e Ramazan ke 30 Roze

2] kafare ke tor per 2 mahine ke musalsil Roze, agar kisine jaan bujh (intentionally) Roze nahi rakhe, aur uske pas azaad karwane ke liye Gulam (slave) bhi na ho (ek roz ke roze ka kafara 60 Roze hain)

3] do mahine ke musalsil Roze, agar kisi ne qata se (by mistake) kisi ko khatal kiya, beqaer irada, (intention) baqaer qasd (without purpose motive or intentions) Agar gulam azad nahi karsakta hae to, roze ke saath usko "Diyat" (blood money) bhi ada karna hae

 4 ] "Zihaar" ظهار yane agar biwi ko Maa ya Bhen kisi ne khe kar pukara hae, yane apne per haram karlena, Iska bhi kafara 2 mahine ke Roze hain, agar gulam azaad nahi kar sakte hae to

5 ]  Qasam  حنث اليمين (promise) todne ka kafara woh teen din ke Roze hain, agar uske pas miskin ko khilane ke liye ya ghreeb ko kapde phenane ki taqat na ho

6 ] "Mutamata bil umrah ilal Haj" agar qurbani na mil'e, ya phir zabihat khreedne ki taqat na rakhe to 10 Roz Roza kare

7 ] Nazar ke Roze jo ke usne apne kisi jaes aur halal maqsad ke liye nazer kiye ho

Sunnat ke Roze mae 12 hain;

1 ] Aetekaaf ke Roze jo kam se kam teen din ka hae (agar woh Ramazan ke alawa kisi aur mahine mae baith raha hae, sheher e Ramazan mae to farz hae)

2 ] maah e Shabaan ke pu're mahine ke Roze

3 ] har mahine ki pehli jumeraat ka roza

4 ] har mahine ki darmiyani Budh (wednesday) ka roza

5 ] har mahine ki aakhri jumeraat ka Roza

6 ] ayaam e beez أيام بيض har mahine ki 13, 14, 15 tariq ke Roze

7 ] Dawood Alehe e Salaam ka roza, yane ek roz roza rakhna aur ek roz nahi (alternate) days, ye Roze bahut mushkil hoti hae

8 ] Jumme ke Din ka Roza, magar Jumua ka roza, hafta, ya jumeraat ke saath milakar karna chahye

 9 ]  Arfe ke din ka roza, ye us shaqs ke liye hae, jo Haj per nahi gaya ho

10 ] bache ka roza jab woh saat 7 saal ka hota hae

11 ] ahram ki halat mae shikar karne ka kafara, yeh Imam ke uper depend karta hae ke kitne Roze kis chez ke liye muqrar kare

12 ] Ahram ki halat mae baal  katne ya sar mundwane ka kafare ka roza

Allah taala humko in tammam farz wa sunnat ke rozaun ki sahi marefat ata kare, takeh hamare Roze ka amal sahi ho aur Allah taala ke bargaah mae uski puri tarah qabuliat ho

□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■

10/3/15, 7:22:23 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕

Salaam alaikum !

Moulana Ali ibn e Abi Talib farmate hain abid (ibadat guzar bande) ki teen nishani hae, Namaz, Zakat, aur Roza.

Aap ne apni aulad aur ahle baet ko wasiyat farmai keh, mae tum ko Allah ke taqwa ki wasiyat karta hun, aur Zakat ke ada karne ki takid karta hun, woh Allah ke qusse ko thanda karti hae

Rasulullah ka irshad hae keh jo koi Allah ki baqshish mae se ek hissa (zakaat) khush dili se ada kare, aur jisne ne bhi maal ki zakat barabar ada ki, uske maal mae kabhi nuqsan nahi hoga

Aur phir farmaya ke zameen mae, ya darya mae maal barbaad nahi huva, siwae uska jisne zakat maal rok diya

Tum apne maal ko zakat se mehfooz karlo,

Apne bimaraun ka ilaj Sadqa de kar karo,

Aur Duaon se balaun (calamities) ko roko,

Aur Saqawat se apne Nufus ko rihai dilao

Moulana Imam e Baqar Salwatullah alehe farmate hae

Zakat dene se maal hargis kam nahi hota, zameen per aur dariya mae woh maal hargis halak nahi hosakta jiski Zakat barabar ada kardi gai hae

Rasulullah ka irshad hae ke Zakat ada karne se maal ghat'ta nahi, aur Zakat rok rakhne se maal badhta nahi.

Moulana Ali salwatullah alehe farmate hae ke mae ne Rasulullah se suna hae mommin ka sadqa (zakat) shaitan ke jabde (jaws) ko cheer (tear) kar nikalta hae, aur poshida sadqa (khair khairat) woh rab ke qusse ko thanda karta hae, aur tum jab sadqa do to seedhe haath se do, is khadar chupao (hide) kar ki baye haath ko bhi khabar na ho

Farz Sadqa woh Zakat hae jisko openly Imam waqt ye unke muqrar karda Duwaat ko dena hae

Tatawaat ka Sadqa,jisko hum khairaat kehte hain insaan ko iqteyar hae woh dena chahte hae de, aur nahi dena chahe nahi de, aur chupa kar de woh behter hae, maqfi rakhna afzal hae

Moulana Ali Ibne Abi Talib ka irshad hae phode, phunsi, dubna, jalna deewar girne se zakhmi hona, is tarah 70 bimariun ko Sadqa dafa karta hae (gives protection)

Allah taala ne apne bandau per apni kitab e kareem ke zareeyeh Zakat farz kiya hae, aur usko pure hisaab se ada karne wale mutaqi aur ameen khelata hae

Zakat ka haq pura ada karne se Nafs mae nishaat (satisfaction & contentment) aur fazilat paida hoti hae

Moulana Imam Hakim Be Amrillah ne Moulana Ali se riwayat ki hae ke Rasul e khuda ne mommin ko apne Imam se apne maal ki zakat chuppane se mana kiya hae aur itna farmaya ke ye harkat nifaq hae

Aur farmaya ki jis per Zakat wajib ho aur usne uska haq na diya, to Allah taala Zakat ki adaegi baqaer uski Namaz nahi qabool karta, aur dhoka aur fareb diya huva sadqa (Zakat) bhi qabool nahi karta, aur jo shaqs haram kaamau se nahi rukta uski Zakat bhi qabool nahi karta

Allah taala humko in buraiyun se mahfoos rakhe aur is mubarak farz e deen Zakat ka paband banae

⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕

10/3/15, 7:22:24 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

19 شب شهر رمضان المبارك آپ سب کو مبارک ہو آپ سب سے دعا کی التجا هے، الله تعالی ہم سب کی دعا کو آج کی رات کی برکت سے قبول فرما

Moulana Imam e Jafar e Sadiq Zakat ke liye farmate hain

من كل جزء من اجزاءك زكاة واجبة لله تعالى، بل علي كل منبت شعر من شعرك، بل علي كل لحظة من لحظاتك زكاة

Imam ka irshad e mubarak hae ke, tumhare jism ke har jus (part) per Zakat Allah taala ki taraf se wajib hae, tumhare badan per ugne wale har baal per hae, balkeh tumhare har lamhe (moment) per Zakat farz ki gai hae

Aankhaun ki Zakat ye hae ke tum har chez ko ibrat ki nazar se dekho, (take lessons from hard facts of life) aur apni nazar har shahwat aur haram chez se neechi rakho.

Kaan (ears) ki Zakat ye hae ke tum apne kaan se Ilm wa Hikmat ki baat ko suno, Koran ko suno, aur waaz wa nasihat ki bataun ko suno, jis'se tumhari duniya se najat hasil ho, aur tum un bataun ko sunne se mu modh lo (turn away your face), jaise jhut se, qibat se, aur uske jaisi tammam bataun se

Zabaan ki zakat ye hain, ke woh apne ahel wa aulad wa Musalman bhai ko nasihat kare, ghafil logoan ko apni ghaflat ki neend se be'dar kare, aur ziyada se ziyada tasbeeh aur Allah ka, aur jis baat mae Allah taala khush ho uska zikar kare

Haath ki zakat ye hae ke Allah ki raah mae kharch kare, khair khairat kare, us chez se (maal wa daulat se) jo Allah taala ne usper fazal wa karam kiya hae, aur haath ko harkat de (kaam mae le) Ilm ki kitabat (to write) karne, jis'se log faida uthae Allah ki taat mae, aur har shar aur burai se apne haath ko rok rakhe

Aur tumhare paer (legs) ki zakat ye hae ke tum Allah taala ke huquq (plural of Haq) ko ada karne mae koshish karo, jaise muqaddaseen wa saleheen ki ziyarat karna, deeni aur ilmi mehfil jisme Allah Rasul ka zikar hota hae us'me shirkat karna, rishtedar ke pas aana jana rakhna, unse mael Milap rakhna, Allah taala ki raah mae jahad karne jana,

Yeh woh tammam batain hain jo tumhare Dil ko behter karne wali hain, aur jis'se tumhare deen ki salaamti aur behtari hae

Ye woh batain hain jo tumhara Dil mutahamil hosakta hae, samajh sakta hae, aur tumhare nafs usper razi hokar usper amal karsakta hae magar ye baat ussi ke liye mumkin hae jo Allah taala ke muqhlis wa muqrab bande hain

Issi baat ko Imam e Jafar e Sadiq, Emaan ke bayan mae bhi farmate hae, insaan ke har azo (organ) per ek emaan farz kiya hae, ek maqsus kaam us azo (organ) per Farz hae

Dil per Allah taala ki toheed, iqrar wa marefat farz hae, aur ye ke Mohammed e Mustafa uske bande hae, Rasul hain.

Zabaan per achi tarah baat karna, sahi baat karna, Haq baat karna farz kiya hae jaisa koran kehta hae

قولوا الناس حسنا

Logoan se achi baat kiya karo

وقولوا قولا سديدا

Rasti aur durust baat kho  

Aur Allah taala farmata hae

وقل الحق من ربكم

Aur aap keh dijiye ke Haq tumhare Rabb ke taraf se hi hae.

Aur phir kaan ke liye bhi Koran farmate hae

وقد نزل عليكم في الكتاب أن إذ سمعتم أيات الله يكفر بها ويستهزا بها فلا تعدوا معهم حتي يخوضون حديث غيره انكم اذا مثلهم

Allah taala tum ko hukum diya hae ke Allah ki ayaat ka inkar mat karo, unka mazaaq na uda, tum aise logoan ke saath mat baitho, yahan tak ki woh doosri baat na  karne lagae

kaan per Farz kiya hae ke Allah ka kalam sunne, uski taraf pura dhyaan de, aur haram aur aisi baat na sune jo Allah taala ko napasand ho

Aur Allah taala  farmata hae;

واذا سمعوا الغواعرضوا عنه

ke agar woh laqo (useless, bekar) baat sunte hain to anjaan hojate hain

Aur aankhaun ke liye farmaya

قل للمومنين يغضوا من ابصارهم ويحفضوافروجهم

Aap Musalman mardaun se keh dijiye ke apni nigah neechi rakhe aur apni sharmgaah ki hifazat kare, takeh koi uski taraf nazar utha kar na dekhe

Aur issi tarah paer ke liye farmaya

ولا تمشي في الأرض مرحا انك لن تخرق الأرض ولن تبلغ الجبال طولا

Tum zameen per itra ke, akad ke mat chalo, na tum zameen ko phad sakte ho, na pahadaun (mountains) ki unchai (height) pohunch sakte ho

Allah taala ne is tarah har azo ka ek emaan farz kiya, aur issi tarah uski zakat bhi ada karna hae    

اللهم وفقني بما تحب وترضي

Allah taala mujhe tawfeeq de us baat ki jisko tu pasand karta hae aur jis'se to razi hae aur khush hae

Oh Allah, the almighty give me your guidence to do things that makes you happy, and that what makes you contented and satisfied.

▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

10/3/15, 7:22:24 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: . ●○●○●○●○●○●○●○●○●○●

°•°•°•°•°•°•°•°•°•°•°•°•°•°•°•°•°

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Aaj 19 Shehrullah e mubarak ko Moulae kaenat Moulana Ali ibn abi Talib Salawatullah alahe ko ibne Muljim ne talwaar se zarb lagai thi jiski wajeh se aap, 21 Ramazan ul mubarak ko Shahadat hasil farmaye

Aapki nasihataun Ko yaad karne aur usper amal karne se bheter, aapke liye kiya khiraj e aqeedat (homage) hosakti hae

Kumael ibn Ziyad aapke mashoor sahabi the, Kumael farmate hain ke ek roz Moulae Kaenat ne mera haath pakda aur khabrastan ke ek kone mae le chale

Jab hum ek su'ni veeran jagaah mae baith gaye to aap ne irshad farmaya;

Ae kumael momin ka dil ek bartan ki tarah hote hae, aur nekiya aur achaiya us bartan mae rakhne ki chez hoti hae

Yaad rakho ki Ilm maal se bahut behter hae, Ilm tumhari hifazat karta hae aur maal ki hifazat tum karte ho

Ilm amal ko pak karta hae aur, maal kharch karne se ghat (reduce) jata hae

Ilm aalim ko zindagi mae taat guzar (obedient) banata hae, aur usku un bataun se arasta (decorate) karta hae, jo usko uski maut ke baad ki zindagi ko achi aur asaan karti hae

Maal ke khatam hone per uski duniyavi zindagi mae zawal (decline) aur khrabi aajati hae, aur maal jama karne wale zinda rahte huve bhi murda hojate hain, aur Uloma (aalim log) apni zindagi mae bhi aur uske baad bh haneshai zinda rahte hae

Ae Kumael tum khana shru karte waqt yeh kho

  بسم الله الذي لا يضر مع اسمه دآء و فيه شفاء من جميع الاسواء

Mae shru karta hun Allah ke naam ke saath, woh hasti jiske ke naam ke saath koi marz nuqsaan nahi pohuncha sakta aur us naam mae har marz se shifa hae

Ae Kumael jab tum khana khau to logoan ko bhi khana khilao, usme kanjoosi na karo, is baat mae koi shak nahi ke tum logoan ke razzak nahi ho, magar Allah taala tum ko is baat ka sawab zaroor ata karega

Ae Kumael tum jab khana kha lo, to bulund awaaz mae "Alhamdulillah" zaroor kho, is'se tumhara ajar ziyada hoga

Ae Kumael tum apne aqlaq ko nek banau, aur apne saathiyu se khush dili aur ache se milo, aur apne khadim aur naukar ko jhidko mat

Ae Kumael apne pet (stomach) ko khane se pura mat bhro, pani ke liye kuch jagaah chod do aur kuch hawa ki jolani (free movement of air) ke liye bhi

Ae kumael sahet (health) ka daromadar kam khane aur kam pine se hae

Ae Kumael, to kuch bhuk (hunger) ko baqi rakhkar dastarkhan se uth ja

Ae Kumael Zakat ki adaegi momineen mae, bhai chargi wa mohabbat, aur rishtedari mae barkat ka baas hoti hae

Ae Kumael to momineen ke saath khrabat (relation) ko badha aur tum rishtedaraun per hamesha meherbaan raho

Ae Kumael tum sadqa karo, Allah taala ke pas sadqe ka bahut bada ajar hae

Ae Kumael momin ki behtreen araesh (beauty, quality) woh tawazu  (humility & respect for others) hae, aur tawazu ki khubsoorti, logoan ki khata (mistakes) ko darguzar (ignore) karne, ache aqlaq rakhna, shafaqat wa meherbani se pesh aana, aur qil wa qaal yane, bakwaas aur betuki baat aur be'ja kalaam se bachna hae.

Ae kumael to dikhave se bach

Ae kumael tum deen ke mamle mae khuda ke liye agar kisi se behes wa mubhasa (argument & debate) karo to aqalmand se hi karo, bewaquf se ahtiyat karo yeh bahut zaroori baat hae

Ae Kumael to nalaeq se munazera (debate) mat kar, aur to unke saath aisa hoja, jaisa ke Allah taala Koran mae farmata hae

 واذا خطابهم الجاهلون قالوا سلاما

Jab jahel log unko muqatib hote hain to woh bas Salaam karte huve guzar jaate hae

Ae Kumael tum har haal mae sach kaho, Mutaqeen ka bojh utha (burden of being honest; mutaqeen)  faseqeen se dur rahe, aur qaen (amanat mae chori karne wala) ka kabhi saath na'de

To har haal mae pak daman rahe, sabar aur tahamul se har mamle mae kaam le

Ae kumael teri mohtajgi aur teri bechaeni ko logoan per kabhi zaher na kar, poshida rakh, izzat ke saath sabar kar, aur is baat ke sawab ki umeed Allah taala se rakh

Ae kumael tere bhaiyaun mae, sacha bhai woh hae jo shidat ki takleef mae bhi tera saath na chode, aur tere koi gunaah mae mubtela hone per woh Khamosh bhi na rahe (tujh ko tambih kare, aur haq baat samjhae)

Ae Kumael momin, momin ka aina hota hae, kiyunke woh uska har halat mae saath deta hae, uski mohtajgi ko rokta hae aur uski har halat ko bardasht karta hae

Jaan ae Kumael momin aapas mae bhai bhai hain, koi baat koi chez bhaiyaun ke darmiyan hael (in between) nahi asakti

Ae kumael to Allah taala ka, uski tammam naemataun ke ata karne per shukur ada kar

Ae kumael to har shidat aur takleef mae ye tilawat kar;

لا حول ولا قوة الا بالله العلي العظيم

yeh tere liye kafi hoga, aur har naemat per "Alhamdullillah" khe, is'se teri naemataun mae ziyadati hogi, aur jab teri risq wa rozi mae kami hojae, to Allah taala se Isteqfar talab kar, Allah taala teri risq mae wusat dega

aur ae Kumael, jab Shaitan tere dil mae "was wase" paida kare to us waqt to khe

  اعوذباللہ القوى من الشيطان الغوى واعوذ بمحمد الرضى من شر ما قدر وقضى واعوذ باله الناس من شر الجنة والناس أجمعين

Mae Allah taala se panah maangta hun jo gumraah shaitan se bahut ziyada taqatwar aur qawi (strong) hae, aur Mohammed Al Razi Salwatullah alehe se, har burai se jo Qaza aur Qadar hochuki hae, aur mae panah maangta hun Allah taala se un tammam Ins wa Jinn ke shar (burai) se

Ae kumael Allah ki naemataun se koi zamana khali nahi, tum Allah taala ki Hamd, Majd (buzrugi), Tasbeeh, Taqdees, Shukoor aur uske Zikar se ghafil na raho

Ae kumael Faraez ki adaegi mae koi riyayat (excluse) nahi aur Nuwafil ki adaegi mae koi sakhti aur shidat nahi

Ae kumael to is baat per bhi qor kar (think) keh, to kiyu aur kis liye Namaz padh raha hae, aur agar to yeh nahi jana to teri Namaz ki qaboliyat mae farakh ajaega

Ae kumael dil ki baat zabaan se zaher hoti hae, aur tera dil qiza (your diet) se banta hae, bas to zara qor kar ke to apne jism wa dil ko kiya qiza (food) khilaya, agar woh Halal na thi to Allah taala teri Ibadat, Tasbeeh, wa Shukur ko kabhi bhi qabool nahi karega

Ae kumael samajh le aur jaan le maqlooq mae kisi ki bhi amanat ki adaegi ko tark (avoid) karne ki ijazat nahi

Phir Moulae kaenat Moulana Ali Ibn Abi Talib ne farmaya

Mae kasam khata hun, ke mae Rasulullah ki wafat se kuch waqt pehle suna ke Rasul e khuda ne takid ki, aur teen martaba farmaya, Ae Abul Hasan (Moulana Ali ki kuniyat hae) amanat ko ada karo, chahe woh kisi nek ki ho ya fajir ki, chahe woh kam ho ya ziyada, yaha tak keh woh sui ke nake (hole of the needle) ke barabar dhaga (thread) kiyu na ho (kitni bhi mamuli chez kiyu na ho agar amanat hae to usko lotana hae)

Allah taala humko tawfeeq de keh hum in nasihataun ke paband bane

وما توفيقى الا بالله العلي العظيم

Tawfeeq wahi hae jo Allah Ali ul Azeem ki taraf se hae

10/3/15, 7:22:24 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■

●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

21 شب شهر رمضان المبارك آپ سب کو بہت مبارک ہو، آج یوم شہادت ہے مولاے کائنات مولانا علی ابن ابی طالب کی،آج کے دن کے وسیلے سے اللہ تعالی همارے گنا ه کو معاف فرما

Aap Agar Moulae Kaenat Ali ibne Abi Talib ke Khutbaat, Aqwal, wa Ashar ka mutalea (study) karenge to malum hoga ke in tammam mae aap ka ek hi maqsad hae keh is fani Duniya ki haqeeqat waze karna, aur aakherat ki asliyat aur sachai ko saamne lana, aur us aakherat ki zindagi ko kaisa is fani zindagi ke zareeyeh behter banaya ja sakta hae batana

Moulae e mushkil kusha ka ye ek aisa qol hae, jo humko is fani aur adna Duniya ki talq (bitter) haqeeqat ko hamare saamne khol kar daldeti hae, Duniya ki sachai ko saamne lati hae, aur humko deen wa aakherat ki taraf raqib (incline) karti hae

Allah taala hum sab ko Moulana Ali ibn abi Talib ki waliyat per qayem rakh, aur ahle baet ki mohabbat per khatama bil khair kar

Kiya hi behtreen nasihat farmai hae Moulana Ali ibn abi Talib ne ;

Ek roz Moulana Ali ne ek sahabi e Rasoolullah, Jabir bin Abdullah al Ansari ko lambi lambi saans (heavy breathing) lete dekh kar pucha

Ae Jabir, tum ye lambi lambi thandi saans, kiya is Duniya ke liye lae rahe ho ?

Janab e Jabbir ne arz kiya haan ae Moula, yehi baat hae

Imam e Ali, Wasi e Rasoolullah ne farmaya ae Jabir suno (listen)

Insaan ki puri zindagi ka daro madar (dependence) saat bataun per hae

Aur unhi saat 7 chezaun per lazataun (pleasures, Indulgence) ka khatema bhi hae, us se badhkar koi lazzat (enjoyment satisfaction) nahi

1) khane ki chez

2) mashrubat, pi'ne ki chez (drinks)

3) libaas (clothes, dress) pehne ke kapde

4) laz'zat e Nikah (sexual pleasures)

5) Sawari (ride)

6) Sunghne ki chez

 (perfume, smell)

7) Sunne ki chez

(Hearing: music & songs)

Ae Jabir tum zara in chezaun ki haqeeqat per ghor karo (ponder & think on the realities of these pleasures)

Zameen per khane ki chez mae sab se achi woh shehed (Honey) hae jo ek makhi (insect, bee) ka luab e dhen (saliva) hae

Pe'ne (drink) mae sab se achi chez pani hae jo ke aasman se nazil hota hae aur zameen per mara mara phirta (flows on the land) hae

Behtreen libas woh Dibaj (silk) hae, jo ek keede (insect, silk worm) ka luab (secretion) hae

Behtreen mankuhat (jisse Nikah kiya jata hae) woh aurat hae, Duniya wale uski jis chez ko achi nigah se dekhte hain wohi uske jism ki sab se ziyada gandi jagaah hae, jiski taraf dekhne se roka gaya hae

Sab se behtreen sawari (ride) ghoda (horse) hae jo khatal khital (used in wars and fights) ke kaam a'ta hae

Behtreen sunghne (perfume) ki chez woh mushk (musk) hae, jo keh ek janwar, haran (deer) ke naaf (naval, belly button) ka sukha huva khoon hae (Dried blood)

Aur sunne ki (hearing) sab se achi chez woh gana bajane (songs and music) jiska sunna Allah taala ke nasdik ek bahut bada gunaah hae

Ae Jabir tum aisi chezaun ke liye aur aisi duniya ke liye thandi saans (cold breaths) le rahe ho

Jabbir bin Abdullah al Ansari farmate hain keh is irshad e mubarak ke sunne ke baad mae kabhi bhi is Duniya ka khyal aur uski khaesh nahi kiya

Allah taala hum ko bhi is Duniya ki haqeeqat ko samajhne ki tawfeeq de

Hadees e shareef hae

الدنيا جيفة وطلابها كلابا

 Duniya ek mur'daar (carcass) hae aur uska talab karne wala woh kutta hae

Moulana Ali farmate hain:

طالب الأخرة يدرك أمله وياتيه من الدنيا ما قدرله

Aakherat ko chahne wala apne asal murad wa maqsad ko hasil karleta hae, aur saath mae uski taqdeer mae jo bhi Duniya mae usko milna likha hota hae woh bhi usko mil hi jata hae

ومن أصلح أمر الأخرة ،أصلح الله له أمر الدنيا

Jisne apne aakherat ke mamlaat durust karliye, Allah taala uske duniya ke mamlaat sawaar dega behter kardega

الدنيا بأموال ، والأخرى بالأعمال

Duniya ki zindagi maal se hae aur aakherat amal se hae.

انك مخلوق للأخرة فاعمل لها

Tum aakherat ke maqlooq ho aur ussi ke liye amal karo

ما يدرك أحدا ما يريد من الآخرة إلا يترك ما يشتهي من الدنيا

Tum aakherat ki pasandida chezaun ko hasil nahi karsakte jab tak ke tum Duniya ki pasandida chezaun ko tark (discard, leave behind) na kardo

Allah' ta'ala hum ko aisi Duniya se mehfuz rakh jiski khaesh aur raqbat, sirf aur sirf hamari zindagi mae zawal hi lasakti hae

Kaash ke hum ye baat samajh sakte.

Allah tabaraka wa Taala aaj ki raat aur din ki barkat se hum ko ye tawfeeq de
