10/3/15, 7:22:24 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🍁🍁🍁🍁🍁🍁🍁🍁

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

أپ سب کو ليلة القدر کی آمد الله تعالی بہت مبارک کرے

Buzrugane deen se hamesha sunte aye hain, insaan ke bade se bade gunaah ki maqferat ke liye do hi moqe Allah taala ne rakhe hae

Ek, Haj ke ayaam mae "Arfe ke Roz, muqam e "Arafat" per jae aur toba kare aur Allah tabaraka wa Taala se maqferat talab kare

Aur ek aaj ki Woh mubarak tareen raat hae, jisko hum ليلة القدر kehte hain, jo 23 wi raat hae shehrullah e Mauzam se.

Hadees e shareef hae;

ما تقرب العبد الي الله أفضل من سجود خفي

Banda Allah taala se sab se ziyada khreeb, poshida SAJDE ki halat mae hota hae, aur sajde hi ki halat mae humko Allah taala ki bargaah mae apni toba pesh karna hae, isteqfar karna hae, gidgid'ana hae, aankhun se aansu (tears) bahana hae

Moulana Ali ibn abi Talib Salawatullah alahe farmate hain

نعم العبادة السجود والركوع

Sab se behtreen ibadat woh Ruku wa Sujood hae.

وأفة الصلاة الرياء

Aur farmaya, sab se badi khrabi aur afat ibadat ki woh ibadat mae dikhawa karna hae

Imam Jafar e Sadiq salwatullah alehe farmate hae;

Jisne 'sahi maane' mae Allah taala ki bargaah mae Sajdah kiya, woh hargis, hargis, kabhi bhi nuqsan mae nahi rahega, agarche ke uska woh SAJDAH, Allah ki bargaah mae uski zindagi mae ek hi waqt kiyu na huva ho.

Aur woh shaqs kabhi kamiyaab nahi huva, jisne Allah ke siwae khyal kiya, yane Allah ke alawa kisi aur ki taraf tawaju kiya, usne apne Nafs ke saath dhoka kiya, woh ghafil raha, be parwah raha, is baat se jo Allah tabaraka wa Taala ne us bande ke liye uske Sajde mae ajar e azeem wa sawaab, uski is zindagi mae bhi, aur aakherat mae uske liye rakha hae

Jisne SAJDE  ko acha kiya,  khalis Allah taala ke liye kiya, usko kabhi bhi Allah taala se duri nahi hosakti.

Aur Jisne, SAJDE ke adab ka khyal nahi rakha, uski hurmat (respect & dignity) ko zaye kiya (discard waste), apne Dil ko apne khyalaat ko Allah ke siwae kisi aur se jod diya, to usko Allah se taqrub (closeness) kabhi bhi hasil nahi hoga

Tum Allah ko puri tawazo aur hurmat ke saath sajda do, apne aap ko zaleel (degrade) karte huve uski bargaah mae, ye jaante huve aur ye ahsaas rakhte huve ke :

Allah taala ne tum ko issi mitti (dust of the earth) se paida kiya hae, us mitti se jisko tum jaisi maqlooq raundhte huve, khundalte huve, apne paer (feet) se usper chalti hain, aur tum ko Allah taala ne tarkeeb (formed) diya hae us Nutfe (sperm) se jisko har koi gandi nigah se dekhta hae, aur tum ko paida kiya wahan se jahan tum kuch bhi na the

شيء مزكورا

Koi aisi chez na the, jiska zikar kiya ja'sake

Allah taala ne Sajud ka maqsad yehi rakha hae ke tum Dil se Allah taala se sabse ziyada khreeb hojao, apne andaruni zameer ke jasbe ke saath, apni Rooh se.

Jo bhi Allah se khreeb huva woh doosre tammam ter khilqaat (created) se dur hogaya

Tum agar zaheri sajde per hi qor karo to tum ko malum  hoga ke woh tum ko har dekhe jaane wali chez se dur kardeta hae

Jis tarah tumhari aankhaun se tammam zaheri dekhe jane wali chezain Sajde mae chup jati hain, issi tarah Allah taala chahta hae ke batin mae bhi tumhara Dil wa Dimaag se, Allah ke siwae har chez tum se chup jae dur hojae

Agar banda apne Dil ko SAJDE mae kisi aur chez ke khreeb kiya, usse taluq joda to yaqinan, woh us chez se khreeb huva, aur Allah taala  se dur huva

Allah taala ka irshad e mubarak hae

ما جعل الله لرجل من قلبين في جوفه

Nahi banaya Allah taala ne kisi bhi Insaan ke seene mae do (2) Dil, woh ek hi waqt mae dono ko khush nahi karsakta

Hadees e Qudsi hae, Allah tabaraka wa Taala farmata hae ke mae jab bhi dekhta hun apne bande ke Dil ki taraf, bas mae jaan janta hun uski kaifiyat ko, agar woh meri mohabbat ko iqlaas ke saath, mere Qatir meri taat mae hae, meri khushi aur razamandi mae hae, to us waqt mae uska waali (zimedar, caretaker) hojata hun, uske, maamlat ki durustagi ka, uske zindagi ke tammam maamlaat ka, aur mae us bande ke hamesha khreeb rahta hun

Aur jo bhi Insaan apni namaz mae, sajde mae, mere siwae kisi aur ke taraf mashqul hojata hae, woh sirf apne aap se, apne Nafs se thata mazaaq kar raha hae, bas uska naam us diwan (volume) mae likha jaega jisme خاسرين yane nuqsan uthane wale, qusur waar bandaun ke naam likhe jate hae

Moulana Ali ibn abi Talib ne ek waqt apni shaan mae khutba diya, aapne farmaya keh  "Mae Awaal hun, mae Aakhir hun, mae Zaher hun, mae Batin hun", aapke alfaz aise the ke logoan ko khudai ke dawe ka khyal jata, us waqt aap mimber se neeche utter aye aur zameen per apna chehra rakh diya, raet (sand dust) per aapke chehre mubarak ko lagadiya, phir aapne farmaya " Mae Allah taala ka ajis BANDA hun, tum mujhe Allah ka banda  samajh kar, tasleem karke, mujhe jo chahe tum khedo "Allah O Akbar"

Hamari ye halat hae, ke us Allah tabaraka wa Taala ki marefat to kiya dur ki baat hae, humko to hamari ajisi aur bandagi ka bhi ahsaas nahi rahta hae

Ae Allah humko hamare, ajis wa majboor bande hone ka sahi ahsaas karwa, takeh hamara SAJDA uski bargaah mae sahi maane mae SAJDA ho

سجد وجهي البالي الفاني،لوجهك الدائم الباقي، سجد وجهي الذليل لوجهك العزيز الجليل،سجد وجهي الفقير لوجهك الغني الكبير

Mae Sajdah karta hun apne bosida (fragile) aur fani (khatam hone wale) chehre ke saath us zaat ko jo hamesha qaem wa Daem aur baqi rahne wali hae, us chehre se jo zaleel hae usko sajdah karta hun, jo bada hi taqat wa khudrat wala hae jo jaleel hae, mae us chehre se Sajdah karta hun jo Faqir hae aajis hae, mohtaj, maangne wala hae, usko jo Ghani aur kabir hae, be niyaz hae, jo kisi ka mohtaj nahi  

Ae Allah aaj ki raat hamare SAJDAUN ko teri bargaah mae qabuliat ka darja ata farma

وما توفيقى الا بالله العلي العظيم

10/3/15, 7:22:24 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🔳🔳🔳🔳🔳🔳🔳🔳

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

جمعة مبارك

Allah taala ka fazal wa ahsaan hae ke humko ek aur khadar wali raat naseeb huvi, Allah tabaraka wa taala hamare naqis (defective) amaal aur tuti phuti duaon ko qabool farmae

Kal 25 Shehrullah e Mauzam 1005 hijri youme e wafat hae, Syedna wa Moulana Dai Humam us Zaman Syedna Sulaiman ibne Syedna Hasan bin Syedna Yusuf bin Sulaiman saheb ka

Aapke seerat (history) e mubaraka ko bilkul mukhtasar mae pesh karna hae

Aap 27 wae Dai hae dor e Tayabi ke, aap dor e Mohammedi ko khatam karne wale aur dor Qaemi ki ibteda karne wale hain

Aapki paedaesh e mubarak 27 shawal e kareem 961 Hijri ko Dar e Sadaan (aapke dada ka makan) qile Tayba Yemen mae huvi

Aapke walid Syedna Hasan per aapke dada Syedna Yusuf ne Dai ki nas kardi thi magar aapke dada hi ki zindagi mae aur Syedna Sulaiman ke bachpan mae hi aapka inteqal hogaya aur aap Dai e qaer munfareed huve

Aapki waleda Syedti Zainab ibne Musa ibne Sulaiman jo Syedna Yusuf ki bhetiji hoti thi, sahebe martaba Aalema fazele bibi thi jinka shummar us waqt ke Hudood e Dawat mae hota tha

Syedna Sulaiman saheb 5 saal ki umar mae yateem hogae, aapki tarbiyat wa taalim Aapke dada aur aapki waleda ke pas shru huvi

5 saal mae aap Koran padhna shru kiye apke pehle ustad miya Malik ibne Qutub the

5 saal mae aapki taharat e fitri ki gai (musalman kiya gaya)

8 saal ki umar mae aap Koran e majeed khatam farmaya, aapke dada Syedna Yusuf ne khushi mae ek badi dawat ki aur ek gae (cow) ki zabihat ki, jo ek khaas baat ki taraf ishara tha

9 saal mae aap ne Koran e Majeed ko hifz (by heart) karliye aur Sahifatus salaat ki puri duwain yaad karli, aur namaz salaat ke paband hogae

Aap ne Dada Syedna Yusuf ke peeche Arfe ki namaz padhi, aur issi saal Syedna Yusuf, apne pote ko khud padhana shru kiye

Daswae 10 saal Idd e Qadeer ke mubarak din dada ne Ahadees e Nabawi ki kitab "Shahab un Nabawi" aur "Kitab ut Tahara" jo Syedna Qazi un Nauman ki mashoor kitab hae padhane shru ki

Aap bahut hi tezi se apni zahanat (intelligence) aur zakawat (sharpness) ki wajeh se ilm ke madareej (levels) tae kar rahe tha

Jab aap 13 saal ke the 974 Hijri mae aapke dada Syedna Yusuf ne aap se is Koran e kareem ki ayaat ke mane (meaning) aur tafseer puchi,

وعلي الله قصد السبيل

Aur Allah hi per hae seedhi raah dikhana hae

Syedna Hummam ne bahut hi behtreen andaz mae is ayaat ki tashreeh aur tafseer ki, jisse aapke dada be inteha khush huve, aur apne pote mae woh buzrugiyat ke asaar (signs) nazar aagae jisse se aapki aankhen thandi huvi

Aur ussi saal jabke aapki umar 13 saal thi, 16 Zilhaja ko aapke dada Syedna Yusuf bin Sulaiman Yemen mae inteqal farmae

Aapke dada ka inteqal ke baad aap ka pura khandaan, Yemen ko chod diya aur Sidhpur ka irada kiye

Umar ke 14 saal mae aap Hindustan pohunche, Hindustan ke port (ghogha) per aapko Syedna Jalal ibne Hasan ke inteqal ki khabar mili aur Syedna Dawood bin Ajab Shah ke aapke baad Dai hone ki itela mili

Aap Sidhpur 975 ki pehli Mohurram ko pohuncha

Jamadil awal 975 aap Sidhpur se Ahmedabad Syedna Dawood bin Ajab Shah ki khidmat mae gaye, jo us waqt markaz (centre) e Dawat tha

Sydney Dawood aapka bahut hi khushi se isteqbal kiye aur khud hi Syedna Sulaiman ko taalim dena shru kiye

Sab se pehle aapko kitab "Daem ul Islam" aur "Mukhtaser ul Asaar" padhana shru kiye

Ek waqt aap Ahmedabad se Sidhpur kuch kaam se gaye magar bahut jadi wapas Ahmedabad aagae

us waqt Syedna Dawood ne mazaq mae bahut lateef andaz mae Koran ki ye Ayaat padhi

وما اعجلك عن قومك يا موسى

Ae Musa tum apni qom ke pas se kiyu itni jaldi chale aye ?

Janab Syedna Sulaiman ne bhi Koran ki hi ayaat se jawab de diya

 عجلت اليك ربي لترضي

Aapke pas jald isliye aya keh aap khush ho

Kiya hi behtreen jawab Syedna Hummam ne itni kam umri mae diya

Syedna Dawood ne aapko Musae dor khekar ye bhi bata diya ke agar aap Musa e dor hain to Aapka ek dushman Firaun (Pharaoh) bhi yaqinan hoga jisse aapko muqabela karna hoga

14 saal ki umar mae "Lailatul khadar" mae Syedna Dawood ne aapka Ahed E Shareef (Misaq) liya

15 saal mae aap Shariat aur Seerat ki bahut si kitabain padh rahe tha aur aap manzoom kalam (poetry) kehna shru kiye, aur Rasulullah aur Ahle Baet e Nabi ki shaan mae Qaside, manqebat aur muqtalif ashar kehna shru kiye

17 saal ki umar mae aap Rasaele Ahmedia jo Imam Ahmed bin Abdullah 9th Imam ki kitab hae jo "Rasaele Ikhwan us Safa" ke naam se maruf hae woh apne padha

18 saal mae aapko Namaz ba jamaat padhane ki Fushat ata ki gai, aur Sidhpur ke tammam Hudood e Dawat per aapko foq (supercede) kardiya gaya (us waqt Sidhpur mae sab se badi jamaat thi)

19 saal mae aapko Syedna Dawood ne kitab "Taj Ul Aqaed wa Madan ul Fawaed" jo hamare 5th Dor e Tayabi ke Dai Syedna Ali bin Mohammed bin Walid ki likhi huvi hae woh padhane shru ki

Ye kitab hamare ahle Haq ke,  sahi aqeeda kiya hona chahye, woh 100 aqeede aapne samjhae hain

Is kitab ke liye Syedna Sulaiman Saheb likhte hae ke ye kitab meri Surat e Roohani ko sab se ziyada munawar aur roshan karne wali sabit huvi

Umar e shareef ke 20th saal mae aapka Nikah, Idd e Qadeer ke roz fajar mae alhura Khadija binte Noah se huva jo Syedna Dawood ki bhetiji thi, aur shaadi ke baad widai pehli Mohurram ko huvi

Aapke Zindagi ke tammam ahem mamlaat kisi na Kisi mubarak din anjaam pae hain

Agar aap qor kare to aapki zindagi aur Rasulullah ki zindagi mae bahut si batain mumasil (similar) hain, jaise aapka bachpan mae Yatim hona, zaher se shahadat hasil karna iske alawa aur bhi bahut se hain

Hum Syedna Sulaiman saheb ki ziyarat karte hain, hum zaheri khabre shareef ko chumte hain, magar batini ziyarat bahut badhkar hae aala hae, aur woh aapki marefat hae aapke maratib ko jan'na hae, aap ne apne waqt ke Imam ke, Dai azeem ki haisiyat se batini tor per kiya kaam anjam farmaye hain

Syedna Dai Ali bin Hussain Almakrami ne aapki jab ziyarat ki to aapke tareef mae kiya hi baleeq baat kehi thi "Hijaab e Hijaab khair ul Mursalina" jo Ilme haqaeq se waqif hae woh jante hae ke ye aapke kitne bade muqam ki taraf ishara hae

Aapne ye farmaya tha ke "aap mae nubuwat ke tammam qasail e Mehmooda (qualities required for nubuwat) maujud the"

Nubuwat ke Qasail e Mehmooda 46 hain (qualities or virtues required for nubuwat) jo tammam ke tammam aap mae maujud the

Aapki Seerat e mubaraka per bahut kitabain likhi gai hae, aur urdu mae bhi moujud hain Hazrat Moulana Shakir saheb muqaddus ki likhi "Zia ul Emaan" ek behtreen kitab hae uske alawa Syedna Dai Ali bin Hussain Almakrami ka likha Risala "Al Shahab e lamea" jiska urdu tarjuma bhi hae, iski alawa aapki wiladat ke 400 saala jashan per jo muqtaleef buzrugaane deen ne tahqeeqi mazameen (researched articles) likhe hain jisme Mukaram Ras ul hudood Moulvi Abbas Saheb ka mazmun Syedna Sulaiman saheb ke ashaar per hamari baseerat ko roshan kardeta hae, Syedna Sulaiman saheb ne 11000 se ziyada ashaar (verses) kehe hae jo 6 volumes mae Syedna Jafar ne copy kiya hae

 Allah humko tawfeeq de ke hum in kitabaun ko padhkar aapki batini tor per bhi ziyarat se mushraaf ho

Inshallah aapka zikar aur bhi hae...............

🔳🔳🔳🔳🔳🔳🔳🔳

10/3/15, 7:22:24 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ▫▪▫▪▫▪▫▪▫

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن

Aaj youme e wafat hae Syedna Dai Sulaiman ibne Syedna Hasan qadasalahu arwahuma.

Aapki zindagi ke bees saal tak ka mukhtasar zikar huva tha

Aapke ki shaan badi hi nirali thi, aapke Muqeem, aapke ustad, aur aapko Dai banane wale Dai aapke liye apne ghar walaun ko farmate "kiya tum log samjthe ho ke Sulaiman mere pas padhne aate hain, arre nahi, nahi, Sulaiman to mujhe padhane aate hain, aur farmate ke unki Maa ne ek Noor ka tukda jana (gave birth to) hae"

23 saal ki umar mae Syedna Dawood bin Ajab Shah ne aapko Yemen bhejne ka irada kiya takeh aap apne Dada Syedna Yusuf bin Sulaiman ke muqam ko Yemen mae sambal lae

14 Rajab 984 Hijri ko Syedna Sulaiman saheb ko Syedna Dawood ne Hindustan se Yemen ke liye bheja aur us waqt farmaya "mae tum ko ek khaas maqsad ke liye bhej raha hun, aur woh maqsad tumhare siwae koi pura nahi karsakta hae"

Jazeere Yemen ke ravana hote waqt aapki umar 24 saal thi aur us waqt Syedna Dawood ne aapko tammam Yemen ke Hudood e Dawat per fauq kardiya tha siwae Syedi Ali bin Idrees al Sumbuli ke, aur aapko jazeere ka pura itlaq diya tha, ke aap wahan jaisa chahain karsakte hae baqaer Hindustan se ijazat liye

Umar ke 25 saal aap 20 Rabiul awal 985 Ko aap Taiba Yemen pohunche, syedi Idrees ne aapka khair maqdam (welcome) kiya, aur Yemen ke tammam Hudood per fauq kiya

26 saal ki umar aap Haj wa ziyarat e Nabi se mushraaf huve, aap wapas ke raaste per the ke Yemen mae Syedi Idrees bin Sumbuli ka inteqal hogaya hae aur aapko Yemen ki dawat sambhalne ki wasiyat unhune farmai thi, aap wasiyat ke hisaab se Taiba aye, aur Syedna Dawood bin Ajab Shah ko sab bataun ki khabar ki aur aapke ahkam ke muntazir rahe

27 saal ki umar mae aap ne Yemen ke Haras aur uske atraf ke tammam ilaqe jhan momineen rahte the, aap do'ra (tour) kiye, aur sab momineen aapki taat kiye    

 Issi saal Syedna Dawood bin Ajab Shah ka Hindustan se mushraf mila, aapko Syedna Idrees ki taziyat thi aur saath hi mubarakbaad aur khushi ka ishaar tha ke aapko pure jazeere ka itlaq (power) mila hae

Syedna Dawood ne aapko yehi likha, ke hum yehi baat aapke liye chahte the aur aapko Hindustan se bhejne ka maqsad bhi yehi tha

Issi saal aapki waleda Zainab binte Musa bhi Hindustan se Yemen ayi, aapka bahut bada muqam tha aur Hudood e kiraam mae shummar hota tha

988 Hijri umar ke 28 saal aapko ek farzand paida huve Yusuf jinki tareeq e paedaesh bhi 27 shawal thi jo aapki ki bhi tareeq e paedaesh thi, aur issi saal aapki buzrug waleda ka Yemen mae inteqal bhi huva

Umar ke 30 wae saal aapke halaat khrab hone shru huve, Yemen turkey hukumat ke control mae tha unke Governor Hasan turkey tha, aur Dawat ke mamlaat Ameer Mohammed bin Ismail aur Abdullah almehfuzi ke haataun mae the, teeno bhi bade munafiq the Dawat ke, dushman the, Syedna hummam in teeno se bahut hi narmi aur ahtiyat se bartau (behave) karte takeh momineen ko nuqsaan na pohunche

Issi saal mae aapne ek kitab "Muktatabat Al Hasana" jisme aap ne apni wiladat se leker aakhri umar tak ka ahwaal likha hae, us waqt ke halaat ke ek lamba chapter likha hae

30 saal ki umar se aapke mushkilat ka saqt tareen daur shru huva, magar aap ne Syedna Dawood ke hukum ke mutabiq kaam kiye aur halaat per sabar farmate rahe

Inshallah aapke zindagi ka aage ka ahwaal ainda. ....................................

10/3/15, 7:22:25 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ☆☆☆☆☆☆☆☆☆☆☆☆

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Inshallah, zikar Syedna Sulaiman saheb ka Eid ke baad karunga, bahut hi dilchasp aur lambe waqeat hain, hamare emaan ko tazgi baqshne wale hain

Sajde ka zikar huva tha, ke Sajde mae hamari batini dil ki kiya kaifiyat honi chahye, is per kisi ne khaesh ki hae ke, hamara zaheri Ruku aur Sujood ka rukun (action) kaisa hona chahye woh bhi batae

Hamare Duwaat ne zaher ho, ya batin har baat ko bilkul waze (clearly) tor per bayan farmaye hae

Syedna Dai Qazi un Nauman ibne Mohammed jinhune ne "Daem ul Islam" kitab likhi, aap hi ne apni mashoor taleef (collection) kitab "kitab ut Tahara Almubaraka" mae Ruku aur Sujood ke liye farmate hain;

Aap farmate hae ke Qiyam (standing) se Ruku mae jata waqt Takbir kehe aur haath ki hateli (palm) ko khol kar haath kaan tak lejae, haath kaan se uper aur aage nahi jana chahye

Ruku mae haath se guthne (knee) ko pakadna hae aur haath aur ungliyun ko usper phelana hae, aur kamar (back) ko straight rakhna hae, oloma kehte hae ki kamar ko itna seedhe rakhe ke pani ka piyala peeth (back) per rakhe to pani na gire, aur saath mae dono haath (arms) ko badan se thoda dur karna hae, aur khoni (elbow) ko bhi slight fold karna hae aur apne jism se dono haath (arms) ko thoda dur rakhne hae, magar itna nahi ke bahut dikh kar aye, aur doosre ki namaz mae takleef ho, magar haath badan ko chipka huva nahi hona hae

Aur namazi jab is tarah se itmenan se Ruku de de, to phir Ruku mae usko ye tasbeeh karna hae

سبحان ربي العظيم بحمده

Ye tasbeeh namazi ko teen waqt padhna hae aur agar saat waqt padhta hae to aur acha hae, aur uske baad bhi agar woh Dua karna chahta hae to kare acha hae, magar imamat karwa raha hae to teen waqt tasbeeh karna bheter hae

Ruku mae jaate waqt takbeer per haath uthae aur Ruku se uthte waqt ye kalemaat kehte huve

 سمع الله لمن حمده  ya  ربنا لك الحمد

Kehne per bhi haath uthae, magar Sujood mae qiyam ki halat se jate waqt haath nahi uthana hae, is tarah is rukun e "Ruku" ko Syedna Qazi un Nauman ne samjhaya hae

لو يعلم المصلي ما يغشاه من الرحمة ما رفع رأسه من السجود

Agar namazi ko ilm hota ke kitni Rahematain usko, uske Sajud mae gher rakhi hae to woh kabhi bhi Sajde se sar nahi uthata

Sajde ke liye Syedna Qazi un Nauman farmate hae ke jab tum Sajdah do to apne peshani (forehead) aur naak (nose) ko zameen per lagao aur hateli (palm) ko khula rakho aur haath ko chehre se kuch fasle per rakho aur haath kaanaun se aage nahi jana chahye, aur haath aasteen (sleeves) se baher rakhkar sajda dena hae, sleeves per sajdah jaes nahi, aur issi tarah amame aur topi ki kor (border) per bhi Sajdah jaes nahi hae

Haath aur khoni (elbow) ko badan se alag rakhna hae chipkana nahi chahye, aur na hi seene (chest) ko zameen per lagana hae, khoni (elbow) ko zameen se upar rakhna hae, haath ko zameen per litana nahi hae, aur sajde mae paer ke ungliun ke uper ke hisse ko zameen per lagana hae, aur agar ungli ke neeche ke hisse ko lagae to bhi jaes hae magar bheter pehli shakal hae

Sajda saadi zameen (plain land) per dena sabse afzal hae, aur har us chez per de sakte hae jiska libaas pehna jaes hota hae, halal janwar ki khal (hide, wool etc), magar bhige (wet) Zameen aur anaj (grain) aur khane ki chez per jaes nahi hae

Zameen per ugne wali nabat (grass, shrubs, plants) per namaz jaes hae agar us'me insaan ke khane ki koi chez na ugti ho

Issi tarah baithak ke liye aap farmate hae ke namazi ko chahye ke baya (left) paer (leg) lita'de (flat below your body folded inside) aur seedhe paer aur uske angothe (thumb) per weight lae aur left tashreef  (buttock) ko zameen ko lagade aur apne haath raan (thighs, just above your knees) per rakhe aur ungli guthne ke khreeb ho magar guthne per nahi ho

majboor insaan ke liye sab baat ki ijazat hae, humko chahye ke jitna mumkin hosakta hae usper amal karne ki koshish kare

Hum ne walid e Hazrat muqaddus se suna hae ke insaan ko aankh khuli rakhkar namaz padhne chahye, nazar sajda gaah per hona chahye aur Ruku mae sar (head) ko kuch uthana chahye takeh nazar aur chehra sajde ki jagaah per ho apne paer (feet) ki jagah per nazar no ho, aur namaz ko puri be'dari (alertness) se padhe, susti aur aadhi neend ki halat mae nae padhe

Moulana Ali farmate hain :

اذا قام أحدكم الي الصلاة فيصل صلاة مودع

Jab bhi Insaan namaz ke liye kheda rahe, to woh ye khyal kare ke ye uski aakhri namaz hae

Aur yaqinan ye baat hum mae khushu, khusu, aur arkaan ke sahi hone ka za'meen hojaegi  

Allah humko tawfeeq de ke hum har namaz is khyal ke saath hi padhe

وما توفيقى الا بالله العلي العظيم

10/3/15, 7:22:25 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ♢■♢■♢■♢■♢■♢■♢■♢

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

اللهم اجعلني من زوارك وعمار مساجدك وافتح لي باب رحمتك وأغلق عني باب معصيتك، الحمدلله الذي جعلني ممن يناجيه

Ae Allah to mujhe masajid ki ghadi ghadi ziyarat karne wala (Masjid aane jane wala bana) aur tere masajid ko abaad karne wala bana, aur khol de mere liye tere rehmat ke darwaze aur bandh karde mere liye gunaah ke darwaze

Allah tera Hamd hae is baat per ke tu ne mujhe teri bargaah mae munajaat karna wala (ajisi ke saath ahista ahista Dua karna wala) banaya

Ramazan ul mubarak ki barkat hae, har koi koshish karta hae ke Masjid mae ba-jamaat namaz ki pabandi karle, koi saal tammam  paband hote hae, koi maah Rajab, Shabaan wa Ramazan ka paband hota hae aur koi sirf Ramazan ul mubarak ka, jiska jaise amal hoga, waise uska sawab ya iqaab (saza)

Har mutaqi perhazgaar abid ki tafreeh gaah woh masjid hoti hae, Rasulullah ne farmaya;

المسجد بيت كل تقي

.

Masjid har mutaqi, parhezgar shaqs ka ghar hae

Aur farmaya ;

احب البقاع الي الله المساجد

Allah taala ke pas sab se pasandida muqam woh masajid hae

Aur farmaya ;

واتخذواالمساجد بيوتا

Tum masjid ko apna ghar jaisa banalo (tum kasrat se us'me ate jate raho)

Imam e Jafar e Sadiq farmate hain, us shaqs ke liye jo masjid mae namaz ke liye hazir hota hae, aap farmate hain;

Ae shaqs jab to masjid ke darwaze per pohunchta hae to zara ruk ja, aur jaan is baat ko keh

To ek azeem us shaan badshah ke darbar mae dakhil hone ka irada kar raha hae, aisa Darbar jiske farsh (floor) ko siwae مطهرين muthareen ke kisi ko bhi khundalne (walk on) ki ijazat nahi, aur na uske bargaah mae siwae Sidiqeen (sache log) ke kisi ko ijazat hae

Tum dakhil ho to us badshah e azeem (Allah ki zaat) ki haibat, raub, aur dab'dabe ka sahi andaza karlo, kiyunke tujhe ek azeem khatre (danger) ka saamna hae, agar tu ne zara si bhi qaflat ki, to woh zaat (Allah) puri qudrat wa taqat rakhta hae ke jo chahe woh tere saath kare, chahe to woh tere saath adal wa insaaf kare, ya chahe to tere saath Meherbani se fazal aur karam kare

Agar Allah taala tere se Meherbani kare aur apne fazal aur rehmat se tere thode se amaal ko qabool karle jo tu ne taat ke saath uske bargaah mae pesh kiye hae, to woh tujhe bada sawab aur inam dega us amaal per

Aur agar Allah taala tujh se apne Haq ko jatate huve, tujh se Iqlaas aur sachai ke saath tere amaal ko talab kare, aur agar amaal mae iqlaas aur sachai ki kami hogi to woh tujhe rok dega aur radd (reject) kardega agarche ke tera amal kitne hi ziyada kiyu na ho

وهو فعال لما يريد  

Woh jo chahe kare woh uska Haq hae

Tum jab us Badshah (Allah) ke darbar mae hazir ho to Inkesari ke saath apne qusur, faqar aur ajisi ka aeteraaf karo

To Allah taala ki taraf mutawajeh ho raha hae, uski ibadat ke liye, usse unsat chah raha hae, uski bargaah se, to ye baat achi tarah jaan le, ke maqlooq ke koi bhed wa raaz usse chupe huve nahi hae chahe woh alaniya kiya ho, ya maqfi mae kiya ho

Tum uski bargaah mae apne aap ko sab se ziyada mohtaj Faqir khyal karo, aur apne Dil ko Allah ke masiwa har shuqul se khali karlo jo tum ko tumhare Rabb se rok de,

To tere amaal ke zareeyeh  dekh ke tera naam kis diwan (register) mae Qiyamat ke din likha jaega (unme jo najat hasil karke jannat mae dakhil honge, ya jinko jahannam bheja jaega)

Agar tum ko apni munajaat ki mithas ka maza chakna hae, uske bargaah mae muqatebat "kalam" karne ki lazzat hasil karna hae, aur uski rehmat ke piyale se pina hae, to tum apne aap ko sab se bheter andaz mae uske saamne pesh karo

Tum Allah ki bargaah mae aise hazir ho, ye iqrar aur tasleem karte huve ke ab Allah ke siwae aur koi nahi hae jo tumhari umeedaun ko puri karne wala hae

Aur jab Allah taala tumhari dil ki sachi niyat ko jane ga aur uski janib tumhare iqlaas ke saath ajisi se ilteja karne ko dekhega, tab woh Rehmat, Rafaat aur lutf wa karam ki nigaah se tum ko dekhega

Aur agar tum aisa nahi karsakte ho to ruk jao, thed jao, tumhari umeedaun ko koi puri karne wala nahi

Allah taala tawfeeq dega usko, jisko woh pasand karta hae, jis'se woh razi hae, Allah taala kareem hae aur woh karamat ko pasand karta hae, woh مضطرين mustareen (bechain dil) ki ibadat ko pasand karta hae, unko pasand farmata hae jo apne aap ko gunahun ki sharmindagi ki aag mae jala leta hae

Allah taala Koran e Majeed mae farmata hae

امن يجيب المضطر اذا دعاه ويكشف السوء

Kaun hae (Allah ki siwae) jo jawab deta hae مضطر ko (person in distress), jab woh usko pukarta hae, aur Allah taala dur kardeta hae unki takleef ko pareshaniyu ko

10/3/15, 7:22:25 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🐾🍃🐾🍃🐾🍃🐾🍃

سلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

ليلة الوداع أپ سب کو بہت مبارک ہو

SALAAT  صلواة  Namaz

Kiya hi ahmiyat bayan ki gayi hae, Namaz ki Koran e majeed mae aur Aulia Allah ke aqwal mae.

Allah taala ne jitne bhi faraez hum per wajib wa farz kiye hain, unme sab se afzal wa Aala Namaz hi hae

Momineen ki qurbani aur muvaqeneen (yaqeen rakhne wale) ki ibadat hae.

Allah taala se qurbat (nearness) ka sab se bheter zareeyah woh Namaz hi hae

Hamara nafs ko Namaz johar (enlighten) dar karti hae, usme badi khubi aur achai paida hoti hae aur namazi is duniya mae sambhal jata hae, gunahaun se bajta hae aur aakherat ke ranj wa ghum aur pareshani se mahfus hojata hae,

Hamare Nafs ko Namaz bilqua بالقوة (passive) se bilfael بالفعل (active) ki taraf le jati hae.

Moulana Hakim be Amrillah Rasoolallah se riwayat farmate hain ke tum apne 'Nufus' ko apne aamal se najat dilao aur sab se bheter amal Namaz hi hae, tumhare deen ka chehra Namaz hae.

Imam e Jafar e Sadiq farmate hain ki mae Allah ki marefat ke baad kisi chez ko, Namaz se ziyada afzal nahi janta

Namaz ko chodne wale ka deen e Islam mae koi hissa nahi, naseeb nahi.

Momin jab Namaz mae hota hae to woh Allah taala se sab se ziyada khreeb hota hae.

Moulana Ali Ibn Abi Talib riwayat karte hain Rasulallah se,

Jis ne wasu kamil kiya, Namaz achi tarah ada ki, apne maal ki Zakat hisaab se ada ki, apne qusse (anger) ko pi gaya, zaban ko khabu mae rakha, neki aur bhlai ka kaam kiya, apne Rab se apne gunahun ki maafi chahi, apne ahle bait (family nember) ka khyal rakha, bus usne Emaan ke usool aur haqaeq kamil karliye ab uske liye Jannat ke darwaze khule hain

Ek riwayat Rasulallah se hae keh, Jannat mae ek jhad (tree) hae jiski jad (roots) se ablaq (black & white) ghode (horses) niklenge jinki lugaam sone ki aur zeen (saddle) moti aur yakoot ki hogi, aur Jannat mae "Ahle iliyeen" un ghodoun (horse) per sawaar honge us waqt Jannat ke neeche ke darje (level) wale pujhenge keh in logoan ko ye karamat (privilege) kis liye di gai, jawab milega ye log raat mae ibadat se qiyam karte the jab tum sote the, yeh Roza rakhte the jab tum khate pite the, yeh sadqa karte the jab tum kanjusi karte the, yeh log, jab Allah ki raah mae Jihad karte the us waqt tum busdil (showed your cowardice) bante the

Jis kissi ne gunaah kiya aur sharminda huva, ghalti ka ahsaas huva, to usko chahye ke kamil wasu kare aur phir aise muqam per nikal jaye jhan usko koi nahi dekhta ho, phir do rakat Namaz padhe aur phir Dua maange, ke ae Allah mere falan falan (so & so) gunaah ko maaf karde, uski woh Namaz us gunaah ka kafara hogi, woh gunaah jo bande (insaan) aur mabud (Allah taala ki zaat) ke darmiyan, ahkam Ilahi ki nafarmani mae huve sirf woh, woh gunaah hargis nahi jo bande aur bande ke darmiyan huve, zulum aur taddi (refusal) se huve, woh gunaah hargis maaf nahi honge, siwae iske ke mazlum, zalim ko maaf karde, ya phir us bande ka haq pura ada karde

Moulana Ali Ibn Abi Talib farmate hain Namaz ek tarazu (weighing scale) hae jo jitne dega utna lega

Namazi jab Namaz ke liye kheda hota hae to aasman se Rehmat nazil hoti hae aur Farishte usko gheir lete hain, agar Namazi yeh janta hota ke usko Namaz mae kiya mil raha hae to Namaz se apna chehra kabhi nahi phirata.

Allah ke nasdik sab se ziyada nek amal Namaz hi hae, tammam Ambia ki vasiyat bhi yehi hae

Jab ek banda Namaz mae sajda deta hae to Iblees chilata hae ke afsoos ke is insaan ne taat ki (been obedient) aur mae ne nafarmani ki

Masjid ke padosi ki Namaz Masjid mae honi chahye, Masjid barkataun aur saadataun ke nazil hone ki jagaah hae.

Masjid mae Namaz ke intezar mae baithna bhi ibadat hae aur qibla rukh baithna sunnat hae.

Masjid apni veerani ki Allah se shikayat karti hae, aur koi Namazi aata hae to khush hojati hae, jaisa ke tum koi qaeb (absent) aziz (relative) ke wapas aane per khush hote ho

Masjid mae hathyar (arms) lagana mana hae, khreed wa farokht (trading) mat karo, zor se baat mat karo, har hafta khushbu (incense, Agar or buqur) do, gandagi se pak wa saaf rakho, jis ne Masjid ko izzat di uska ahteram kiya, Allah taala us se Qiyamat ke din haanste huve milega

Moulana Ali alahe salaam farmate hain ke jab Masjid mae dakhil ho to ye dua zaroor padho

       بسمالله الرحمن الرحيم

بسم لله وبالله إلسلام عليك أيها النبى ورحمة الله وبركاته السلام علينا وعلى  عبادالله الصالحين

Aur Masjid mae dakhil ho to, do rakat "Thyatul Masjid" zaroor padho

Allah taala hum sab ko is ahem farize deen "NAMAZ" ka paband banae

🍃🐾🍃🐾🍃🐾🍃🐾

10/3/15, 7:22:25 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🌸🌺🍀🌹🌸🌺🍀🌹

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

ليلة العيد الفطر،وعيد الفطر المبارك

🍃🍁🌿🍂🍃🍁🍂🌿

Aap sabko EID UL FITER ki RAAT wa EID UL FITER ki mubarakbaad pesh khidmat hae

Moulana Imam Ali e Zainulabedeen Salwatullah alehe ne kiya hi behtreen EID ki Dua farmai hae jo hamare "Sahifatus salaat" mae moujud hae, ye Dua Eid ki Namaz ke baad 'Imam e salaat' hamare liye khede hokar Allah taala ki bargaah  mae ajisana tor per maangta hae

DUA ke chand jumle urdu mae tabruk ke tor per Eid ki mubarakbaad ke saath pesh hae

Mommin ki Dua hae Allah taala ke bargaah mae ;

Ae woh (Allah) jo aise shaqs per rahem karta hae jis per bande bhi rahem nahi karte

Ae woh jo apne hajat mandaun ko haqeer (lowly) nahi samajhta

Ae woh jo uski bargaah mae gidgid'ana (sorrowfully  beg) wale aur ajisi karne wale ko nakaam wa na murad wapis nahi karta

Ae woh jo bande ke chote se chote tohfe ki qadar karte huve pasandadgi ki nazar se usko dekhta hae aur qabool farmata hae

Ae woh jo bande ke thode se mamuli se amal per bhi bade se bada ajar de deta hae

Ae woh, jo uske khreeb huva, to usko aur khreeb karta hae, aur jo us'se mu moda (turn away the face) usko bhi apni taraf bulata hae

Ae woh, jo bande ko saza dene mae jaldi nahi karta, itna rukta hae ke, yahan tak ke banda us gunaah ko mita le aur maaf karwale

Ae Allah teri baqshish, faiz wa karam se mere khaeshaat ke bartan bher gae hain (vessels of my wishes are overflowing)  

Har sifat (quality) teri tareef tak pohunchne se bekar hogai, teri bulundi har bulundi se unchi hae, har bulund aur aala teri bulundi, Jalal, wa majd (buzrugi) ke muqable bahut chota aur adna hae

Har shareef teri sharafat ke muqable bahut haqeer hae

Ae Allah, jo log tere siwae tere qair (apart from you) ke pas gae woh nakaam, na muraad, mayus, mehroom wapis huve

Jisne tere fazal ki justaju ki, un raqbat karne walaun ke liye tere darwaze hamesha khule hain, teri baqshish har sawal karne wale ke liye mubah (permitted, open) hae

Tujh se umeed rakhne wale mehroom nahi hote, aur teri baqshish se tere saamne aane wale na umeed nahi hote

Teri rozi tere nafarmani karne wale ke liye bhi pheli (spread out) huvi hae, aur tera Hilm wa burdbari tere dushman per bhi jari hae

Bure aur badi (wrongdoer, scoundrel) logoan ke saath bhi ahsaan karna teri hi aadat hae, sarkash wa baqi (rebel) ke saath meherbani karna aur unke haal per chodna woh tera hi tariqa hae

Afsoos us ke liye hae jisne tujh se mu modh liya, badi ruswa (insulting) karne wali mehrumi hae uske liye, aur saqt badbakhti hae uske waaste jo tere saamne maqroor (proud) huva

Kis qadar ziyada woh tere azaab mae phirta rahega, aur kitna lamba zamana woh tere iqaab (punishment) mae aata jata rahega, aur kitni hi dur hogi uske, us azaab wa iqaab se nikalne ki muddat

Aur ye tammam baat tere insaaf ke faisle per hogi, aadelana hukum (on just order) per hogi, tu kabhi bhi kisi per zulum wa sitam nahi karta

Tu ne to bande per khullam khulla apni hujjatain (argumements) zaher kardi thi, darane wali chezaun se agaah (warned) kardiya tha, aur bahut hi lutf wa meherbani se aakherat ki tarqeeb (shoq) dilaya tha, aur tarah tarah ki misaal ke zareeyeh duniya wa aakherat ke mamlaat samjhae the

Ae Allah tu ne apni mohalat ki muddat ko badhata gaya tha, aur azaab aur saza mae taqeer (delay) karta hi gaya, halanke to foran grift (pakad, catch hold) mae lesakta tha, tera pura ikhteyar tha, aur to puri taqat wa quwat rakhta tha

Na ye narmi teri ajisi ki wajeh se thi, aur na ye mohalat dena teri kamzoori ki wajeh se thi, aur na azaab mae deri karna teri ghaflat ki wajeh se thi, balkeh ye sab isliye tha ke teri hujjat har tarah se puri ho, tera karam kamil ho, tera ahsaan pura hojae, aur teri naimaat tammam ter ho

Teri buzrugi itni ziyada bulund hae ke uski haqeeqat ki hadd ki ja sake (usko samajh sake, to understand the reality of the existence of God almighty)

Teri naematain itni ziyada hain ke uska pura shummar karsake, aur tera ahsaan itna ziyada hae ke uske thode ka bhi shukriya ada kiya jasake

Mae teri tareef wa Hamd se aajis hun, mae apni ajisi aur majboori ka pura aeteraaf karta hun, mae itna kamzoor hun ke teri sahi tareef karne ki qudrat bhi nahi rakhta,

Ae Allah ye sab meri be raqbati ki wajeh se nahi hae, balkeh meri ajisi, majboori kamzoori ki wajeh se hae

Ae Allah mae tere pas aane ka qasd (irada) karta hun

انا ذا أمك بالوفادة وأسألك حسن الرفادة

Mae tere pas aane ka irada karta hun, aur tujh se achi baqshish wa karam ka sawal karta, umeed rakhta hun

To Mohammed (Salallahu Alehe wa sallam) aur unki Aal per rehmat bhej aur meri munajaat, sargoshi (whispers) ko sunle aur meri Dua ko qabool farma

يا مولاي كانت اليوم تهيي وتعبيي واعدادي واستعدادي رجاء عفوك ورفدك وطلب نيلك وجاءزتك

Ae Allah aaj ke din meri tayari aur aamadgi aur mustadgi (readiness) teri hi taraf hae, teri baqshish wa ata tere daen (offers) aur ata aur inam ke maangne ke liye hae, aaj ke din meri umeed ko mehroom na jane de ae mere maa'bud

🌸🍀🌺🌻🌸🍀🌺🌻

Ye Dua ka pura mukamil lafzi tarjuma nahi hae, Dua mae se chand jumle urdu mae apni zabaan mae pesh kiya hun, Allah tabaraka wa Taala aapki aur hamari naqis duaon ko qabool farmae Ameen !!

🍃🍂🌿🍁🍃🍂🌿🍁

10/3/15, 7:22:25 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Umeed hae ke aap sab ki Eid ul Fiter khair wa khubi se guzri hogi, Allah ka ahsaan hae ke sab bilad e Hind wa Sind aur tammam duniya mae jahan jahan ikhwan e momineen ki jamaat hae, wahan Idd ki namaz huvi

Allah taala ka ahsaan hae ke aksar jagah itne log bhi hain ke Namaaz e Idd hosakti hae

Ikhwan e Jamaat ka ek jagaah moujud hona ek bahut badi naemat hae

Is baat per Syedna Dai Gulam Husain saheb ki bahut hi hakimana tashreeh (philosophical explaination) lafz e "Jamaat" kisko kehta hain woh yaad aagai

Aap farmate hain ke aam tor per chand logoan ka ek jagaah jama hojane ko jamaat kehte hain, ya phir bheed (crowd) majma (collection) ya firqa (sect) kehdenge

Laikin ek aalim, ek falsafi ke pas jo "Jamaat" ki tareef (Defined meaning) ki gai hae, woh ye hae keh;

Jamaat ki tareef mae kha gaya hae ke bahut se logoan ka ek jagaah jama hona zaroori nahi hae, balkeh dimaag, khyal, aqeede, ka wabasta (connected) hona, unka itehad (synchronized bonding) hona Jamaat kehlane ke liye kafi hae

Aap kehenge ke agar ek lakh admi kandhe se kandhe (shoulder to shoulder) milae khede hojain aur agar unme dimaagi ishterak (commen thinking) na ho to woh hargis jamaat nahi kehlaegi, aur is ke barkhilaf (opposite to it) agar char log duniya ke char kone mae kiyu na ho, magar itehad e rae ho, muwafiq e khyal, ek aqeeda ho to woh ek haqeeqi jamaat hain (Common opinion, same belief & similar ideas & practices)

Haan ye aur baat hae ke ye itehad (unity) aur ittefaq (bonding) jismani ittehad wa ittefaq paida zaroor kardeta hae, kiyunke aksar aisa hota hae ke hum khyal log ek jagaah jama hojate hain, magar ye jismani ittehad Jamaat ki asal shart (condition) nahi

Nabi kareem ne Jamaat bandi aur ittehad per zoor diya hae aur farmaya

الجماعة رحمة، الفرقة عذاب

Jamaat bandi rehmat hae, aur alag alag rehna azaab hae

Aur ye bhi irshad huva

 يد الله على الجماعة

Allah taala ka haath jamaat ke uper hae

Jamaat ke afrad ek jism ke aza (organs) ki tarah hain, Jamaat, afrad (individual) se hae aur afrad jamaat se hae,

Jis tarah jism ke kisi azo (part) ko takleef ho to pure jism ko takleef hoti hi hae, aur hone bhi chahye, issi tarah jamaat ka koi ek aadmi bhi koi burai aur khrabi ki taraf mael (inclined) hojae to puri jamaat hi mutasir hojati hae

Is baat se sabit ye huva ke jamaat ka har fard (individual) apni zati amal se jamaat ki izzat ko badha bhi sakta hae, aur uski izzat ko gira bhi sakta hae

Nabi kareem ka irshad hae ke akele (alone) safar na karo, akele safar karne wale ka saathi shaitaan hota hae, aur Aulia Allah ne uske peeche hikmat ye batai ke agar usper Allah ka Amar (maut) ajae to kaun uske kafan dafan ka wali (responsible) hoga, aaj hamare ikhwan aise aise muqam per basse (settled) hain jahan koi aur ikhwan nahi, unko is baat per qor karna chahye, maut kabhi bhi, kisi jagaah bhi, aur kisi umar mae a'sakti hae, kam as kam hamare duniya ke aakhri safar, aur aakherat ki paedaesh ke maamlat jo bahut ahmiyat ke hae woh sahi anjaam pae

وما توفيقى الا بالله العلي العظيم

Tawfeeq (hidayat) wahi hae jo Allah Ali ul Azeem deta hae

Allah taala hum ko us jamaat se banae jiske liye Allah taala farmata hae

اوﻵيك حزب اللہ، اﻵ ان حزب اللہ هم المفلحون

Ye Allah taala ki Jamaat hae, aur agaah (beware) hojao, Allah taala ki yehi jamaat falah (kamiyabi) pane wali hae

Aur hum mae se har fard ki ye Dua honi chahye

ان تلحقنا بالنبين واصدقين والشهدا والصالحين

Ae Allah humko Ambia, Siddiqeen, Shohda (shaheed) aur Saleheen ki jamaat ke saàth laheq (connect) karde

والحمد لله رب العالمين والصلاة والسلام على سيدنا محمد وعلى آله

🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹

10/3/15, 7:22:25 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🌾🍀🌾🍀🌾🍀🌾🍀

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Allah ka lakh lakh ahsaan hae, ke hum per Ramazan e Shareef ko warid kiya tha, takeh hamare jismaun ki aur hamare nafus ki taharat wa safai hosake

Eid uski thi, jisne 30 din ke kamil Roze rakhe, apne jawarah (limbs) ko gunaah aur khrabi se roka, apne aankh ko haraam dekhna se, kaan ko haram sune se, zabaan ko pu're khabu mae rakha, aur Allah taala ki kitab Quran e kareem ki tilawat kazrat se kiya, faraez ke alawa raataun ko jaag kar tatawaat ki pabandi kiya aur sab se badh kar to khloos e Niyat se Zakat ko ada kiya, jo ke Roze se badhkar Farz hae

Walid muqaddus farmate the, "arre Eid uski nahi jisne naye kapde pehne, khushbu lagaliya, aur sheer khorma banaliya", yaqinan hum momineen ka shummar unme hargis nahi hae

Allah ka is baat per bhi shukoor hae ke usne, is 30 din ke Roze ki halat ko iftar mae badal diya aur hamare liye Eid ki khushi ka din muqrar kiya

Jis tarah 30 din Roze rakhna farz qarar diya ussi tarah 10 kisim ke Roze ka na rakhna bhi farz kiya, aur us din mae Roza rakhna haram kardiya, un dinaun ko janna bhi hamare liye zaroori hae

Majalis e Mustanzira mae Moulana Imam Maad al Mustansir Billah ke majalis mae, Imam farmate hae ke 10 Roz ke Roze jo haram hain, woh ye hain

1) Eid ul Fiter

2) Eid us Zoha (Baqar eid)

3) 4) 5) teen din ayaam e Tashreeq ke yane Eid us Zuha ke baad ke teen Roze 11, 12, 13 Zilhaja

6) Som ul Visal, yane do din, ya usse ziyada din ko milakar Roza rakhna yane beech mae iftar na karna

7) Som ul abad, hamesha ka Roza

8) Som ul haez (haeza aurat, during periods) ka Roza

9) Gunaah mae nazar maankar Roza rakhna,

Yane aisi niyat jo jaes nahi hoti masalan kisi aur ko naukri nahi milna, ye niyat se roze nazar karna

10) shak (doubt) ki halat mae Roza rakhna, Roza sirf yaqeen per rakh sakte hain

Allah taala humko in ahkamaat ka paband banae takeh hamara Deen aur hamari Duniya dono behter ho

ربنا آتنا في الدنيا حسنة والآخرة حسنة وقنا عذاب النار

Ae hamare Rabb hum ko duniya mae bhi neki ata kar aur aakherat mae bhi nekiyain ata kar, aur jahannam ke aag ke azaab se mehfuz rakh

Aur ROZA hi sabse badi dhal (shield) hae azaab e jahanam se bachne ke liye

🌾🍀🌾🍀🌾🍀🌾🍀🌾

10/3/15, 7:22:25 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ا▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

جمعة مبارك

Maut ek aisi haqeeqat hae jis'se har ek ko do char (confront) hona hi hae, ussi liye maut ka doosra naam "Yaqeen" hae

Hum ko doosraun ki maut ko dekhkar ibrat lena hae, aur apni maut ka yaqeen karna hae, aaj woh hain, to kal hamari bari hae

Hum sab bahut khreeb se apnaun ki maut ko dekhte hain, Aulia Allah ne bahut hi tafzeel se humko waqif karwae hae ke maut ke khreeb jab koi hota hae, to hum per kiya farz hae, hum ko uske saath kiya karna hae, is bare mae shariat ke ahkamaat kiya hain

Sab se pehle to jo bhi inteqal ke khreeb hae us'e humko Qibla ruq (direction) karna hae, agar woh peeth (back) per leta hae to usko aisa litae ki uska chehra qibla ruq ho, yane agar woh baithe to dono paer (feet) qible ki janib ho, ya agar woh karwat (on sides) hae to to phir uska chehra qibla ruq hona chahye

Agar tum inteqal karne wale ko aisa lita do'ge to Malaeka uski taraf mutawajeh honge, aur Allah taala bhi uski taraf nazre karam karega

Moulana Ali ibn abi Talib Salawatullah alahe farmate hain, ki ye fitrat hae, yane fitri baat hae ke mareez jo maut ke khreeb ho usko Qibla ruq kardiya jae

Aur jab tum inteqal karne wale mommin bhai ke pas ao to usko kalme shahadat

لااله إلا الله، وحده لا شريك له، وأن محمدا عبده ورسوله

Ki talqeen karo, padhne kho

Aur mareez ki aakhri halat mae yane نزع ke waqt mae, us takleef mae jab ke uska Nafs uske jism ko chod raha hota hae, to hum ko chahye ke uske sirhane (near his head) baith kar "Ayaat ul Kursi" aur uski baad ki do ayaatain padhe, aur phir ye Ayaat

أن ربكم الله الزي خلق السموات والأرض في ستة أيام

Aakhir tak yane

تبارك الله ربالعالمين  

Tak pura padhe aur uske baad aakhri teen ayaatain Su're Baqra ki tilawat kare

Yehi woh Dua, tarteeb di gai hae jisko hum "Dua e Sakraat" kehte hae jisko ek mommin ke maut ke khreeb ki takleef, bechaini, ke waqt humko padhna hae

"Dua e Sakraat" mae aakhir mae marne wale ke liye dua hae ke agar uski maut ka waqt aachuka hae to usko asaani se maut de, usko maut ke warid hone ki takleef se najat de, usper rahem kar, uski maqferat farma, uski toba qabool kar aur le chal usko teri raza wa rizwan ki taraf aur usko khush khabri de jannat ki , aur agar uski maut ka waqt nahi aya hae, uski duniya mae rozi baqi hae, to phir us'e shifa ata kar aur afiyat se sahet yaab karde

Imam e Jafar e Sadiq farmate hain ke maut ke waqt jab mommin ki zabaan bandh hojati hae, us waqt Rasul e Khuda seedhe janib aur Moulana Ali ibne Abi Talib bayi (left side) janib tashreef la'te hae aur Rasul e kareem farmate hain, tum jiski umeed karte the woh tumhare saamne hae, aur tum ko jis baat ka khoof tha usse tum mehfuz ho, uske baad uske liye jannat ka darwaza khol diya jaega aur Jannat mae marne wale ka muqam dikha diya jaega, aur phir us'e ye kha jaega ke agar tum abhi bhi duniya mae jana chahte ho to to duniya mae tumhare liye dhed sare (piles of) sona aur chandi hae, us waqt woh mommin khega ke mujhe Duniya ki koi zaroorat nahi

Us waqt uska chehra safeed hojaega, peshani (forehead) per pasina (perspiration) jari hoga, dono haunt (lips) sukh (dry) jaenge, aur uske dono naak ne nathne (nostrils) phool jainge (will get swollen) aur uske baye aankh (left eye) aansu ka khatre ainga (drop of tears)

Aur agar tum ye alamat (signs) dekho to samajh lo ke uska maut ka waqt aagaya hae, aur issi waqt ke liye Allah taala farmata hae

 لهم البشري في الحيوة الدنيا

Unke liye khush khabri hae duniya ki hi zindagi mae   

Us waqt tum ko chahye inteqal karne wale ke dono haath uske seene per baandh do (fold on the chest), uski aankhaun ko bandh (close) kardo, uske dono hauntaun (lips) ko milado, uske seedhe kaan mae Azaan do aur uske bayein kaan mae Iqamat de

اذا إصابتهم مصيبة قالواأنا لله وأنا إليه راجعون

Jab Tum per koi musibat a pohunchi to us waqt tum ye kho,

Hum sab Allah hi ke liye hain aur Allah hi ki taraf laut kar jainge

Allah taala hum sab ko aisi maut de ke hum sabke liye maut khush khabri ban'ker aye

اللهم ارحمني اذااشتد الأنين وعرق الجبين وبئس مني الطبيب وبكي علي الحبيب وانقطع مني الامل وحصل علي العمل

Ae Allah Rahem farma mujh per jab Ah wa pukar aur karhana bahut ziyada hojae, meri peshani pasine se bheeg jae, mere tabeeb (doctor) mujh se mayus hojae, yane ab doctor ko bhi mere bachne ki koi umeed na rahe, mere dost ahbab mujhe per rone lage, aur ab mujh ko meri zindagi se koi umeed aur khaesh puri hone ki gunjaesh baqi na rahe, ab sirf jo amal karchuka wahi baqi hae, bas ussi ka sahara hae

اللهم ارحمني اذااشتد علي الياس وسكنت مني الأنفاس وانتهت مدة أجلي وطويت صحيفة عملي

Ae Allah taala Rahem farma mujh per, jab shadeed hojae mujh per mayusi, aur jab ki meri saans (breathing) ukhadne lage, aur jab ke meri is duniya ki zindagi puri hone lage, aur lapet (fold) diya jae meri zindagi ka Sahifa (kitab), yane ab mere liye koi acha amal karne ki gunjaesh baqi na rahe. (I cannot do any good deed now)

Ae Allah tabaraka wa Taala mujh per rahem farma.

وأخردعوانا والحمد الله رب العالمين   

{ Ye Dua Syedna wa Moulana, Bab ul Abwaab, Syedna Abul Barkaat ki hae, jo hamare Sahifatus Salaat mae page number 631 per hae, ye uske ibtedai chand jumle hain.

Walid e muqaddus ko ye Dua bahut pasand thi aur haqeer ko apne aakhri ayaam mae padhne ke liye aksar kehte

Kiya hi behtreen andaaz mae maut ke khreeb ke halaat, aur maut ke baad ke halaat ki manzar kashi ki hae

A very vivid description of the events that unfolds at the time of one's death, and after the death }

10/3/15, 7:22:25 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🌹🌿🌹🌿🌹🌿🌹🌿

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Allah taala Koran e kareem mae Surre Yusuf mae irshad farmaya hae

وفوق كل ذي علم عليم

Har aalim ke uper usse ziyada jaane wala aalim moujud hae" [but over every possesor of knowledge is one (more) knowing]

Musa ibne Imran alehe salaam ko jab Rasul banaya gaya, pharaon (Pharaoh) per fateh wa kamiyabi hasil huvi, jab "Torat" kitab aap per nasil huvi aur aapko apni nai Shariat di gai, us waqt Musa Alehe Salaam ke Dil mae ek lamhe ye khyal aya, 'aaj duniya mae mujh se ziyada aalim aur buzrug banda koi nahi'

Us waqt Allah taala ki taraf se Musa ko hukum huva aur tambih huvi ke, ye khyal e batil (ghalat khyal) apne dil se nikal do, aur tum jao aur hamare us bande خضر (Khizer) se milo, jaise koran mae farmaya hae

أتينا رحمة من عندنا وعلمناه من لدنا علما

Hum ne unko خضر (Khizer) ko rehmat baqshi hae, aur hum ne unko Ilm e laduni sikhaya hae, yane Ilm e batin yane haqaeq ka Ilm diya hae

Syedna Dai Gulam Hussain saheb farmate hae ke har zamane mae baas aise unche aur aala maratib ke log bhi hote hae, jo apne Ilm wa hikmat aur fazilat mae kamal hasil kiye huve hote hain, aur unme baaz to Nabi aur Rasul ke ustad aur Hadi (guide) hote hae, yane maratab (rank degree) mae unse bahut badhkar hote hae, jo Koran ke, Khizer alehe salaam ke waqae se zaher hota hae

Musa Alehe Salaam ko Khizer alehe salaam se Ilm hasil karne ka hukum huva

Musa Alehe salaam ki jab Khizer se mulaqat huvi to Khizer ne kha, tum mere pas kiyu aye ho, Musa ne kha "mujhe Allah taala ka hukum huva hae ke mae aapse Ilm hasil karu, aapse sikhu",

Jab Khizer aur Musa ki ye guftagu ho rahi thi us waqt ek chidya (bird) ayi aur bazu behti huvi naher (flowing rivelet) se apni chonch (beak) mae pani li aur udh (took flight) gai

Us waqt Khizer Alehe salaam ne Musa Alehe Salaam se kha "Ae Musa tumhare Dil mae ye ghalat khyal paida huva tha ke tum ahle zameen mae sab se ziyada aalim ho, magar haqeeqat ye hae ke, tumhara aur mera aur saare jahan walaun ka Ilm, jo log pehle the, aur jo ainda duniya mae ainge, un sab ke Ilm ka muqable (in comparison) mae us pani se bhi kam hae jo us chudiya ne apni chonch (beak) mae leker udh gai hae

Khizer aur Musa Alehe salaam ka bahut hi lamba waqae hae jo koran ne pura tafseel se bayan kiya hae, aur saath mae Khizer ne Koran mae hi uski taweel bhi bayan ki hae, aur phir hamare Duwaat ne uski aur unchi taweel aur haqaeq (batini raaz aur hikmat) bayan farmae hae

Jab aakhir mae Khizer alehe salaam Musa Alehe Salaam ko wida kiya to, Moulana Ali ibn abi Talib riwayat farmate hain, ke Musa ne Khizer alehe salaam ko kuch nasihat karne ke liye farmaya

Us waqt Janab e Khizer alehe salaam ne chand nasihatain farmai

1) baqaer kisi zaroorat ke, baqaer kisi kaam ke ghar se baher na niklo

2 ) khushamad, chaplusi ya hadd se ziyada kisi ki ajisi mat karo

3 ) baqaer kisi tajub wa hairat ke bila wajeh mat hanso (don't laugh without any real reason, or don't laugh on small trivial things and matter)

4 ) khata karaun ki khata per musalsil malamat na karo (don't ridicule or insult a person for small trivial mistakes)  

5 ) apne gunaah aur khata (mistakes) per nadim (regret) hokar aansu bhau aur ro, (do cry on your gunaah and mistakes)

6 ) aaj ka kaam kal per mat dalo (don't procrastinate, don't put away today's work for tomorrow)

Jisne bhi ye gumaan kiya ke woh aalim hae, dar haqeeqat mae woh sab se bada jahel hae

Allah taala hum ko tawfeeq de ke hum ye jaa'ne ke hum jahel kitne hae, aur us jahalat ko dur karne Ilm hasil kare

اللهم هب لي قلبا تقيا، وحكما مستقيما، ولسانا صادقا، وعقلا يعقل عنك جميع الخطاب

Ae Allah humko mutaqi dil de, sahi hikmat aur faisle ki quwat de, sachi zabaan ata kar, aur aisi aqal de jis'se tammam khitab (kalaam) ko sahi samjhe (to understand what is told)

🌹🌿🌹🌿🌹🌿🌹🌿

10/3/15, 7:22:25 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

جمعة مبارك

Moulana Ali ibn abi Talib Salwatullah alahe ka kiya hi behtreen Qol hae

Aap farmate hain ;

لا تخلفن وراءك شيء من الدنيا فاتخلفه لأحد رجلين،أما رجل عمل فيه بطاعة الله سبحانه  فساد بما شقيت به واما رجل  عمل فيه بمعية الله سبحانه فكنت عونا له علي المعصية وليس أحد هذين حقيقة أن نواثره علي نفسك

Tum apne maut per, duniya ka maal,  wa daulat kisi ke liye bhi mat chodo,

Agar tum apne waris (heirs) ke liye daulat chode, to do (2) baatain mumkin hae

Pehli agar tumhari aulad usko ache kaam, khair ke kaam, nek kaam mae kharch kiye, to log ye khenge ke tumhare pas itni daulat thi aur tum ne usko kharch nahi kiya, aur Allah bhi naraz hoga ke tum ne kanjoosi ki, khair ke liye kharch nahi kiya, Allah per tawakul (bhrosa rely) nahi kiya, aur tum is baat se gunehgaar honge

Aur tumhari aulad buri huvi to woh bure aur khraab kaam mae kharch karenge, aur is baat ke bhi gunehgaar tum hi honge, kiyunke daulat tumhari thi, tum khud ache kaam nae kharch karsakte the

{Don't leave your worldly possessions behind you when you die, because you either leave them to one of the two persons, a person who uses them in obeying Allah taala and uses the money for good causes, the hard earned money for which you had toiled

         Or

A bad character, a person who uses them for sinful deeds, so in that case you helped him to sin, none of this two should be preferred over yourself,

The Imam means to says that, don't leave your worldly possessions behind you, when you die, either someone inherits it and uses it for good deeds, in that case you will be judged in the aakherat for sin of keeping your money idle, and not using it yourself for good deeds,

or someone who inherits it and uses it for bad and sinful deeds, and in that case you have actually helped that person to do the sin by leaving behind your money  

So in either case you shouldn't leave behind your wealth, spend the money yourself for virtues deeds in your lifetime, and gain the sawab yourself

Allah taala Koran kareem mae irshad farmaya hae ke jab tum inteqal ke khreeb ho to apne maa baap, khrabatdaar (near ones) ke liye خير الوصية achi behter wasiyat (will) chodo

Maal wa daulat mae marne wale ko 1/3 (of his inheritable wealth) mae wasiyat ka Haq hae, balkeh Moulana Ali farmate hain ke us se behter hae ke 1/4  mae wasiyat karo, aur us se bhi behter hae ke 1/5 mae karo, aur baqi maal tum Allah ke hukum per chod do jo Allah taala ne wirasat ka khanoon (inheritance laws) banaya hae uske hisaab se taqseem hogi

{ Nothing can be given to the waris from the wasiyat, as he gets his share from the shari wirsa (his part of inheritance) }

Rasulullah ne, aur tammam Imam ne, deeni maamle mae hi wasiyat ko ziyada ahmiyat di hae, jaisa keh;

Moulana Ali ibn abi Talib Salawatullah alahe ne farmaya, ke Rasul e khuda ne mujh ko wasiyat karne ka hukum farmaya tha, aur aap ne sabse pehle apne hathyaar (arms) aur kitabaun ke liye wasiyat farmai

Phir aapne Imam e Hasan ko farmaya, ke tum mere khatal ke maamle mae ikhteyar rakhte ho, tum chaho to mere khatil (killer ibne Muljim) ko khatal kardena, ya chaho to maaf kardena

Phir Moulana Ali ne Duniya mae hone wale tammam badshah ke naam, aur Qiyamat tak hone wale tammam Duwaat ke naam aur duniya ki muddat se waqif karwaya

Phir aap'ne tammam faraez deen Namaz, Roza, waqaera ke anjaam dene ki wasiyat ki

Phir aap'ne farmaya ke Rasul e khuda ne mujhe hukum diya tha, tum apne haath se neki ka hukum karo burai se roko, ye nahi karsakte to zabaan se roko, aur ye bhi nahi karsakte ho to Dil se roko,

Khabardaar tum kisi ki qeebat (backbiting) na karna, us'se a'maal saqit (gira diye jate hain) sille rahmi karo, Namaz ko waqt per padho,

Tum takabur mat karo, bilashak, (without any doubt) takabur karne wala malaun hae, aur tawazu karne wala Allah ke pas bulund martabe wala hae,

Tum 'Kibar' aur 'qaroor' na karna, kiyunke takabur Allah ki chadar hae, (he only deserves it) jo us chadar ko khenchega, Allah taala usko para para kardega (into pieces)

Tum apne Nafs ke saath jahad karo, wohi tumhara sab se bada dushman hae, jaise ke Allah taala Koran mae farmata hae

ان النفس لإمارة بالسوء إلا مارحم ربي

Bas Ye tumhara Nafs hi tum ko khaeshat aur bure kaam ki taraf ubharta (incite) hae, siwae uske jis per mera Rabb rahem farmata hae, woh mehfuz rahta hae.

Nafsani khaeshat ki taraf mael (incline) hona unki paervi karna wohi gunaah ki pehli manzil hae,

Tum Allah ka khoof rakho aur duniyadari ki taraf raqbat na rakho, duniya hi tammam khrabi ki jadd hae, (root cause) aur aakhir mae duniya hi tabah hone wali hae

واتقوا الله وقولوا قولا سديدا يصلح لكم أعمالكم ويغفر لكم ذنوبكم

Tum Allah taala se daro, aur sach baat kho, us ki wajeh se tumhare a'maal durust honge aur tumhare gunaah maaf hojainge

🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Uloma e Islam wa tariqdan (historians) mae ek bahut bada ikhtelaaf (difference) hae ke Adam Alehe Salaam ko kis Jannat mae basaya (settle) gaya tha ?  

kiya woh, wohi jannat hae jiska wada Allah taala apni kitab mae momineen ke saath, unke is duniya ke ache a'maal ke ajar wa sawab mae dene ka wada kiya hae

Aam tor per Koran e majeed ki tafseer karne wale yehi kehte hae ke, ye wohi jannat hae jo saatwain aasmaan per hae, aur uski daleel is baat se woh lete hae ke jab Adam aur Hawa ko unke khata (mistake) ki wajeh se saza mae jannat se nikala gaya, to is baat ko koran ne in alfaz mae kha

اهبطوامنها

Yahan se neeche giro

Magar hamare uloma aur awaam ke bhi mohaqeqeen (research scholars) kehte hain ki Adam wa Hawa ke waqae mae jis jannat ka zikar hae woh zameen per hi thi, ye woh jannat nahi hae jo mommin ko uske sawab wa ajar ke badle, aakherat mae wada kiya gaya hae

Pehli baat ye hae ke koran sirf ye kha hae اهبطوامنها niklo yahan se, yane ek muqam se nikalna aur doosre muqam per jana, jaise ki doosri jagah koran mae Musa ki qom ko kha hae اهبطوامصرا tum Egypt ki taraf jao

Ek daleel ye bhi hae ke agar ye sawab wali jannat hoti to Iblees fareb dene, (decieve) dhoka dena wahan pohunch hi nahi sakta tha aur phir ye baat na kehta

هل ادلك علي شجرة الخلد والملك لا يبلي

Kiya mae tum ko aisa jahad (tree) bataun jo kabhi fana na hoga aur aisi badshahat jo kabhi khatam nahi hogi, is baat se sabit hae ke ye jannat woh nahi hae jo abadi (eternal) hae, agar woh jannat abadi hoti to Iblees Adam ko us jahad ki taraf nahi bulata

Ek aur daleel ye hae ke jo jannat mae dakhil huva usko phir wahan se nikala nahi jaega jaisa koran khud farmata hae

وما هم عنها بمخرجين

Woh log wahan se yane jannat se nahi nikale jainge, aur Adam wa Hawa ko to Jannat se nikala gaya

Iblees ne jab sajda dene se inkar kiya to woh mal'un ملعون huva (lanat kiya huva) to phir woh jannat e khuld (eternal jannat) ki taraf wapis nahi jasakta tha

Aur Allah taala ki ye hikmat nahi hae, uska mansha nahi hae ki baqaer kisi amal ke kisi ko jannat e khuld mae paida karde, Allah taala kisi ko bhi baqaer uske kisi amal ke jaza ya sawab nahi deta

Tammam Islam ke uloma is baat per ek hain ke Adam ko zameen per hi paida kiya gaya, jaisa ke koran keh raha hae ke

اني جاعل في الأرض خليفة

Allah taala farmata hae ke mae zameen mae ek apna Khalifa qayam (appoint) kar raha hun, ye nahi kha ke ke jannat mae qayam (appoint) kar raha hun

In tammam daleel se saaf waze hota hae ke Adam ke waqae mae jo Jannat ka zikar hae, ye woh jannat e khuld nahi jahan insaan ko maut ke baad apne ache a'maal aur sawab ke badla bheja jaega

Ye koran ke tammam waqeat ki, sahi haqeeqat aur sachai, sirf aur sirf ahle Haq, hamare Uloma hi bata sakte hain

Koran kehta hae

وأتوا البيوت من أبوابها

Woh gharaun mae darwaze se aate hain, ya yeh ke ghar mae uske darwaze se dakhil ho

Aur woh darwaze se dakhil hona woh hamara Ahde e shareef hae, jis'se hum sab khreeb mae hi dakhil huve hain

Magar hamara dakhil hona hi kafi nahi hae, ye aisa hi hae jaisa sahi aur durust raaste per aakar khede to hogae hain, magar us raaste per chalna bhi zaroori hae, raasta bata diya gaya hae, manzil malum hae magar hum chalte nahi hae to faida kiya

Hum sawal to bahut karte hain, aeterazaat bhi bahut karte hae, Bahes bhi bahut karte hae, magar hum kabhi qor nahi karte hain ke hum khud kitna jante hain, hamare deen ke basic malumaat sahi nahi to ek aalim e deen humko kaise samjhaega

Hum Duniya ki taleem ke liye kitna waqt dete hain aur deen ke ilm ke liye kitna, shaed hi kuch fractions ka waqt duniya ke muqabil

Allah taala hum sab ko tawfeeq de ke hum deen ke ilm ke liye ziyada se ziyada waqt de, jo deen wa duniya dono ko behter banane wali hae

🍃🍃🍃🍃🍃🍃🍃🍃🍃

10/8/15, 11:20:00 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🌸🍀🌸🍀🌸🍀🌸🍀

السلام علیکم و رحمة الله و بركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

جمعة مبارك

Kitab Daem ul Islam mae bayan kiya gaya hae ;

Imam e Jafar e Sadiq, riwayat karte hain Rasulullah se

Char logoan ko apna amal naya shru karna chahye,

Mareez jab woh apni bimari se shifa hasil karleta hae

Mushrik jab Emaan laye,

Jab insaan Namaz e Jumua se lo'te, palte

Aur Haji jab woh apna Haj pura ada karle,

(Kiyunke ab uske bahut se gunaah maaf hogae)

Rasulullah ka irshad e mubarak hae ke tum jumua ke din mujh per Durud ziyada se ziyada bhejo kiyunke us roz amaal ka sawab ziyada kar diya jata hae

Imam e Jafar e Sadiq farmate hain ke Jumua ke roz Namaz aur Sadqa ziyada se ziyada karo kiyunke us roz sawab dugna kardiya jata hae

Jo mommin mard ya aurat Jumua ki raat (jumerat wa jumua ki darmiyani raat) inteqal karta hae usko azaab e khabar se mahfooz rakha jata hae

Aur jo Jumme ke din mae inteqal karta hae usko jahanam ke azaab se mahfooz rakha jata hae

Jumme ke pu're din Namaz padh sakte hain kiyunke is roz jahanam ki aag bujha di jati hae (fajar se asar tak)

Jumme ki shab, (Jumeraat Jumma ki darmiyani raat) Allah taala hukum karta hae ek farishte ko, woh shru raat se awaaz lagata hae aur doosre dinaun mae ek te'haie 1/3 raat guzarne ke baad aur kehta hae

" koi maangne wala hae jisko mae ata karu, koi toba karne wala hae jiski mae toba ko qabool karu, koi maqferat talab karne wala hae jiski mae maqferat qabool karu."

"Ae khair ke talab karne wale aage aa, (come forward) aur ae shar ke talab karne wale baaz aaja mohtaat hoja".(beware)

Moulana Imam e Mohammed e Baqar se riwayat hae aap farmate hain ke Namaz Jumua farz hae, aur woh bhi Imam e Aadil ke saath, jisne bhi teen jumua choda usne teen farayez choda, baqaer kissi uzur (problem) aur illat (reason) ke siwae Munafiq ke koi bhi Namaz e Jumma nahi chodta hae

Jumme ke din khushbu (perfume, ittar) lagana chahiye ,aur zawal se pehle gusul lena sunnat hae

Imam Mohammed e Baqar farmate hain ke jumua ko khushbu lagana aur acha libaas pehn'na chahye, jumua ke roz ek aisa waqt (time) aata hae ke mommin ki koi bhi hajat ho Allah taala ata karta hae, aur woh waqt zawal se leker namaz ki nida tak hae (azaan tak)

Hafte (week mae) 35 namaz (5×7) Rasoolullah ne farz ki hain, inme ek Namaz aisi hae jo kissi ko nahi chodna chahye siwae in paanch ashqaaz ke, bacha, aurat, bimar, musafir aur gulam ke aur woh Jumua ki Namaz hae

Rasulullah ka irshad e mubarak hae ke Jumua ki Namaz mere ummat ke mohtajaun (needy) ka Haj hae

Moulani Ali Ibn Abi Talib Namaz e Jumua ke liye nange pau (bare feet) ja'te baye haath (left hand) mae aap apni chappal utha lete, aur farmate ke ye Allah taala ki ibadat ka raasta aur jagah hae, yeh aapka amal inkesari, tawazu wa tazeem ke khatir tha, koi wajib baat nahi, insaan sawaari per bhi Namaz e Jumua ke liye ja sakta hae

Jumua ki Namaz ki fazilat ahmiyat aur barkat ki riwayatain bahut hain inshallah ainda zikar hoga

Surah Jumua mae Allah tabaraka wa Taala is had farmata hae

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا إِذَا نُودِيَ لِلصَّلَاةِ مِن يَوْمِ الْجُمُعَةِ فَاسْعَوْا إِلَىٰ ذِكْرِ اللَّهِ وَذَرُوا الْبَيْعَ ذَٰلِكُمْ خَيْرٌ لَّكُمْ إِن كُنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ

O you who believe ! When the call is proclaimed to prayer on Friday (the Day of Assembly), hasten earnestly to the Remembrance of Allah, and leave off business, That is best for you if you but knew !

10/11/15, 9:07:56 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🍂🍁🍂🍁🍂🍁🍂🍁

          السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

                 بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم  

Kitab Daem ul Islam, Jihad ke bayan mae kiya hi behtreen nasihat Ameer e Qom, (leader) sardar e lashkar (Army commander) ko ki gayi hae

Ae woh insaan jo aaj Sardar bhi hae, Badshah bhi hae aur mamluk (slave, servant) bhi hae

Tu mazi (past) ko mustaqbil (future) ke liye daleel (pointer) bana, aur sab se pehle apne aap ko nasihat kar, apne pehle ke ghaltiun ko dekh kar ainda ke liye mohtaat hoja (be warned)

Tujh per, kiya farayaz a'ed hote hain aur tere kiya, kiya, huquq hain (duties, rights and privileges) un sab per qor wa fikar kar

Apne mamlaat mae aur apne Nafs ke mamlaat mae Allah ka khoof rakh.

Allah taala ne jo tujh per jo farayez wa zimedari

(responsibility) rakhi hae usper Allah ko nigraan samajh, aur Allah taala ko hazir wa nazir jaan (He is always present and keeps a watch on you)

Tu Allah ki ibadat, inkesari aur a'jisi (humbleness & humility) ke saath kar, wohi Allah hae jis ne tujhe is martabe aur muqam (rank & position) tak bulund kiya.

Inkesari, tawazu, ajisi ye tammam baatain Allah taala ki bandagi ki qasiyat hain, aur qaroor wa kibir (pride & ego) woh Allah taala ki sifat aur nishani hae, woh usi ko zeb deta hae.

Yaad rakh keh aise muqam (position) ki talab na kar jo tera Haq nahi, woh tujhe mayana ravi (just path) se hata dega

Aur Allah ne tujhe naimatain ata ki hae woh tujhe Allah ke hudood aur bandaun ke huqooq ki taazim (respect) se qafil na karde

Allah taala ka Haq uski azmat ke aetebar se, be'inteha hae, aur yaad rakhna keh jo Allah taala ne tum ko izzat wa karamat di hae us se tum per jo Allah taala ke huquq, farayaz aur ahkamaat a'ed huve woh tum se hargis saqit (exempted) nahi hote

Agar tum aisa samjhoge to yaqeen karlo ke tumhare Dill per mael (dirt) jam jaega aur jo amal tum kar chuke ho uska anjaam bhi bura hoga

Qor kar ae Badshah, ae Va'li, ae Haakim, jo Allah taala ka adna banda aur mamluk (gulam) bhi hae

Kah'an (where) hae woh tere a'ba wa ajdad (father & forefathers) aur ka'han hae unki aulad aur shahzade jinko bade, bade, alqab (titles) aur badi izzat aur karamat di jati thi, aur ka'han hae unke jism jinko woh badi rahat pohanjate the aur aram se rakhte the, kiya ab un mae se koi tum ko nazar ata hae

Aaj tu bhi wohi nizam chalata hae jo pehle woh chalate the (earlier rulers), kiya tum ko koi unki nasal (heirs) mae aaj nazar aata hae

Aur yaad rakho keh tumhare naseeb per tumhare nafsani khaeshat qalib na aane pae

Apni aulad ki mohabbat aur unper shafaqat aur narmi, tum ko unke liye maal aur daulat jama karne per na uksaye, aisa na ho keh yeh tumhara faisla, Allah taala ke faisle ke khilaaf ho

Ae Va'li (ruler) tum maut ko apne per jald nazil hone se apne aap ko mehfooz na samajhna, aur duniya ke zawal hone ko, khoob yaad kiya karo

Inqelab e zamana aur duniya ke badalte rang ko dekho aur ibrat hasil karo

Tum ne badshahaun ko dekha, unke be inteha saza'un (torture & punishment) ko bhi dekha aur raham aur karam ki raah ko chod dene ko bhi dekh rahe ho

Apne ma'tehtaun (subordinates) ke saath zulm, jaur aur zabardasti karne ko bhi dekh rahe ho

Aur unka apne khud ke anjaam ke ba're mae kam qor wa fikar karne ko bhi tum ne dekha

Unka, khud ki maut ke liye qaflat mae padhe rahne ko

aur shehwataun (carnal desires) mae khoob raqbat (intrest) rakhne ko bhi dekha

Allah taala ke inteqam ke bare mae bhul jana aur qor wa fikar na karna, yane Ibrataun se kam faida uthana

Unper guzarte huve halaat se faida na uthana aur sabaq na lena

Sirf maal wa daulat wasul karne ki khaesh, aur jo doosraun ka Haq banta hae, jo wajib hae, woh nahi dena, ya kam dene ko bhi dekha

Kamzooraun per sakhtiyan karna aur khud ye khaesh rakhna keh doosre esaar (sacrifice) kare aur khud jama karte jae aur nazrane (monetary offerings) lete jaein

Jo kuch khud ne bure amal kiye, usko mamuli khyal karna aur jo unper per wajib farayez aaed kiye gaye the usko zaye (ignore, waste) kardena

Tum un badshahun ki, in tammam baataun ko bura samajhte the ya nahi ?

Agar tum in afaal (deeds) ko bura kaam aur aeb (bad qualities, vices) samajhte ho, to tum ko chahye ke tum apne aap ko nasihat karo aur in baataun se bachu aur apne aap ko dur rakho

Aur agar tum un badshahun ke aeb, burai aur ghaltiyaan, sirf is wajeh se nikalte the aur bura kehte the, keh tum un se rashk aur hasad (jealous, jalte) karte the, to phir tum yaad rakho keh tumhare pas Allah ki qudrat,  ta'khat aur insaaf se bachne ka koi raasta nahi, koi zareeyah nahi

Kiya tumhare pas bhaag kar jane ki koi aur jagaah hae, jahan tum Allah ke azaab se bach sako'ge

Ya tumhara koi aur Allah hae jo tum ko panha de (protection), aur sahara de sa'ke

Kiya tum mae, Khuda ke azaab ko bardasht karne ki qudrat aur taqat hae

Kiya kisi ki qudrat hae keh tum ko Allah ki qudrat se nikal kar, kissi aur ki qudrat ke supurd karde

Arre tum doosraun ke haal per nazar rakhte ho, jaan lo ki issi tarah log tumhare haal per bhi nazar rakhte hain

Tum jis tarah doosraun ke mutaliq bolte ho waise hi log tumhare mutaliq bhi baat karte hain

Tum nafe aur nuqsan (gains and losses) ke hisaab mae, apne nek amal (good deeds) ko sab se ziyada mehboob aur qabil e bhrosa khazana samjho (most reliable asset)

Tum apne nek amal zohod wa taqwa aur parhezgari ko sab se afzal tareen khazana aur daulat samjho

Wohi aankhun ki thandak, sukun wa itmenan, aesh wa araam hae

Allah taala hum sab ko in behtreen nasihataun ko samajhne ki aur unper amal karne ki tawfeeq ata farmae

         وما توفيقى الا بالله العلي العظيم

🍁🍂🍁��🍁🍂🍁🍂

10/13/15, 2:04:40 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Janab Ibrahim bin Adham

se rivayat hae jab log aap se daryaft kiye ke Koran kareem mae irshad e mubarak hae

 بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

وَقَالَ رَبُّكُمُ ادْعُونِي أَسْتَجِبْ لَكُمْ

اور تمہارے پروردگار نے کہا ہے کہ تم مجھ سے دعا کرو میں تمہاری (دعا) قبول کروں گا

Tum mujhe pukaro mae tum ku jawab daunga aur tumhari Dua qabool karunga

Aur hum dekhte hain ke hamari bahut si Duain, Allah taala qabool nahi karta.

Aap ne farmaya, dus (10) baataun ne tumhare Dil ko maar'dala hae yaane murda banadiya hae, tum mae ahsaas nahi hae, issi liye tumhari Duain qabool nahi hoti.

Allah ka irfan rakhte ho (jaante ho) magar uska Haq ada nahi karte (yane uski Ibadat nahi karte)

Allah ki Kitab, koran majeed padhte to ho, magar usper amal nahi karte

Shaitaan ko bura to samajhte ho magar us'se dushmani nahi rakhte aur usse mu nahi modte.

Rasulullah ki mohabbat to dil mae rakhte ho, magar unki sunnat per nahi chalte.

Jannat ki khaesh to rakhte ho magar uske liye tayari (preparation) nahi karte, amal nahi karte.

Maut ko Haq mante ho magar uske liye tayar nahi rahte, har lamhe insaan ko tayar rahna chahye maut kisi lamhe bhi asakti hae

Doosraun ke aeb (shortcomings) nikalte ho aur khud ke aeb ko nahi dekhte

Allah ki di huvi rozi (risq) khate ho magar Allah ka shukur ada nahi karte

Tum apne mauta (dead) ko dafan (bury) zaroor karte hain magar ibrat nahi lete (sabaq nahi leta ke tum ko bhi ek roz jana hae)

Allah Tabaraka wa Taala humko tawfeeq de ke hum in 10 ghaltiyun ka ahsaas kare aur apne aap ko durust kare, takeh hamari har Dua Allah ke bargaah mae maqbool ho

●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●

10/15/15, 12:45:25 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

□□□□□□□□□□□□□□□□□□

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

جمعة مبارك

Muqtalif kitabaun mae zikre  Jihad aya hae, uska khulasa (summation) ye hae ke jihad do kisim ke hae

Pehla Jihad woh talwaar se Allah ke dushman, deen ke dushman se jung karna hae, Allah ki raah mae, Imam waqt ke, ya unke muqrar karda Duwaat ke hukum se Jihad karna hae

Doosra Jihad jo ziyada  bada jihad hae, jisko Rasulullah ne Jihad e Akbar, yane bada Jihad kaha hae, woh apne "Nafs e Ammara bis su" se Jihad karna hae, yane apne khrab Nafs jo humko bure aur khraab kaam ki taraf uksata hae, us'se apni Aqal aur Allah ke ahkaam aur Rasulullah ki sunnat ke zareeyah se ladna hae, aur us per qabu pana hae, usko control mae rakhna

Aulia Allah ne is Jihad e Akbar ko batini jihad bhi kha hae aur uske bhi 2 do kisim bayan ki hain

Batini Jihad ke ek kisim ye hae ki mommin apne Mabda wa Maad ko samjhe, yane woh ka'han se aya hae, kaise aya, kiyu aya, aur hamari is duniya ki jismani zindagi ka maqsad kiya hae, humko shariat e Mohammedi ki pabandi kiyu karna hae ? aur phir aakherat ki taraf hamare palat kaise hogi ?

Maad; yane apne aakherat ke maamlaat ko samjhe, maut ke baad ke maamlaat ko samjhe, jannat aur jahannam ki haqeeqat ko ja'ne

Doosra batini Jihad ye hae ki, apne ache aqlaq aur kirdar se logoan ko sahi deen ki taraf dawat kare, rahnumai kare, Jis tarah se Imam e Jafar Sadiq ne ek waqt farmaya tha ke tum khamosh rahkar hamari maddad karo, hamare deen ki taraf dawat karo

Jihad mae bhi 7 saat faraez hain aur 12 bara sunnat hain

Farz ye hain ;

Mushrik buth parast (Idol worshippers) se jung karna,

 Esai (Christian) se jung karna,

Roman Christians se jung karna

Yehudi (Jews) se jung karna

Majusi (Parsees) se jung karna,

Munafeqeen se jung karna

Baqi Musalmaan (Muslim rebels) se Jihad karna

12 sunnat ye hain ;

Apne jism ko Nafsani khaeshat ki paervi (to obey & follow) karne se rokna

Nafs ko hidayat ki taraf rahnumai karna

Mutaqi parhezgaar (pious) logoan ki iteba karna (to follow)

Aalim aadmi ki izzat karna,

jo tum ko Haq wa Sadaqat aur najaat ka raasta batae,

Allah ki taat mae, aur uske hukum ko man'ne mae, har takleef aur musibat per sabar karna

Bewaqoofaun se agar takleef pohenje to usko bardasht karna aur jitna bhi mumkin ho unko samjhana, aur gusse (anger) ko har halat mae control karna

Har halat aur musibat mae apne aap ko khabu (control) mae rakhna aur Deen e Haneef per har mushkil ke ba'wajud qaem rahna

Har musibat mae bhi Allah ka shukur ada karna, jaisa keh tum rahat aur aaram mae shukur ada karte the

Quwat aur taqat (power and strength) rakhne ke bawajud kissi ko takleef na dena, khususan zaef, budha aur kamzoor logoan ko (specially week and elders)

Takaburi aur dikhawe (pride & pretension) se apne aap ko dur rakhna

Bad'kari (bad and character less deeds) aur bakhalat wa kanjusi (stinginess) se apne aap ko dur rakhna

أن المجاهد نفسه علي طاعة الله وعن معاصيه عند الله سبحانه بمنزلة بر شهيد

Allah taala ki taat mae, uski hukum ki pabandi mae, aur uski nafarmani se bachne aur doori ikhteyar karne mae jo apne Nafs se Jihad karta hae woh Shaheed ke barabar hi hae  

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

10/17/15, 6:57:17 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 💧💧💧💧💧💧💧💧💧

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

ليلة النصف من شعبان الكريم أپ سب کو بهت مبارک ہو

Nisf e Shabaan ki raat un teen mubarak raat mae shammil hae jiske liye Nabi e kareem ne farmaya, pehli Rajab ul murajab, 15 wi Shabaan e kareem aur 23 shab Shehrullah e mubarak, aur us mae bhi shammil hae jiski Fazilat Moulana Ali ne farmai thi, pehli Rajab, 15 Shabaan aur do Eidain ki raat, aur Kisi muqam per Hazrat Ziaali saheb ne 27 wi Rajab ko pehli Rajab ke badle shammil kiya, Allah behter janta hae kiyu aap ne likha hae

Is mubarak raat, Moulana Ali ghar se ibadat ke liye nikle aur raaste mae Nof bin fizaam se farmaya;

Khush khabri us ke liye hae jo zohod زهد ko ikhteyar kiya, Koran ko apna sheyar (path) banaya aur Dua ko odhna banaya,

Ae Nof to shayer (poet) na ban, shart baaz (betting) na ban, gaane wala (singer) na ban, qibat (back biter) na ban, shatranj (chess) khelne wala na ban,

Is raat rozi ke liye Dua maangne ke liye khaas raqbat dilai gai hae, aaj ki raat uski qubuliyat bahut ziyada hae    

Dua ke sharaet (requirements) aur lawazimat (conditions) bahut hain, insaan ke sab kuch karne per bhi kabhi kabhi, Dua qabool nahi hoti, aakhir kiya baat hae, uski kiya wajeh hae ?

Imam e Jaffar e Sadiq farmate hain, jab kabhi bhi koi Musalman Dua karta hae, to Allah taala uski Dua ko yaqinan qabool karta hi hae, aur Dua ki barkat se uski Dua se badhkar, bla (musibat) aur pareshani ko us'se dur bhi kardeta hae,

aur kabhi Allah taala uski Dua ko aise waqt ke liye utha rakhta hae jab ke uski woh Dua uske liye ziyada faida mand ho, magar shart yeh hae ke uski woh Dua zulum ki, ya khatte rahem (breaking of blood relations) ki Dua na ho

Aap ne farmaya ke Qaza wa Qadar (taqdeeri mamlaat, maut aur hayat wa hadesat aur insaan ki rozi) ko paltane ke liye Allah taala ke pass sab se ziyada mehboob sawal woh Dua hi hae

Har khair ki kunji Dua hae, har hajat mae kamiyabi Dua se hi hae, Allah taala ki bargaah se agar kuch hasil karna hae to sab se behtreen zareeyah Dua ka hi hae

Rasulullah ka irshad hae ke har mommin ki Dua mustajab (accepted) hae, yaqinan qabool hoti hi hae, sirf ye hae keh ujlat (jald bazi) se kaam ne le

Logoan ne pucha jald baazi se kiya matlab ?

Imam ne farmaya ke, log Dua karne per jab Dua ka asar nahi dekhte hain to kehdete hae ki meri Dua qabool nahi huvi

Imam kehte hae ke Allah apne wade mae sacha hae, baat yeh hae ke Allah taala jitna chahta hae jald Dua qabool karleta hae aur baqi aakhrat ke liye utha rakhta hae, aur jab mommin un duaon ke azeem us shan inam aur sawab ko maut ke baad aakhrat mae dekhega to kehega ke "kash Allah taala hamari duniya mae koi bhi Dua qabool na kiya hota aur sab hi aakhrat ke liye utha rakhta"

Baba Hazrat muqaddus kehte the, hamari ye halat hae ke humko to hamare liye kiya acha hae aur kiya bura hae uska bhi Ilm nahi, hum us nadaan bache ki tarah hae jo khilone ki awaaz aur rang dekhkar khush hota hae, usko kiya khabar ki kiya maange aur kaisa maange, agar Aulia Allah hamere liye Dua karke na batate to hum kiya maangte siwae is duniya ke adna aur arsi chezaeu ke

Allah taala jo karta hae wohi hamere liye sab se behter aur acha hae, insaan ko sabar se kaam lena chahye, yaqinan har mukhlis Mommin ki Dua Allah taala ke bargah mae maqbool hae

Dua ke Arkaan, Asbab, Bazu wa Awqat bhi hote hain

Arkaan e Dua woh huzoor e qalb yane dil ki puri tawajohi (concentration), khushu wa qusu ke saath ho

Uske Bazu (support) sidq wa sachai hae (honesty & truthfulness)

Aur uske Asbab woh Rasoolallah aur aapki Aal e pak per Durood wa Salaam bhejna

 اللهم صلي على محمد وعلى آله

Uske Awqat woh fajar ka waqt qabal e tulu hae (before sunrise)

Iske alawa Dua ke aur bhi sharaet wa lawazimat bayan kiye gae hain

Dua ache lahan mae aur sahi alfaz ke sath ho, aur Rab e Subhanahu ke bargaah mae ajisi wa inkesari ke izhar ke saath ho

Dua karne wala qibla rukh hokar baithe, aur apne dono haath Allah taala ki bargaah mae bulund kare,

Rasulullah ka qol hae keh jab banda apne dono haath Allah ke bargaah mae bulund karta hae to Rab e Subhanahu ko un haataun ko khali lotane ke liye sharam aati hae

Dono haataun ko chehre per masah karna sunnat e Rasoolallah hae

Allah taala ka irshad hae

    ادعوا ربكم تضرعا وخفية

Tum Allah taala ko tazaro zari aur maqfi tor per pukaro (in a soft tone, in seclusion with a sorrowful heart)

Irshad hae keh tum Allah taala ko inkesari ajisi aur apne aap ko uske muqabil zaleel karte huve pukaro

Bande momin ko chahye ke puri ajisi wa inkesari ke saath Dua mae puri tarah koshish kare, aur Dua karte waqt Allah taala se Dua ki qubuliat ki puri umeed rakhe, Aur Allah Tabaraka wa Taala ki Rehmat se kabhi mayus na ho, kiyunke woh jiski bargaah mae Dua kar raha hae, woh ek zaat e kareemana hae

Allah taala se multaji hun ke humko dua karne ke sahi tareeqe se waqif karae, takah hamari har Dua uski bargaah mae qubuliat ka darjah hasil kare

Aap sab se haqeer wa ahle khaandan ke liye Dua ke liye multaji hun

وآخر دعونا والحمدلله رب العالمين
