11/10/15, 12:49:25 PM: Ishaq Ziaee (Mulla): 🍁🍃🍁🍃🍁🍃🍁🍃

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Bambai ka mukhtasar safar, magar Dil per ek ghera asar choda hae, ek taraf to woh alishaan buildings aur bungalows hain to doosri taraf wohi slums aur chawls

Hamare bhi bahut se ikhwan in mukhtasar se kamraun (rooms) mae ek se ziyada families rahte hae, jahan mezanine floor per mazanine floors bangaye hain, aur be hisaab partitions ne un mukhtasar se kamre ko kai kameaun mae taqseem kiya gaya hae,

In rihaesh (residence) mae jahan zaeef, bimar bhi hain, raat ko jaag kar padhna wale students bhi hain, naujavan shaadi shuda jode (couples) bhi hain, aur chote bache bhi hain jo raataun ko maa'un ke saath sabhi ko jagate hain

Mujhe is mahol ko dekhkar deen ke un ahkamaat ka khyal aya jo padosiyaun ke liye shariat mae aye hain

Majalis e Mustansaria mae jahan deen ke 7 saat farayaz aur 12 bara sunatain bataye hain

wahan 12  bara sunnataun mae ek yeh bhi hae

HIFZ UL JAR حفظ الجار

Padosi ka khyal rakhna aur unki hifazat karna

Aur isme bhi 7 saat faraez hae aur 12  bara sunnatain hae

Sab se pehle to koran ne teen kisim ke padosi bayan kiye hain

Ek to tumhara padosi bhi hae, ek hi aqeede ka hae, aur rishtedar bhi hae

Ek padosi tumhara rishtedar hae magar mazhab wa aqeeda alag hae

Ek woh padosi hae jo tumhare aqeede aur mazhab ka hae, magar rishtedar nahi

Ek woh bhi hae jo sirf tumhara padosi hae, na woh tumhare aqeede ka hae aur na hi rishtedar hae

Ek padosi woh bhi hae jo tumhare safar ka saathi hae, train mae, plane mae, ship per, ya kisi aur janwar per

Ek woh padosi, ya neighbour hae jo tumhare school, college ya madrese, mae saath hain

Is tarah 7 kisim ke padosi ka zikar shariat mae aya hae

Padosi ke saath sulook (behave) karne aur taluqat (relations) rakhne ke bara 12  adaab ye hain

Unka makan mae taak jhak (peeping) hargis nahi karna chahye

Kaan laga kar padosi ki baataun ko hargis nahi sunna chahye

Agar unke khangi (private) mamlaat ka koi Ilm hojae, to usko chupana, aur logoan mae aam nahi karna chahye

Tum unse aise mamlaat per baat mat karo jo unko pasand na ho, ya us baat se unka dil dukhta ho

Tum unko aisi koi chez mat batao jo unko pasand nahi ho, aur dekhna nahi chahte hain

Agar woh tum se koi choti si zaroorat ki chez maangte hain to tum inkar mat karo

Agar tumhare padosi tumhare office dukan ye kisi bhi kaam mae tumhara subordinate hae to tum ghar mae usper hukum na chalao

Agar woh tum se ameer aur daulat mand hae to tum us'se hasad (jealousy) mat karo

Agar woh kisi bhi mushkil ya pareshani mae mubtela ho to to uski jitni bhi tum se maddad hosakti hae zaroor karo

Aur tum aisa koi kaam hargis mat karo jis'se padosi ko takleef hoti hae

Agar hum in deen ke ahkamaat per amal kare aur khyal rakhe to hum chahe kitne hi chote makan mae rahte ho hum khush gawar aur achi zindagi guzar sakte hae

Allah taala un tammam ke halaat ko behter banaye jo in chote se makanaat mae rahte hain, unke makanat bahut chote hain magar unke Dil bahut kushada (large hearted) hain  

🍁🍃🍁🍃🍁🍃🍁🍃

11/11/15, 12:12:06 PM: Ishaq Ziaee (Mulla): 💠💠💠💠💠💠💠💠💠

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن

Aaj pehli shab hae maah e Safar ul Muzaffer ki, Allah taala humko is shaher (month) ke shar wa shidat aur balaun se mehfuz rakhe

Aaj Hindustan mae bahut dhoom se Diwali ka tehwaar manaya ja raha hae, log chirag se roshni kar rahe hain, patake (crackers) aur aatish bazi (fire works) ke saath khushiyaan mana rahe hain

Hum ahle Haq hain, hum "Naar" (aag) se nahi "Noor" se hidayat hasil karte hain,

Allah ki zaat وحده لا شريك له aur uski Rehmat wa Karam hae ke woh hum ko gumrahi ke andheriyun (darkness) se Noor ki taraf lejata hae, isi baat ko koran farmata hae

هُوَ الَّذِي يُصَلِّي عَلَيْكُمْ وَمَلَائِكَتُهُ لِيُخْرِجَكُم مِّنَ الظُّلُمَاتِ إِلَى النُّورِ وَكَانَ بِالْمُؤْمِنِينَ رَحِيمًا

وہی تو ہے جو تم پر رحمت بھیجتا ہے اور اس کے فرشتے بھی۔ تاکہ تم کو اندھیروں سے نکال کر نور کی طرف لے جائے۔ اور خدا مومنوں پر مہربان ہے

Allah taala ne hum Emaan walaun ke liye "Noor" banaya hae, aur mushrekeen ke liye "Naar" Aag tiyar ki hae

Allah taala ne koran  kareem mae aag نار se hamesha "Jahannam" ki taraf hi ishara kiya hae, Koran mae jahan bhi aag ka zikar aya hae wahan aksar jahannam hi murad hae,

Allah taala ka wada hae kafireen كافرين ke liye, ke woh yaqinan jahannam mae hi jane wale hain,

 jaisa ke koran ne farmaya hae

لَتَرَوُنَّ الْجَحِيمَ

Yaqeenan tum (جحيم ) jahannam ko dekhoge

 فَاتَّقُوا النَّارَ الَّتِي وَقُودُهَا النَّاسُ وَالْحِجَارَةُ أُعِدَّتْ لِلْكَافِرِينَ

Aur humko hidayat huvi, ki tum aag e jahannam se bacho jiska aendhan (fuel) insaan aur pather hain

إِنَّ الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا لَن تُغْنِيَ عَنْهُمْ أَمْوَالُهُمْ وَلَا أَوْلَادُهُم مِّنَ اللَّهِ شَيْئًا وَأُولَٰئِكَ هُمْ وَقُودُ النَّارِ

Jo log kafir hain, na unka maal unke kaam aega, aur na hi unki aulad, aur woh yaqinan jahannam ka aen'dhan hain

وَاتَّقُوا النَّارَ الَّتِي أُعِدَّتْ لِلْكَافِرِينَ

Tum us jahannam ki aag se bacho, jo kafireen ke liye maqsoos tayar ki gayi hae

Allah taala, maut ke baad humko is jahannam ki aag se mehfooz rakhe, aur is duniya ki zindagi mae bhi humko aur hamari aulad ko is aatish bazi (fire works) se mehfooz rakhe

Hadees Nabavi hae ke jo insaan bhi doosre Qom ki mushabehat (resemblence) paida karega wo ussi Qom mae gina jaega (will be counted amongst them)

Hum doosre mazhab ke culture, festivals, aur rusumaat (rasam wa rivaj) ko apna'te hain, adapt karte hain, hum'me pata bhi nahi chale ga, ke kab woh doosra mazhab, ahista, ahista, hamare ghar mae dakhil hogaya, aur hamare Dil mae bhi jagah banali

Deen mae qizazat, badla, yane gunaah ki saza, (punishment) ke teen asbab bayan kiye gaye hain  

Pehli baat kisi gunaah ka kaam, shariat mae jo jaes nahi, jo haram hae, mana (forbidden) hae usko pasand karna, usko bura na samajhna

Doosra us khrab kaam ke karne wale ko appreciate karna admire karna, support karna, us kaam ke karne per uksana, encourage karna

Teesra ye ke woh gunaah aur bura kaam khud karna, us gunaah mae hissa lena

Ye teeno baatain (amal), insaan ko saza wa azaab ka mustahaq (deserving) banata hae

اعوذباللہ من ذلك

Allah in tammam baataun se humko panah mae rakhe

إِنِّي وَجَّهْتُ وَجْهِيَ لِلَّذِي فَطَرَ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضَ حَنِيفًا وَمَا أَنَا مِنَ الْمُشْرِكِينَ

میں نے سب سے یکسو ہو کر اپنے تئیں اسی ذات کی طرف متوجہ کیا جس نے آسمانوں اور زمین کو پیدا کیا ہے اور میں مشرکوں میں سے نہیں ہوں

💠💠💠💠💠💠💠💠

11/12/15, 1:29:14 PM: Ishaq Ziaee (Mulla): 🍃🍂🍃🍂🍃🍂🍃🍂

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

جمعة مبارك

Kiya khoob kehne wale na kha hae

Zameen hum ko mukhatib ho kar kehti hae

Ae ibn Adam tum mujh per chalte ho magar tumhara thikana mere pet (belly) mae hae

Yaqeenan tum zameem per haste ho to tum mere andar zaroor roinge

Tum mera oper khushiyaan manate ho mera andar tum ko huzun wa malal hoga

Tum meri peeth per gunaah karte ho, mere pet mae tumko uska azaab hoga

Tum shahwataun ko meri peeth per khate ho (haram chez) yaqinan tum ko mera andar k'ide makode (insects) khainge

Tum aise na bano jo tobah kam karta ho, Duniya se umeede ziyada rakhta ho, baqaer amal ke akherat ki umeed rakhta ho

Zaheedeen jaisi baat karte ho aur munafeqeen jaisa amal karta ho

Jo Allah ne diya usko kafi na samajhte ho, aur jis baat se mana kiya gaya us per sabar nahi karta ho

Arre tum Saleheen aur nek logoan ko pasand zaroor karte ho magar un jaisa nahi bante ho

Tum woh nahi karte jo mae kehta hun, aur woh karte ho jo mae nahi kehta

Phir Allah taala farmata hae ki mae to tumhari har chez puri puri karta hun aur tum meri koi baat puri nahi karte

Allah taala hum mae ye ahsaas paida kar ke hum is baat ko ja'ne ki is duniya mae hamari kiya haisiyat hae aur hamari kiya haqeeqat hae

وما توفيقى الا بالله العلي العظيم

🍂🍃🍂🍃🍂🍃🍂🍃🍂

11/13/15, 8:52:35 PM: Ishaq Ziaee (Mulla): 🍂🍃🍂🍃🍂🍃🍂🍃

Salaam alaikum !

Kha jata hae ke Dawat e Hadiya ke bara Jazeere (regions, territories) hote hae, (geographical demarcated area not the present politically divided areas) jhan per emaani dawat hoti hae, Jazeere ke ahmiyat shariat ke lehaz se bahut hae magar baat yahan uski nahi karna hae

Hamare 12 jazeeraun mae Dawat ka khyam hota hain, jo waqt aur halaat se badalte bhi rahte hae (kabhi sab Jazeere mae Dawat hoti hae kabhi kisi mae hoti hae kisi mae nahi)

Buzrugane deen ka farmana hae ke aaj 12 mae se teen jazeeraun mae Dawat ka khyam hae Yemen Hind wa Sindh, aur Hind aur Sindh, Yemen ke tahat rahta (Under) aur Sindh aksar Hindustan ke ma'thet (under administration) raha

Sindh hum jis region ko kehte hain woh aaj Pakistan ka Punjab hae, jiske khreeb sabse bada Pakistan ka shaher Multan hae

Sindh ki dawat bhi bahut hi khadeem hae, Syedna Yusuf  bin Sulaiman jo dada the Syedna Sulaiman ke, aapke waqt bhi Dawat thi, aur baad mae Syedna Hummam ke waqt bhi rahi aur Syedna Jafar ke zamane ka to mashoor waqae hae Janab Laad bin Dhaenu sindhi ka jinhune pehle Dawoodi mazhab ko ikhteyar kiya tha aur phir Syedna Jaffar aur Syedna Mohammed bin Fahad ke haath per Sulaimani huve aur phir unhi ki koshish se Sindh ka pura Jazeera Sulaimaniyat ko ikhteyar kiya

Syedna Faiz e Ali bin Syedna Sulaiman ke zamane mae Sindh ki Dawat bahut mazboot huvi, aapke zamane mae log Ahmedabad aakar deeni taleem hasil karte aur Syedna Ali ke zamane mae Sindh ke mansoob Syedi Dawood bin Babu the, jo ke Ahmedabad ke safar ke dauran 30 Ziqadatul haram1046 Hijri mae inteqal farmae, aur Syedna Sulaiman Saheb ke Roze ke baher chabrutre per aapki khabar e mubarak hae

Aapke baad wahan ke mansoob Alhaj Mohammed bin Dawood Multani huve jo 23 Shaban 1086 Hijri ko sindh ke ek gaon Langarshah mae inteqal kiye aur wahi dafan kiye gae, aapka dor bahut lamba raha aur aapne badi khidmat anjaam di

Us zamane mae Sindh ki Dawat ke markaz (centre) Muradpur naam ka gaon tha aur ikhwan e momineen phele (spread out) huve the, muqtalif gaon mae jinke naam the, Uch, Alipur, Ahmedpur Sethpur, Adilpur, Sultanpur, Multan, Bandeshah, Langarshah, ye sab chote chote gaon the, siwae Multan ke

Ikhwan gaon mae abaad the, dehati the (villagers) kheti badi unka kaam tha aur purily agricultural economy thi, Hindustan ke ikhwan se bahut hi muqtalif zindagi thi, culturally bahut hi alag the, unki zabaan bhi sirf ek dialact hae usko "Saraeki" kehte hae jo urdu se bahut alag hae, aaj to sab urdu se waqif hae magar shaed khadeem zamane mae aisa nahi tha

1086 ke baad kuch waqt tak Sindh ki Dawat, Hind ke Mansoob ke tahet rahi aur Manaseeb wahan ke Aamil Mafasih aur Maulim (ustad) muqrar farmate, is tarah se Sindh ki Dawat bhi behtreen andaz per chalte rahi, log Hindustan manaseeb ke pas aate aur deeni taleem hasil karte aur Sindh mae Dawat ki khidmat anjaam dete

1114 Hijri mae Dai waqt Syedna Mohammed bin Ismail ke hukum per Syedi wa Moulai Yusuf bin Ali khan ko Sindh ka mansub muqrar kiya gaya

Syedi Yusuf bahut hi zabardast aalim the, aap ne Sindh ki Dawat mae ek nai jaan daldi aap ne Ilm ko phelaya bahut shagird tiyar kiye aur behtreen intezamat, Dawat ke farmae

Magar aapki zindagi bahut ziyada wafa na ki aur aap Sindh jane ke 7 saal baad pehli Ziqadatul haram 1121 Hijri ko inteqal farmaye aur Muradpur naam ke gaon mae aap dafan kiye gae jo ek darya ke khreeb hae

Aap ko Arabi zabaan per zabardast Ubur (mastery) hasil tha, aur behtreen shaer bhi the, aapke qaseede (verses) bahut hae Hamd, Naat e Nabi, Manqebat, madhe Ahle baet aur Duwaat ki madha mae, ziyarat e muqamaat e muqaddussa ki ek behtreen munajaat hae jiska pehla shaer hae

سلام واكرام وازكي التحيات

غدا عشيادآءما كل أوقات

Aulia allah ki shaan mae aap farmate hae;

Subah aur shaam aap hazraat per salaam tahiyaat wa Ikram hota rahe, balkeh hamesha aur har waqt hota rahe

Aur issi tarah aap ki Dua e tawasul bhi bahut mashoor hae jo ke hamare manaseeb aksar Shab e Qadar mae tilawat karte hae

Aap awaam un naas (general public) mae bhi bahut mashoor hae, aapke maajis wa karamat bahut hain, awaam ke log aapse bahut aqeedat rakhte hae aur kasrat se ziyarat ke liye aate hae

Aapka, ek zamane se 15 March ko Urs shareef hota hae, jiski wajeh ka mujhe Ilm nahi

Allah taala aapko muqaddus kare aur aapke darjaat jannat e aaliyat mae aala se aala kare aur hum sab per aapke nazrat aur barkat hamesha jari rakhe

11/13/15, 8:52:35 PM: Ishaq Ziaee (Mulla): 🌹🌷🌹🌷🌹🌷🌹🌷🌹

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

جمعة مبارك

Zikar huva tha Dawat e Hadiye Sulaimaniya ka Jazeere Sindh mae

Syedi Yusuf bin Ali khan ka 1121 Hijri mae inteqal ke baad, Sindh ki Dawat ka intezam Hindustan ke mansoob Syedi Dawood bin Feer ke haath saupa gaya

1123 Hijri mae Syedna Dai Mohammed bin Ismail ne Syedi Sher Mohammed bin Abdul khaliq Sindhi jo bahut aalim fazil the aur mohajir bhi the, aapko Jazeere Sindh ka mansoob muqrar farmaya aur aap Muradpur ke basti mae qiyam karte aur tammam gaon mae ikhwaan ki khidmat ke liye dora karte

Syedi wa Moulai Sher Mohammed Saheb ki Sindh ke liye bahut badi koshish rahi, musalsil taleem dete, vaaz wa nasihat ka silsila jari rakhte, ikhwaan e momineen bhi aap se bahut khush the, magar maut se kis ko chutkara hae, aakhir aap bhi 4 Rajab ul murajab 1142 Hijri ko inteqal farmaye aur Syedi Almansoob Yusuf bin Ali khan ke roze mae dafan kiye gae

Aapke inteqal ke baad Sheikh Yaseen jo ke Hindustan ke mansoob the unke bhai Sheikh Taha bin Vali bin Dosan ko Sindh ka naeb muqrar farmaya gaya aur aap ne apne ahel wa aulad ko Hindustan mae chodkar khidmat e Dawat ke khatir akele Sindh tashreef le gaye

1160 Hijri mae Syedna Dai ne Mulla al fazil wal aalim, wal kamil Mohammed Hussain bin Noor Bhai ko jo us waqt Dai ki khidmat mae, hijrat mae the Hindustan bheja ke tum Hindustan ke mansoob Sheikh Yaseen ke madadgar hojao aur apne farzand Abdul Razzaq ko Sindh bhejo takeh Mulla Taha jo bahut waqt se wahan khidmat kar rahe hain, woh apne watan ahel wa ayal mae wapas aasake aur waise hi huva Mulla Taha watan wapas aasake aur mulla Abdul Razzaq wahan ki qidmat sambhal liye, aur issi tarah Sindh ki Dawat in do logoan ne sambal liye kuch waqt Mulla Taha wahan rehte aur kuch arsa Abdul Razzaq bin Mohammed Hussain khidmat karte

Issi tarah silsila chalta raha

ek waqt Mulla Taha bin Wali bhai Sindh se Hindustan aane ke liye chand ikhwan ke saath nikle magar raaste mae hi lapata hogae aur aap ki koi khabar nahi mili, Allah taala aapki, deen mae jo  khidmat thi uska behtreen ajar de aur jhan bhi aapki khabar mubarak ho usper hamara salaam wa Ikram ho, aur Allah taala ki rehmatain nazil hoti rahein

Inshallah Sindh ki Dawat ka zikar aur bhi hae, al aalim Sheikh Imran bin Almansoob Sher Mohammed saheb, Abdul Halim bin Ahmed Multani, in tammam hudood ki bahut badi khidmatain hain Sindh ki dawat ke liye, aur khususan hamare khreeb ke mansoob moulana Farhat Ali saheb muqaddas ki bahut badi koshish rahi hae Sindh ki dawat ko baqi rakhne mae

Allah taala in tammam muqaddeseen ko behtreen ajar wa inam uski bargaah se ata kare

Inshallah zikar jari rahega.................................

🌹🌷🌹🌷🌹🌷🌹🌷🌹

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Rasoolallah ne Moulana Ali Ibn Abi Talib se farmaya keh paanch batain Dil ko roshan karte hain aur Dil ki saqti ko kam karte hain ;

Oloma ka saath sohbat (unke saath uthna baithna)

Yateem ke sar per haath pherna, yane yateem ke saath shafaqat se pesh aana

11/13/15, 8:52:35 PM: Ishaq Ziaee (Mulla): ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

Salaam alaikum  !

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Syedi Mulla Taha ke safar mae lapata hone ke baad jab ke dor Hindustan ke mansoob Abdul Raheem bin Saleh ka tha jo keh 1196 mae mulla karamulla saheb inteqal ke baad mansoob huve

Syedi Abdul Raheem ne Sindh se bahut masboot taluqat rakhe, aap ek khaas qasid (messenger) ko khat lane aur le jane ke liye rakhe the jo musalsil aapko Jazeere Sindh ko puri khabar deta rahta

Hudood ko qaem kiya tha waaz aur nasihat likh bhejte, phir kuch waqt baad aap ne Sheikh Imran saheb ko jo Wahan ke Mansoob e muqaddus Sher Mohammed saheb ke farzand the, unko Sindh ki Dawat ko sambhalne bheja

Syedi Sheikh Imran bade hi Aalim the, Dai ke pas Hijrat kar chuke the

Sheikh Imran khud Sindhi the, wahan ki zabaan, tor tareeqe se waqif the, bahut achi tarah deeni taleem dene lage, deen ke ahkamat sikhate, logoan per aap ka bahut acha asar pada log deen ki taraf bahut shoq karne lage

Aap ne chand ikhwan ko select karke khaas deeni taleem dena shru kiya takeh woh ainda Dawat e Imam us zaman ki khidmat karsake

Wahan Sindh mae ek gaon tha Bandeshah jo aaj hamara markaz e Dawat hae, wahan ka ek navjavan hoshyaar ladka tha jinka naam Ghazi Shah tha aur unke saath aur ek ladka jinka naam Abdul Halim bin Ahmed Multani ko aap ne khaas taleem di, aur alhamdulillah dono bhi Shagird aapke bahut qabil nikle aur ek waqt aap ne Mohtaram Ghazi shah ko kuch gaon mae apna naeb banae, aur Abdul Halim ko Sindh ke kuch areas mae naeb muqrar kiye aur khud Hindustan tashreef laye magar aapki umar bhi wafa nahi ki aur 1228 mae aap Surat Gujrat mae inteqal kiye

Aap bahut zabardast Aalim the, Arabi ke shaer bhi the, aapke behtreen munajaat aur qasaed hain, aapki Khabre mubarak Surat mae ring road per sadak ke beech mae hae, aapke khabre shareef ki bahut mashoor karamat bhi hae, aapki khabar ko bulldozer se, hukumat khatam karna chahi magar bulldozer khreeb aata aur zameen se uth jata aakhir hukumat khamosh hogai, aaj khaas aur aam sab hi aapki ziyarat karte hae aur faiz uthata hain

Mukaram al aalim Abdul Halim Multani saheb kuch waqt Sindh mae rahe Dawat ka kaam sambhal liye aur phir Ilm ki khatir Baroda Mansub e waqt Syedi Abdul Raheem saheb ke pas aye, khoob Ilm hasil kiya magar ilm ki piyaas nahi bujhi aakher aap Dai ki hazrat mae pohunch gaye

Kafi waqt Dai ki khidmat mae rahkar Ilm hasil kiya, aur phir Hindustan wapas huve, Aapko Sindh ka mansub bhi muqrar kiya gaya tha, magar aap Sindh wapas jana pasand nahi kiye aur mansub e waqt ke saath rahkar Dawat ki khidmat anjaam diye

Aap ne Hindustan mae Barode ki ek bibi se shaadi bhi kiye aur aulad bhi huvi 1348 mae aapki aulad se Mulla Turab Ali walde Ahmed Ali walde Turab Ali walde Abdul Halim Multani moujud the, aaj malum nahi aapke khandaan se kaun log moujud hae, jo bhi ho Allah unper unke ye buzrug jadde aala (great grandfather) ke nazrat jari rakhe

Abdul Halim bin Ahmed multani Barode mae hi 63 saal ki umar mae 14 Shehrullah mubarak 1248 Hijri mae inteqal farmae aur aapki khabar Syedna Izzat Ali saheb jo kuch mahine pehle inteqal kiye the aur Hazrat Sheikh Ibrahim saheb ke hi Roze mubarak mae hae

Allah taala in tammam buzrugaun ke nazrat hum per rakhe aur hum mae bhi wohi jasba paida kare ke hum bhi Ilm ke khatir apni zindagi dedicate kardein

Syedi Ghazi Shah ka ziyada ahwal malum na hosaka

Haqeer ne Babahazrat ke zamane mae Syedi Sheikh Imran bin sher Mohammed ke haath ka likha safar naama (travalogue) dekha hae jo ashar (verses) mae hae, safar 1200 ke aas pas ka tha jo aap ne Baroda se Hyderabad kiya tha

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

Aapke khabre shareef ki tasveer bhi saath hae

Zikar Sindh ke Jazeere ka aur bhi hae.....................

11/13/15, 8:52:35 PM: Ishaq Ziaee (Mulla): 🌾🌱🌾🌱🌾🌱🌾🌱

Salaam alaikum !

Zikar ho raha tha Jazeere Sindh ki dawat ka........

Syedi Abdul Halim Multani Mansub e Sindh ka inteqal 1248 Hijri mae Barode mae huva, aur us'se qabal Sheikh Imran saheb 1228 mae Surat mae inteqal farma chuke the

Hindustan mae Manaseeb ka silsila barabar jari raha, Syedi Almansoob Abdul Raheem bin Saleh bhai ke 1216 mae inteqal ke baad Moulana Almansoob Mohammed Qassam saheb mansoob huve, aap 1227 mae inteqal kiye, aapke baad Syedna Izzat Ali saheb mansoob huve aur phir Dai ki aap per nas huvi magar aap Dai e qaer munfarid huve, aapke 1248 mae inteqal ke baad aapke farzand Moulana Gulam Fayaz Ali saheb 2 saal ka arsa Mansoob rahe aur aapke baad Moulana Ikram Ali saheb muqaddas huve, aur aapke 11 saal ke dor ke baad moulana Almansoob Sheikh Ibrahim Saheb 1262 mae mansoob muqrar huve, aapke baad Hazrat Moulana Farhat Ali saheb muqaddas 1278 mae mansoob e Hind wa Sindh huve

Taqreeban 60/70 saal ka period shaed hi koi Mansoob, Sindh ka dora kiye, haqeer ko is baat ki malumaat nahi hosaki magar itna zaroor kehsakta hun ke ikhwan e Sindh is dauraan apne deen aur aqeeda per masbuti se qaem rahe

1288 mae Hazrat Moulana Farhat saheb ne Sindh ka dora kiya aur Jazeere mae ek nayi rooh phunki, saqt mushkil halaat mae aap mukamil ek saal ka dora kiye

Sindh mae ikhwan bahut chote chote gaon mae bate (divided) huve hain jo ek doosre se bahut dur dur hain, aur woh zamane mae ghode aut (camel) khachar ki sawari thi, phir bhi aap har basti mae tashreef le'gae, deeni uloom batae, logoan ke aqeede durust kiye aur mukamil Dawat ka Nizam qaem kiye, Aap hi ne badi koshish aur kawish se Syedi Yusuf ke mazar ka chabruta uncha kiya jo pani se khrab ho raha tha aur roze mubarak ki durustagi wa tarmeem farmai, aur wahan Dawat ke intezamat ke liye Mulla Khawja Imam Baksh walde Peer Baksh ko bada muqrar farmaya   

Allah taala aapki is badi khidmat ka behtreen ajar ata kare

Aapke dor mae Hazrat Moulana Ziaali saheb bin Sheikh Ibrahim saheb bhi Sindh ke dore kiye, deeni taleem di aur intezamat farmae

Moulana Farhat Ali saheb aur Moulana Ziaali saheb ke dor se, Sindh aane ja'ne ka silsila phir jari hogaya, uske baad Syedna Gulam saheb aur Hazrat Maulana  Fathullah Saheb bhi barabar dore kiye,

Hazrat Moulana Fathullah saheb to Sindh ke lambe dorre se wapis aakar Barode mae saqt bimar huve aur uske baad hi 1355 mae inteqal farmae, bahut saqt zamana tha bahut mushkil aur dushwaar safar tha, Allah Taala aapki khidmat ka Dar e aakherat mae behtreen ajar ata kare

Dono muqadaseen Moulana Farhat Ali saheb wa Moulana Ziaali saheb  ke inteqal ke baad Syedna Gulam Hussain saheb aur Hazrat Fathullah Saheb Sindh ke Dorre karte hi rahe, aur aap hi ke dor mae Hazrat Ishak saheb ka bhi pehli waqt Sindh jana huva

Hazrat Moulana Ishak saheb muqaddus ke dor mae aap ne Sindh ke bahut se dorre kiye aur doosraun ko bhi Sindh bhejte rahe,

Hazrat Moulana Ishak saheb ne Sindh mae Dawat ka markaz qaem karne ka irada farmaya, aur wahan Zilla Muzaffergadh tahseel Alipur ke khreeb Bandeshah ke gaon mae jo  Pakistan ke national highway per moujud hae wahan aap ne 4 acres ki zameen per markaz (centre) qaem kiya, aur wahan per ek Masjid bhi banai jiska naam Jamae Masjid al Husain diya aur ussi zameen per ek khoobsurat imarat bhi banavai jiska naam Dar ul Rishaad diya, is imarat ke ban'ne ke baad Hindustan se jaane wale buzrugaane deen ko rahne ki bahut sahulat hogai

Aapke Dor ke baad Syedi Almansoob Moulana Shakir Saheb wa Moulana Nasrullah saheb ka dor aya, aap dono sahebaan ne Sindh ke bahut dorre kiye kafi waqt wahan rehte deeni taleem ikhwan ko dete waaz aur nasihat farmate bastiyun mae masajid wa jamaat khane tameer kiye aur Dawat ki imarat Dar ul Rishad per ek floor ka isafa bhi farmaya

Hazrat Moulana Ziaali saheb ibne al mansoob Ishak saheb ka dor aya, aap ne bhi Sindh ki Dawat mae kafi islaha (correction) kiye, wahan jamaat mae aam dehati logoan ko jangla (junglee) khe kar pukara jata tha aap ne saqti se is baat se roka aur farmaya "hum sab Sulaimani hae mommin hae koi kisse ko aaj ke baad jangla nahi khega", issi tarah aise bahut se rasumaat the jisko aap ne khatam kiya, usme se ek rasam beti de to beti le ki thi (jisko woh satta batta kehte hain) aap ne is ko bhi khatam karne ki bahut koshish farmaye, aap ne jaisa ki har dor mae huva awaam ke Sunni aur Isna Ashari Shia aalimaun se bahut bhes aur hujjatain ki aur bahut se awaam ko apne daleelaun se Sulaimaniat ki haqaneet ko sabit kiya, issi tarah bahut se log deen e Hanif mae dakhil bhi huve  

1983 mae Aap ne Dawat ke markaz mae, Dar ul Irshad ki imarat ke khreeb masjid banane ka irada kiya aur bahut khubsoorat hall banaya gaya, aap ne us imarat ka naam Dar ul Saada rakha aur us hall ke aadhe hisse ko Masjid qarar diya

1991 mae Syedna Hussain bin Ismail jab Sindh ka dora farmaya to aap ne us imarat ko puri Masjid qarar diya aur mehrab banane ka hukum diya, jo bahut jald bana diya gaya, aur issi tarah aapke dor mae bahut se basti mae masjid bhi tameer ki gai

Hazrat Moulana Ishak saheb ke waqt se lekar moulana Ziaali saheb ke dor tak Mukaram Alhaj al aamil al aalim Mulla Ameeruddin Saheb ibne Mulla Fakhruddin saheb bhi Manaseeb ke saath Sindh ke bahut se dorre kiye the, aur aap se manaseeb ko bahut maddad rahi hae, aap ne apne har dorre mae safar ka tafzeeli ahwaal likha jisko padhne se bahut si bataun ki malumaat hoti hae, khususan hamare buzrugane deen ki awaam ke oloma se bhez, unke nadir faisle, karamatain, Momineen ke ahwal, Allah taala aapko muqaddus kare aur aapki khidmat ka behtreen ajar de

Sindh ki Dawat ka zikar mukamil nahi hosakta hae jab tak ke wahan ke Aamil janab Mulla Fazle Ali Shah saheb ka zikar na ho, aap ne bahut lambi muddat khidmat e Dawat e Sindh ki, panch manaseeb ka dor dekha aur behtreen andaz mae manaseeb ke mansha mujeeb un ki taat mae Jazeere ki khidmat ki, aur aaj unhi ke bhetije Mulla Niyaz Hussain Shah saheb aur janab Mulla Hashim Ali Shah saheb khidmat e Dawat kar rahe hain

Inshallah Sindh ki Dawat ka zikar aur bhi hae.........

🌱🌾🌱🌾🌱🌾🌱🌾

11/13/15, 8:52:35 PM: Ishaq Ziaee (Mulla): 🍂🍂🍂🍂🍂🍂🍂🍂

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

جمعة مبارك

Kiya hi behtreen nasihat hae unke liye jo apne ghar se baher nikalte hae

Imam e Jaffar e Sadiq ka qol e mubarak hae, jab tum apne ghar se baher niklo, to aisa niklo ke, ab tumhare wapas aane ki koi umeed na ho, (as if you are not going to return back)

agar niklo to Allah ki taat mae hi niklo, aur ghar se nikalne ka sabab, woh asbab e Deen hi hona chahye, halal rozi kamana, misaaj pursi karna, ye sab bhi asbab e deen hi mae shammol hae, duniya ke kaam, agar jaes aur halal hain to woh bhi deen hi ke kaam aur maqsad mae shammil hae

Jab bhi tum ghar se niklo, to tum per lazim hae ke sakinat wa wiqar rakho  (patience, dignity & self respect) aur har haal mae, har waqt mae Allah ka zikar karte raho

Kehte hain, ke kuch log janab e Abizar e Ghaffari ki biwi se unke ghar aakar Abizar ke liye pucha, khaan hein woh ?

unki ahliya ne kha baher gae hain,

Woh log puche kab ainge ?

Ahliya ne jawab diya, jinki rooh kissi aur ke haath mae ho, uske liye mae kaise batasakti hun, aur woh bhi, apne nafs ke maalik nahi hain

Tum jab baher niklo, aur jahan kahi bhi jau, jidhar se bhi guzro, to Allah ki achi aur buri maqluq (good & baad) se ibrat hasil karo aur seekho

Tum Allah tabaraka wa taala se sawal karo, keh woh tum ko Allah taala ke nek aur khalis bandau mae shammil kare, aur maut ke baad tum ko tumhara hashar, sadiqeen wa saleheen ke zumre (group) mae kare

Tum Allah taala ka hamd karo, aur shukur ada karo, ke woh tum ko shahwataun (carnal indulgence) se mahfus (safe) rakhe, aur qabih (ugly) aur bure mujremeen ke afaal (deeds) se dur rakhe

Tum raaste mae apni nigaah shahwataun se nichi rakho aur aisi chezau ko, aur aise muqamat ko na dekho jisko tumhara deen ne dekhne se mana kiya hae

Tum darmiyani (standard pace) chal chalo, tum Allah ki taraf tawajuh (attention) har haal mae rakho, aisa ke tum ek pul e siraat per se guzar rahe ho

Tum ( لفافا lafaf) na bano, idhar udhar nigha na dau'rao (roving eyes) idhar udhar ruk kar tamashai na ban jao

Tum ifsha us Salaam karo (express salaam loudly) Salaam ke ahel ko Salaam karo, Salaam karne wale bano, ya phir jawab dene wale

Raaste chalte huve, jis kisi ko maddad ki zaroorat ho maddad karo, aur raasta bhatke huve ko sahi raasta batao

Raasta chalte huve jahelaun (illiterate) ke mu na lago, (donot indulge in conversing with shady characters) unse kinara karke (moving away), alag khamoshi se apna raasta lo, aur wahan se guzer jao

Aur jab tum apni manzil pohuncho aur ghar mae dakhil ho, to aise dakhil ho jaise, ek mayat khabar mae dakhil hoti ho, na ab uski koi taqat hae, na koi himmat, siwae Allah tabaraka wa taala ki rehmat aur afo wa maqferat ke

Hamari duniyawi zindagi ka koi fael, (action ) deen ke ahkamat se khali nahi, har amal ke liye Allah ki kitab, Koran e Kareem, Shariat e Mohammadi, sunnat e Nabi, A'ima ke aqwaal aur nasihat maujud hae

Ae Allah, humko itni tawfeeq inayet kar ke hamara amal, hamari har fael (action) Allah aur Rasul aur unke batae huve raaste ko pesh e nazar rakh kar ho

🍂🍂🍂🍂🍂🍂🍂🍂

11/13/15, 8:52:35 PM: Ishaq Ziaee (Mulla): 🔺🔺🔺🔺🔺🔺🔺🔺🔺

Insaan ki chaal ke bare mae nasihat per mujhe ek waqae yaad aya jo likh raha hun

Hazrat Moulana Ziaali saheb ibne Hazrat Ishak saheb muqaddas ek waqt Sindh ke Dorre per the, aur jaisa ki khadeem mae aur aaj bhi riwaj (custom) hae ke Jo bhi Hindustan se Sulaimani jamaat ka buzrug Sindh tashreef le jate hain wahan ke awaam ke log milne aate, baaz sawalat lekar, baaz aqeedat se aur baaz log hujjatain karke khud ke mazhab ko sahi sabit karne

Aur aksar waqt hamari haq ki daleelae sunkar deen e Haq Sulaimaniat mae dakhil bhi hojate hain aur ahed e shareef se musharaf hote hain

Hazrat Qibla ki ilmiyat aur shaqsiyat ka zikar sunkar wahan Alipur ke civil court ke judge aur kuch vakil aqeedattan milne ke liye aye

Walid e muqaddus se muqtalif subject per baat cheet hoti rahi, Hindustan ke siyasi haalat, shariat ke ahkaam e hudood, (islamic shari punishment)  Hindustan mae mazhabi azaadi, Urdu zabaan, Osmania university aur Hyderabad, bahut daer baithne ke baad, woh aapse bahut mutasir (impress) huve the, woh log jate jate aap se khaesh kiye ke aap humko kuch nasihat ki jiye

Walid ne farmaya ke mae kiya nasihat karu, nasihat to woh hae jo Koran ne farmaye hae

Aap ne hamare ikhwan mae se ek 9 saal ka bacha jo Wahan baitha tha aur hafiz e koran bhi tha usko surre Luqman padhne ke liye kha

Surre Luqman nasihataun se bhra hae, woh ayaat tilawat karta aur aap uska tarjuma wa tafseer farmate

Uski aakhri aakhri ayaataun mae ye nasihat bhi hae

لا تمش في ألارض مرحا أن الله لا يحب كل مختال فخور

Tum zameen per akad kar itra kar mar chalo, beshak Allah taala itrane wale, akadna wale, fakher karne wale ko napasand karta hae

Aur phir ye bhi farmaya

واقصد في مشيك

Tum apni chal darmiyani rakho aetedal per rakho

Tum zameen per zor zor se paer patak ke na chalo,

aur phir aap ne farmaya ke mere taraf se ek nasihat karta hun

Aap sab vakil haen isliye khaas keh raha hun,

hukoma ne farmaya hae ke apne sar (head) ko hamesha thanda rakho aur paer (feet) ko garam rakho yane, gusse per aur jasbaat per khabu rakho, aur paer ko garam rakhne se matlab hamesha zindagi mae justaju aur koshish karte raho

Jab woh vakil jaane lage to bahut hi ahistagi se khadam uthate huve chalte huve gae, jab ke wo aye the to apne ju'te (shoes) zameen per zor se mar kar chal rahe the

Wahan ke aamil Mulla Fazle Ali Shah saheb ne farmaye ke Hazrat saheb aap ki nasihatain, to unki zindagi ki hi chaal badal dali

🔺🔺🔺🔺🔺🔺🔺🔺🔺

11/13/15, 8:52:35 PM: Ishaq Ziaee (Mulla): 🍁🍁🍁🍁🍁🍁🍁🍁

Salaam alaikum !

 بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Imam e Jaffar e Sadiq farmate hae ;

Har bulundi ki asal woh ilm hae, issi liye Rasoolullah ka irshad mubarak hae

   طلب العلم فريضة علي كل مسلم و مسلمة

Ilm علم ka talab karna har musalman mard aur aurat per farz hae, aur ye jis ilm se qarz wa maqsad (aim & object) rakha gaya woh ilm e taqwa aur yaqeen hae

Moulana Ali ibn Abi talib farmate hae ;

اطلبوا العلم ولو بالصين

Tum Ilm ko talab karo, agarche ke tum ko uske liye seen (china) hi kiyu jana na pade aur haqeeqat mae woh Ilm hamare nafs ki marefat karna hae, aur uske zareeyeh se Allah taala ki marefat karna.

Nabi e kareem ka irshad e mubarak hae

من عرف نفسه فقد عرف ربه

Jisne apne Nafs ko jana pas usne apne Rabb ko jana

 Aur phir farmaya

عليك من العلم بما لا يصح العمل الا به وهوالاخلاص

tum per woh Ilm wajib hae, jiske baqaer koi amal sahi nahi hosakta, aur woh uska 'Iqlas'  اخلاص hae, yane Ilm ki asal woh uska ikhlas hae

Aur Nabi e Kareem ne ye bhi farmaya ke

 نعوذ باللہ من علم ﻻ ينفع

Mae Allah ki panah maangte hun us Ilm se jo koi nafa aur fayda na de, aur woh ilm hae, jo amal mae iqlas na paida karsake

Aur yeh baat bhi tum janlo keh thoda bhi Ilm mohtaj hota hae bahut ziyada amal ke, kiyunke thoda sa chend lamhe mae hasil kiya ilm bhi lazim kardeta hae, uske jannewale per zindagi tammam ka usper amal karna

Essa Masih alahe salaam ne ek pather dekha jisper likha tha, mujhe paltau, aur jab Esaa alahe salaam ne paltaya to usper likha tha, jisne ilm hasil kiya magar amal nahi kiya usper nahusat hae, aur woh Ilm usper phek diya jaega jo usne hasil kiya tha

Allah taala ne Dawood Nabi per wahi ki, keh jis ne Ilm ko hasil kiya, magar amal nahi kiya, to aise aadmi ko mere liye saqt tareen saza (punishment) dena bahut hi aasan hoga, aur mae uske dil se mere zikar ki mithas ko nikal daunga

Allah Subhanahu wa taala ki taraf jane ka ek hi raasta hae aur woh ilm hi ka raasta hae, ilm har insaan ki zeenat hae, duniya wa aakherat mae

Ilm woh aisa khazana hae ke kabhi kam nahi hota, Ilm maal se bahut behter hae, Ilm tumhari Hifazat karta hae aur maal ki tum hifazat karte ho, ilm haakim hae aur maal mehkum hae, maal kharch karne per kam hota hae aur Ilm kharch karne per badhta hae, pak hota hae, barkat hoti hae,

Isiliye Allah Subhanahu wa Taala ne Koran Kareem mae farmaya

يرفع الله الذين آمنوا منكم والذين أوتوا العلم درجات

Allah taala bulund karta hae darjaat un logoan ke jinhune Emaan laya aur jinhune Ilm hasil kiya

Aur Nabi kareem ne Irshad farmaya

العلماء ورثة الأنبياء

Oloma woh waris hote hae Ambia ke

Aur farmaya

Sab se behter hadiya ya tohfa woh kaleme Ilm wa hikmat hae

Aur kisi shaer ne kiya khoob shaer kha hae, jiska aakhri misra hae

الناس موتي واهل العلم إحياء

Tammam log murda hae, siwae ahel Ilm jo haqeeqat mae zinda hain

Aur Ilm hi ke zareeyeh insaan jannat ki taraf chalaya jaega, aur ilm hi ke zareeyeh Allah ki khushnudi (acceptance) aur marzi ki taraf insaan pohanchega

Sacha aalim woh hae jiski gawahi uske nek aur saleh amaal de, uske pak aur saf aadat de, uski sachai uska taqwa uska kirdar (character) uske aqlaq de

Woh aalim nahi jo sirf uski zabaan bolti ho, woh bhi nahi jiske gawahi sirf uski be-maqsad bhes de, woh bhi nahi jo kisi aur se compare kiya gaya ho, jo ye kehta ho ke mae usse badhkar hun, ya woh mujh se kamtar hae, aur woh bhi aalim nahi jo apni charab zabani se (sharp tongue) se aalim kehlaya gaya ho

Ilm ke talab karne wale mae, Aqal, nusuk (total obedience) Hikmat, Haya, khoof e Khuda hona zaroori hae, jo aaj kal ke Ilm talab karne wale mutalameen mae nahi hae

Aalim ke liye zaroori hae ke usme samajhdari ho, narmi ho, doosrau ki khairkhai (doosraun ki achai aur behtari chahna), Hilm (burdbari) hona, sabar hona, qinaat hona, aur saqawat hona

Aur issi tarah Ilm hasil karna wala muttalim ke liye bhi zaroori hae ke woh Ilm ka shoq wa raqbat rakhe, pukhta irada (firm  intention) rakhe, apna aap ko duniya ki mashquliat se azad rakhe, nusuk (obedience) rakhe, Allah ka khoof rakhe, hifz yana yadaasht ho, aur dur andeshi (farsightedness &  vision) usme maujud ho.

Allah taala se Dua hae ke hum ko sahi ilm ki maraefat ata kare

اللهم اغنني بالعلم وزيني بالحلم واكرمني بالتقوى وجملني بالعافية

Ae Allah tabaraka wa Taala, mujhe Ilm ki Daulat de, Hilm se zeenat dar kar, aur taqwa se izzat wa karamat de, aur aafiat se arasta (decorate) kar

11/13/15, 8:52:35 PM: Ishaq Ziaee (Mulla): 🌿🌿🌿🌿🌿🌿🌿🌿🌿

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

أنا لله وانا اليه راجعون

كل نفس ذائقة الموت وإنما توفون اجوركم يوم القيامة

Har Nafs maut ka maza chakne wala hae aur usko pura ka pura ajar Qiyamat mae milega

Maut to sabhaun ko aati hi hae, magar ek maut woh bhi hae jo Qom wa millat ki maut tasavur ki jati hae, aur woh, Syed wa Sardar e Qom wa millat ki maut hoti hae

Aisi hi maut Hamare Dai e Azeem Syedna wa Moulana Abdullah bin Mohammed Qadasallahu Rooh'hohu ki hae jinhune apni Azeem khidmat ko pura karne ke baad apne ajar ke talib hote huve aur apne Rabb e Aala ki mulaqat ke khaeshmand hote huve, apne khaliq ki taraf ruju kiye aur woh is tarah se ke dono ek doosre se razi wa khush, jis tarah aise hi bandaun ke liye Allah Subhanahu ne farmaya

يا أيتها النفس المطمئنة ارجعي الي ربك راضية مرضية

Ae Nafs e mutmaina (contented satisfied Nafs) laut ja apne Rabb ki taraf is halat mae ke tu usse razi hae aur woh tujh se razi.

Maut se kisi zinda ko chutkara nahi, har Nafs ko maut ka maza chakna hi hae, Jaisa ke koran ne farmaya

أين ما تكونوايدرككم الموت ولو كنتم في بروج مشيده  

Tum kahi bhi raho maut tum ko hasil karlegi agarche ke tum mazboot qile (fort) mae hi kiyu na chupe (hidden) huve ho

Allah taala ne Nafs ko maut ka maza chakne wala kha, to kiya jism nahi marta ? halankeh hum jism ko mayyat kehte hain, yane marne wali chez,

Maut ki tareef yu ki gayi hae ke مفارقة النفس الجسد yane maut woh dar haqeeqat Nafs ka jism ko chodna hae, to kiya hamara Nafs jism mae qaed tha ?

aisa bhi nahi hae balkeh asal baat ye hae ke Nafs ka jism se taluq (connection) tha jo uski maut per woh taluq khatam hojata hae aur yehi Nafs ki maut hae

Aur issi baat ko Koran Kareem ne farmaya

الله يتوفي الانفس حين موتها

Allah wafat deta hae Nafs ko uski maut per, bas haqeeqat yehi hae ke jism hamesha hi murda hae, jo muntaqil (inteqal karne wali chez) woh uska Nafs hae

Aur Allah taala ka irshad hae

والأجر الآخرة خير للذين أمنوا وكانوا يتقون

Aakherat ka ajar behtar hae un logoan ke liye jo Emaan laye aur jo taqwa shear rahe

Hamare Dai, Allah muqaddus kare aapko, ek Azeem Dai the aapke taqwa ka hum kiya zikar kare, bahut mushkil hae ke aapki sahi kaifiyat ko bayan kiya jae, sirf ek hi baat ka zikar kafi hae ke aap chend roz pehle tak 5 waqt Namaz ke liye Masjid mae tashreef laate aur Namaz padhate aur tammam Namaz kheda rahkar padhte jab ki aap ki umar 100 saal ke khreeb thi

Allah tabaraka wa Taala aapko muqaddus kare aur aapke nazrat wa taeedat hum per hamesha jari rakhe, aur Allah humko tawfeeq de ke hum bhi aapki tarah sab namaz masjid mae ba jamaat ada karsake

🌿🌿🌿🌿🌿🌿🌿🌿

11/13/15, 8:52:36 PM: Ishaq Ziaee (Mulla): ▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

الحمد لله، الله کا کرم وإحسان هے کےاور ایک جمعه همکو نصیب هوا  

Aaj Syedna al muqaddus ko Dar e Karamatullah ki taraf inteqal kiye char roz bhi hogae, Allah taala ki Rehmat aur barkaat ho aap per aur aapke nazraat jari rahe hum sab per

Deen, aur duniya ka bhi dastoor hae ke ek buzrug inteqal karta hae to uski jagaah uske jaisa sambhal leta hae

Jaisa ke Syedna Dai Gulam Hussain saheb muqaddas ne farmaya tha

الحمد الله الذي يتسق نظام دعوته، بقيام حدوده وخدماء دعوته الكرام

Allah taala ka Hamd hae is baat per keh, usne mazboot kiya nizam (organisations) Dawat ko uske hudood e kiraam ke qiyam se aur Dawat ke khidmat guzaraun ke zareeye se

Hum ko basharat (khush khabri) mili ke aapki jagaah per Syedna moulana Ahmed bin Ali Al Jamali Dai honge aur aapke baad aapke Khalifa Syedna wa Moulana Ali bin Hasin atalalahu baqahuma honge

Allah tabaraka wa taala humko un dono ki taat mae rakhe aur Hind wa Sindh ke manaseeb e kiraam ki taat mae rakhe, aur un tammam buzrugane deen ka saye atefat daraz kare

Koran Kareem ka irshad  hae ke, har Nafs maut ka maza chakhne wala hae, dar asal jism to pehle hi murda tha, aur inteqal ke baad bhi murda hi hae, agar zindagi thi to Nafs se thi.

Science ki musalsil koshish hae, ke insaan ki jismani zindagi ko badhaya jae aur kuch hadd tak medical science ne kamiyabi hasil bhi ki, magar kitna ? wohi chend aur saal ke pareshan kun aur takleef de zindagi

Aaj science bhi deen ki tammam bataun ko ahista ahista sacha rahi hae, aur ab scientific evidence ke saath tasleem kar rahi hae ke maut ke baad ki zindagi, roohani zindagi hi sab kuch hae,

Aaj science kiya kehti hae usiki zabaan mae pesh hae

It says;

There is vast information pointing with great force to the world that it doesn't require a physical body to be alive and this information is not esoteric or arcane anymore

A recent award winning documentary "Death makes life possible" where leading researchers tell's us that death is not the end of your existence

Researchers now agree that we are something more then our physical  body, definitely the body is the most intimate part of our environment, but its not not "US"  the body is so close to us that we can't just walk away from it until we die, but our body isn't "us"

The researchers say that that a "subtle body" an inner body emerges on our death when our physical body is shed, it emerges as naturally as a butterfly from cacoon at that point it enters a new environment as subtle as itself and becomes an outer body and this environment is what we call an "Afterlife" (ya phir hamari zabaan mae aakherat ya maut ke baad ki zindagi)

Serious research is being done all over the world on this paranormal phenomena, the scientifically researched papers and conclusions based on experiences and observations says that realistically, the world, one might enter after death could have terrors of its own, if ones character is marred by habits of cruelty, depravity or excessive selfishness

Bur for the true servants of humanity- from the ordinary good people who gives love to their families and friends to the geniuses  who lead the world to permanently changed for better, the world they would enter at death would be the most rewarding then this one in which we live with our bodies

There is definitely lot of evidence that points towards the life after death, or after this physical life.

All of us deserve to know about the massive amount of scientific evidence pointing to life after death

Duniya aur physical science ko, aur medical science ko issi tarah deen e Islam ki har baat ko tasleem karna hi hoga, science aaj ahista ahista Islam ki sab talimaat aur shariat ke ahkam ko apne tajrubaat experiments aur observations se sahi maan rahi hae, accept kar rahi hae

Aur hum jab science kehti hae to mante hae, aur jab Allah aur uske Rasul 1400 saal se kehte huve aye to dil se, yaqeen se nahi tasleem karte

Duniya ki science abhi us perfection tak nahi pohunchi jo Deen ki malumaat Allah, Rasul aur uski kitab koran aur Ahle baet aur Aima wa Duwaat ke zareeye hum tak aye hain

Science aur uske tajrube aur experiments woh hum insaan ki koshish ka natija  hae, aur woh deen ke Ilahi uloom hamare khaliq ke bataye huve hain jo hum tak Rasulullah aur uski kitab Koran ke zareeye aye hain

To phir kaun sahi hoga ?

 kaun perfect hoga ?

Kaunse uloom qabil aetemad aur bhrosa ke honge ?

Allah humko tawfeeq de ke hum hamare deen per ziyada aetemad (rely) kare bhrosa kare banis'bat, (in comparison) ke duniya ke science ke

اللهم إني أسألك من الخير كله ما علمت وما لم أعلم

Ae Allah; mae tujh se har khair ka khaeshmand hun chahe mujhe us baat ka ilm ho ya ilm na ho

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

11/13/15, 8:52:36 PM: Ishaq Ziaee (Mulla): 🌸🍀🌸🍀🌸🍀🌸🍀

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Syedna wa Moulana Dai Al Jamali Ali bin Hussain Almakrami Qadasallahu roohu, Jo keh Hindustan wa Sindh Pakistan tashreef laye the aur hum mae se aksar ikhwan e momineen ko, aapko dekhne aur qandambos hone ka sharaf hasil huva tha.

Syedna Jamali 1976 ke aas pas apni bimari ke ilaj ke liye London tashreef le gaye the, us waqt aap khud zikar farmate hae ke "mae apni bimari ki tashkhis (diagnosis) ke liye jab London gaya to wahan hamare ek bhai jinka naam  (Mulla) Dr Mushtaq hae unhune hum se khaesh ki keh ke mae unhe aur ikhwan e London ko aise baatain sunau jo unke deen mae nafa baqsh ho (faida mand sabit ho)"

"us waqt mujh per wajib hogaya ke mae deen ki bimariun ki tashkhis kardu, jis tarah se mujhe jismani bimariun ki tashkhis ki zaroorat hae

Aap ne us waqt bahut hi shaandar waaz wa nasihat se bhra bayan irshad farmaya tha

Aap ne farmaye ke "Ae mere bhai tum ko malum hona chahye ke jism ki bimari aur uski takleef ki inteha maut hae, magar deen ki bimari aur uski takleef maut ke baad shru hoti hae aur bahut saqt hae, jo kuch bhi Koran aur uske Rasul ki hadeesaun mae bayan huva woh ek saheb e Aqal e saleem aur zaheen (intelligent) ke liye kafi hae"

Aap ne uske baad toheed e subhanahu aur uske usul ko samjhaya aur ek mommin ke kiya aqaed (believes) hone chahye samjhya, jaise ke tammam Ambia ko sachana, tammam Aasmani kitabaun ko barhaq manna, Malaeka ke wajud ko tasleem karna aur Qiyamat ka iqrar karna ke, woh ek roz zaroor aegi aur us roz hum sab ke amal ka hisaab hoga

In buniyadi aqaed (basic believes) ke baad aap ne ye waaze (clearly) farmaya ke Duniya mae insaani zindagi ka wahed (sole & only) maqsad woh Allah ki ibadat hae, aur uske baad aap ne tammam ibadaat ko waaze (clearly) bayan farmaya

Aur sab se aakhir mae aap ne irshad farmaya;

"Ae ikhwan e azeez tum per wajib hae ke tum apni aulad ko is Deen e Haneef ki taleem do, jo ke Nafs ke liye aakherat mae sabse badi daulat hae, deen ki taleem bhi ussi tarah honi chahye jis tarah tum apni aulad ko duniya ki risq aur jism ki baqa (existence) ke liye taleem dete ho, hunar (proffesional skills) sikhate ho, ussi tarah tum unko aakherat ke liye bhi tarbiyat karo, ilm wa adab sikhao

Tum mae se har ek nigehbaan hae, tum mae har ek apne zer e sarprast (living under the guidance, parents) afraad ke bare mae sawal kiya jaega aur woh jawab de hoga (responsible) aur zimmedar hoga

Jaisa ke koran ne farmaya ;

 يا أيها الذين آمنوا قو أنفسكم وأهليكم نارا

Ae emaan walo tum apne aap ko aur apni aulad ko aag e jahanam se Bachao

Tum ko mae aa'gah (warn) karta hun ke tum hargis, aur hargis, duniya ki daulat ko aakherat ki fakiri aur mohtajgi ke badle mat talab karna, kiyunke aakherat, maut ke baad ki nafsani zindagi bahut taweel hae (lambi hae) aur woh tumhare ache amaal ki ziyada mohtaj aur zaroorat mand hae

Tum jo rozi apne jismani baqa ke liye talab karte ho woh to tumhare khaliq (creator) ne tumhare liye muqrar kardiya hae Jaisa ke Koran ne farmaye

 خلقكم ورزقكم فلا ينال أحد من الرزق إلا ما كتب الله له

Tum ko paida kiya aur risq diya, har shaqs ko bas utna hi risq milega jitna Allah taala ne uske liye muqrar kardiya

فالرزق مقسوم والاجل مختوم

Tumhari rozi taqseem ho chuki aur tumhari zindagi ki muddat per mohar (stamped) padh chuki hae

Magar, magar, aakherat ki rozi woh maqluq ko apni mehnat aur ilm wa amal se hi hasil karna hae, aur koshish karna hae

أما غنا الآخرة والكسب لها فالخلق مكلفون به  

Aur aakherat ki naeematain insaan ko apni mehnat aur koshish se hasil karna hae

Syedna Dai ne aakher mae Koran e majeed ki tilawat ke liye bahut takid farmai,  aur kha " tilawat e koran ke saath tum ko uski ayaataun mae qor wa fikar karna lazim aur wajib hae

Jo bhi insaan uski ayaataun mae qor aur fikar karega aur uske batae huve raaste per amal karega uski maut per usko hidayat hi hidayat hasil hogi

Aakhir mae aap ne Irshad farmaya ke ye meri Mukhtasar si nasihat unke liye hae, jinke pas Dil hae aur sunne wale Kaan hae

Syedna Ali bin Syedna Sulaiman saheb farmate hain ke teen huquq wajib aur farz hae

Allah ka Haq bandaun per

Maa Baap ka Haq aulad per

Aur Aulad ka Haq maa baap per

Allah taala ne in tammam ka ada karna apni Kitab ke zareeye Farz kiya hae, in'me se ek bhi ada na kiya gaya to doosre bhi nahi qabool honge

Allah taala ka Haq hae ke uski manhi'aat (haram karda) se ruka jae, uski taat ki jae aur uske ahkam per paband raha jae

Maa Baap ka haq hae ke unki aulad unke ahsanat ka shukur ada kare aur hamesha unki taat mae khyam kare (being obedient to them)

Aur aulad ka haq banta hae ki unke Maa Baap shafaqat ke saath unki tarbiyat kare, unko munasib qiza (food) khilae, aur kitab ullah Ilm e Shariat wa hikmat sikhae

Agar kisi ne bhi in'me se ek mae bhi kothai ki, kami ya barabar nahi kiya, to phir woh uske doosre huquq ke qabool hone ki umeed na rakhe

Allah humko tawfeeq de ke in teeno Huquq ko puri tarah ada kare.

 🌸🍀🌸🍀🌸🍀🌸🍀

11/13/15, 8:52:36 PM: Ishaq Ziaee (Mulla): 🌾🌳🌾🌳🌾🌳🌾🌳

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Maah e Rajab ul murajab ka saamne hae, aur yeh mahina aata hae to Hazrat Almansoob Moulana Shakir Saheb muqaddas ki yaad ajati hae

Aap ka inteqal 6 Rajab 1393 Hijri, youme sanichar, 4 august 1973 ko huva

Waise to har buzrug e deen mae bahut si khubiyaan hoti hi hain magar, Moulana Shakir Saheb mae jo aapki sabse numaya khubi thi to woh aapka kalam e majeed per ubur tha (mastery)

Aap moqe moqe se Koran Kareem ki ayatain quote karte, uske maane aur matalib uloom e ahle baet se batate, uski tafseer wa taweel batate

Ek waqt aap Hyderabad mae tashreef rakhte the, us waqt kisi saheb ke bahut hi khreebi rishtedar inteqal kiye the, woh bahut ghum liye the aur unka, marhum ke liye rona bahut ho raha tha

Hazrat muqaddas ne unko taziyat diye aur tasali di, aur phir aap ne bahut hi ache andaz mae unko zindagi ka maqsad, maut ki haqeeqat aur aakherat ka safar aur uske mane wa mafhum samjhaya,

Aap ne Koran e Kareem ki muqtalif ayaat sunakar unko tasali di, aur farmaya ke maut, hukum e Ilahi ka ek atal khanoon hae jis'se koi ze-rooh bach nahi sakta

Phir aap ne ye sher padha

موت أمر رب هےٹل سکتی نہی

کیا رہے کوی، جو پیغمبر گے  

Phir aap ne farmaya, ye duniya aur uski zindagi aarzi hae, chend roza hae, aur phir fana ho jaegi, yaha ka dukh sukh, aram wa takleef, maal wa daulat, dost wa aulad sab hi aarzi (temporary) hain, sab dhoka hae, ye duniya ek khel tamasha hae, bas bandaun ke liye imtehan hae ke kaun apni aakherat ke liye, yane maut ke baad ki asli aur haqeeqi zindagi ke liye amal karta hae

Aur phir aap ne ek saath zindagi aur maut aur aakherat ki abadi zindagi per bahut si ayaatain sunai, jinme se chend ayatain pesh hain

كل من عليها فان ويبقي وجه ربك ذىالجلال والإكرام

Duniya ki har chez fani hae khatam hone wali hae ,baqi rahna wala woh Allah ka chehra hae jo Jalal aur Ikram wala hae

وما الحيوة الدنيا إلا لعب ولهو، وللدار الأخرة خيرللذين يتقون أفلا تعقلون

Ye duniya ki zindagi khel kud ke siwae kuch nahi, magar beshak perhazgarau ke liye Dar e aakherat bahut behter hae, kiya tum itna bhi nahi samajhte

انا جعلنا ما علي الأرض زينة لهالنبلوهم أيهم احسن عملا

Duniya ko tumhare liye ek muqam e zeenat banaya, takeh tum ko aazmae ke tum mae se kaun acha amal karta hae

المال والبنون زينة الحيواة الدنيا والباقيات الصالحات خير عند ربك ثواباوخيراملا

Maal aur aulad zindagi ki chend roza araesh hae, baqi rahne Wali tumhari nekiyaun Allah taala ke nasdik ba'etebar sawab ke aur ba'etebar umeed wa tamana ke bahut achi hain

الذي خلق الموت الحيوة ليبلوكم ايكم احسن عملا

Allah taala ne maut wa hayat ko paida kiya takeh tumhari aazmaesh kare keh tum mae se kaun acha amal karta hae

ولكم في الأرض مستقر ومتاع الى حين

Tumhare liye zameen per rahna aur chend roza zindagi guzarna kuch waqt tak ke lye hae

وان الآخرة هي دار القرار

Beshak aakherat ka ghar hi qarar ka ghar hae sahi thikana hae

In tammam ayaat se ye duniya ka aarzi hona sabit hota hae, aur is duniya ka aesh wa aaram sukoon wa itmenan koi maane nahi rakhta, duniya ki haqeeqat wa haisiyat aankhaun ke saamne aajati hae, haqeeqi wa ab'adi zindagi woh maut ke baad hi shru hoti hae, maut hamare liye ek lamhe fikar hae, hum maut se ibrat le, hamari zindagi ka maqsad sirf duniya ka maal wa daulat taqat wa power na ho, balkeh sirf aur sirf aakherat ke nazar se duniya ki zindagi basar karna chahye

Hazrat qibla ke koran ki in ayaataun se samjhane se, woh bhai ko dili tasali huvi, zindagi aur maut ka nazriya badla aur itmenan aur puri tasali hazil karke apne ghar laut gae

Hazrat muqaddas ka ek saath musalsil itni bahut si ayaataun ka quote karna, tammam mehfil ko ek hairat aur tajub mae dal diya tha, aur phir aapka unko sada asaan alfaz mae samjhana sab hi mashallah, subhanallah kehte jate

Allah taala Hazrat muqaddas ko jannat e aaliyat mae aala se aala tareen muqam ata kare, aur humko haqeeqi zindagi kise kehte hain uski marefat karae

11/13/15, 8:52:36 PM: Ishaq Ziaee (Mulla): 🚥🚦🚥🚦🚥🚦🚥🚦🚥

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

جمعة مبارك

Deen mae har choti si baat ke liye ahkam aye hae, issi tarah safar ke liye bhi ahkamaat hain

Aaj ka safar bahut asaan hogaya hae, magar phir bhi ha'desat aur mushkilat to pesh aate hi hae, hum kuch bataun ka khyal rakhe to safer ki "suffering" se mehfooz hojainge

Rasoolullah farmate hain koi shaqs safar per nikalta hae to apne ahel wa ayal ke liya sab se acha nighebaan, jo chodta hae, woh uski do rakaat Namaz e Safar hae jo woh safar se pehle padhta hae

Moulae kaynaat Ali ibne Abi Talib salwatullah alehe  jab bhi safar per nikalte to sab se pehle salaamti ki Dua karte aur sadqa wa khairaat karte

Aur jab salaamti ke saath wapis hote, tab bhi Allah ka shukur ada karte aur phir sadqa karte

Jab aap sawari per baith'te to koran majeed ki ye ayaat tilawat farmate

 بسم الله الرحمن

سبحان الذي سخر لنا هذا وما كنا له مقرنين 0 وانا الى ربنالمنقلبون 0

Pak hae woh zaat jisne is (sawari, mode of transport) ko ta'be (under control) kiya hamare liye warna hum to aise na the ke is ko qabu (control) mae karlete, aur yaqinan hum apne pawardigaar ki taraf laut kar jane wale hain

Aur uske baad aap teen baar Surre الحمد padhte aur phir teen waqt zoor se "Allah hu Akbar" kehte

Phir aap yeh ayaat padhte

سبحانك اللهم إني ظلمت نفسي فاغفرلي فغفر له أنه هوالغفور الرحيم

tareef hae Allah tabaraka wa Taala ki, mae ne apne aap per zulum kiya bas tu mujhe maaf farma be shak koi mujhe maaf karne wala nahi siwae tere

is kalam ke baad aap haaste (used to laugh)

logoan ne pucha ae Ameer al momineen aap kis baat per haas rahe hain ?

Aap ne farmaya keh mae ne Rasulullah ko bhi aisa hi haasta hua dekha hae

Aur mae ne jab Rasulullah ko pucha ke aap kis baat per haanste hain to aap ne farmaya tha

Allah taala is baat ko bahut pasand farmata hae jab ke banda Allah se yeh aajisi se kehta hae, keh "tu mere gunaah ko maaf farma"

Aur Allah Taala bhi jaanta hae, Rasul bhi jaante the aur mae bhi jaanta hun ke uske siwae koi nahi hae jo mere gunaah ko maaf kare

bus issi baat per mujhe haansi aagai

Imam e Jafar e Sadiq farmate hain;

do murawat (khyal karna) hain ek safar ki aur ek hasar, yane watan ki

Hasar ki murawat woh tilawat e Koran hae, masjid mae namaz ke liye haziri dena, ache shareef logoan ki sohbat ikhteyar karna aur shariat mae qor wa fikar karna, shariat ke paband rehna

Safar ki murawat yeh hae ki haath khula rakhna (paise mae kanjosi na karna), safar ke saathiyun ka saath dena, aur alag hone per unki burai se rukna, burai nahi karna

Rasulullah ne akele safar karne se manna farmaya hae, aap ne farmaya akela aadmi woh Shaitaan hae, do bhi do Shaitaan aur teen woh khafila hae

Ae Allah taala hamare safar ki saqtiyun ko asaan farma, aur hamare liye behtreen saathi moin wa madadgaar hoja, aur tammam takaleef mushkilat aur tangi ko aasaan farma

بحق سيد المرسلين ووصيه مولانا أميرالمومنين وأهل بيته الطيبين الطاهرين صلوات الله وسلامه عليهم أجمعين
