12/8/15, 9:53:58 AM: Ishaq Ziaee (Mulla): 🔲🔲🔲🔲🔲🔲🔲🔲

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Surah Luqman mae Janab e Luqman Hakim apne farzand ko nazihat farmate hain

وَلَا تُصَعِّرْ خَدَّكَ لِلنَّاسِ وَلَا تَمْشِ فِي الْأَرْضِ مَرَحًا إِنَّ اللَّهَ لَا يُحِبُّ كُلَّ مُخْتَالٍ فَخُورٍ

اور (ازراہ غرور) لوگوں سے گال نہ پھلانا اور زمین میں اکڑ کر نہ چلنا۔ کہ خدا کسی اترانے والے خود پسند کو پسند نہیں کرتا

Tum logoan se mu phula kar, narazgi ka ishaar karke, aur zameen per akad kar na chalo, Allah taala kisi itrane wale, khud pasand (proud) insaan ko pasand nahi karta

Imam e Jaffar e Sadiq ka qol e mubarak hae ke jab bhi tum apne ghar se baher niklo, to aisa soch kar niklo ke ab ghar wapas nahi aane wale ho (as if you are not going to come back)

Ghar se baher niklo to Allah ki taat mae hi niklo, aur nikalne ka sabab, (reason) woh asbab e deen hi ho, Halal rozi kamana, misaj pursi karna, ghar ki zaroriyaat la'ne jana, ye sab bhi asbab e deen hi mae hae, duniya ke kaam agar, jaes aur halal hae to woh bhi deen hi ke kaam mae shammil honge

 Jab bh tumi ghar se niklo, to tum per lazim hae ke sakinat wa wiqar rakho (patience dignity & self respect) aur har haal mae Allah ka zikar karte raho

Allah taala (pompous) logoan ko saqt napasand karta hae, farmata hae

فَخَرَجَ عَلَىٰ قَوْمِهِ فِي زِينَتِهِ

تو (ایک روز) قارون (بڑی) آرائش (اور ٹھاٹھ) سے اپنی قوم کے سامنے نکلا۔

Qaroon bade thatt (pomp) se apni Qom ke saamne nikla Allah taala ne koran e kareem mae Qaroon ka sach dhaj kar (with ornamental decorations) phen kar baher nikalna saqt napasand kiya hae  

Kehte hae ke kuch log Janab e Abizar e Ghaffari ki biwi se unke ghar aakar janab e Abizar ke liye pucha "kahan hein Janab e Abi Zar" ?  

Janab e Abizar ki biwi ne kaha, baher gae hain,

Woh logoan ne puche kab ainge ?

Aapki biwi ne jawab diya, jinki "Rooh" kisi aur ke haath mae ho, uske liye mae kaise batasakti hun ke kab ainge, aur sach to ye hae ke woh khud bhi, apne "Nafs" ke malik nahi

Tum jab bhi baher niklo, jahan kahi bhi jao, jidhar se bhi guzro, to Allah ke ache aur bure dono maqluq se ibrat hasil karo, sabaq sikho

Tum har haal mae Allah taala ka حمد Hamd wa شكر shukur ada karo, ke woh tum ko shahwataun (carnal indulgence) se mahfus rakha hae, aur qabih aur bure mujremeen ke afaal (deeds) se dur rakhe

Tum raaste mae apni nigah shahwataun se nichi rakho, aur aisi chezaun ko, aur aise muqamat ko na dekho jisko tumhara deen dekhne se mana karta hae

Tum darmiyani (standard pace) chal chalo, tum Allah ki taraf tawajuh (attention) har haal mae rakho, aisa ke tum, ek "Pul e Siraat" per se guzar rahe ho

Tum ( لفافا lafaf) na bano, idhar udhar nigha na dorao (roving eyes) idhar udhar ruk kar tamashai na ban jao

Raasta chalte huve jahelaun (illiterate) ke mu na lago, unse kinara (keep distance) karke alag khamoshi se apna raasta lo

Aur Allah taala Koran e kareem mae momineen ki sifat mae farmata hae

وَالَّذِينَ لَا يَشْهَدُونَ الزُّورَ وَإِذَا مَرُّوا بِاللَّغْوِ مَرُّوا كِرَامًا

اور وہ جو جھوٹی گواہی نہیں دیتے اور جب ان کو بیہودہ چیزوں کے پاس سے گزرنے کا اتفاق ہو تو بزرگانہ انداز سے گزرتے ہیں

Woh log jhooti gawahi nahi dete, aur jab laq'wee'at, behuda khrab (cheap & shady characters) logoan ke pas se guzarte hain to sharafat ke saath apne daman ko bacha kar baqaer ched chad (instigating them) ke khamoshi se guzar jate hain

Tum ifsha us salaam karo (express Salaam loudly), salaam karne wale bano, ya phir jawab dene wale, jaisa ka Allah ka hukum hae, mommin, qaer e mommin, ahle kitab, Mushrik, aurat, sab ke salaam karne aur jawab dene ke ahkamaat alag alag hain

Raaste chalte huve, jisko maddad ki zaroorat ho maddad karo, aur raasta bhatke huve ko sahi raasta batao

Allah taala Koran mae farmata hae

وَعِبَادُ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الَّذِينَ يَمْشُونَ عَلَى الْأَرْضِ هَوْنًا وَإِذَا خَاطَبَهُمُ الْجَاهِلُونَ قَالُوا سَلَامًا

اور خدا کے بندے تو وہ ہیں جو زمین پر آہستگی سے چلتے ہیں اور جب جاہل لوگ ان سے (جاہلانہ) گفتگو کرتے ہیں تو سلام کہتے ہیں

Tum raaste per ahistagi se darmiyani chal chalo, aur jab tum jahel logoan ke pas se guzro to, to unko salaam karte huve guzar jao, aisa karne se tum unke shar aur burai se baj jaoge

Aur jab tum apni manzil pohuncho aur ghar mae dakhil ho, to aise dakhil ho jaise, ek mayat khabar mae dakhil hoti ho, na ab uski koi takhet hae, na koi himmat, siwae Allah tabaraka wa taala ki rehmat, afo wa maqferat ke

Aur ek raasta, woh HAQ ka raasta bhi hae jisper hum, Allah ke karam se khede hain, magar humko usper chalna bhi hae, sirf raaste per khede hone se manzil nahi miljati

Allah taala humko us manzil ko pa'ne, hasil karne ke liye us raaste per chalne ki hidayat de

اهدنا الصراط المستقيم

اهدنا الصراط المستقيم

اهدنا الصراط المستقيم

🔲🔲🔲🔲🔲🔲🔲🔲🔲

 Qaroon قارون woh Hazrat e Musa ke zamane ka ek bahut bade Qabile ka sardar tha, jo shru mae Musa ko maanta tha, magar baad mae Musa aur Haroon alehe salaam, ke khilaf ladne aya tha, uske pas be hisaab daulat aur khazane the, jisko Qaroon ka khazana kehte hain aur English mae (Croesus treasure) kehte hain, Hazrat e Musa ki bad'Dua se uska anjaam bahut bura huva

🔲🔲🔲🔲🔲🔲🔲🔲

12/10/15, 11:47:31 AM: Ishaq Ziaee (Mulla): 📖📖📖📖📖📖📖📖

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

يوم الجمعة مبروك

شهر ميلاد النبي ربيع الأول کی تبریک آپ سب کو پیش ہے  

Imam e Jaffar e Sadiq alahe Salaam irshad farmate hain,

Jis kisi ne bhi Koran e kareem ki tilawat ki, aur Allah ki bargaah mae khushu nahi kiya, riqat e qalb (Dil) nahi kiya, huzun nahi paida kiya, to phir usne Allah taala ki buzrugi aur shaan ko halka khyal kiya

Koran ka padhne wala teen chezaun ka mohtaj hae, khushu karne wala Dil, fariq badan (free from other activity) aur khali pursukoon jagaah (peaceful isolated place)

Jab Qari e koran (reciter) khushu karega to shaitan us'se dur bhagega

Allah taala Koran e majeed mae farmata hae

       فاذا قرآت القرآن فاستعذ بالله من الشيطان الرجيم

Tum jab kabhi bhi koran ki tilawat karo to sab se pehle Allah ki panah (protection) talab karo shaitan nir'rajeem se

اعوذباللہ من الشيطان الرجيم

Agar tum apne "Nafs" ko Duniya ki mashquliat se dur karlo, apne Dil ko doosre khyalaat se pak karlo, alag karlo, tab hi jakar tum koran ki puri Barkat ko, Noor ko, aur uske tammam fa'waed (benefits) ko hasil kar sakoge

Jab tum Koran e kareem padhne ke liye sukun ki khali jagaah dekh loge, aur logoan se dur hojaoge, (secluded) aur khushu e Qalb, aur badan ki firaqat (free from work) ke saath Koran e kareem ki tilawat karoge to us waqt tumhari "Rooh" Allah taala se un'sat hasil karegi, aur tum ko woh shireeni woh lazat hasil hogi, jo Allah ke Saleheen (nek) bande hasil karte hain, aur tum bhi jaan jaoge woh lutf (enjoyment, satisfaction  contentment) ko jo صالحين Saleheen, wa nek bandaun ko hasil hoti hae,

Aur jo shaqs is mashrab (pina ki jagah, yane Koran) se ek piyala (bowl) pi liya, woh hamesha ussi haal mae rehna hi pasand karega, bahut ziyada tilawat karte rahega, balkeh woh doosre tammam kaam, aur shuqul (activity) ke muqabil mae koran ko padhna hi sab se ziyada pasand karega, kiyunkeh, koran ka padhna woh Allah taala se munajaat karna hae, sargoshi (speaking in whispers) karna hae, aur woh bhi baqaer (without) kisi waaste (link) ke,  

Tum jab Allah taala ki Kitab padho, to uske hudood ki pabandi karo, uske hukum ko qabool karo, uski mana (forbidden) karda haram chezaun se dur raho, yeh ek bahut hi kimti, bahut hi aala, bahut taqatwaar Kitab hae

     لا ياتيه الباطل من بين يديه ولا من خلفه تنزيل من حكيم حميد

Koran e kareem mae koi baat, koi chez batil (wrong) nahi, uske aage na peeche, aur woh ek aise Hakim O Hameed ki taraf se nazil kiya gaya hae jiska Hamd kiya jata hae, tareef wa tauseef ki jati hae

koran e majeed ko tartil (ruk ruk kar umda tariqe se saaf alfaz se ada karte huve padhna) ke saath sahi padho, qor wa fikar karo, har us ayaat per jahan dadaya gaya, jahan Allah taala ne jannat ka wada kiya, jahanam ka khoof dilaya gaya, tum socho, qor wa fikar karo, un ayaataun mae jahan misaale (examples) diye gaye, jahan waaz wa nasihat ki gai, aur jahan dadaya gaya

Aur aisa bhi na ho ke tum sirf uske zahari huruf wa alfaz mae ulhaj kar rah jao, aur uske batani maane aur uske hudood (limits) aur awamir (hukum) ko zae (waste) kardo

القرأن غني لا فقر بعده ولا غني دونه

Koran aisi daulat hae jiske baad koi mohtajgi nahi rahti, balke uske siwae koi daulat hi nahi hae

Aur Nabi ne farmaya

ليس منا من لم يتعظ بالقرآن

Jis ne Koran e majeed se nasihat hasil nahi ki woh hum mae se nahi hae

  والحمدلله والصلاة والسلام على سيدنا محمد وعلى آله وسلم

📖📖📖📖📖📖📖📖

12/14/15, 8:25:07 AM: Ishaq Ziaee (Mulla): 🌾🌱🌾🌱🌾🌱🌾🌱

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Milad un Nabi ka mahina hae, Nabi e kareem Mohammed e Mustafa Salallahu Alehe wa sallam ke "Aqlaq e Hasana" ka zikar karna hae

Nabi e kareem ka khud irshad hae,

بعثت لإتمم مكارم الأخلاق

Mae aqlaq ki mukamil taleem dene ke liye hi mabus مبعث kiya gaya hun aur Koran e kareem ne is baat ki gawahi is tarah di

وَإِنَّكَ لَعَلَىٰ خُلُقٍ عَظِيمٍ

And verily, you ]Muhammad] are on an exalted standard of character

Beshak ke ae Nabi aap bade azeem aqlaq per ho

Moulana Ali se ek dehati aadmi (villager) pucha ke Rasulullah ke aqlaq kiya the ?

Aap ne usko farmaya ke pehle tu bata ki duniya ki chezain kitni hain ?

Usne kha be'hadd wa hisaab, ginti karna mushkil hae (countless)

Aap ne farmaya ke aur Allah taala ne un chezaun ke liye farmaya

 قُلْ مَتَاعُ الدُّنْيَا قَلِيلٌ

Kehdijiye ke Duniya ka samaan thoda hi hae, aur is baat ke muqabil jis chez ko azeem kha gaya hae, to uski  azmat kiya hogi, aur usko hum kiya shummar karenge

كان خلقه القرآن

Saara ka Saara koran, aapke aqlaq ka partao (reflection) hae  

Nabi e kareem ki sabse badi حسنت khubi woh aapki "Raheemi" wa "Kareemi" ki sifat thi, isliye ke Allah taala ne aapko saare awalim (universes) ke liye Rehmat banakar bheja tha, aur farmaya tha

 وَمَا أَرْسَلْنَاكَ إِلَّا رَحْمَةً لِّلْعَالَمِينَ

And We have sent you [Muhammad] not but as a mercy for the 'Alamin (mankind, jinns and all that exists).

Nahi bheja aapko siwae Rehmat banakar aalameen ke liye

Aur Rehmat ul Lil aalameen mae "Rehmat" ke maane bahut vasi (vast) hae,

Jaisa ke Allah taala farmata hae

لَقَدْ جَاءَكُمْ رَسُولٌ مِّنْ أَنفُسِكُمْ عَزِيزٌ عَلَيْهِ مَا عَنِتُّمْ حَرِيصٌ عَلَيْكُم بِالْمُؤْمِنِينَ رَءُوفٌ رَّحِيمٌ

Verily, there has come unto you a Messenger (Muhammad) from amongst yourselves, It grieves him that you should receive any injury or difficulty. He is anxious over you, concerned for you, for the believers he is full of pity, kind, and merciful

Ae logoan tum per jo bhi saqti hoti hae woh Rasul per bahut shaq (hurts him) guzarti hae  

Aur Nabi ko khitab karte huve رحمة للعالمين khe jane ki wajeh bhi Koran e kareem mae is tarah bayan farmadi

فَبِمَا رَحْمَةٍ مِّنَ اللَّهِ لِنتَ لَهُمْ وَلَوْ كُنتَ فَظًّا غَلِيظَ الْقَلْبِ لَانفَضُّوا مِنْ حَوْلِكَ

And by the Mercy of Allah, you (Muhammad) dealt with them gently. And had you been severe and harsh-hearted, they would have broken away from you

Ae Nabi aap agar saqt dil hote to aap ke atraaf ye log kabhi jama na hote

Aap ke Rahimi ke be'shummar waqaet hain, seerat un Nabi, un be shummar waqaet se bhari padhi hae, hum kin, kin, baataun ka zikar karsakte hain

Rasulullah saari zindagi Afo عفو wa maqferat مغفرت se kaam lete rahe, logoan ki badi, badi, ghaltiyun aur khataun (mistakes) ko maaf farmadiye

Aap apne inteqal ke khreeb ye 'elaan e aam' karwa diye ke agar mae ne kisi ki jaan, maal, ya aabro (izzat) ko sadma (hurt feelings) pohunchaya hae, kisi ko koi takleef pohunchi hae, to woh baat mujh per karz hae, mae hazir hun woh shaqs baqaer kisi khoof, darr, ke aakar mujh se badla le le, kiyunke mae Allah taala ke pas saaf suthra jana chahte hun

Is baat ke barkhilaf (in comparison) hum momineen, wohi Rasulullah ko mane walaun, ka kirdar kiya hae ? hamare Aqlaq kiya hain ?

Hazrat Moulana Ziaali saheb muqaddus hamesha farmate the ke hum momineen sab se ziyada logoan ke mamlaat ke khisas (hisaab) mae pakde jainge, ibadaat, awamir wa nawahi (things to do & to refrain) to woh Allah ki janib se hae, na karne per Allah maaf bhi karde sakta hae, woh aapki toba aur isteqfar ke upar daromadar (depends) hae, magar huquq ul ibaad, bandaun ke haq mae koi farq hae, kami hae, to usse woh chute ga nahi, jab tak ki jiska hisaab hae woh maaf na farmade, ya badla pura na ho

Rasul e kareem "Rehmat ul aalameen" ne Islam ki daulat, insaaf ki naemat, aur aqlaq ki daulat de'kar, hum per ahsaan e azeem kar gae, ab ye hum per munhasir (depends) hae ke hum us baat ka kitna khyal rakhte hain

أشهد أن لا اله الا الله محمد رسول الله

🌱🌾🌱🌾🌱🌾🌱🌾

12/17/15, 11:30:09 AM: Ishaq Ziaee (Mulla): 🍂🌿🍂🌿🍂🌿🍂🌿

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

جمعة مبارك

Aaj Duniya ka koi aisa muqam nahi jahan Rasulullah ka laya huva "Deen e Islam" moujud na ho

Agar hum qor wa fikar kare to mehsoos hoga ke ye ek kitna mushkil, balkeh, mae kahunga ke ek na mumkin kaam tha ke Arabastan jaisi jagah, jahan jaheliyat inteha per thi, aisi jagah Deen e Islam ki buniyaad rakhna, aur nai shariat pesh karna, aur puri tarah kamiyab bhi hona

Hum agar seerat un Nabi ka aur qable (before) Nabi ki tareeq ka mutalea (study) kare to humko jaheliyat e Arab aur uske muqabil, Rasulullah ki kawish, mehnat wa koshish ka kuch andaza hoga

Tammam Ambia aur Rasulaun ki zindagi 3 teen marekaun (jung, opposition) se guzarti hae

Pehli baat woh ترهيب tarheeb hae, tarheeb mae dadaya jata hae dhamkaya jata hae, khoof dilaya jata hae, sataya jata hae, jaise ke Rasulallah ki raah mae kante (thorns) dal diye jate the, kachra pheka jata, aapko pather mare jate, aapko shaer, majnoon (diwana) sa'her (jadugar) kha jata tha

Doosra tariqa woh ترغيب tarqeeb ka tha, yane Zan, Zar, Zameen, yane aurat, maal wa daulat aur zameen pesh ki gai, takeh aap Deen e Islam ke phelane se ruk jae

Teesra aur sabse khatarnak tareeqa woh تركيب tarkeeb ka hae, isme chal hoti hae, sa'zish hoti hae, compromising situation paida hoti hae, maqsad ko dilute kardiya jata hae, matlab ye ke tum kuch jhuko hum kuch jhukte hain, tum kuch hamari baat mano, hum kuch tumhari baat mante hae

Nab ei kareem, Rasul Akram, Mohammed e Mustafa Salallahu Alehe wa sallam ko in teeno marahel (stages) se guzarna huva

Tarheeb ترهيب mae log aapko Mohammed ki jagah muzammam kehte (jiski mazamat, yane burai ki gai) aapke Sahabi ko صابي Sabi (downtrodden) kha jata, aur Islami tareeqe  السلام عليكم  ko badal kar  السام عليكم  kehte, jiske mane, tumhari maut ho, tumhari halaki ho ke hote

Tarqeeb ترغيب mae aapko Mecce ke mashoor pahad "Jabal e Abi Qubaes" ke barabar sona (gold) pesh kiya gaya, Arab ki haseen tareen aurataun ko, aapke ke liye pesh kiye gaye, Arab ki puri siyasi hukumat (political power) dena ka wada kiya gaya, magar yeh ke aap Islam ko phelane se ruk jae, magar Nabi e kareem ne in tammam baataun se apna mu modh liya

Ab aakhri tariqa woh tarkeeb  تركيب  ka tha, to kuffar khuresh ne kha ke aapke kalme mubarak لااله إلا الله  ki jagah aap usko  الله اله Allaho Ilahun, yane bahut se Allah mae se mera bhi ek Allah kardo, Nabi ne inkar kiya to kehne lage to phir aisa karte hain ke ek saal hum aapke Allah ki ibadat karte hain, aur ek saal aap hamare Allah (idols) ki ibadat karna

Nabi kareem ne in tammam baataun ka saaf inkar kardiya aur kehdiya

لكم دينكم ولي دين

Tumhare liye tumhara deen hae, aur hamare liye hamara deen

Aaj hum deen e Islam ki iteba (follow) karne wale in teeno baataun mae puri tarah mulawas (involved) hain,

Deen per, aur deeni mamlaat mae amal karne per jab mushkil ati hae to hum dadh jate hain, na itni jurat (courage) hae ki uska muqabla kare, aur na itni himmat ki jahan sabar karna hae, sabar kare, balkeh hum be'chain wa pareshaan hojate hain

Bahut se Deen ki baataun, aur shariat ke ahkamaat, aur deeni mamlaat mae hum compromise aur adjustment karte aa rahe hain

Agar bachaun ki deeni taleem ki baat hoti hae to jawab hota hae ke aaj kal duniya ki taleem hi itni hogai hae ke bachaun ko waqt kahan milta hae, aur bachaun ka career bhi to banana zaroori hae

Shariat per na chalne ke muqtalif tarkeeb hum nikalte hain, nayi nayi logic aur apne hisaab ke interpretation se ahkamaat ko badal diya jata, balkeh is hadd tak bhi hota hae ke un ahkamat ko outdated aur orthodox khyal karte hain, jaisa ke aaj hamare pas aurataun ke libas aur baal ke taluq se tasavur qaem hogaya hae

Insaan ko doosraun ki achai se sikhna hae, achai ko apnana hae, magar hum aaj doosraun ki burai aur khrabi ka sahara lete hain, aur jawab ye hota hae agar woh karsakte hae to phir hum kare to kiya huva ?

Aur koran kehta hae tum neki aur achai mae ek doosre ki maddad karo, aur burai se khrabi se ek doosre ko roko, aur hum doosraun ki burai ke sahare khud burai karte jate hain

Aur in sab baataun ki asal, woh is duniya ki daulat aur shohrat (fame) ko hi hamari khushi ka asal zareeyeh samajhna hae, jab ke haqeeqat mae in dono baataun yane khushi ke hasil hone aur daulat mae koi munasebat, koi taluq koi connection hi nahi hae

Allah taala humko tawfeeq de ke humko bhi zindagi mae jab  ترهيب ترغيب وتركيب  ka saamna ho to hum bhi ussi tarah uska saamna kare jis tarah se Nabi e kareem ne kiya tha, takeh humko duniya ki haqeeqi khushi ke saath behtreen aakherat bhi naseeb ho

🌿🍂🌿🍂🌿🍂🌿🍂

12/21/15, 8:32:26 AM: Ishaq Ziaee (Mulla): 🍀🍀🍀🍀🍀🍀🍀🍀

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

🍀🍀🍀🍀🍀🍀🍀🍀

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

يَا أَيُّهَا النَّبِيُّ إِنَّا أَرْسَلْنَاكَ شَاهِدًا وَمُبَشِّرًا وَنَذِيرًا○ وَدَاعِيًا إِلَى اللَّهِ بِإِذْنِهِ وَسِرَاجًا مُّنِيرًا

اے پیغمبر ہم نے تم کو گواہی دینے والا اور خوشخبری سنانے اور ڈرانے والا بنا کر بھیجا ہے اور خدا کی طرف بلانے والا اور چراغ روشن

🍀🍀🍀🍀🍀🍀🍀🍀

 Milad un Nabi e kareem ki aap sabko mubarakbaad pesh hae

Hamare Nabi Mohammed e Mustafa Rasulullah salallahu alehe wa Sallam, ki bachpan hi se badi ajeeb shaan thi, shru se hi aap saheb e mojizaat wa karamaat hain

Syedna Dai Gulam Hussain saheb muqaddas apni mashoor kitab Qutrun Nada mae, aapke bachpan ka zikar farmate huve kehte hain

Ek waqt Mecce mukarama mae zabardast qehet (famine) aya huva tha Mecce ki wadi (valley) bilkul sukhi (dry) hogai thi aur maveshi (cattle) bhuk wa piyas se mar rahe the, us waqt Mecce wale, qabile (tribe) khuraesh ke sardar Moulana Abi Talib jo paigambar ke chacha aur kafil (caretaker) the ke pass aaye aur barish ke liye Dua ki ilteja (Request) kiye

Moulana Abi Talib bin Abdul mutalib Dua ke liye haram e Kabatullah gaye, us waqt logoan ne dekha ke aapke saath ek chota sa bacha bhi haath pakde huve aya hae, jiske chehre se noor baras raha hae, aur chehre per jalal wa jamal hae, woh noorani shaqsiyat Mohammed Mustafa salwatullah alehe ki the

Moulana Abi Talib kabatullah ko peeth (back) lagakar kheda (stood) hogae aur Rasoolallah ka haath thame rahe, aur Rasoolullah ke sar (head) per haath rakhkar aasman ki taraf nazar ki aur Dua maangi, aasman bilkul saaf tha magar ahista ahista badal jama hone lage (covered with clouds) aur is qadar tez barish huvi ki puri wadi e Mecca pani se bhar gai, aur tammam logoan mae ek khushi ki laher dodh gai

Us waqt Moulana Abi Talib ne Rasulallah ki shaan aur tareef mae ek taweel (long) qasida 80 sher (verses) ka kha

Uska ek sher ye hae

وابيض يستقي الغمام بوجهه

ثمال اليتامي عصمة للارامل

Ye safed roshan chehra hae jiske wasile se barish talab ki jati hae,

Jo yateemaun (orphans) ka malja (umeed) aur bewaun (widows) ki jae panah (shelter) hae

Issi tarah moulana Abi Talib  Rasoolallah ki shaan mae ek qasida farmaya hae jinke do sher ye hain

اتاني نبي بعد ياس وفترة

من الله والاوثان في الارض تعبد

وشق له من اسمه ليجلة

فذواعرش محمود وهذأ محمد

 Ek taweel susti (uneventful period) na'umeedi (after a long period of hopelessness) ke baad Allah taala ke pass se ek Nabi aya jab ki zameen per sirf butaun (idols) ki puja ki jati thi

Allah taala ne Nabi ka naam apne naam se mashtaq (similiar, same roots) kiya takeh us Nabi (Mohammed salwatullah alehe) ki shaan zaher kare

Saheb e arsh woh MEHMOOD hae aur uska bheja huva nabi woh MOHAMMED hae

hum Mohammed e Mustafa Salwatullah alehe ke wasile se aur us buzrug aur aala zaat jiska naam e mubarak Moulana Abi Talib ibne Abdul mutalib hae ke wasile se jinhuna Rasulallah ka aapke bachpan mae wasila liye tha, un dono ke wasila se mae Dua karta hun ke hum sab ko is duniya ki pareshani aur mushkilat se najat dila

12/24/15, 12:44:27 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ⭐🌹⭐🌹⭐🌹⭐🌹

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Aaj duniya bher mae Essa Maseeh (Jesus christ) alahe salaam ki pedaesh ka din Christians aur doosre log mana (celebrate) rahe hae

Koran e Majeed Essa alehe salaam ki duniya mae aane ki basharat (khush khabri) yun deta hae

إِذْ قَالَتِ الْمَلَائِكَةُ يَا مَرْيَمُ إِنَّ اللَّهَ يُبَشِّرُكِ بِكَلِمَةٍ مِّنْهُ اسْمُهُ الْمَسِيحُ عِيسَى ابْنُ مَرْيَمَ وَجِيهًا فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ وَمِنَ الْمُقَرَّبِينَ

(وہ وقت بھی یاد کرنے کے لائق ہے) جب فرشتوں نے (مریم سے کہا) کہ مریم خدا تم کو اپنی طرف سے ایک فیض کی بشارت دیتا ہے جس کا نام مسیح (اور مشہور) عیسیٰ ابن مریم ہوگا (اور) جو دنیا اور آخرت میں باآبرو اور (خدا کے) خاصوں میں سے ہوگا

Malaeka (angels) ne bibi Maryam se kha ke beshak Allah taala tum ko apne ek kaleme (nishani, sign) ki basharat (khushkhabri) deta hae jiska naam Masih Esa ibn Maryam hoga jo duniya wa aakherat mae ba izzat (respectable) hoga aur Allah taala ke muqrab (close) bandaun mae se hoga

Aur Esa alahe salaam ne gah'ware (cradle) mae hi kalam (spoke) karke apni gawahi di jisko koran farmata hae

قَالَ إِنِّي عَبْدُ اللَّهِ آتَانِيَ الْكِتَابَ وَجَعَلَنِي نَبِيًّا

عيسى نے کہا کہ میں خدا کا بندہ ہوں اس نے مجھے کتاب دی ہے اور نبی بنایا ہے

Esa Masih ne sab se pehle apne Allah taala ka banda hone ka iqrar (acceptance) kiya

Phir khud saheb kitab "Injeel" (bible) hone ka zikar kiya aur Phir yeh keh Allah taala ne mujhe nabi (messenger of god) banakar bheja hae

Hazrat Esa Masih bahut kam kalam karte the, bahut kam khate, aksar roza rakhte, kisi ek muqam per na thedte, siyahat (walking) bahut karte issi wajeh se aapko Masih kha gaya (one who walks) aap hamesha nange paer (barefoot) rahte

Na aapke pas ziyada kapde the, na aapne makan banaya, aur na shaadi ki, na hi ek roz se ziyada rozi (khane pine) ka intezam kiya

Jab aapke havariun (disciples) ne aapka ghar banakar aapko dene ki khaesh ki to aapne kha keh mae jagah batata hun, wahan banau, aapke saathi razi hogae, aap'ne ek pahad (mountain) ke pas legaye aur pahad ki ek steep slope batakar kha ke yahan mere makan banado

Logoan (havareen) ne kha ke is slope per makan kaisa baqi (remain intact) rahege, aap ne farmaya ke bas issi tarah duniya ki koi bhi chez paidar (long lasting) nahi rahti hae, kiya tum is baat per qor wa fikar nahi karte (dont you think & understand) tum duniya mae bade aaram deh kushada (luxorious & expansive) ghar banate ho laiken bahut jald tum is duniya ko chod kar jane wale ho, aur chand saal mae ye ghar bhi tut phut (destroy) kar khatam hojaeinga

Asal ghar to aakherat ka ghar hae aur aakherat ki hi asal zindagi hae

Allah taala hum sab ko is duniya ki zindagi ki haqeeqat ko samajhne ki tawfeeq de, aur hum samajh le ke is duniya ki chand sala (life of few years) zindagi ke muqable mae ye aakherat ki zindagi haqeeqi zindagi hae, Abadi zindagi hae (eternal life) hae

⭐🌹⭐🌹⭐🌹⭐🌹

12/25/15, 1:45:54 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 💜💙💛❤💚💗💜💙💛

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Jamaat mae mashallah se shaadiyun ki bahar hae, tammam bilad mae shaadiyan huvi aur aage bhi ho rahi hae, Allah taala un tammam dulha wa dulhan ko mubarak kare aur unki ainda ki zindagi kamiyab aur khush gawar guzre hum sab ikhwan ki unke liye dua hae

Allah taala Koran e majeed mae irshad farmata hae

وَمِنْ آيَاتِهِ أَنْ خَلَقَ لَكُم مِّنْ أَنفُسِكُمْ أَزْوَاجًا لِّتَسْكُنُوا إِلَيْهَا وَجَعَلَ بَيْنَكُم مَّوَدَّةً وَرَحْمَةً إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَآيَاتٍ لِّقَوْمٍ يَتَفَكَّرُونَ

اور اسی کے نشانات (اور تصرفات) میں سے ہے کہ اُس نے تمہارے لئے تمہاری ہی جنس کی عورتیں پیدا کیں تاکہ اُن کی طرف (مائل ہوکر) آرام حاصل کرو اور تم میں محبت اور مہربانی پیدا کر دی جو لوگ غور کرتے ہیں اُن کے لئے ان باتوں میں (بہت سی) نشانیاں ہیں

Aur Allah ki quadrat ki nishaniyun mae se ye bhi hae ki usne tumhare nufoos mae se tumhari biwiyaan paida ki takeh tum unke saath rahkar chaen aur sukoon hasil karo, aur tumhare darmiyaan ulfat (piyar wa mohabbat) aur rehmat paida ki, in tammam baataun mae badi badi nishaniyan hae unke liye jo qor wa fikar karte hae

Rasulullah ka qol e mubarak hae keh, jo bhi insaan ye chahta hae ke woh Allah taala se pak wa mutta'har halat mae mile, to usko chah'ye ke woh shaadi karke iffat wa pak damani hasil kare

Imam e Jaffar e Saddiq salwatullah alehe farmate hain ke jo shaqs bhi apni bharpur jawani mae Shaadi karleta hae to us waqt shaitan shor wa qul aur hungama macha kar kehta hae ke afsoos is aadmi ne apne 1/3 deen ko mujh se mehfoos karliya, ab bande ko baqi 2/3 deen ki hifazat karna hae

Ek Sahabi e Rasul, Osman bin Mazun ne Rasulullah se mashora (opinion) liya aur kha ke mera Nafs in baataun ki khaesh karta hae, mae aap se is baat mae rae lena chahta hun

1] Mae zameen mae khub phirna chahta hun (I would like to travel around the world)

Aap ne farmaya ke tum zameen mae siyahat (travel) mat karo, Phir farmaya ke meri ummat ki siyahat gaah (places of travel) woh meri masjidain hain

2] phir Usman ne kha ke mae gosht ka khana apne oper haram karlu, ye mera irada hae

Rasoolullah ne farmaya keh aisa kabhi na karna kiyukeh mae gosht ko Pasand karta hun aur khata hun, aur agar mae Allah se Dua maangu keh mujhe har roz gosht khilae to Allah meri Dua zaroor qabool karega

3] phir Usman ne kha ke mae ye chahta hun ke din mae sirf ek waqt khana khaun

Rasul ne farmaya ke, na ye baat hum mae se kisi ne ki aur na kisi aur ke saath pasand karenge, aur meri ummat ka bhuka rahna woh Roza hae

4] phir Usman ne kha ke mae chahta hun ke mae apni biwi ko apne oper haram karlun (abstain from wife)

Rasul e khuda ne farmaya, aisa hargis na karo ae Usman

Kiyunke

Jab mard apne biwi ka haath pakadta hae to Allah taala uske dus nekiya likhta hae, aur dus burai ko mita deta hae

Jab usse piyar karta hae to to uske 100 nekiya likh deta hae aur 100 buraiyun ko mita deta hae

Aur jab shohar apni biwi se qurbat (closeness) hasil karta hae to, Allah taala uske 1000 nekiyan likh deta hae aur 1000 uski buraiyun ko mita deta hae

Ye riwayat bahut lambi hae magar isse yehi baat zaher hoti hae ke miya biwi ka rishta aur taluq deen mae bahut ahmiyat rakhta hae

Allah taala se Dua hae ke in tammam naye shaadi shuda jodaun mae mohabbat ulfat aur rehmat paida ho, aur Allah taala unko aisi nek aulad ata kare jo unki aankhaun ki thandak bane

💛💙💜💚❤💗💛💙💜

12/28/15, 8:51:33 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🍀🍁🍀🍁🍀🍁🍀🍁

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Bambai mae Badr Bagh aate hae to purani yaadain taza hojati hain, kaise kaise moqe aur halaat ko hum ne Badr Bagh mae rahte huve dekha hae; earthquake, floods, bandhs, indo pak war, blackouts, riots, sab hi halaat dekhe aur us waqt buzrugane deen ki tadbeer aur ikhwan ki ek doosre se hamdardi mohabbat wa khloos ke saath hum ne un halaat ka muqabela kiye

dost ahbab mae in baataun ke zikar ke saath hamare, ek navjavan fighter pilot ka bhi zikar aya jo 1965 indo pak war mae ma're (killed) gae the aur unhe full military honours ke saath, Badr bagh se vida kiya gaya tha, ghumnak waqae tha, magar Badr bagh mae ye sab military honours ka hona ek fakher ki baat thi

Mae us Jawan pilot ke zikar se pehle unke khaandan ka zikar karta hun jinme unke nani ka sab se pehle zikar karna hae

Mrs Khadija Shafi Tayabji saheba ek bahut hi izzatdar badiwale khandaan ki fard thi

Aap 30 saal ki kam umri mae be'wa (widow) hogai thi aur do chote bachaun ki zimmedari bhi aap per thi, magar Qom ki khidmat ka jasba aapke nasdik sab se pehla tha

Aap ne social work se ibteda ki, aapke kaam ka andaza is list se hoga jo mukhtalif organisations se aap wabaste (related) rahi hain

1928 Chairman Red cross Society

1927 founder Naigaum social society

Chairman Mahila Seva mandal hostel service

Trustee Dawood Bhai Zariwala orphanage

Chairman advisory committee Cama & Albless hospital Dhobi Talao

Recipient silver star Bharat Scouts & Guides

Chairman Bombay muncipal Girls Guide

Chair women All India Educational conference womens wing year 1940

President Seva Sadan Society

President Bombay Port Haj committee

Aap ka sab se bada karnama woh Muslim girls Purdah nursing division ka establish karne ka tha jo duniya mae sab se pehla division tha

Aap ko Khaisar e Hind Silver Medal 1935 aur Gold Medal 1941 mae mila tha aur St Jhons ambulance Maharashtra state seva medal bhi aapko hasil huva tha

Aap Corporater the Bombay Municipal Corporation 1932 se 1952 tak

aap  MLA thi 1946 se 1952

JP (justice of peace) Bombay Presidency magistrate

Aap Jamaat ki, jab bhi zaroorat hoti, jitna bhi aapse mumkin hota maddad farmati aur buzrugane deen se aqidat rakhti aur Ikhwan se hamdardi, khloos wa mohabbat rakhti

Aapke ek bete Qamar Tayabji Saheb 1962 mae inteqal kiya woh Hyderabad ke mashur business man the, aur Azam Jahi textile mills ke managing Director

Aapki beti Sultana Shafi  Tayabji bahut mashur social worker thi aur Mayor of Bombay bhi rah chuki thi

Mrs Khadija Shafi Tayabji ke inteqal 1976 mae 95 saal ki umar mae huva, unke Altamount road mumbai ke makan per fateha khani huvi thi jisme Hazrat Moulana Nasrullah saheb wa Hazrat moulana Ziaali saheb bhi shareek huve the

Aapki condolence meeting bhi bahut bade paimane per Bambai mae organise huvi thi jiski ibteda Hazrat Moulana Nasrullah saheb muqaddas apni ki Dua, aur tarifi kalaam se kiya tha

Mrs Khadija Tayabji ki beti Sultana Tayabji ke ek hi farzand the, jinka mae ne shru mae hi zikar kiya, flight leiutenant Iqbal Hussain jo watan ki khidmat mae 1965 war ke dauran 23 saal ki kam umri mae inteqal kiye

Unki tadfeen Bambai mae Sulaimani kabrastan mae pure military honours aur gun salute ke saath ki gai thi, bahut se government officials, military officers aur dignitaries bhi Badr Bagh mae aye the jo Jamaat e Sulaimani ke liye ek fakhar ki baat thi

Allah taala in tammam ko apni khidmataun ka behtreen inam ata kare, aur hum mae bhi woh insaani khidmat ka jasba aur shoq paida kare, meri bhi Dua hae aur Aap sab se bhi Dua ki ilteja hae ke Badr Bagh ke rahne walaun mae wohi ittehad, ittefaq, mohabbat, wa hamdardi hamesha baqi rakhe

12/31/15, 1:30:07 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

جمعة مبارك

 نیا سال آپ سب کو بہت مبارک

🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹

Naye saal 2016 ki ibteda hae, aap sab ko naye saal ki mubarakbaad pesh hae

Duniya khoob shor aur hungame ke saath naye saal ka isteqbal kar rahi hae, har aane wale saal se hum badi umeedain laga rakhte hain magar haqeeqat ye hae, ke na hi duniya ki koi umeed puri hone wali hae, aur na is duniya mae koi arzoo takmeel pane wali hae

ye duniya dhoke ka ghar hae, duniya ki chal aur halaat bata rahe hain ke ainda hum is duniya se koi  bahut achi umeed to nahi rakh sakte bas har aane wala naya saal ek hi baat bata raha hae ke hamari umarain (age) badh rahi hain, aur duniya mae hamara waqt kam hota hi ja raha ha, aqalmand wohi hae jo is baat ko samajh le aur apne aap ko maut aur badalte waqt ke liye tiyar karle  

Is angrezi saal (gregarion calender) ke muqable (comparison) mae Islami Hijri saal bhi hae, jiski ibteda ghum wa sog (sadness, gloom & sorrow) aur aansu baha kar hoti hae (By shedding of tears)

Allah taala ka Koran e Majeed mae irshad hae

فليضحكوا قليلا وليبكوا كثيراجزاء بما كانوا يكسبون

Allah taala farmata hae ke tumhe chahye ke kam hanse (laugh) aur ziyada roe (cry) us baat ki jaza mae jo tum ne kamaya hae

Allah taala ne rone ki raqbat (encourage) dilai hae, pasand kiya hae aur ziyada hasne ko napasand farmaye,

Issi tarah Rasulullah ka bhi irshad e mubarak hae

لو تعلمون ما اعلم لضحكتم قليلا ولبكيتم كثيرا

Rasul e kareem ka irshad hae, agar tum wohi baat jante, jo mae janta hun, to tum bhi kam hanste aur ziyada rote (cry)

Moulana Ali Ibn Abi Talib momin ke ausaf (qualities) batate huve farmate hain, ke momin woh hota hae jo kam hansta hae aur...

 وان ضحك لم يعلي صوته

Jab momin hansta (laughs) hae to awaaz bulund nahi karta, khekha (burst of laughter, guffaws) nahi lagata

Aur Nabi kareem ne to, kaise rona bhi batadiya (how to cry)

تحزن القلب وتدمع العين

Dil mae ghum wa huzun ho aur aankhaun mae aansu (tears) ho

Hadees shareef hae

البكاء من خشية الله مفتاح الرحمة

Khoof e khuda se rona woh Rehmat ke raastaun ki kunji (keys) hain

Allah taala ko sab se ziyada mehboob woh khatre khoon hae jo Allah ki raah mae ba'haya gaya.

Doosra woh khatre (drop) aanso (tear) hae, jo raat ke andhere mae khoof e khuda se tapka ho

Rona huzun wa ghum, insaan mae ajisi burdbari inkesari paida karti hae, (humility, dignity) uske muqabil hasna aur zor se khekha lagana, insaan ke dil ko murda bana deta hae

كثرة ضحك تميت القلب

Ziyada hasna insaan ko murda dil bana deta hae

Rasulullah ka mashur qol hae, khekha (busrt of laughter) lagane wale ko, ye nahi malum ke, woh Allah ko khush kiya, ya naraz ?

Allah taala ke in Irshadat mae badi hikmat poshida (hidden wisdom) hae, Aulia Allah farmate hae ke hamare us Roohani alam ko chodna aur jismani alam mae aana woh ek ghalti aur qata (sin) ki wajeh se hae, ye jismani aalam ek qaed (jail) hae, isi baat ko Rasulullah farmate hain

الدنيا سجن المومن وجنة الكافر  

Ye duniya mommin ka qaed khana hae, aur kafir ke liye Jannat

Aur Nabi ne duniya ki haqeeqat is tarah batai

 دارسخط الله

Ye Duniya Allah ki narazgi ka ghar hae

Isiliye duniya mae hum per wajib hae ke hum gunahun se isteqfar kare, toba kare, aur hamari toba najat ka zareeyah bane, ek qaidi (prisoner) ko khaed khane (jail) mae ziyada hasna ya khekha (laughing loudly) lagana zaeb (suit) nahi deta

Hum ko hamare haqeeqi ghar (the final abode) ki taraf chadhna (climb) hae aur issi baat ko koran e kareem farmata hae

 وان الدار الاخرة لهي الحيوان لو كانوا يعلمون

Beshak aakherat ki zindagi hi asal zindagi hae, kash keh log is baat ko jaante

Koran e Kareem mae Irshad hae keh,

Bahut se waqt tum kisi chez ko napasand karte ho, halankeh woh tumhare liye behter hoti hae usme tumhare liye khair hota hae, aur bahut se waqt tum kisi chez ko Pasand karte ho aur woh tumhare liye nuqsan de hoti hae, usme tumhare liye shar hae

Hum nahi jante ke hamare haq mae kiya behter hae aur kiya khrab hae, Allah tabaraka wa Taala hi behter janta hae

Hum to is duniya mae us chote nadaan (young ignorant) bache ki tarah hain jo apne mitti aur lakdi ke khilone ko hi sab kuch samajhta hae, uski puri duniya wohi hae, Kash ke hum apni aankh kholte aur dekhte ke aakherat ki zindagi hi haqeeqi zindagi hae

Allah taala hum ko sahi Islami aur emaani jazbaat ki marefat ata kare, aur haqeeqi khushi aur ghumi kis'se kehenge aur hamari duniya ki jismani zindagi ka maqsad kiya hae samajhne ki tawfeeq de

🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹

1/2/16, 4:18:59 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Aaj 23 Rabi ul awal hae aur youme wafat hae Syedi Ali bin Hasan bin Hussain Zuljaddain ki, aur haqeer ki khush kismiti hae ke Barode mae hone se ziyarat bhi naseeb huvi

Aapka inteqal 1160 Hijri  Barode mae huva, aapka shaandar mazar hae jisme aapke saath Syedti Aziza bu aur Syedi Almansub Moulana Mohammed Shakir saheb muqaddas bhi hae

Syedi Ali bin Hasan bin Hussain ko Syedna Dai Hibatullah bin Ibrahim ne 1159 mae Hindustan mae Dawat ke mamlaat ko sambhalne ke liye bheja tha aur aapki maddad ke liye ek Arab bhai jo hudood se the Salah bin Mohammed Shebani ko saath diya aur saath mae ek mohajir Bhai, Syedi wa Moulai Ali bin Qutbuddin jo Barode mae hi aapke mazar ke saamne chabrutre per khabre shareef shareef hae unko bhi tarjuman (translator) ki haisiyat se bheja

Syedna Dai ne aapko ek Risala (nasihat nama) bhi diya jiska naam "Risalatul Hikmat wa Mauzatal Hasana" bhi diya tha aur aap Dai ke hukum se momineen ko har Jumua ki namaz ke baad woh nasihat nama jo ek kitab ki shakal ka tha padhkar sunate

Aap Rabi ul awal mae Yemen se nikle the aur Ramazan ul mubarak mae Surat ke port pohunche aur Surat mae hi pura Shehrullah, Mulla Karamulla bin Mohammed Sadiq (jo baad mae mansub huve) ke makan mae guzare

Aap 3 Shawal ko markaz e Dawat Baroda tashreef laye aapka bahut hi shaandar isteqbal momineen ne kiya

Aap Dawat ke makan mae rahe Aapko Dai ne dono jazeeraun ka pura itlaq diya tha (appointment mansub) Dawat ka Kutub khana aur ifada (padhana, aur kisi ko padhane ki ijazat dena) woh  aur Dawat ka pura hisaab kitaab aapke zimme tha

Aapki sab se ziyada maddad al Hurra Aziza bu aur unke navase al Fazil Gulam Inayatullah saheb karte, Aziza bu us waqt hudood e Dawat mae 4 chota number per the

Mukaram al fazil Gulam Inayatullah bahut bade alim the, aur unka bahut bada karobar tha khud ki daulat se Dawat ki bahut maddad farmate

Syedna Ali saheb ke Hindustan aane se Dawat ke halaat bahut behter hogae, Ahmedabad, Barode, Surat, Hyderabad aur Aurangabad mae Sulaimani Dawat ke bade markaz the

Syedna Hussain ne deeni taleem aam kardi bahut log padhne lag gae, aur aap ke kehna per bahut log Haj ka irada kiye aur saath ziyarat aur phir baaz log Syedna Dai ki hijrat mae Yemen jane ka bhi irada kiye

25 shawal 1159 mae Syedna Dai Hibatullah bin Ibrahim ka inteqal huva aur aap ki Nas ke zareeyeh aapke farzand Syedna wa Moulana Ismail bin Hibatullah ko Dai muqrar farmaye

Sheikh Salah jo aapke saath aye the woh ek saal kuch mahine ke baad Yemen wapis chale gae

Sheikh Salah ke jane ke baad Syedi Hussain bahut bimar rahne lage magar Dawat ki khidmat barabar anjaam dete khususan taleem ka nizam bahut acha kardiya tha

Magar din be'din aapki bimari badhte hi ja rahi thi aur 23 Rabiul awal ko aakhir aap 45 saal ki kam umri mae inteqal farmaye aur 24 Rabi ul awal ko aapko dafan kiya gaya

Aap ek saal kuch mahine Hindustan mae rahe magar Dawat ke nizam ko bahut masbut kardiya, aap ke inteqal per Hindustan ke pu're bilad mae saat din tak khatam koran aur khane huve aur issi tarah Yemen mae bhi Syedna Dai ne kiya

Aapka pehla roza us waqt ke ek bahut saqi bhai Sheikh Jafar bin Hasan khan ne banaya tha aur uske baad Syedna Dai Gulam Hussain saheb muqaddas ne pather ka Roza banaya jo aaj moujud hae

Aap ne inteqal se pehle 19 Rabi ul Awal ko apni wasiyat (will) likhi hae aur usme tammam Dawat ke umur (matters) ko bhi likha hae jo aaj bhi Dawat ke khazane mae mehfooz hae

Aapki bahut badi khidmat hae, kehte hae ke aap bahut saqi the aur bahut hi narm tabiyat ke the

Barode walaun ko fakher hona chahye ke aise buzrug yahan dafan hae

Allah taala unke nazraat aur barkaat hum sab per jari rakhe

●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●

Kal Moulana Dai izzat Ali bin Mohammed Husain  saheb ka bhi din hae aap bhi Barode mae hi dafan hae

Syedi wa Moulai Ali bin Qutbuddin saheb ki bhi bahut badi shaan hae jinka mae ne what'sapp per tafseel se ahwaal likh chuka hun

1/4/16, 3:47:48 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

 Kal 24 Rabi ul awal youme wafat tha Syedna wa Moulana Izzatali ibne Mohammed Hussain saheb Jamali ka, aap Dai e qaer munfareed the, yane aap per Nas huvi magar aap qiyam nahi karsake, aur aapke Nas karne wale Dai ki zindagi mae hi inteqal kiye

Aapki paedaesh hyderabad mae 1160 mae huvi

Moulae kaenat farmate hae ki tum ilm hasil karne wale ya phir ilm dene wale bano koi teesre nahi, ye baat aap per puri tarah sahi baithti hae

Aap puri shru ki zindagi bade bade jayad aalim se Ilm hasil karte rahe aur baad mae aapke bahut se shagird bhi huve jo bade bade maratib hasil kiye jinme aapke farzand Moulana almansub Gulam faiyaz Ali, moulana Ikram Ali saheb hae aur Moulana almansoob Sheikh Ibrahim saheb the

Ibteda zindagi mae aap Arabi aur farsee ki taleem hasil kiye aur 1185 mae Almansub Mulla Karamulla saheb ne hudood e fazil janab Alhaj Abdul Rasul bin Noah bin Essa ko hyderabad bheja takeh hyderabad mae deeni taleem de aur farmaye ke ae Abdul Rasul tum Deccan ki sar zameen se hire (diamond) wa jawaheraat nikalo

Abdul Rasul saheb ke do talib ilm bahut khaas huve ek to moulana almansub Qassam bin Ali Mohammed  saheb aur doosre Moulana Dai Izzatali bin Mohammed Hussain saheb

Aap dono 9 saal tak Abdul Rasul saheb ke pas deen ka ilm hasil kiye aur phir Yemen Syedna Dai Abdullah bin Ali ke pas hijrat ke liye tashreef legaye

1216 Hijri mae Hindustan ke Mansub Abdul Raheem bin Saleh bin Ahmed inteqal kiye, aur aapke muqam mae Syedna Dai ne Hazrat Almansub Qassam saheb ko mansub muqrar farmaye

Aapke mansubiat ka waqae bhi bahut dilchasp hae jab Hazrat Moulana Qassam saheb per Nas e shareef ayi to us waqt Moulana Izzatali saheb rutbe mae badhkar the aur namaz se qiyam karne khade rahne wale the aur Moulana Qassam saheb peeche khede the, jab moulana Izzatali saheb ne Syedna saheb ke khat ke lifafe per Hazrat Moulana Qassam saheb ka naam pehle dekha to foran apne janimaz peeche le liya aur Qassam saheb ko aage kardiya

 Aap ne bahut hi khloos wa aqeedat ke saath Hazrat Moulana Qassam saheb ki 11 saal khidmat ki aur 1227 mae Qassam saheb ka inteqal hogaya

Dai waqt Syedna Yusuf bin Ali ne Syedna Izzatali saheb ko mansub muqrar kiya aur ye fazilat bhi ata ki keh teeno jazeere Hind Sindh Wa Yemen mae itlaq diya

Baad mae Syedna Dai Ismail bin Mohammed Almakrami ne aapko apne baad janeshin Dai muqrar kiya magar Moulana Izzatali saheb unki zindagi mae hi inteqal kiye aur Dai e qaer munfareed huve

Aapka inteqal 1248 mae 88 saal ki umar mae Barode mae huva aap'na janeshin munsubiat ke rutbe mae apne farzand Almansub Gulam faiyaz Ali saheb ko muqrar farmaya

Aap ne 5 Duwaat ki khidmat anjaam de aur 54 saal dawat e Hadiya ki behtreen khidmat anjaam di aur usme bhi khilafatut Dai aap 21 saal rahe

Aapke be hisaab ilmi karname hae aapke qaside bhi bahut hae

Aapke doosre aulad bhi sab hi saheb maratib huve jinme aapke farzand turabali Ali saheb aur wali Mohammed saheb bhi hae aur unke farzand Moulana Shujuauddin ibne wali Mohammed saheb hae

Aapki aulad bahut huvi aur aaj jamaat ke aksar logoan ka aap se nasabi rishta hae jinme khususan "Jamali" khandaan hae

Allah taala hum sab per unke nazrat jari rakhe aur unki aulad mae unki khubiyaan paida kare

■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■

Aapki umre shareef ahiya us salf mae aur khabre shareef per 80 saal hae jab ke seerat ul Manaseeb mae 88 saal hae paedaesh 1260 aur inteqal 1248

Inshallah Tahqeeq karke sahi baat se ainda waqf karaunga

■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■

1/7/16, 12:32:13 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ♢♢♢♢♢♢♢♢♢♢♢

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

جمعة مبارك

Rasul e Khuda Mohammed e Mustafa Salallahu Alehe wa sallam Aalim, mutalim (ilm hasil karne wale) aur waez, yaane waaz wa nasihat karne wale ke adab ke ba're mae farmate hain

Aalim عالم ko chahye ke woh hilm حلم per lazim rahe, yane shagird ke saath narmi shafaqat aur meherbani se hamesha pesh aye hamesha ba'wiqar rahe (dignified)

padhane wale عالم ko chahye ke shagird ke saath thandak se pesh aye, aur woh khud bhi sukoon wa itmenan se rahe

Woh apne Ilm ko bahut hi asan aur sahel (simple & understandable) karke pesh kare, takeh kam se kam aqal rakhne wala bhi asani se samajh jae aur shagird ke kisi bhi sawal per aalim ko chidna (agitated) nahi chahye,

Aalim ko har ek ki, daleel wa hujjat ko puri tarah sun'na chahye, aur agar woh sahi ho to usko qabool karna chahye, agar'che ke woh daleel dushman ki hi pesh ki huvi kiyu na ho

Issi tarah Rasul e Khuda ek mutalim (shagird) ke liye farmate hae ke ek shagird aalim ke pas aye to Salaam se ibteda kare aur aalim ke saamne kam se kam kalaam kare, aur jab Aalim jagah se uthe to usko bhi chahye ke aalim ko izzat wa karamat dete huve khud bhi uth jae,

Shagird ko nahi chahye ke aalim ko ye khe ke aap yeh kehte hain aur doosra aalim, kuch aur kehta hae, doosraun ke references usko na de

Shagird ko nahi chahye ke ustad wa Aalim ke barabari mae baithe, aur na hi woh Aalim ke saamne muskurae (keep smiling), aur Aalim ke rae ke khilaf apni rae na de, aur jab aalim apni baithak se uthe to usko bhi foran uth jana chahye

Aalim ke kapde pakad kar na khinche, aur na hi us'e raaste mae chalte huve sawal kare, aur aalim se itna bhi ziyada sawal na kare ke woh be'zaar aur chidchida ho jae

Aalim jab mehfil mae waaz wa nasihat kare to kibir (badapan) bilkul chod de, woh hamesha apne se bade aur khususan Allah tabaraka wa Taala se sharam wa haya ko lazim rakhe, aur Allah taala ki taraf apni ajisi wa inkesari ka ishar karte rahe

waaz wa nasihat karne wale, sunne wale ki behtari aur faide ka hamesha khyal rakhe, apne Nafs ko apne aib aur nuqs ki marefat se zaleel kare

Waaz karne wale ko apne samein (listeners) ke saath narmi wa salamti ke saath pesh ana hae, aur sunne wale ko nafa wa faida pohunchane ka hamesha khyal aur khaesh rakhna chahye, aur sunne walaun se hamesha acha gumaan aur umeed rakhna chahye, bure aadmi ke saath bhi acha guman wa tawaqo rakhe aur usse bhi achi baat kare, aur ye bhi lazim hae ke waaz karne wala khud hi apne qol (sayings) per puri tarah amal kare, yahan tak ke woh khud bhi faida uthae aur doosre bhi uski waaz se faida uthae

Allah taala hum ko tawfeeq de ke hum in Rasulullah ke bataye huve adaab ka khyal rakhe

♢♢♢♢♢♢♢♢♢♢♢

1/8/16, 7:50:25 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ⚪⚪⚪⚪⚪⚪⚪⚪⚪

السلام علیکم ورحمة الله وبركاته

Aaj youme wa'fat hae Syedna wa Moulana Dai ul Duwaat Syedna Jaffar bin Syedna Sulaiman aa'lal'lahu qudsahu ka, last year aapke wafat per 3 mazameen likha tha, aaj chand logoan ki khaesh thi in mazameen ke liye, mae dobara unko bhej raha hun,

mae sab mazameen broadcast karta hun individually bhejna mushkil hae, is wajeh se ye 3 mazameen bhi sab hi ko bhejna padh raha hae, is baat ke liye mazerat chahta hun

⚪⚪⚪⚪⚪⚪⚪⚪

Syedna wa Moulana Jafar ibne Syedna Sulaiman ek Dai e azeem the, Aap 28 wae Dai hae, 28 ka number ahle batin ke pas bahut ahmiyat rakhta hae.

Aap dor e Qaemi ke iftetah karne wale hain, aapka shummar, shumukh (peak) Duwaat mae hote hae, jo duwaat mae ek khaas rutba hae, jo Syedna Sulaiman Saheb ke baad sirf char Duwaat ko hasil huve

Aapki paedaesh 20 Zilhaj at ul haram 994 Hijri peer (Monday) ke din huvi, aur 55 saal ki umar mae 29 Rabi ul awal 1050 Hijri Yemen Taiba mae inteqal farmae

Aap ka qiyam Ahmedabad mae ziyada raha, aapki wiladat per aapke walid, jo us waqt Dai bhi nahi huve the logoan se farmaya tha "Aaj tumhara Dai paida huva"

Aapke walid ne bachpan mae hi aap per Dai ki Nas kar di thi, aur Syedna Mohammed bin Fahad qadasallahu roohohu ko aapka mustauda (caretaker) muqrar kiya tha

Aapki umar ke 22 wae saal,  Ramzan ul mubarak 1015 hijri mae Syedna Mohammed bin Fahad ne aapko, aapke walid ki di huvi amanat supurd kardiya aur aapko Dai ke rutbe mae qaem kardiya, aur khud aapke peeche hogae

Aapne 84 kitabae tasneef ki (authored) jinme se 73 aapne Hindustan mae apni zindagi ke 47 saal mae likhi hae, aur baqi 8 kitab aap jab Hindustan chod kar Yemen tashreef le gaye us waqt likhi hain

Aapki tasnifat (writings) sab hi uloom per hain, Ilm e haqaeq, taweel, shariat, hujjat, seerat, aur ashar (verses) per likhi huvi hae.

Aap ne sirf Kitabain likhi hi nahi, balkeh bahut se Kitabe jo doosraun ki likhi huvi thi usko naqal (copy) bhi kiya hae, jinme Syedna Sulaiman Saheb ke ashar ke diwan (volumes) hain, Syedna Mohammed bin Fahad ki kitabain hain, uske alawa be shummar kitabain Duwaat e Tayebi ki hain (period before Syedna Sulaiman saheb & after 21st Imam moulana Tayab salwatullah alehe)

Aapka khat (writing script) bahut hi khubsoorat tha, aur hundreds of pages mae kisi ek jagaah bhi correction nazar nahi aega, aur aap ne aksar kitab mae ye bhi likha hae ke kitab ke kitne safeh (pages) hain aur har page per kitne lines hae aur kitab mae jumla alfaz (words) kitne hain

Aap ne apni autobiography bhi likhi hae jisko aapne apni 50th kitab shummar karte hae, jo aapki paedaesh se leker inteqal tak ka ahwal hae, inteqal ka ahwal aapke bhai Syedna Faiz e Ali ke hukum se aapke matrae (brother from same mother but different father) Syedna Ibrahim bin Mohammed bin Fahad ne likha hae

Aapki ye biography Arabi se urdu mae Mukarum wa Mohtaram al Aalim wal Aamil tarjumane dawat Mulla Alhaj Ameeruddin ibne Mulla Fakhruddin saheb ne farmaya hae, aur is kitab ko print Hazrat Qibla Moulana Abdullah saheb atalalahu baqauhu ne apne mansubiat ke shru mae print karwakar ikhwan per ahsaan kiya, takeh sabko asaani se dastiyab (available) ho sake

Ye kitab be inteha diljasp aur malumati hae, isme samajhne wale ke liye sirf history hi nahi balkeh haqaeq, taweel, shariat sab hi moujud hae, mae Itna keh sakta hun ke jo shru kiya woh usko khatam kiye baqaer nahi rahsakta, bas shru karne ki zaroorat hae, Allah hum sabko tawfeeq de

Allah taala Syedna Muqaddas Syedna Jaffar ke nazrat aur barkat hum sab per jari rakhe, aur Syedi Mukaram wa mohtaram tarjumane Dawat Mulla Ameeruddin saheb ko Muqaddus farmae aur jannat e aaliyat mae unche se uncha muqam ata farmae, aapki Dawat e shareef ke liye khidmataun ka hum andaza nahi laga sakte, hum qasir hain (beyond our reach) bas Itna zaroor khunga ke Duwaat aur Manaseeb ke pas aapki bahut badi qadar thi

يقدس أرواحهم أجمعين

⚪⚪⚪⚪⚪⚪⚪⚪

1/8/16, 7:56:29 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ♻♻♻♻♻♻♻♻

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Buzrugane deen ke zindagi ke waqeat mae hamare liye bade bade sabaq poshida hote hae.

Syedna Dai Jaffar bin Syedna Sulaiman Saheb qadasallahu arwa'hohum ka youme wafat hae,

aap ne apni autobiography

"NUZHAT UL AZHAN WA BEHJATUL IKHWAN"

mae ek ahem waqae ka zikar kiya hae, jo aapki zindagi ka sab ahem moud (turning point) hae

Ye waqea 13 Ramzan ul mubarak 1015 Hijri ka hae jab ke aapki umar e shareef 22 saal ki thi,

Aap bayan karte hain ke hum ek mommin bhai ke janaze mae shareek the, ke kuch muqalif log (Dawoodi) janaze ko kandha dene lage, achanak unko ahsas huva ke ye Sulaimani saheb ka janaza hae to unhune usko foran chod diya aur bhaag kheda huve, kiyunke unke bade (Dai) ka hukum tha ke Sulaimani ki koi taqreeb mae shareek nahi hona chahye, kitne bhi khreeb ke rishtedar kiyu na ho

Syedna Jaffar aur aapke do (2) saathi ye dekh kar hans diye (started laughing)

Jab sab khabrastan pohunje aur mayat ko Khabar mae utarne ka waqt aya, us waqt Syedna Mohammed bin Fahad bahut hi qusse mae aur raub wa Jalal ke saath ae aur kha "tum mae se kaun Hansa (laughed) tha ?"

Aur saath mae ye Hadees e shareef bhi padhi

أن الله ينهاكم عن الضحك في المقابر اوهوعندالمقابر

Allah taala tum ko Kabrastan mae ya khabraun ke pas hasne se mana farmata hae

Syedna Jaffar ne likha hae ke mae akela hi tha jisne apni ghalti ka iqrar kiya, us waqt Syedna Mohammed bin Fahad ne mujh ko ek tamacha (slap) mardiya aur mujh per buri tarah khafa (angry) huve aur naraz huve

Syedna Jaffar ne is waqae ko bahut tafzeel se likhe hae, iske baad aap bahut sakht bimar huve, bahut bukhar (fever) hogaya, aap roza bhi nahi rakh sake

Syedna Mohammed bin Fahad aapko dekhne bhi nahi ae, magar jab aapki waleda (Moulatena Khadija binte Noah) ne yeh kehlaya ke "Jaffar bahut sakht bimar hogaye hain, agar aap, qabal iske ke woh ye duniya chod dein, unko kuch kehna chahte hae to kehne ke liye aa'ja'ye"

Aapki zauja (wife) ka ye paigham mila to aap foran makan per tashreef laye, jab aap ne Syedna Jaffar ki itni buri halat ko dekha to bahut ranjida (saddened) huve aur farmaya

Ae Jaffar mujhe bilkul andaza na tha ke ke mere qusse aur narazgi ka Itna tum asar lo'ge,

Mae ne qusse mae kal jo tumhare saath harkat kar baitha (tamasha mara, slapped) uske liye mae tum se aur Allah'o Ali ul Azeem se maafi chahta hun, aur phir aap besakhta (uncontrollable) rone lag gae

Syedna Jaffar ne Koran e Kareem ka hi jumla dohraya

مولاي وما عليك تثريب

Ae mere Moula aap per koi Ilzam nahi, (aapki ki koi ghalti nahi, aap ne bilkul sahi kiya)

Aur ye, wahi waqt tha jab Syedna Mohammed bin Fahad ne Syedna Jaffar ko aapke walid Syedna Sulaiman Saheb ka ata kiya huva rutba aur tammam amanatain saump di (handed over) jiske Aap mustauda (caretaker) the, asal mustaqer Dai Syedna Jaffar the, aur aap Syedna Jaffar ke peeche hogae

Ae Allah hum mae bhi aisa hi, Maa Baap ki aur buzrugane deen ki nasihat ko qabool karne aur tambih (scolding) ka asar lene ka maada (capebality) paida kar

Baap ko Shafiq kehte hae, arabi mae شفيق ke maane be panah mohabbat karne wala, chahne wala hae, aur ek maana ye bhi hote hae, aulad ke liye hamesha fikar karne wala, pareshan rahne wala, khoofzada rahne wale

Jaise ke Koran farmata hae

والذين هم من عذاب ربهم مشفقون

Yahan mushfequn azaab e رب rab se darne ke maane mae aya hae

Baap Shafiq hota hae, usko hamesha apni aulad ki fikar rahti hae, woh jo bhi karta hae Unki bhlai aur behteri ke liye karta hae, chahe aulad ko marna kiyu na padhe, aur issi liye baap se bache dadte bhi hain jabki maa ki sirf be panah mohabbat hoti hae, maa ki mamta hi mashoor hae, maa ki shafaqat aur baap ki mamta koi nahi kehta

Kaash ki hum bhi Syedna Dai ke misaal se apni maa ki mamta aur baap ki shafaqat ko samjhe

وما توفيقي الا بالله العلي العظيم

Tawfeeq Allah billah ul Ali ul Azeem hi ki taraf se hoti hae

♻♻♻♻♻♻♻♻♻

1/8/16, 8:12:30 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🌿🌸🌿🌸🌿🌸🌿🌸🌿

"AKBAR THE GREAT EMPEROR" history mae hum sab yehi padhte aye hain, magar history bhi badli jati hae, haqeeqat kuch aur hi hae

Akbar Badshah apne adal wa insaaf aur apne secular khyalat ke liye mashoor tha, magar hamare Dai e Azeem Syedna Ali bin Hussain Almakrami Qadasallahu roohhohu Hindustan tashreef lae the, aur Delhi tafreeh ke liye gae the, muqtalif tareeqi (historical) muqamat dekhe, magar jab aapko Badshah Akbar ka Maqbera dikhane le gae to aap ruk gae aur dekhna pasand nahi kiya

Hamare dawat ki tareeq (history) mae, Syedna Dai Sulaiman bin Syedna Hasan ka muqadama (legal court case) aapke muqalefeen Dawood Khutub (opposition) ke saath Moghul Sultanate ke badshah Akbar ke darbar mae hi pesh huva tha

Syedna Jaffar aur doosre duwaat ne ye case ki puri karwai (proceedings) ka tafseeli zikar apni kitabaun mae kiya hae

Akbar badshah Deen e Islam ko tabah kardiya tha, doosre mazaheb ki preaching aur practices ko leker naya mazhab shru kiya tha jisko woh "Deen e Ilahi" kehta tha

Woh roz subah chadhte suraj ki puja karta, Dadhi rakhna napasand karta tha, naach gaane ka aadi tha, halal janwar gae (cows) ko zabah (slaughter) karna haram kardiya tha, log usko Sajda karte the aur roz subah jab tak log uska Darshan na karlete, unka khana peena aur kaam per jana mana tha

Badshah 40 roz tak "Navroz" ka tehwaar (festival) manata tha jo bahut hi dhoom dham aur shor wa shrabe ka saath manaya jata, ai'yashi ka Mahol hota, Eid se ziyada khushi manai jati

Hum bhi jamaat mae "Meena bazar" rakhte hae, ye bhi Akbar badshah ka "Navroz" tehewar mae raej (started) kiya huva hae, Syedna Jaffar bin Syedna Sulaiman likhte hain ke "is bazaar mae us waqt Ameer (rich & nobles) apne makan se khimti wa nadir (precious & unique) chezain lakar rakhte the, aur Badshah unka moyana (observe) karta aur un chezaun mae se koi chez usko pasand aati to munasib khimat dekar khreed leta, magar saath mae us noble ya ameer shaqs ko Badshah ko ek badi raqam (amount) nazrana dena padhta

Badshah ka hukum tha ke un ameer aur nobles ki ghar ki auratain aur jawan ladkiyaan Badshah se purdah na kare, kiyunke Badshah unke baap ki tarah tha, aur kiya baap se koi purdah karta hae ?

Aise Badshah ke darbar mae Syedna Hummam aur hamare muqalefeen ke bade Dawood khutub ka case pesh huva tha

Badshah jawaheraat wa zeveraat (precious stones & jewellery) ka be inteha shauqeen tha, usne rishwat (bribe) mae khub jawaheraat muqalefeen se wasul kiye, sirf Itna hi nahi balkeh unke bade ne unko khush karne ke liye apni dadhi bhi mundwadi (clean shaved), Dawood khutub har roz Badshah ke darbar mae teen waqt hazir hota, sajda bhi karta aur haath jod kar ghantaun kheda rahta, gae (cows) ki zabihat ko apne mazhab mae haram kardiya takeh badshah khush hojae

Ye muqadama 1004 Hijri mae Lahore mae, darbar Shahi mae pesh huva tha, Muqadame ki karwai ke liye khud Syedna Hummam Syedna Sulaiman saheb tashreef legaye the, magar aapki zindagi wafa na ki aur aap hamare muqalefeen ke zaher (poison) dene se shahadat se inteqal farmae, magar muqadama ki puri paerwi (follow up of the case) Syedna Dawood bin Ajab Shah ke farzand Syedi Ibrahim ne ki, magar anjaam kiya hota, nainsaaf Badshah ne taqreeban do saal ki karwai ke baad muqadame ko hi adalat se kharij kardiya

Syedi Ibrahim ne dawat ki bahut badi khidmat ki aur jis tarah aap adalat mae jawab dete Badshah Akbar ko koi Chara na rehta aur hamesha kehta ke "tumko khub Jawab dena ata hae"

Ek waqt Syedi Ibrahim Lahore se Ahmedabad aye kuch witness ko lene, aapko 4 mahine ka Waqt diya gaya tha, magar aapko wapas Kashmir aane 160 din hogae, char maah yane 120 din se ziyada hogae us waqt Akbar badshah kashmir mae tha aur karwai bhi wahi ho rahi thi, Dawood khutub ne muqadama kharij karne ki darqaast ki, magar Syedi Ibrahlm ne foran Jawab diya ke mae to waqt per aya hun, sab hairat mae the, Syedi Ibrahim ne kha aapke Deen e Elahi ke calendar ke hisaab se ek mahina 40 din ka hae, aur is hisaab se mae char mahine mae barabar aya hun (Akbar badshah ne Naya calender shru kiya tha jo 40 din ka mahina aur 10 mahine ka saal tha)

Akbar Badshah bahut khush huva, aur muqadama jari rakhne kha

Hamare Duwaat aur Manaseeb hamari tareeqi kitabaun (books on History) mae, aur unke khutut (letters) mae duniya ki history ke bare mae bahut kuch likha hae, humko chahye ke hum sachai ko ja'ne aur un kitabaun ko bhi padhe

🌿🌸🌿🌸🌿🌸🌿🌸🌿

1/13/16, 11:44:26 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Bambai mae haal hi mae shaadi ke silsile mae "Islam Gymkhana" mae taqreeb huvi

Gymkhana ke dakhele (entrance) per Janab honourable Chief Justice of Bombay state, Mukaram Badruddin Tayabji saheb ki tasveer bhi lagi huvi thi

Ye wohi Badruddin Tayabji saheb hae jinhune besh'qimat (invaluable) hadiya "Badr Bagh" Bambai mae Sulaimani Jamaat ko diya tha

Janab Badruddin Tayabji saheb "Islam Gymkhana" ke bhi founder member the aur 1900 se leker 1906 aapke inteqal tak president bhi rahe

Cricket aur doosre outdoor sports ke bade shauqeen the, aur doosraun ko bhi bahut shoq dilate the aur issi wajeh se woh Gymkhana ki buniyaad rakhi jo us waqt sirf masulmaanaun ke liye tha, us'se pehle Parsee, Hindu aur Bombay (Europeans) gymkhana qaem hochuke the

Kehte hae ke aap apne makan "Somerset House" jo aaj Bambai ka mashoor college "Sophaia" hae se Queens Road gaadi mae aate aur wahan se Bombay high court har roz walk karte huve jate

Aapka kuch bilkul, mae mukhtasar mae zikar karta hun, kiyunke "Mohsin" (ahsaan karne wale) ke ahsaan ko kabhi nahi bhulna chahye, aur aapka ahsaan "Badr Bagh" hae, jahan aaj hamari Zia masjid hae, ikhwan ke makanaat hain, aur jamaat ke taqareeb bhi hote hain, woh unhi ka ek ahsaan e Azeem hae

Aapki paedaesh 1844 ki hae aur inteqal London mae 19 Aug 1906 mae achanak huva, aapki aur aapke heirs ki khaesh per Bambai mae jamaat e Sulaimani ke kabrastan mae 10 October 1906 dafan kiye gaye

Aapke walid Janab Mukaram Mulla Tayab Ali Bhai Miyan the, jinhune Hazrat Moulana Ziaali saheb muqaddus se Deeni uloom ko hasil kiya tha aur "Gulban e Hidayat" kitab us Ilm ko hasil karne ke baad likhi thi

Tayab Ali saheb se hi unka khaandan Tayabji's kehlaya

Tayab Ali saheb ki bahut aulad huvi shaed 10 thi unme se taqreeben sab ladke Europe padhne gae aur bade bade post hasil kiye aur ek farzand Shamsuddin Tayabji Deeni uloom hasil karne Najran Dai ke pas hijrat bhi kiye, Shamsuddin Tayabji saheb Mulla the uske alawa Tayab Ali saheb ke do aur farzand Mulla the, Mulla Najmuddin aur Mulla Shujauddin saheb, sab hi aulad deen ke uloom se waqif the aur deendar parhezgar log the, Janab Mulla Shujauddin saheb ke haath ka likha "Sahife Salaat" bhi hae, aapka behtreen Arabi khat (writting) tha, jiski photo mae mazmoon ke saath inshallah bhej raha hun, khaas baat ye hae ke usme ishare (directions) sab Gujrati mae hae jo aam tor per us waqt jamaat ke logoan mae boli jati thi

Badruddin Tayabji saheb 1867 mae 23 saal ki umar mae first Indian barrister huve

1895 Mumbai High Court judge muqrar huve

1902 mae Chief justice Bombay high court appoint huve

Aap Bombay university ke 1876 se 1905 senate member rahe

Pehle Indian National Congress 1885 session ke aap working member the magar kuch masrufiat ke wajeh se attend nahi karsake

1887 Madras ke 3rd Indian National Congress session  ke president rahe aur ussi session mae Hazrat Moulana Ziaali saheb muqaddus ko aap ne khaas dawat di thi aur puri izzat aur karamat di

1874 mae aap aur aapke bhai Solicitor Camaruddin Tayabji, Anjuman e Islam ki buniyaad rakhi jiske tahet (under) bahut se schools aur muqtalif idare (organisation) qaem huve

Aapke chief justice ki haisiyat se bahut se cases mashoor huve, khaas case  "lokmaniya Tilak" ka case tha jisme aap ne Tilak ko tammam Ilzam se bari (acquit) kiya tha aur English counsel ko bahut sakhti se sarzanish (warned & scold) kiya tha

Aap Urdu Arabi Farsee aur English ke maher the Shakespeare ko bahut pasand karte, issi wajeh se khud ke makan ka naam "Somerset" rakha tha, aur urdu wa Farsee ashar bahut yaad the aur aksar "baet baazi" mae shoq se hissa lete

Aap ne ikhwan e Sulaimani aur awaam un naas ke liye be hisaab kaam kiye, Anjuman E Islam mae hamare bahut se ikhwan naukr bhii kiye, khaas tor per Hazrat Almansub Moulana Mohammed Hussain saheb aur Sufi saheb bhi wahan teacher ki khidmat anjaam di hae

Aap daulat bhi bahut kamaye kehte hae ke Malabar Hills per bahut ziyada zameenat aap hi ki thi, magar jitna aap ne kamaya uska bahut bada hissa aap ne Allah ki raah mae kharch bhi kiya

Ek waqt Rasulullah ke pas teen alag alag log ae, ek ne kha ke ae Rasul e khuda mere pas 100 sone (gold) ke coins hain mae usme se 10 bataur (for) sadqe ke liye aapke pas laya hun

Doosre ne kha mere pas 100 chandi (silver) coins hain aur mae 10 aapko logoan mae sadqa karne de raha hun

Teesre ne kha mere pas sirf 10 sone ke coin hain mae usme se 1ek aapko sadqe ke liye pesh kar raha hun

Rasulullah teeno se unke sadqe ko qabool kiya aur Dua ki, aur phir farmaya ke tum teeno ko barabar sawab milega, kiyunke tum teeno ne apne maal ka 10 wa hissa (tenth portion) sadqe ke liye nikala hae

Allah ka ahsaan wa karam hae ke aaj bhi hamare ikhwan mae bahut se log maal wa daulat ke hisaab se Badruddin Tayabji jaise moujud hain, bas kami hae to woh jasbe ki, woh Qom ki khidmat ki, woh khair wa khairaat karne ki

Woh jo kiye woh unke liye sawab e jaria hae, (everlasting) jo zamane se aur ainda zamanaun tak unko milta hi rahega, aaj 100 saal se ziyada unke inteqal ko hone per bhi unka naam baqi hae zikar baqi hae

Aaj bhi Bombay High Court mae unki tasveer lagi hae, Mumbai Fort mae ek road ka naam aapke naam se hae, Shaed Anjuman e Islam school mae bhi tasveer moujud hae, bahut se muqam per aapka naam engraved hae, aur aapka zikar bhi hote hi rahta hae

Allah taala unki khidmataun ka aur ahsanat ka behtreen ajar de, aur hum mae bhi woh dil, woh jasba, woh ahsaas, rakhne wale paida kar

 ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

1/14/16, 9:50:30 AM: Asif Hussain: AsSalaamAlaykum Ishaq bhai..... I had a question if you wouldn't mind answering. The batini concept of Tasbeeh is glorifying or elevating in rank which suggests that the movement is from a lower form to a higher form. So then why in tasbeeh (after fard namaaz), we start with AllahuAkbar, Hamdulillah, SubhanAllah, because the 33 Allahuakbar represent the highest of the 99 entities. Hamdulillah represents the next 33 entities and then the lowest group of SubhanAllah

 If tasbeeh is elevation in rank shouldn't it be subhanallah, then hamdulillah, and then allahuakbar? And then after the descending ranks, the final is La Ilaha Illa Allah which is the highest of all 99. So why is the tasbeeh in such disconnected order?

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

"Sankrant" ya "Utran" ka festival guzra, patang bazi ke alawa hamare telengana state mae is roz "cockfights" ka bhi bahut riwaj hae, jaisa ke Duniya bhar mae bhi ye riwaj hae jo mukhtalif moqe per khela jata hae, aur usper betting bhi bahut hoti hae

Aaj duniya mae aksar countries mae yeh banned kardiya gaya hae aur india ne bhi SPCA (society for prevention to animals), 'Blue cross' aur us jaise bahut se idare (organisations) ki demand per banned kiya hae, magar aaj bhi bahut jagah ye commen hae aur khela jata hae, aur is baat ko lekar aaj kal akhbaraun mae bahut bhes ho rahi hae

Duniya ki tehzeeb aur uska kanoon aaj usko bura aur ghalat keh raha hae jab ke Shariat e Mohammedi (law of Islam) usko sakhti se mana farmaya hae aur napasand kiya hae

Shariat e Mohammedi ne sirf usko napasand nahi kiya hae balkeh jo aadmi is khel mae hissa leta hae uski gawahi ko qabool nahi karti hae (such person are not accepted as witnesses in court of Sharia law)

Daem ul Islam mae "Shahadat" yane kiski gawahi qabil e qabool hae usme iske alawa aur bhi logoan ka zikar hae masalan walad e zina (bastard), drug addict, prostitute ke pas aana jana wala, jo insaan naap to tol (weights & measurements) mae kami karta ho, jo namaz ka paband na ho, jo padosiyaun ko takleef deta hae, yateem ka maal khajane wala, uske alawa aur bhi logoan ka zikar hae jisko witness ki haisiyat se kanoon e Shariat accept nahi karta hae

Rasulullah ki layi huvi Shariat woh mukamil kanoon hae na usme koi baat ki kami hae na kisi baat ka zikar us mae moujud na ho, woh har zamane ke liye hae aur ta'Qiyamat baqi rahegi (will be valid & applicable)

Jahel log kehte hae ke Shariat mae tabdili (change) ki zaroorat hae ye unki kam aqli (ignorance) hae, woh Koran Hadees aur Sunnat e Rasul ko samjhe hi nahi hae, jane hi nahi

Jis baat ko 1400 saal pehle Rasulullah ne mana farmaye aaj usper bhes ho rahi hae aur tasleem kar rahe hae ke "cockfights" ghalat hae, janwar per zulum hae

Aaj animal right aur welfare activists be'dar (waking up) ho rahe hae Jab ke Rasulullah ne janwar ke saath kaisa suluk karna us waqt bata gae, jab duniya ko in baataun ka hosh bhi nahi tha

Janwar ka Rasulullah ko itna ahteram (respect) tha ke ek waqt aap ke saamne se ek ghode sawar (horse rider) guzra to aap ne kha ke 'tum dono per mera salaam hae' logoan ne pucha aap kaun do (2) ko salaam kiye ?

aap ne farmaya ki ghode aur uske sawar ko (the horse & it's rider)

Aap ne ek waqt kha ke bahut se waqt sawar (rider) se behter woh sawari ka janwar hota hae uski sharafat ke lihaz se

Aap ne janwar ke mu per marne se saqti se mana farmaya aur kha ke har janwar apne mu se Allah taala ki tasbeeh karta hae

Shariat ki kitabain aise ahkamaat se bhari padhi hain, hum jante nahi to samajhte hae ke deen mae in baataun ka koi dakhel nahi

Duniya ka koi aisa mamla ye masla nahi jisme Shariat ke ahkamaat ka dakhel nahi ho

Aulia Allah ka qol hae ke insaan ko shariat ko ja'ne baqaer karobar bhi nahi karna chahye, na karna hi uske Haq mae behter hae warna woh kitne gunaah aur ghalti kar jaega

Hum ne aksar walid e muqaddus se suna hae ke insaan ko Nikah nahi karna chahye jab tak ahkamaat ko puri tarah na jaan le, warna uski aur uske aulad ki khrabi hogi

Allah taala hum sabko tawfeeq de ke hum jis tarah duniya ke kanoon per qor wa fikar karte hae ussi tarah Shariat Mohammedi mae bhi kare, kiyunke Shariat sirf duniya ke mamlaat ko pesh e nazar rakhkar nahi balkeh hamare aakherat ke roohani mamlaat ko pesh e nazar rakhkar banae gae hain, jo duniya ke kanoon se bahut ziyada ahem hain

🍃🍂🍃🍂🍃🍂🍃🍂

1/20/16, 1:11:31 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ا🌸🍀🌺🌸🍀🌺🌸🍀🌺

لسلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Aksar log, khususan navjavan aur bache apne kaam kach aur padhai ke alawa kuch na kuch "Hobbies" develop karte hain, jiske zareeyeh se apne free aur fursat ke waqt mae relax karte hain aur saath hi unki malumat mae isafa bhi hota hae

Aise hi hobbies mae muqtalif chezaun ko jama karna bhi hota hae jinme bahut hi commen woh 'Postal Stamps' aur 'Coins' ka jama karna hae, jo yaqinan bahut umda shoq hae aur saath hi duniya ki malumaat mae bhi bahut isafa karti hae

log bahut ajeeb ajeeb chezaun ka bhi collection karte hain aur baaz aise bhi hote hae jo ilm ki qadar to nahi jante magar 'Pens' jama karte hain, aur baaz 'Waqt' ki qadar na karne wale "Wrist Watches" bhi jama karte hain, Allah aise logoan ko saheb e qalam aur waqt ki qadar karne wala bhi bana de

Collections mae ek aur intresting hobby woh 'Autographs' ka collect karna hae, ye bahut hi dilchasp shoq hae magar depend karta hae kiski autographs jama karte hain, baaz apne "Teachers" ki jama karte hae to baaz "leaders" ki karte hain aur kuch log "Film stars" ki, baaz logoan ke liye yehi kafi hota ke woh autographs unka, un personalities se milne ka suboot hoti hae, aur yehi unke liye fakher ki baat hojati hae, aur baaz ke liye unki autograph ke saath likhi huvi ibarat aur hidayat unki zindagi ke liye ek rahnumai aur hidayat ka zareeyah banti hae

Hamare pas bhi Syedna Dai Ali bin Hussain Almakrami Qadasallahu roohhohu  1972 mae Hindustan tashreef laye the aur bahut se logoan ne aap se autograph liye, aap apne mubarak dastakhat (signiture) ke saath kuch na kuch likh dete

Hakim ki koi baat hikmat se khali nahi hoti, aapke chand autographs ke saath ke likhe mubarak jumle, jo ya to Koran ki ayaat hoti, ya Ahadees e Nabi hoti ya phir Aulia Allah ke aqwal hote unme se chand autographs pesh e khidmat hain

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

عليك بذكرالله تجده يذكرك

Tum Allah ka zikar karte raho tum Allah taala ko tumhara zikar karte huve paoge (Allah taala bhi tumko yaad rakhega)

ومن يعمل من الصالحات من ذكر أو انثي وها مومن

Jo koi bhi mard ya aurat mae se nek amal kiya woh mommin hae

اذكر الله يذكركم

Tum Allah ka zikar karte raho, Allah taala tum ko yaad karte rahega

وفقكم للعمل والإيمان والعلم وزادكم  فهما وذكابحوله وقوته

Allah taala tum ko tawfeeq de, amal, emaan, aur ilm ki, aur ziyada kare tumhari faham (understanding) wa zakawat (intelligence) ko uski quwat wa taqat se

استعملوا الدعآء تنالواخيراته من الله سبحانه

Dua karte raho Allah Subhanahu ke khairaat tumhe milte rahinge

وما خلقت الجن والإنس إلا ليعبدون

Nahi paida kiya hum ne, Jinnat aur insaan ko, magar ye ke uski ibadat kare

واستعينوا باصبر والصلوة وأنها لكبيرة إلا علي الخاشعين

Tum sabar aur salaat ke zareeyeh maddad chaho, ye sab giraan (bhari difficult) hain siwae خشوع  khushu karne walaun ke liye

فذكر إنما انت مذكر  

Tum Allah se daro aur yaqinan tum darane wale ho

الحبيب هوالعلم

  Sacha dost woh Ilm hae

ومن عجائب في تصرف دهرنا

قرب الحبيب وما إليه وصول

كالعيس في البيدآ يقتلها في الظماء

والماء فوق الظهورها محمول

Hamare zamane ki ajeeb baat ye hae ke dost khreeb hae magar us'se milna mumkin nahi, uski misaal aisi hae, ke sahra (desert) mae ek ouet (camel) ki, jisko piyas maar dal rahi hae, halankeh woh apni peeth (back) per pani uthae phirta hae

Insaan duniya ki koi bhi maadi (physical) chez jama kare, waqt ke saath aur guzarti huvi umar ke saath uski ifadiyat (benifits) khatam hoti jati hae, aur jaise jaise woh maut ki manzil se khreeb hoga woh uske khazane, jo usne itni mehnat aur koshish se jama kiya wohi uske liye ek bojh banjaega, insaan ke liye wohi behter hae jama karna jo insaan ke duniya mae bhi kaam aye aur aakherat mae bhi, aur woh insaan ke nekiyaan hain, khair aur khairat hae, hamdardi ka sulook hae, ikhwan se mohabbat hae jo usko duniya mae bhi khushi degi aur aakherat mae bhi kaam aegi aur is se behter duniya mae koi collection ho hi nahi sakta

🌺🍀🌸🌺🍀🌸🌺🍀🌸

1/21/16, 2:12:02 PM: Asif Hussain: Jazak Allah khair Ishaq bhai!!

1/21/16, 2:14:14 PM: Asif Hussain: I have another question related to tasbeeh, and curious to know your thoughts on it..... We have 99 things in tasbeeh divided into 3 categories (AllahuAkbar, AlHamdulillah, SubhanAllah)..... Is there a correlation between these and the 99 names of Allah..... Are there 33 names that would fall under the AllahuAkbar category..... 33 names that would fall under Hamdulillah and 22 that would fall under SubhanAllah?

1/21/16, 2:15:51 PM: Asif Hussain: Because we have huqooq Allah..... Huqooq AnNafs and Huqooq AlIbaad..... And some scholars have commented that Huqooq Allah is AllahuAkbar..... Huqooq AnNafs is Hamdulillah (praise and gratitude for all his blessings) and then Huqooq AlIbaad is SubhanAllah ..... And of course this could apply to anything that has an essence (asal) of 3 because of Alif Laam Haa..... Just curious to know your thoughts on this

1/21/16, 2:25:13 PM: Asif Hussain: I read that everything in the end ties back to the attributes of Allah..... So there is Allah and his attributes and nothing else (which matches our theology).....

The first is Huqooq Allah which we get by observing the divine attributes of Allah within the self and everything around us….. (آیات و انفس) We recognize he is kabeer….. Jaleel….. Kareem….. Azeem….. These attributes force us to submit ourselves to him in praise and gratitude….. And that results in our worship and obedience to him

The second this Huqooq AnNafs….. The body has a right that it be properly nourished ….. And the soul has a right that it be properly nourished….. Nourishment of the body is food….. Which comes from the harvest of this earth….. And nourishment of the soul is Akhlaaq….. That come from the harvest of the divine attributes….. We understand the divine attributes of Allah and develop our character based on it….. He is Kareem….. So we train ourselves to become generous with the self….. And the greatest generosity with the soul is to protect it from sins….. And to put it to work to accumulate good….. Allah is AlHaqq….. The truthful….. So we train the soul to make it truthful….. Allah is Ghafoor….. He is forgiving….. So we learn to rely on Allah's forgiveness….. Allah is Saboor….. He is patient….. So we train our soul to become patient and endure hardships….. Allah is Shakoor….. So we become grateful to Allah for his uncountable gifts….. This is all part of Huqooq AlNafs, developed through the experience of divine attributes

And then there is Huqooq AlIbaad….. The rights of creation….. Which is now reflecting the divine attributes that we have developed without our soul, into our interactions with Allah's creation….. We trained ourselves to be generous to our soul….. And now we interact generously with them….. We learnt to depend on Allah's forgiveness for our mistakes….. As a result of that we forgive the mistakes of others….. We trained ourselves to become truthful….. We not interact with Allah's creation with honesty ….. Allah is wakeel….. He is trustworthy….. And therefore I must be trustworthy with others…..  Allah is Sattar….. We realize that Allah is constantly covering up my sins….. My faults my mistakes in my interactions with him….. I will therefore now cover up the faults of others in my interactions with them…..

So in its most simplest form, ALL معاملات are nothing but derivates of the divine attributes

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

جمعة مبارك

Moulae kaenat Moulana Ali ibn abi Talib Salawatullah alahe عدل 'adal' (justice) ke liye farmate hain

Adal ek hi surat, ek hi shakal hoti hae, (its unique to a situation) aur uske muqabil 'zulum' bahut si surat wa shakal wala hota hae, issi liye zulum karna bahut asaan hae adal karna bahut mushkil hae (jo adal wa insaaf se hata bas usne zulum kiya)

adal aur zulum teer andazi (marksmanship) mae sahi aur ghalat nishane (target mark) ki tarah hae, teer (arrow) ka sahi nishane per baithne ke liye bahut zamane ki practice aur badi maharat ki zaroorat hoti hae, jab ke nishane (target) ko miss karne ke liye kisi baat ki bhi zaroorat nahi hoti,

Jo nishane per baitha woh adal aur jo nishane se hata woh zulum

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن

Kuch waqt pehla

(1 November 2015) mae Hadiya dene aur lene ke silsile mae kuch ahkamaat aur riwayat bayan kiya tha ussi silsile mae bayan hae

Rasulullah Hadiya dene wale ka taluq se farmate hain ke hadiya ya tohfa dene wala, hadiya qabool karne wale ki taraf fazilat aur karamat ki nigah se dekhe, usko izzat de

 Hadiya lene wala jab hadiye ko qabool kare to is baat per woh khushi aur masarat ka izhaar kare

Hadiya dene wala apne hadiya dene ka logoan mae charcha na kare

 Aur sab se badhkar to Allah taala ka shukur guzar rahe ke Allah taala ne usko hadiya dene ki tawfeeq di, aur apne hadiye ko hamesha mamuli aur choti chez kehkar izhaar kare, chahe woh kitni bhi mahengi, badi aur ziyada kiyu na ho

Issi tarah se hadiya lene wale, qabool karne wale ke bhi adaab hain,

sab se pehle to hadiya lene wala hadiya qabool karte waqt khushi ka izhaar kare agarcheh ko uske nasdik woh kitni bhi choti aur mamuli chez kiyu na ho,

 Hadiya dene wale ke liye Dua khair kare, aur agar qudrat rakhta hae to woh bhi uske jaisa, ya usse behter hadiya de, aur mumkin ho to uski sahi tareef bhi kare, magar is baat ka khyal rahe ke woh tareef chaplusi (flattery) na ho, aur na hi uske deen mae khrabi paida kare, aur aisi bhi tareef na ho ke usme tamma (greed) aur lalaj ka izhaar ho, ya aur ziyada milne ki khaesh zaher ho

Aqlaqiat deen ki buniyaad hae, aqlaq se aadmi ki pehchan hae, deen aur mazhab ki buniyaad ache saaf suthre shareef aqlaq hain, aur Islam aisa mazhab hae ke jisme zindagi ke har mamlaat ke liye aqlaqi taleem di gai hae jo shaed hi kisi aur deen mae maujud ho

Hum bahut se aise mamlaat aur hamare roz marah (daily routine) ke kaam kaaj hote hae jiske adaab hosakte hain, hum khyal bhi nahi karte jaise ke

Rasulallah ne ek waqt kisi aadmi ko, jo kisi ke darwaze per dastak (knock) de raha tha usko farmaya

Tum agar kisi ghar ke darwaze per dastak do to darwaze ke saamne mat kheda rahna balkeh bazu hath kar kuch fasle per khede raho, takeh darwaza khule to tumhari nazar makan ke andaruni hisse mae na padhe

Darwaza khulne tak tum tasbeeh aur hamd karte raho

Agar tum ko andar se guftagu ki awaaz aa rahi hae to tum usko kaan lagakar na suno, balkeh dur hojao,

Darwaza kholne per narmi ke saath Salaam karo

Tum makan ke andar, taak jhaak (peeping) mat karo

Jab tak ijazat na mille makan mae dakhil na ho

Agar ijazat na mille to wahan mat ruko, wapis hojao

Aur makan mae se koi puche ke kaun hae to wazahat (clarity) ke saath apna taruf karao, aisa na kho ke "mae hun", "mae hi hun", ye baat munasib nahi, apne naam ka barabar izhaar karo

Allah taala humko tawfeeq de ke hum In deeni adaab ka khyal rakhe takeh is'se hamari zindagi bhi achi hogi aur doosraun ko bhi asaani aur sahulat hogi, aur in sab se badhkar to Rasulullah ki itteba (following) aur Allah taala ki khushnudi hogi

وما توفيقى الا بالله العلي العظيم

🍂🍂🍂🍂🍂🍂🍂🍂🍂
