السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Hadees e Qudsi mae Allah taala ka irshad e mubarak hae

Mae ne panch chezaun ko panch jagah per rakha hae aur log unko doosri jagah per dhundte hain

Mae ne tumhari izzat ko meri farmabardari (obedience) mae rakha hae (logoan ki izzat Allah taala ki taat aur uske ahkaam ki pabandi mae rakha hae) aur log us izzat ko Ameeraun (wealthy) aur Badshahaun ke darwaze per dhundte hain ab kiyun'ker unko izzat milegi

Ilm aur Hikmat ko mae ne bhuk wa piyas mae rakha hae aur log usko saeri (pet bhar khane) mae dhundte hain, ab kahan woh Ilm wa Hikmat hasil karenge

rahat wa aram, sukoon wa itmenan, mae ne Jannat mae rakha hae, log uske liye duniya mae jus'taju (make effort) karte hae ab woh kis tarah haath aegi

Qina غني wa Tawangiri (wealth & contentment) mae ne qinaat mae rakha hae, aur log usko maal aur daulat mae talash karte hain

[Qani ya tawangar ke asal mane hae ke itna hona ki aur ziyada ki zaroorat hi na ho, uski har zaroorat puri ho, agar kam per qinaat karta ho, satisfied ho, khush ho, to phir woh us aadmi se bahut behter hae jiske pas be'hisaab daulat ho, bahut ho, magar uska Dil mutmaen (content) nahi ho, woh satisfied nahi ho,

[daulat ki ziyadati se insaan qani غني nahi hota balkeh thode per khush rahne wala qhani hae]

Aur Allah taala farmata hae  mae ne meri khushnudi (Allah taala ki khushi) muqalefat e Nafs (opposition of Nafs) mae rakhi hae, aur log usko muafeqat (obedience) e Nafs mae chahte hain kiyunker woh usme painge

[Hamara Nafs hi hum ko bure, ghalat aur khrab khaeshat per ubharta hae, hum ko hamari aqal aur Rasulullah ki Shariat ki maddad se uski muqalefat karna hae aur hamari hifazat karna hae]

Agar insaan is deen e Islam ke buniyaadi aqeede ko samajh le aur yaqeen karle to phir woh kabhi duniya per lalaj حدص nahi karega aur na hi hasad حسد karega

Moulana Ali ibn abi Talib ne ek waqt Abdullah ibne Abbas ko khat (letter) likha tha usme aap ne likha

Log koi chez pa'kar aise khush hote hae jis e woh haqeeqat mae kabhi khone wala na tha, har halat mae usko milkar rahti

Aur ek aisi chez kho'kar ghumgin hojate hain jisko woh kabhi bhi hasil karne wale na the

Bas isiliye jab Allah taala tum ko duniya ki koi chez de to usko pakar bahut ziyada khush na ho

Hum jo zohod زهد wa taqwa lafz istemal karte hae, usme zohod ke mane bhi yehi hote hain ke duniya ki koi chez milne per uski khushi mae koi isafa nahi hota aur duniya ki kisi chez ke khone ya zae hona per us'e koi afsoos bhi nahi hota

Aur Allah taala duniya ki chezaun mae se koi chez ro'ke to tum uske liye bahut ziyada ghumgeen na ho, tumhari puri fikar us chez ke waaste honi chahye jo tum ko maut ke baad milna hae, jo haqaeqat mae tumhari duniya ki koshish  (ilm wa amal) ke baad hi hasil hosakti hae

🔲🔲🔲🔲🔲🔲🔲🔲🔲

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

جمعة مبارك

Moulana Ali Ibn Abi Talib irshad farmate hain

Allah taala ki ibadat tum utni hi karo jitni tum ko Allah se hajat (need) ho

Duniya se tum utna hi lo, yane duniya mae utna hi maal wa daulat jama karo jitna tum duniya mae rehne ki umeed rakhte ho

Tum duniya mae utne hi gunah karo jitna tum akherat mae azaab jhelne ki taqat rakhte ho.

Tum toshe aakherat utna hi lo jitna tum qabar mae rehne ki umeed rakhte ho

Aur Jannat ke liye utna hi amal karo jitna ke tum jannat mae rehna ka irada rakhte ho

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Hokoma aur oloma ne zulm ظلم ki tareef (define) is tarah ki hae

وضع الشي فى غير محله

Yane kisi chez ko uske sahi muqam per nahi rakhna woh zulm hae, aur شيء chez mae insaan bhi shammil hae

Masalan kisi bhi mulk ke Badshah ko aap ek aam aadmi ki tarah logoan mae bitha diye, to aap ne us Badshah per zulm kiye, issi tarah agar aap ek aalim fazil bade hudood ko ek aam aadmi ki tarah mehfil mae peeche baithne kehde, to yaqinan us aalim per aap ne zulm kiya, uske ilm aur fazal ki aap ne qadar nahi ki

Moulana Ali ibne abi Talib Salawatullah alahe ne farmaya ke zulm bhi teen tarah ka hota hae

Pehla zulm jo kabhi bhi maaf nahi kiya jaega, jisko koran ne zulm e azeem kha hae

أن الشرك لظلم عظيم

Aur Allah taala farmata hae

ان الله لا يغفر أن يشرك به

Allah ke saath kisi ko shareek karna, شرك بالله ye sab se bada gunah hae jo kabhi bhi maaf nahi kiya jaega

Doosra gunah jo Allah taala maaf kar bhi deta hae, woh bande ka zulm hae, jo woh khud apne Nafs per karta hae, woh uske chote chote laqzish hae, jo Allah taala maaf bhi karta hae.

هوالغفورالرحيم

Allah taala bada maaf karne wala Raheem hae

Aur teesri kisim zulm ki jisko choda nahi jaega, jo kabhi maaf nahi kiya jaega woh zulm bande ka, ek doosre bande ke saath hae, chahe woh mommin ho, ya Munafiq ho, chahe kaisa bhi insaan ho woh choda nahi jaega

Mazloom (jisper zulm kiya gaya) logoan ka Allah taala kafil (caretaker) hae, Allah taala ne unki nusrat (maddad) ki zamanat (undertaking) di hae

Aur Allah taala jis kisi ke khilaf maddad karne ka wada kiya zameen huva, woh la mahala (for sure) maqloob hokar rahega (will be defeated), jaisa ke Allah taala Koran e kareem mae farmaya hae

ثم بغي عليه لينصرنه الله

Phir jisper bhi ziyadati ki jaegi, Allah taala uski zaroor maddad farmaega.

Aur Nabi e kareem ka irshad e mubarak bhi hae

اشتد غضبي علي من ظلم ,علي من يجد ناصرا غيري

Mera gussa us shaqs per bahut saqt hoga jo aise shaqs per zulm kare jiska mere siwae koi aur madadgaar na ho

Allah taala ki koi وعيد waeed (saza ka wada) ko halka samajhna, usko ahmiyat na dena, bahut hi bura kaam hae, hum sab ko is baat se bachna chahye, Allah taala agar kisi ko kuch waqt ke liye choot de di, ya dheel de di, to ye hargis na samajhna ke woh bach gaya, Allah taala yaqinan usko pakde ga aur azaab dega, agar is duniya mae nahi to aakherat mae, aur yaqeen rakhiye ke aakherat ka azaab aur saqt, wa shadeed hoga

Aur Allah taala farmata hae

ان ينصركم الله فلا غالب لكم

Aur agar Allah taala tumhara (mazloom ka) madadgar banjae to phir koi bhi tum per ghalib (overtake) nahi a'sakta hae

Zulm, Zulm hota hae, chahe woh kitna chota hi kiyu na ho, ya phir bade se bada ho, har halat mae saqt tareen azaab ka Allah taala ne wada farmaya hae aur Rasulullah ki Hadees e mubarak hae

لو بغي جبل علي جبل لجعل الله الباغي منهما دكا

Agar ek pahad bhi doosre pahad per ziyadati kare, to Allah taala ziyadati karne wale pahad ko 'reza reza' (bits & pieces) kardega

Allah taala Koran mae, Nabi e kareem Ahadees mae, aur Aulia Allah ne apne kalaam mae, zulm ki kai kisim bayan ki hae, jaisa ke

Nabi e kareem farmate hae kisi se saqt kalaam karna bhi ek kisim ka zulm hae

Nabi e kareem farmate hae ek musalman bhai, na apne musalman bhai per zulm karega, aur na hi usko kisi zaleem ke hawale karega, is baat se saaf zaher hae ke jisne bhi zulm kiya woh musalman hi nahi raha, aur phir farmaya ke jo zaleem ka saath diya woh mujrim (culprit) hae,

Nabi kareem ka irshad hae

انصر أخاك كان ظالم أو مظلوما

Apne bhai ki maddad karo agarche ke woh zaleem raha ho ya mazloom ho

Log hairat se puche ke mazloom ki maddad to humko samajh mae aati hae, ke usko zulm se bachana aur maddad karna hae, magar zaleem ki maddad karna samajh mae nahi aya

Us waqt Rasulullah ne farmaya ke zaleem ko zulm karne se rokna, woh zaleem ki maddad karna hae

Aur ek mommin ke liye sab se badi fazilat ki baat ye hae ke woh usko maaf karde, jisne usper zulm kiya, aur is maaf karne ki wajeh se Allah taala us mommin ki izzat mae bahut izafa karega

 Ae Allah taala, mae tujh se panah maangta hun, ke mae kisi per zulm karu, ya koi mujh per zulm kare, na hi mujhe zaleem bana aur na hi mazloom

اعوذباللہ من ذلك

🔴⚪🔵🔴🔵⚪🔵🔴

Salaam Alaikum wa Rehmatullah wa Barkatuhu

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Jaanwar mae Aqal nahi hoti aur farishtey mae Khaesh nahi hoti, magar Insaan mae dono hoti hain,

Ager woh aqal ko daba de (aqal ko istemal na kare) aur sirf khaeshat ki perwi kare to jaanwar hae, aur ager khaesh ko daba le to farishta kehlaega

Insaan ek dukan hae aur zabaan us ka tala (lock), tala khulta hae to maloom hota hae ke dukan soney ki hai ya koiley ki (gold or coal)

Insaan buzdil (coward) itna hae ke sotey huwe khawab mae bhi darr jata hai aur be-waqoof itna ke jaagtey huwe bhi apne Allah se nahi darta.

Dunya naseeb sey milti hae aur aakherat mehnat aur koshish se magar aaj hamari sari mehnat hum duniya ke liye karte hain aur aakherat ko hum ne naseeb per chod diya hae

🍁🍁🍁🍁🍁🍁🍁🍁🍁

2/4/16, 10:24:39 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🍋🍒🍇🍓🍋🍒🍇🍓

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

جمعة مبارك 🌹

Insaan ke liye Sahet se badhkar koi naemat nahi, aur tammam atiba (Doctors), hokoma (wisemen) yehi kehte hae ke tammam bimariun (illnesses) ki jadd (root cause) uski asal woh paet (stomach) hi hae

Rasul e Khuda ka qol hae ke

ما ملاء ابن آدم وعاء أشر من بطنه

Insaan ne nahi bhara apne paet se bura koi aur bartan (vessel), Nabi kareem ne insaan ke paet ko sabse shar yane bura, takleef pohunchane wala bartan kha hae

Aur Janab e luqman hakim ka qol hae,

أمه جميع الأدوية قلة الطعام

keh kam khane se behter insaan ke liye koi dawa (medicine) nahi, kam khana dawaun ki maa hae

Imam Jafar e Sadiq farmate hain ke insaan ke liye har haal mae kam khana hi behter hae, chahe woh Jism ke liye ho ya Nafs ke liye

Ek mommin apni quwat wa taqat ke baqa ke liye, zinda rahne ke liye khata hae, khane ke liye zinda nahi rahta, zaroorat ke liye khana ek pak daman insaan ka fael (habit) hae

Mutaqi wa parhezgar, 'Abid' wa 'Zahed' log isliye khata hae ke itni taqat mi'le ki woh apni ibadat e ilmi aur amali ko puri karsake, na hi unko maze (taste) se koi matlab, aur na hi rang aur khushbu unko mutasir karti hae

Insaan ke Dil ko ziyada khane (overeating) se badhkar koi aur chez nuqsaan pohunchane wali nahi

Ziyada khana insaan mae do badi khrabiyaan paida karti hain, ek to insaan ko قسوة القلب saqt dil bana deti hae, Dill se rahem nikal deti hae, aur khaeshat mae هيجان haijan paida karti hae (uncontrollable sexual & other desires)

Insaan ka bhoka (hungry) rahna, woh mommin ke liye ادام (salan, dish) hae, bhooke rahna Rooh ki qiza (diet) hae, Dil ka khana (food) hae, aur badan (jism, body) ke liye Sahet ka zamin (guarantor) hae

Dawood Nabi ka qol hae ke khaesh rakhte huve bhi ek لقمة (morsel, nivala) chod dena mujhe ziyada pasand hae, banisbat bees (20) raat jaag kar ibadat mae guzarne ke

Nabi e kareem ki Hadees e mubarak hae ke mommin ek aant (intestine) mae khata hae, aur kafir saat (7) aant mae

Rasulullah ne farmaya tha ke do chezain mommin ke liye badi azmaesh ki hain, aur takleef de hain (mushkil mae aur imtehan mae dalna wali hain)

Jab Nabi se pucha gaya ke woh kiya hain? To aap ne farmaya woh paet aur sharamgaah hae (stomach & genitals)

Moulana Ali Ibn Abi Talib Salawatullah alahe farmate hae

اقلل طعامك تقلل سقاما، اقلل كلامك تامن ملاما

Tum apni qiza (khana) kam karo tumhare amraaz (diseases) khud baqud kam hojainge, aur tumhara kalaam (baat cheet) kam karlo tum logoan ki malamat (bura kehna) se bach jaoge

Aur aapka saqt jumla hae ke jis insaan ki fikar sirf paet mae jane wali chez tak agar ho to uski kimat (value) uske paet se kharij (nikalne) wali chez tak rahjaegi

Essa Masih alehe salaam ne kiya khoob farmaya hae ke, insaan ke Dil ke liye, uske Dil ki saqti se bura koi marz (disease) nahi, aur uske Nafs ke liye bhook (hunger) ko bardasht na karne ki qaslat se buri koi baat nahi, insaan ke bethasha (uncontolled) khane ki حرص hirs uske Nafs ko murda banadeti hae

Allah taala humko tawfeeq de ke hum jeene ke liye khae, khane ko apne zindagi ka maqsad na banae

Inshallah khane ke taluq se zikar aur bhi hae............

2/7/16, 10:40:43 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🍏🍊🍎🍈🍏🍎🍊🍈

السلام علیکم و رحمة الله و بركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

پہلی شب کی مبارکبادی قبول کیجئے

Zikar huva tha ke insaan ko kis maqsad ke liye khana, khana chahye,

Zikar karna hae ke insaan ki khana khate waqt zehani (mental) aur jismani kaifiyat kiya hona chahye

Sab se pehle to hamare zahen mae ye baat hona chahye ke jo taam (food) aaj hamare saamne hae woh Allah taala ki taraf se nazil kiya huva hae, Allah hi uska za'meen (responsible) hae, is baat per hum jitna bhi shukoor ada kare kam hae

Aur is baat per bhi shukoor ada kare ke hum ab is qabil aur sahet se hain ke us khane ko kha sakte hain, warna kitne log hain jo bimari, aur doosre wujuhaat ki bina per sab hi naematain moujud hone per bhi khana chak (taste) bhi nahi sakte  

Syedna wa Moulana Qazi un Nauman ne, jo Ahle Haq ki muqtalif shariat ki kitabain likhi hae irshad farmate hain

Khane per baithne wale ko sabse pehle to apne haath pani se dhona chahye, balkeh sirf itna hi nahi, aap farmate hae ko usko chahye ke apne mu ko, baalaun (hairs), nakhun (nails), balkeh apne tammam jism ko bhi saaf suthra rakhna chahye aur saath hi libaas ki safai ka bhi khyal rakhe

Insaan agar khane ke saamne baithe to ba'wiqar baithe, aur pu're sukoon wa itmenan se baithe, isiliye bade buzrug hamesha kehte hae ki ghuse ke aalam mae khana na khae, khane per ghussa na kare warna hazema (digistion) khrab hota hae  

Khane per kabhi bhi teka (back support) lag kar na baithe, aur na hi do zanu aur na hi char zanu (crossed leg) baithe, balkeh khane wale ko chahye ke woh seedhe paer (right leg) ko khada karde aur baye paer (left leg) ko litade yane zameen per modde (fold it inside) aur seedhe haath se khate huve baya (left) haath ko zameen per tek kar sahara lena nahi chahye, (should not recline with the support of left hand), majboori aur baat hae

Rasulullah ne laet kar, chahe apne paet (stomach) per, ye peeth (back) per khana khane saqti se mana farmaya hae

Rasulullah ka mashoor Qol hae ke mae ek Gulam ki tarah khana khate hun, (like a slave in front of his master), kehna ka maqsad ye hae ke khane ki puri izzat aur tazeem karna hae

Syedna Dai Gulam Hussain saheb muqaddas ka farmana hae ke tum khane ko zameen se kuch unchai per rakha karo

Khana woh Allah ki taraf se aya huva hae, aur khane wale aap hain, jaisa ke namaz se badhkar namaz ke auqat (timings) hae, kiyunke namaz aap padhte hain aur namaz ka waqt woh Allah taala ki taraf se muqrar hae, Isiliye waqt ki bahut ziyada ahmiyat hae, yehi misaal khane per bhi sadir aati hae (suits it)

Aap farmate hain, Rasulullah aur tammam Aima ka tariqa raha hae ke panch ungliun se hi khana khate the aur har mommin ko unki iteba (follow) karna hae

Aap farmate hae ki tum mutakabir (proud egoist) logoan ki tarah teen ungli se ya churi aur kaante (knife & fork) se khana mat khao, mutakabir, jabir wa zalim log apne haath se khana khane ko mayub, napasindada (bad manners) samajhte hae, Insaan ki rozi woh Allah taala ki taraf se hae uska ahteram Allah taala ka ahteram hae, yehi Rasulullah ki sunnat bhi hae, aur issi per har mommin ka amal hona chahye

Aap farmate hain ki mommin ko chahye ke apne saamne se hi khana le, haataun ko dur tak phelakar idhar udhar se na le, aur na hi plate ke tammam kone (corners) mae haath ya chamcha phirae ye ek bahut hi na pasandida fael (act) hae

Khana bahut ahtiyaat se khana chahye, khate huve doosre khane walaun ke mu ko, ya unke luqmaun (morsel) ko nahi takna (stare) chahye  

Khana khate huve ek doosre ko niwale na dena chahye na hi zabardasti karna chahye, aur na hi doosraun ke plate mae zabardasti dala jae, ya aur ziyada khane ke liye israr (pressure) kiya jae, balke har insaan ko baqaer takaluf (hesitation) ke apni adat aur zaroorat ke mutabiq khana chaye, takaluf karna ek bura kam hae, khususan agar aap kisi ke mehmaan ho, balkeh kisi Imam ka qol hae ke " Bhai ke saath mohabbat ka taqaza hae ke achi tarah khana khaya jae"

Ye Aulia Allah ke pas se aye huve hikmat ke aqwal hae, isme har ek ke liye be hisaab zahari fawaed hain, aur batini hikmat ke raaz chupe huve hae

Allah taala hum ko itni aqal de ke hum un batini hikmat ko samajh sake takeh hamara zaheri amal samajh kar ho, aur Dil se ho.

Khane ka abhi zikar aur bhi baqi hae, abhi to khana hi shru nahi huva...........

Haqeer ki guzarish hae ke messages forward na kare aur na Kisi group per dale

Shukriya

2/10/16, 10:15:31 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ا🍒🌽🍆🍅🍒🌽🍆🍅

لسلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Insaan ko khana shru karne se pehle  بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم  padhna chahye balkeh har kaam se pehle Bismillah kehna lazim hae

Moulana Ali Salwatullah alehe ne farmaya ke jisne "Bismillah" padhkar khana shru kiya, mae uske liye zamin (guarantor) hun ke woh khana usko koi takleef nahi pohunchaega aur na hi kisi kisim ki aziyaat (discomfort) hogi

Kisi aadmi ne Moula se kha ke mae ne khana shru karne se pehle "Bismillah" padha tha magar phir bhi takleef huvi, us waqt aap ne farmaya ke, "kiya to ne har nau (type, variety) ke khane per kha tha" ? to us ne kaha nahi, us waqt aap ne farmaya ke yehi wajeh hae ki tujhe takleef huvi

Yaqeen rakhiye ki "Bismillah" ki barkat se takleef dur hojati hae, aur agar takleef hoti hae to uske aur bahut se doosre asbab (reasons) hosakte hain, jaise ke chori ka khana ho, ya usme koi haram jis ho, ya Dil mae Iqlas na ho,Bismillah padhte huve bhi Allah per tawakul (bhrosa) na karna, waqera waqera,..

Khana seedhe haath se khana chahye, baye haath ka istemal na kare

Imam e Jafar e Sadiq ne khane per phook marne ki ijazat di hae jab ke koi akela kha raha hae aur khud ke khane per phook raha ho to, agar aur log maujud ho to na kare to behter hae, logoan ko karahiyat (discomfort, repulsion) hosakti hae

Rasulullah ne khane ke darmiyan baat karne se mana farmaya hae, agar koi halki phulki muqtasar (brief) baat hoti ho to koi musaeqa nahi (ijazat hae)

Rasulullah ne uper, uper se, achi achi chezain nikal kar alag khane ko napasand kiya hae, Rasulullah sirf ache khajoor ko talash karte aur chun, chun, kar khate aur yehi mommin ka bhi amal hona chahye

Rasulullah hamesha farmate ke piyala mae lagi huvi aakhri khane ki chez mae badi barkat hae, aap bartan ko hamesha saaf kardete aur bacha huva khana salaan (dish) pura khatam karte

Hadees e mubarak hae  

آخر الصحف البركة

Aap farmate ke jisne bartan ko saaf kiya usper farishte durood bhejte hain aur unki rozi mae barkat wa kushadgi hoti hae

Issi tarah peene ki chez chahe woh pani ho, ya doodh, ya sharbat ho, usme se thoda sa aakhir mae chod dena saqt napasand kiya gaya hae, agar chai ki pati ya koi aur chez jem jae to usko chod dene mae koi baat nahi  

Pani ko ahista ahista chus chus kar teen ghunt (gulps) mae peena chahye aur har ghunt ke shru me Bismillah kehna hae aur har ghunt ke aakhir ma alhamdulillah kehna hae, aur doodh ke liye hukum hae ke tezi se jaldi jaldi pi jae  

Rasulullah khane ke dauran pani pine ko pasand na karte aur farmate ke khana khane ke baad pani pina chahye, magar zaroorat ke tehet darmiyan mae pi'ne ki ijazat bhi di hae

Aap khane ke baad apne ungliun ko chuste the aur tammam khane ki chez jo ungli per lagi hae chus kar saaf karte the, aur is hadd tak chuste ke chusne ki awaaz tak sunai deti, ye amal Allah taala ke liye tawazu, inkesar,i wa aajisi ke ishar ke liye hae, aur isme khane ki tazeem bhi hae

Aap khane ko achi tarah chaba (chew) kar khate aur jab tak ke ek niwala halaq (throat) mae uter na jae doosra na lete

Aap gosht (meat) ko dant se todne ki ijazat di hae, uske siwae roti ya aur koi khane ki chez ko dant (teeth) se katarne mana farmaya hae, jo hum aam tor per aksar khate hain jaise sandwich, burgers, pizzas, samosas, Allah hum'me maaf kare, humko ahtiyat karna chahye takeh shariat ki pabandi ho'sake

Khane ke baad duaon ki bahut si ri'wayat aye hae, magar sab se zaroori woh Allah taala ka shukur ada karna hae, bulund awaaz الحمدلله Alhamdulillah kehna hae, aur agar mehmaan ho to mezbaan ka shukriya ada karna chahye, uski rozi mae barkat ki dua karna chahye

Insaan ke khane mae sab se zaroori baat woh nafasat (neat clean and in a decent  manner) hae, har insaan ko ye khyal rakhna hae ke uske atraaf doosre log bhi moujud hain, Allah, Rasul ke ahkamaat ke saath usko hamesha ye khyal rakhna chahye ke saath baitne walaun ko takleef na ho karaihiyat (discomfort) na mehsoos ho

Walid e muqaddus bahut hi nafasat se khana khate the aur hum bachaun ko khane ke adaab ki bahut ziyada takid farmate, khususan khane mae agar mu se awaaz hoti to aap saqt naraz hojate, issi tarah chai peene mae kabhi "sur...sur" awaaz hoti to aap bahut hi napasand karte aur mana farmate

Aap mezbaan (host) ke saamne ye kehna bahut napasand karte, ke mujhe ye khane ki chez napasand hae, ya, ye is chez se parhez hae, aap kehte ke tum kuch chakh lo (taste it, have a small portion) warna dawat dene wala itni mehnat se banaya hae uska Dil tut jaega, bura lage ga, (he will be hurt) issi tarah ye zikar karne se bhi mana karte ke uske saamne ye khe ke ye khana (dishes) falan, falan (so and so person) ke pas is'se bahut ziyada acha aur lazeez banta hae, ye bahut mayub baat hae, aisa nahi karna chahye

Aap farmate ke insaan ko khana khate agar dekh lo to uska pura kirdaar (character) saamne ajata hae

walid farmate ke bachaun ko, Maa Baap ne kaisi tarbiyat ki hae agar dekhna chahte ho to unko khana khate huve dekh lo

Allah taala walid e Muqaddus, Hazrat Ziaali saheb per Rehmat farmaye aur hum per aapke nazrat jari rakhe

Inshallah khane ka zikar hota rahega

Ye deen ke usul ahkamaat hain, in sab ke peeche badi science hae, bahut hikmat chuppi hae, ye bahut scientific aur logical hain,in ko hargis halka na khyal karna,

Duniya ke tor tariqe, etiquettes aur manners, customs aur traditions hain jisme logic aur hikmat ho bhi sakti hae, aur nahi bhi hosakti hae, usse hum ko inkar bhi nahi magar jahan deen ke usul moujud ho to deen ko awaliat aur afzaliat hae

Yaqinan ek roz duniya bhi in usulaun (laws) ko science ke tajrube se tasleem karegi aur apnaegi

وما توفيقى الا بالله العلي العظيم

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Zikar huva tha ke insaan ko kis liye, kab, aur kaise khana, khana chahye

Zikar karna hae ke mommin ko kiya khana chahye,

Hadees e mubarak hae

مثل المومن كمثل النحلة لا تأكل الا طيبا ولا تضع إلا طيبا

Mommin ki misaal shahed ki makhi ki tarah hae, jo achi pak saaf khushbudaar chez khati hae, aur waisi hi saaf shafaf pakeezah chez tayar karti hae, (shahed, honey) jiske liye Koran e kareem kehta hae usme logoan ke liye 'shifa' hae

Issi wajeh se Moulana Ali ka ek buzrug laqab "أمير النحل Ameer un Nahal" hae, yane shahed ki makhi ke Ameer (leader)

Isiliye mommin bahut chun, chun ke achi aur faida mand chez khata hae, apne khane mae bahut ahtiyat karta hae

Insaan jo qiza (food) khata hae woh na sirf uske jism ka hissa banti hae, balkeh uski tammam quwatain jaise uski soch, fikar, khyalaat, nazriye, khaeshat sab hi ussi qiza ka hi natija hae, isiliye insaan ko sirf halal, haram ka hi nahi balkeh apni tabiyat, mausam, halaat, moqa wa umar ko dekhkar khana chahye

Moulana Ali farmate hain ke us khane mae bahut ziyada barkat hoti jisme ziyada haath hote hain, isiliye har ghar ke bade (elder) ko chahye ke ke apne tammam ahel wa ayal ko khane per saath leker baithe, is baat se khane mae barkat hogi aur khana khraab bhi nahi hoga

Khana shru karne se pehle بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم  kehne ke baad namak chakhna chahye jiske liye Rasulullah ka qol hae ke namak ke chakhne se 72 bimariyaan dur hojati hae jisme juzaam aur bars bhi hae (leprosy etc)

Hadees e shareef hae

سيدالإدام الملح

Salan ka Syed woh namak hae, kiyunke namak se hi asal mazah (taste) hae

Rasulallah garam khana, khane se mana farmaya hae ke usme barkat nahi hoti hae, aur shaitaan bhi usme shareek hota hae

Rasulullah ka irshad hae ke khane ka sardar woh gosht hae, jis tarah ke tammam pi'ne ki chezaun ka sardar pani hae, aur har mommin ko 40 roz mae ek waqt kaise bhi gosht khana chahye warna uski tabiyat mae khrabi paida hojaegi

Imam Mohammed ibne Baqaer farmate hae ke gosht se sun'ne aur dekh'ne ki quwat bhi badhti hae

Imam e Jaffar e Sadiq farmate hae ki Ambia mae se kisi ek Nabi ko, jab unhune Allah taala se kamzoori ki shikayat kiye to unper وحي wahi huvi ke tum gosht ko doodh mae pakaw (cook) aur khao, unhune waise hi kiya aur unki kamzoori dur hogai

Rasulullah ka irshad hae jo "Daem ul Islam" mae moujud hae

لحم البقر داء، وسمنها شفاء، ولبنها دواء

 gae (cow) ka gosht  داء marz (illness) hae aur uske ghee mae Shifa hae, aur uska doodh dawa hae, aur uske ghee ke muqabil koi chez nahi jo ek insaan ke paet mae jati ho

Rasulullah ka farmana hae ke behtreen salan woh خل vinegar hae

Hadees e shareef hae

نعم الادام الخل

Sirka acha salan hae, aur issi tarah Rasul e kareem ne zaitoon ke tel ke liye bhi farmaya hae, aap ka farmana hae ke jis ghar mae Sirka hoga woh ghar kabhi bhi salan ka mohtaj na hoga, Sirka talqi (bitterness, badmazgi) ko dur karta hae aur Dil ko zindagi baqshta hae (rejuvenates), vinegar bahut hi ba'barkat chez hae

Imam e Jafare Sadiq ko dekha gaya hae ke aap gosht ko todkar sirke (vinegar) aur zaet (olive oil) mae duba kar khate the, jab logoan ne tajub se aap se pucha to aap ne kha ke hum Aal e Mohammed aur tammam Ambia issi tarah khate hain

Moulana Ali ibn abi Talib ko aur Rasulullah ko Kaddu (bottle gourd) bahut pasand tha aur aapka irshad hae ke kaddu aqal wa damagh ko tez (sharp) aur isafa karta hae

Rasulullah ka irshad hae ke jo shaqs bhi apni roz marah (day to day life) ki zindagi mae aetedal (balance) rakhta hae, miyana ravi rakhta hae, yane ek darmiyani raaste per chalta hae to Allah taala usko rozi zaroor ata karta hae, aur jo insaan israaf karta hae, fasul kharji karega Allah taala yaqinan uski rozi se usko mahrum kardega

Imam e Jafar e Sadiq ne farmaya hae ke khane mae israaf (ziyadati, waste) na karna chahye, irshad e bari taala hae

.

 ثُمَّ لَتُسْأَلُنَّ يَوْمَئِذٍ عَنِ النَّعِيمِ

 Phir Tum se naimataun ke bare mae pucha jaega, yane tum ko jo qiza khane pine ki Allah taala ne baqshi thi uske ba're mae tum se zaroor sawal kiya jaega

Allah taala ne humko duniya ki be hisaab naematain ata ki hae, chand (few) hi chezaun se humko roka hae, haram kiya hae, aur woh bhi hamari hi behteri ke liye, magar hum aise nadaan (Bewaquf) hain jo rukte hi nahi, na Halal se paet bhra hae na hi.......

Hadees e shareef hae

ولا يملأ جوف ابن آدم الا التراب

Insaan ke paet (stomach) ko, siwae mitti (mud) ke koi aur chez nahi bhar sakti

Yane insaan ki uski maut ke baad hi khane ki hirs kam hogi

Khana ke zikar to abhi shru huva hae, zikar hota rahega................

2/16/16, 12:28:01 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🍇🌽🍉🍑🍇🌽🍉🍑

 السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

الحمدلله الذي جعل رزقي في يده لم يجعله في أيدي الناس

Allah taala ka 'Hamd' hae ke usne meri risq ko apne haath mae rakha hae, logoan ke haath mae nahi diya

عليك بتقوى الله أن كنت غافلا

يأتيك بالارزاق من حيث لا تدري

Ae insaan tujh per Allah taala ka taqwa (parhezgari) wajib hae agar to qafil hae

Arre Allah risq ko khench kar laega jahan se to guman (khyal) bhi nahi karsakta  

فكيف تخاف الفقر والله رازقا

فقد رزق الطير والحوت في البحر

Tu rozi ke liye kiyu khoof khata hae jab ke Allah taala tera raziq (provider) hae

Bas woh rozi deta hae aasmaan mae udne wale parindaun (birds) ko aur samandar ki taernewali machliyun (fishes) ko

ومن ظن ان الرزق يأتي بقوة

ما أكل العصفور شياء مع النسر

Tum Agar ye khyal karte ho ke tumhari risq tum apni quwat se hasil karte ho to phir chidya (sparrow) kabhi bhi cheel (eagle) ke hote huve kuch bhi kha nahi sakti   

Har musalmaan ka ye buniyaadi aqeeda hona chahye aur hota bhi hae ke risq dena Allah taala ke haath mae hae,

Zikar ho raha tha ke Rasulullah aur ahle baet e kiraam ko kiya khana pasand tha

Rasulullah farmate hain ke tum masoor ki dal (red lentil) khaya karo woh dil ko naram banati hae aur aansuaun (tears) ko ziyada karti hae

Moulana Ali farmate hae ke tum Anar ko uske chilke (inner membrane) ka saath khao woh paet ko masboot banata hae, aur ye ke har Anar mae jannat ke ek dana hota hae, agar usme se kuch gir bhi jae to usko utha kar khalo, aur aap jab Anar khate to pura khate usme kisi ko shareek nahi karte aur farmate ke jiske paet mae Anar jaega woh shaitaan ke waswase (bhekane) se dur hojata hae

Rasulullah ne ek waqt 'Safarjal' (Quince fruit) khaya aur Hazrat Jafar bin Abi Talib ko diya aur farmaya ke usko khao safarjal Dil ko pakeezah karta hae aur buzdil (coward) ko bhadur (brave) bana deta hae

[SAFARJAL quince fruit is from family of Apple & Pears, bright golden when ripe, native of Iran & Turkey, usually cooked]

Rasulullah se badbudaar  (strong smell) wali tarkari khane ke liye pucha gaya to aap ne farmaya ke khane mae koi haraj nahi magar piyaz, lahsan, (onion & garlic) waqera kha kar masjid na jae kiyunke uski badbu (smell) se doosre namaziun ko takleef hogi

Imam e Jafar e Sadiq ne farmaya ke Rasulullah ko khushk (dried) 'Angoor' (raisins) aur 'Anjeer' (dried fig) bahut pasand the

Rasulullah 'tamar' khajoor ko be inteha pasand karte khususan 'Ajwa' khajoor aur farmate ki ye jannat ka mewa (fruit) hae

Imam e Jafar e Sadiq farmate hain ke Rasulullah ko 'Falooda' bahut pasand tha aur kabhi kabhi Faloode farmaesh karte magar kehte ke kam banao aur aap bahut kam lete

Aap Shakar (sugar) khairaat karte aur jab uski wajeh puchi gai to aap ne farmaya ke khane ki chezaun mae mujhe Shakar bahut ziyada pasand hae, aur mae woh chez khairaat karna pasand karta hun jo mujhe sab se ziyada pasand hae jaisa ki koran kehte hae

"Tum neki ko hargis hasil nahi karsakte jab tak ke tum apni sab se ziyada azeez (pasandida) chez ko khairaat na kardo"

Imam e Jafar e Sadiq ne ek waqt ek mewe (fruit) ko dekha jo raaste mae padha huva tha aur barabar khaya nahi gaya tha aap us waqt logoan per bahut naraz huve aur farmaya ke agar tumhare paet bhra huva to kiya, bahut se aise log hain jo bhuke aur hajatmand hote hae unko khila diya karo

Rasulullah ne Roti ko jaanwaraun ki tarah sunghne (smell) se saqti se mana farmaya hae, aur roti ko knife se katne bhi mana farmaya hae (ye hukum shaed hum jab luqma (morsel) lete hain us waqt ke liye hoga Allah hi behter janta hae)

Hadees e shareef hae ke tum Allah per rozi ke liye aisa bhrosa rakho jis tarah rakhna chahye, to phir Allah taala tum ko is tarah rozi dega jis tarah woh parindaun ko rozi deta hae, jaise ke woh roz subah khali paet (empty stomach) ghoslaun (nest) se jate hain aur paet bhar kar sham mae wapis ate hain

Ae Allah taala meri Risq ko ziyada kar aur halal pak wa saaf risq ata farma jahan se mae gumaan (umeed, expect) karta hun aur wahan se bhi jahan se mae gumaan bhi nahi karsakta hun (from unexpected source)

Zikar huva tha Rasulullah aur Aulia Allah ka, ke woh kiya khate the aur kiya khana pasand farmate the

Rasulullah ne farmaya ke "Sareed" arabaun ka khana hae (Shaed gud 'jaggary' mae Roti churi jati hae) sabse pehle Sareed banane wale woh Khaleelullah Hazrat Ibrahim alehe salaam the

Rasulullah "Hashima" ko bhi pasand farmate, roti ko shorbe mae chur dete the aur 'Hashima' sabse pehle Rasulullah ke ajdad mae se hi Janab e Hashim ne banaya tha ussi liye "Hashima" naam padha

 Moulana Ali ibn abi Talib "Hindaba" yane "Kasni" ki bahut tareef farmate the aur farmaya tha ke 'Kasni' ke har Pette (leaves) mae jannat ke pani ka ek khatra zaroor hota hae

Kasni (Chicory herb, light & dark green leaves with small blue flowers)

Rasulullah salallahu alehe wa sallam ko khulfe ki bhaji (Purslane, also known as hogweed or pigweed) bahut pasand thi aap farmate ke usme barkat hae

Rasulullah ka qol hae ke "الكرفش" "Ajwaan" (carom seed, Bishop weed) woh Ambia ki sabzi hae

Moulana Ali farmate hain ke tum khane se pehle aur khane ke baad اترج Atraj khaya karo kiyunke Rasulullah bhi aisa kiya karte the

Atraj اترج "Etroj" is a citrus fruit like lemon also known as golden apple & persian apple, it's a sacred fruit of Jews eaten during 'Sukoot' festival

Wasaya e Nabi jo moulana Ali ko aap ne nasihat  farmaya hae usme Moulana Ali ne Rasulullah se pucha ke Ae Allah ke Rasul العرم (Armu) kiya hae jisko aapne khane ka hukum diya hae aur القفر (Khafru) kiya hae jiske khane se aap ne mana farmaya hae

Rasulullah ne irshad farmaya "Armu" woh Roti ka chura hae jo khate waqt dastarkhan per gir jata hae aur "Khafaru" woh jo dant (tooths) ke beech mae khana phas jata hae usko tooth pick ya ungli ya koi aur chez se nikalte hain

Agar koi shaqs khane ki chez jo teeths mae stuck hojati hae woh zabaan se nikalta hae to woh kha sakta hae magar agar tooth pick ya koi bhi aur external chez se nikalta hae to usko bilkul nahi khana chahye woh deen mae mana hae

Kisi aur muqam per Moula ne farmaya hae ke insaan ke paet mae sabse achi chez jo jati hae woh dastarkhan per gira huva roti ka chura hae aur sabse khraab chez jo insaan ke paet mae jati hae woh khana hae jo insaan tooth pick se ya ungli se nikal kar phir usko wapis kha leta hae

Hazrat Ali ke saamne ek waqt Falooda laya gaya, aap ne uske bartan aur uski sajawat ko qor se dekha, aur phir usme ek ungli dalkar nikali aur ungli ko mu mae dalkar chusa, phir farmaya ke ye meetha aur bahut umda hae magar mae is baat ko napasand karta hun ke mae apne jism ko aisi chezaun ka aadi karu jiska aadi mera jism nahi, bas tum is ko utha lejao (aap seedhe sade khane pasand karte fancy gourmet food khana pasand nahi karte aur uski adat karna bhi nahi chahte)

Moulana Ali ne farmaya ki jis kisi ne Roti ka tukda raaste per pada dekha aur agar usne usko saaf karke koi saaf suthra unchi hifazat ki jagaah rakhdiya to uski ek neki Allah taala likh dega aur ek neki ka sawab 10 guna (times) hae

Imam e Ali e Zainulabideen ek waqt hammam mae dakhil huve to ek khajoor ko wahan gira huva dekhe aap usko utha liye aur Gulam ko diye, Gulam ne usko saaf karke kha liya, aap itni baat se itne khush huve ke usko azad kardiya

اور خدا ایک بستی کی مثال بیان فرماتا ہے کہ (ہر طرح) امن چین سے بستی تھی ہر طرف سے رزق بافراغت چلا آتا تھا۔ مگر ان لوگوں نے خدا کی نعمتوں کی ناشکری کی تو خدا نے ان کے اعمال کے سبب ان کو بھوک اور خوف کا لباس پہنا کر (ناشکری کا) مزہ چکھا دیا

Qor talab hae ke Aaj hamare dastarkhan ka kiya haal hota hae, kitni be hisaab naematain hoti hae, kitna khana khraab hota hae, Allah taala ki pakad badi saqht hae, hum ko is baat ka ahsaas karna chahye

Rasulullah ne to ek waqt mae itne muqtalif kisim ke khane, khane ko napasand farmaya hae Ali ne to Falooda khane se ruk gaye aur aaj hum unke naam lene walaun ki kiya qiza hae, is baat ka ahsaas hum sabko bahut shidat ke saath karna chahye

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

12 Jamadil Awal aaj se do roz qabal youme Jumua Syedna Dai Hasan bin Syedna Hibatullah bin Syedna Ibrahim bin Syedna Mohammed bin Fahad ka youm e wafat gaya

Aapki paedaesh 1114 hijri Najran mae huvi, aur inteqal 75 saal ki umar mae 1189 mae shahadat se huvi aur aap Dahza Mashad mae dafan kiye gae

Syedna Hibbathullah ke Syedna Hasan ke alawa teen aur farzand the, Syedna Ismail bin Hibatullah Dai munfareed huve, Syedna Ali bin Hibatullah Qaer munfareed the, aur ek farzand the Syedna Jafar bin Hibatullah qaer munfareed huve

Aap ek Azeem Dai the, agarche aap Dai ki haisiyat se 5 saal rahe magar Dawat ki aur Duwaat ki aap ne bahut azeem khidmat kiye

Aap ne teen Dai, Syedna Mohammed bin Ismail, Syedna Hibatullah bin Ibrahim jo aapke walid the aur Syedna Ismail bin Hibatullah jo aapke bade bhai the ka zamana dekha aur unki khidmat ki

Aapki ziyada ter taleem aapke buzrug bhai Syedna Ali bin Hibatullah ke pass huvi

Aapki waleda Alhurra Al Alema Khadija bin Hussain bin Syedna Jafar bin Syedna Sulaiman Saheb thi

Aap ne zayedi mazhab ke logoan ke muqable bahut si jungaon mae hissa liya aur aksar aapko kamiyabi hasil huvi

Aap ne Dawat ke aala haqaeq wa doosre uloom per bahut si kitabain bhi tasneef (authored) ki hae jo taqreeben 30 hain, jinme ek kitab mae Rasulullah ke Ahadees "Shahab un Nabawi" ke haqaeq bayan farmaya hae

Aap behtreen shaer the aur be hisaab aap ne ashar muqtalif moqaun per, muqtalif halaat mae farmae hain

1156 jab aapki umar 42 saal thi aap bahut saqt bimar huve, aapko halaq (Throat aur food pipe) mae ulcers hogae the har kisim ka ilaj karwae magar tammam tabib (Doctors) mayus hogae, us waqt aap ne 114 Baet (stanza) ki munajaat ke zareeyeh tawasul liye aur Allah taala se Dua maange jiska pehla shaer ye hae

سياتي غياث الله من حيث لا ندري

Ankareeb (in near future) Allah taala ki maddad aegi wahan se jahan se humko ilm nahi, Allah taala ne aapki Dua qabool ki aur aapko kuli shifa naseeb huvi

Aapke walid Syedna Hibatullah bin Ibrahim ka inteqal 1160 mae huva jab ke aap Haj per gae huve the aur aapko unka deedar naseeb na hosake, uske baad aapke buzrug Bhai Ismail bin Hibatullah Dai huve

Aapke waqaet be hisaab hae jinka zikar mumkin nahi

1185 mae aapke ek farzand Syedna Abbas ki bhi jung mae 45 saalki ki umar mae shahadat huvi jo bade zabardast aalim the aur itlaq mil chuka tha

Syedna Hasan bin Hibatullah ki aulad mae aapke Farzand Syedna Ahmed bhi Dai qaer munfareed huve jinka inteqal 1223 mae huva

 aapke pote Syedna Ismail bin Mohammed Dai huve aur unke farzand Syedna Ahmed bin Ismail bhi Dai huve, goya aapka pura khaandan hi Duwaat ka khaandan tha

Aapke bhai Syedna Ismail bin Hibatullah ka 1184 Hijri mae inteqal hone ke baad Syedna Hasan bin Hibatullah Dai e munfareed huve

Walid e Muqaddus ne apne hijrat (taleem e deeni ke liye Dai ki hazrat mae jana) ke roz namche (diary, travelogue) mae ek bahut hi dilchasp Syedna Hasan ki karamat ka zikar farmaya hae, jo Syedna Ali bin Hussain Almakrami ne aapko bayan farmaya tha

Aap ne farmaya ke Syedna Hasan bin Hibatullah se ek bahut badi karamat Rasulullah ke Roze shareef mae pesh ayi thi

Syedna Dai ek waqt hamare Arab Yami ikhwan ke saath Medine Munawara, Rasul e Maqbool Mohammed e Mustafa salwatullah alehe ki ziyarat ke liye roze Nabi per tashreef le gae

Us waqt aap ne Wahan ke darbaan (guard) se kha ke tu hujre (room) Nabi, jahan Rasul e kareem dafan hae woh khol de takeh aap ziyarat karsake

Hum sab ko ye baat malum hae ke kisi badshah ke liye bhi woh kamra nahi kholte hain, woh chowkidar is sawal per hairat mae padh gaya.

Syedna Dai ne usko kha ke ye mere dada "Rasulullah" ki khabar e shareef hae aur to uska darwaza kholde

Woh chowkidar ne aapka mazaaq udate huve haste huve kha "agar woh aap ke dada hain to aap khud kiyu nahi khol lete"

Us waqt Syedna Dai Hasan bin Hibatullah josh mae aagae aur farmaya "dekh ab mujhe kaunsi taqat mere dada ki ziyarat se rok sakti hae"

Us waqt aap ne filbadi (extempore) arabi mae madhe (tareef) e Nabi mae ek shaandar Qasida (verses in praise) padha

Idhar aapka qasida khatam huva aur aapne jhuk kar khuful (lock) ko chuma jo bahut hi bada tha, saalaun (many years) se nahi khula (open) tha, aapke chumte hi khuful khul kar zameen per gir pada

Us waqt aap لبيك "labaek" khekar, aur "As'salaam ya jaddi Rasulullah" Salaam ho aap per ae mere dada Rasul e kareem kehte huve tammam apne saathiyaun ke saath hujre, khabre Rasul mae dakhil hogae, sab hi ziyarat e Nabi se musharaf huve, aur foran laut gae

Chowkidar aur tammam log hairat mae pereshan the ke kiya huva, aur kaise huva, aur uske baad ek zamane tak is baat ka charcha aam logoan mae hote hi raha.

Walid e muqaddus woh munajaat likh kar laye hain bahut hi baleeq (eloquent) shandaar munajaat hae, jisme Rasul khuda, ke maratib, darjat aur khususiyat ka zikar hae, jinme bahut hi unche (high) haqaeq wa raaz poshida hain

Aapki ek munajaat Sahife mae bhi moujud hae, jo "Ranj wa Ghum", (sorrow & sadness) ko dur karne ke liye aur kushadgi ke liye hae ye munajaat 'muqamus' hae (five versed), jo ke Moulana Ali ki munajaat أن الامور per aapne apne 3 shaer ka isafa kiya hae is tarah har bandh mae 5 lines hain

Aapki  ek munajaat hamare manaseeb aksar Shab e Qadar mae padhte hain, jo moulana Ali ki fazilat wa tareef mae hae jiska pehla shaer ye hae

ناد عليا مظهر العجأءب

تجده عونالك في نواءب

Moulana Ali ko nida do (pukaro) jo ajeeb wa ghreeb bataun (unusual) ko zaher karne wale hain

Tum Moulana Ali ko har mamle mae madadgar paoge

Aapke bhetije Syedna Dai Abdullah bin Syedna Ali ne aapke inteqal ke baad aapki shaan mae 108 Shaer farmaye hain, jisme aapki sahi marefat karwaya hae

Allah taala aapko muqaddus farmaye aur aapke nazraat hum sab per jari rakhe

2/23/16, 11:31:17 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🌿🌿🌿🌿🌿🌿🌿🌿

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Jamaat e Sulaimani mae ustad bahut se huve, aur Jamaat mae teaching profession bahut common bhi raha hae, aaj bhi bahut se log teachers, lecturers, aur professors hain

Hamare Deeni madaris (plural of madresa) mae jo ustad taleem dete hain, unki taleem kuch aur hi hoti hae woh hamari zindagi ki mukamil rahnumai karti hae jo hamari roz marah ki duniya ki zindagi, deen wa aakherat sab hi ko behter aur kamiyab banati hae

Hum agar us me'yaar (standard) ke ustadaun ka shummar (count) kare jiska hum aksar aaj bhi zikar sunte hain to sab se pehle mere zahen mae Moulvi Yakoob Ali saheb ka khyal ata hae jo 1305 Hijri mae Ahmedabad mae qaem  kiye madrese "Ahmediya" ke ustad e aala wa sarparast (headmaster, administrator) ek lambe waqt tak rahe

Issi tarah Hazrat Moulana Fathullah saheb bhi bahut saalaun tak madrese "Fakhriya" ke sarparast (in charge) rahe aur khud bhi taleem dete the

Hazrat Moulana Mohammed Hussain saheb Anjuman e Islam school Bambai mae teacher rahe,

Hazrat Moulana Shakir saheb muqaddas bhi urdu girls school mae Farsee zabaan ki taleem dete the,

Raas ul Hudood Moulvi Mohammed Abbas Saheb muqaddas ek bahut lambi muddat Nampally urdu school Hyderabad mae ustad ki haisiyat se qidmat ki, unke alawa, jamaat ke naamwar ustad mae Mulla Gowhar Ali saheb bhi the jo 6 saal Zanzibar Africa mae Farsee ke teacher rahe, Moulvi Akbar Saifullah saheb bhi hain, jo na sirf bahut logoan ke ustad rahe hain balkeh aaj bhi aapki aulad, aur aapke khandaan ke aksar afraad deeni taleem dete hain

Baaz ustad apni aala khidmat ki wajeh se aur jo unhune naamwar shagird paida kiye, ek numaya (Unique) haisiyat aur naam paida kiye aur aaj bhi yaad kiye jate hain

Aaj ek khaas ustad ka mae zikar karna chahta hun jo apne padhane ke behtreen andaz aur naamwar (well known) shagirdaun (students) se mashoor hain

JANAB SHUJAUDDIN JIVABHAI SUFI SAHEB jo aam tor per "Sufi saheb" se maruf the, Kaha jata hae ke aap Bambai ke rahne wale the aur Hazrat Moulana Ziaali saheb muqaddus se bahut unsat thi, Hazrat ke kehne per Hyderabad aakar basaya (settled) aur madrese "Fakhriya" mae ustad muqrar huve

Aapki ilmi qabiliyat bahut hi maroof thi, aap Angrezi, Urdu aur Farsee ke bahut zabardast maher the aur behtreen ustad gine jaate the, aapke ke pas kitabaun ka bahut bada khazana (collection) moujud tha

خير أمتي علمائها

Rasulullah ka qol hae ke mere ummat ke sab se behter log uske uloma hain

Bambai mae aap governor ko urdu padhane per muqarar the, aur uske alawa bade bade log aapke shagird (students) rah chuke the

Aap Hyderabad aane ke baad dars wa tadreees (imparting knowledge) mae mashqul (busy) hogaye madrese Fakhriya ke alawa aap madresa AIZA, jo us zamane ka Hyderabad ka mashoor school tha uske ustad bhi muqrar huve

Shujuauddin Sufi saheb ki Madrese mae jo qadar, izzat, wa ahteram tha uske kuch waqeat bayan karna hae

1939 mae "Madrese Aiza" ko reorganise kiya ja raha tha, us waqt management ne ye decision liya ke jinke pas degrees nahi hain unko hata diya jae

Janab Sufi saheb ke pas woh degrees nahi the jinki us waqt ustad ke liye zaroorat thi, Sufi Saheb ko school se nikale ja'ne ki notice di gai to aap ne us notice hi mae angrezi (english) aur urdu dono drafts mae ghaltiyaun nikaldi, aur likh bheja keh mere pas koi sanad (degree) nahi hae

Aap ne, na hi koi sifarish (request) ki, aur na hi kuch dil per asar (affect) liye balkeh apne padhane mae mashqul hogaye

School management ki meeting mae jab unka case discussion ke liye aya tab school administrator Nawab Sir Nizamat Jung bhadur (a nobleman & a scholar of English, whose Engish library in Hyderabad was world renowned) ne farmaya, ke mujhe be inteha khushi hoti hae ke hamare school mae ek azeem aalim ustad maujud hae, jinke saamne hazaraun ustad kagaz ke purze (pieces of paper) hain, Sufi Saheb ka ilmi rutba unki haisiyat aur unka ahteram itna ziyada hae keh unki ye unique position ke wajeh se unki tanqah (salary) unki ta'hayat (lifelong) manzoor kardi jae, aur madrese mae aane aur jaane ke waqt ki pabandi unper se utha di jae, woh jab chahe school aaye aur jab unki marzi ho ghar jae, aur unki salary ghar bhej di jae, tammam committee members ne is baat ko bahut hi khushi se manzoor karliya

Rasulullah ki Hadees hae

إن الفتنة تجي فتنسف العباد نفسا ينجوالعالم منها بعلمه

Aasmaesh bandaun per ati hain aur unko khatam kardeti hae, magar aalim apne Ilm ki wajeh se najat pajata hae

Issi tarah retirement ke baad pension hogai thi, halaat kuch bahut ache nahi the, ek waqt aap bimar hogae aur aapko Osmania General Hospital mae admit kiya gaya tha, us waqt, hospital ke superintendent doctor Hyder Ali Khan staff ke saath round per aaye to apne ustad e mohtaram ko achanak dekh kar apna sar aapke khadmaun per rakhdiya aur phir aap ke liye hospital mae qususi intezamat (special arrangements) farmaye

Issi tarah ka waqea (incident) hae ke NAWAB ALI YAWAR JUNG jo Bambai ke governor bhi rah chuke hain, aap se milne Husaini Alam mae Farhat bagh ke makan mae tashreef lae jahan Sufi saheb rahte the, nawab saheb ke aane ki khabar sunkar Sufi saheb be'chain hogae, nawab saheb se kaha ke aap mujhe bula lete takleef kiyu kiye, aapko mere paas bithane ki jagaah bhi nahi hae, us waqt Janab Ali Yawar Jung ex vice chancellor Aligarh Muslim university, ex Governor Maharashtra ne kha

"ustad saheb aapki jutiyu (shoes) ke pas baithna hi mere liye bahut badi saadat aur faqar (privilege) ki baat hae"

Hazrat Ishak saheb muqaddus bhi apne school ke zamane mae aapke pas English sikhne ke liye jate the

Bambai mae aapke ek bhai, Abdul Husain Saheb Zaki the jinhune dawat ki bahut si kitabae naqal (copy) ki hae,

Sufi saheb ki tammam aulad Pakistan migrate ki, aur Sufi saheb ki Dua se, tammam aulad ne deen wa duniya mae kamiyabi hasil ki, aapke ek farzand Mulla Alhaj Fida Husain Saheb marhum Karachi ke Aamil bhi the

Shujuauddin Sufi saheb ka inteqal hyderabad mae Hazrat Ishak saheb muqaddus ke zamane mae 14 Jamadil Aakher 1369 Hijri mae taqreeben 70 saal ki umar mae huva, do roz qabal aapka inteqal ka din tha

Allah taala marhum ko rehmat aur maqferat kare

Moulana Ali ne farmaya tha

العلماء باقون ما بقي الدهر

Uloma baqi rahinge jab tak zamana baqi rahega  

Ye mazmoon 2 saal pehle

 aapke inteqal ki tariq per aapki yaad mae likha gaya tha

🌿🌿🌿🌿🌿🌿🌿🌿

2/25/16, 11:29:12 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ▪▫▪▫▪▫▪▫▪▪

السلام علیکم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

جمعة مبارك 🌹

Muqtalif ra'wiyun se ye riwayat ayi hae (many historians have quoted) ke Ameer ul Momineen Moulana Ali ibne Abi Talib Salawatullah alehe ne ek hi dophar (afternoon) mae apne Ashaab (companion) ko zindagi ke 400 ahem adaab sikhae

Ye awaam un naas, Shia Hazraat ke pas "Ahadees e Ameer ul Momineen Ali" kehlate hain aur كتب الاربعماية" Kutub e Arabmiyaan" yaane 400 adaab ki kitab bhi kehte hain

Hamare paas bhi Duwaat ne in adaab ko kafi quote kiya hae aur Syedna Dai Faiz e Ali bin Syedna Sulaiman ne apni mashoor kitab

  إسعاف الطالب في جميع المطالب

 mae kuch 200 ke khreeb in adaab ko naqal (quote) kiya hae

Ye kitab english mae "Imam Ali teaches 400 golden rules for the world and the hereafter" se mashoor hae aur net per bhi moujud hae

Aap ne in adaab mae muqtalif baataun ke adaab bataye hae, jisme jism ki safai, fitri taharatain, khane peene aur ilaj ke adaab, Haji ka kaisa isteqbal karna, miyan biwi ke taluqat ke adaab, mujameat (sexual intercourse) ke adaab, hajjamat (cupping) therapy ke adaab, iske alawa bahut se muqtalif insaani zindagi ke pehlu per adaab ka zikar hae

Chend adaab pesh hain;

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

البر لا يبلي والذنب لا ينسي، أن الله مع الذين اتقوا والذين هم محسنون

Neki kabhi khatam nahi hoti, (bekar nahi jati) aur gunah kabhi bhula nahi jaega, Allah taala mutaqi logoan ke saath hae aur jo ahsaan karne wale hain unke saath hae

المومن نفسه منه في تعب والناس منه في راحة

Mommin woh hae jo khud takleef uthata hae, mushkilat bardasht karta hae, takeh log rahat wa aram mae rahe

 المومن لا يعي أخاه، ولا يخونه، ولايتهمه، ولا يخذله، ولا يتبرأ منه

Mommin woh hae jo na hi apne mommin bhai ko be izzat karta hae, aur na zaleel karta hae, aur na ghalat Ilzam lagata hae, aur na hi usko na umeed karta hae, aur na uska kabhi saath chodhta hae

أصناف السكر أربعة ،سكر الشباب، سكر المال، سكر النوم، وسكرالملك

Insaan ke char kisim ke nashe hain, jawani ka nasha, maal wa daulat ka nasha, neend ka nasha aur badshahat ka nasha yane power ka nasha

ولا تقطع نهاركم بكيت وكيت، وفعلنا كذا وكذا، فإن معكم حفظة يحفظون عليكم

Tum apne din bher ko apni badahi (self praising) bayan karne mae na guzar do, ke mae ne aisa aur waisa kiya, ya mae ne ye kiya aur woh kiya, tumhare saath hamesha tumhare muhafiz farishte rahte hain jo tumhari har baat jo tum karte ho aur kehte ho woh likh lete hain, record karlete hain

غسل الثياب يذهب بالهم وطهور للصلاة

Kapdaun ka dhona "humm" (worries for future) ko dur karta hae aur namaz ke liye paki hae

أعط السمع أربعة في الدعاء، الصلاة على النبي وآله، والطلب من ربك الجنة، وتعوذ من النار، وسوالك اياه الحور العين

Dua maangne mae insaan ko char waqt apni awaaz ko unchi karna chahye,

Jab Nabi aur Aale Nabi per durood padhe

Jab Allah taala se jannat ko talab kare

Jab Allah taala se jahanam se panha maange

Aur jab tum Allah taala se Hoor ul Ain ka sawal karo

مقعد في المسجد بعد طلوع الفجر الي طلوع الشمس أسرع في طلب الرزق من الضرب في الأرض

Insaan ka fajar ke namaz ka waqt shru hone se lekar suraj ke tulu (sunrise) hone tak masjid mae baithna (aur Allah taala se Dua mangna) rozi ko khench lata hae banisbat pura din rozi ke liye zameen mae ma're ma're phirna

من أراد منكم ان يعلم كيف منزلته عندالله فلينظر كيف منزلة الله منه عند الذنوب

Agar tum jan'na chahte ho ke Allah ke pas tumhari kiya manzelat (position, muqam) hae, to tum ko chahye ke tum pehle ye dekho ke tumhare pas Jab tum gunaah karte ho to Allah taala ka kiya muqam aur manzelat hae

لا تلبسوا السواد فإنه لباس فرعون

Tum kala libas mat pehno kiyunke woh Firaun (pharaoh) ka libas tha

لا يخرج الرجل في سفر يخاف علي دينه منه

Kisi shaqs ko bhi safar per nahi jana chahye agar usko khoof ho ke wo us safar mae deen ke ahkamaat ki pabandi nahi karsakta hae

من عبد الدنيا وآثرها علي الآخرة استوخم العاقبة

Jo duniya ki lazataun aur khaeshat ka gulam hogaya aur duniya ko aakherat per tarji (prefence) diya uska anjaam bahut hi bura hoga

اذا قام أحدكم الي الصلاة فليصل صلاة مودع

Jab tum mae se koi namaz se qiyam karne ke liye khede rahe to apni namaz ko aakhri namaz khyal kare

(Aur yaqinan jo bhi namaz padhna wala aisa khyal karega uska khushu, khusu aur tawaju badh jaegi)

Ziyada ter adaab shariat ke ahkamaat ke taluq se hain, jisko mae ne amadan (intentionally) choda hae, magar har mommin ko in adaab se waqif hona chahye

2/28/16, 1:20:59 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 💦💦💦💦💦💦💦💦

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Moulana Ali ibn abi Talib Salawatullah alahe ke 400 adaab ke taluq se aksar logoan ke jawabaat mile unme se aksar logoan ke do sawal the

Pehla sawal ye ke, kiya kala rang bilkul bhi nahi pehna chahye, jawab ye hae ke ye Moulana Ali ameer ul Momineen ke bataye huve adaab hain, shariat ka hukum nahi ke haram hae, jaes hi nahi, magar aqalmand woh hae jo Moula ki pasand ko apnaega jo chez behter hae woh istemal karega, hamare pas kisi jagah bhi ye hukum nahi hae ke ghum aur sog mae kale kapde pehna zaroori hae aur ghum ka ishar sirf kale se hosakta hae, Aulia Allah ne sufaed ko ziyada pasand farmaya hae aur yaqinan wohi afzal hae, issi tarah Moula ne kale joote bhi pehna napasand kiya hae

Doosri baat safar per jane ke taluq se ke insaan aise jagah safar per na jae jahan deen ki pabandi na karsake,

Ab agar majboori hae to kiya karsakte hain, magar har haal mae usko shariat ki pabandi to karna hi hae apne deen ki hifazat karna hae, jo bahut se muqamaat per safar karne per bahut hi mushkil kaam hojata hae Issi liye aise muqam per aur aise muqam se safar na karna hi behter hae, insaan ke jism aur nafs dono ki hifazat lazim hae

400 adaab mae se kuch aur ka zikar karta kiyunke aksar ne is baat ki khaesh zaher ki hae

Ek shaqs ne wasi e Rasul se farmaya ke, kiya khuda har jagah nahi hae ?

Moula Ali ne farmaya haan woh to har jagah hae

Phir us shaqs ne kha, to phir hum aasmaan ki taraf mutawajeh hokar kiyu Dua maangte hae

Moula ne farmaya ke kiya tum ne koran ki ye ayaat nahi padhi

وفي السماء رزقكم وماتوعدون

Tumhari risq aur jin chezaun ka tum ko wada kiya gaya hae woh aasmaan mae hae, aur Allah taala ne ek dastoor (rule) banadiya hae ke rozi ko uske muqam se talab karo, aur rozi ka aur Jin chezaun ka wada Allah taala ne kiya hae woh aasmaan mae hi hae

Jab tum kisi sael (maangne wala fakir) ko koi chez do to tum us'se khaesh karo ke woh tumhare liye Dua kare kiyunke uski Dua tumhare liye qabool hoti hae, halankeh (in spite of) uski Dua uske khud ke liye qabool nahi hoti kiyunke woh kabhi jhoot bhi kehta hae

Jootaun (shoes) ko acha rakhne se badan ki hifazat hoti hae aur taherat wa namaz mae maddad milti hae

Jab koi shaqs Aina mae dekhe to ye Dua padhe

الحمدالله الذي خلقني فاحسن خلقي وصورني، فإن صورتي وزان مني ما شأن غيري واكرمني بالإسلام

Mae Hamd karta hun uski jisne mujhe paida kiya aur sab se achi maqlooq qarar diya aur sab se achi surat ata ki aur jo chezain doosri maqlooq ko nahi di woh tu ne mujhe zebaesh ke saath ata ki aur mujhe Islam ke zareeyeh karamat di

Agar koi shaqs apne khud ke makan mae dakhil ho to

 السلام علیکم

kehne chahye aur agar ghar mae koi bhi moujud na ho to kehe

السلام علينا من ربنا

Salaam ho hum per hamare Rabb ki janib se

Allah tabaraka wa Taala hum ko tawfeeq de ke hum in adaab ki pabandi kare aur hamare deen aur aqeede ko aur masboot banae

💦💦💦💦💦💦💦💦

2/29/16, 5:14:10 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🍃🍇🍃🍇🍃🍇🍃🍇

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Gae kal Syedi almansub Karamulla saheb ka deen gaya

Last year bhi aapki seerat per mukhtasar mazmoon likha tha dobara bhej raha hun

Mae messages broadcast karta hun isliye selectively logoan ko bhejna mushkil hae isliye jo pehle padh chuke hain unse mazerat chahta hun

Aaj se taqreeban 240 saal qabal 21 Jamadil Awal 1194 Hijri ko ek jaleel ul qadar Mansub e muqaddus "Syedi wa Moulai Almansoob Mulla Karamulla bin Alhaj Mohammed Sadiq saheb ka 31saal ka lamba arsa Dawat e Hadiya ki khidmat karne ke baad 85 saal ki umar e shareef mae Barode mae inteqal huva

Aapki paedaesh 1111 Hijri ki hae aur aapke walid Janab Mulla Mohammed Sadiq bin Alhaj Qasim khan the jo dawat mae bade hadd e fazil the

Aap ko Syedna Dai Ismail bin Hibatullah ki taraf se 1165 Hijri mae Mansub e Hind wa Sind muqrar kiya gaya tha

Aap se pehle Syedna Dai ne Hindustan ki Dawat ko sambhalne ke liye Syedna Mohammed bin Fahad ki aulad se Syedi Shams ul Islam Ali bin Hussain bin Ali Zul'jaddain ko bheja tha aur aap ne taqrabeen ek saal chand mahine bahut hi khubi se, Alhurra Aziza bu aur Syedi Almansoob Sheikh Yaseen bin Vali bin Dosan ki maddad se Dawat ko sambhala tha

Syedna Ali ke achanak 24 Rabiul Awal 1160 Hijri Barode mae inteqal ke baad Sheikh Yaseen mansub muqrar huve the, magar aap ko Dai ne 1165 mae Yemen bula liya tha, aur aapke muqam per Mulla Karamulla bin Mohammed Sadiq saheb ko Mansub muqrar farmaya  

 Mulla Karamulla saheb ka bahut taweel (long) dor tha, aapke zamane mae Dawat e Hadiya mae bahut muqtalif halaat rahe, awaam ke Sunni logoan se bahut khoof raha, aap hi ke zamane mae Syedi Ali bin Qutbuddin ka bahut hi zabardast waqae bhi huva, jiska mae ne pehle tafseel se zikar kiya hae

Aapka bada hi Ilmi dor tha, bahut log Dai ki Hazrat mae ja'kar Ilm hasil kiye, aur bulund maratib hazil farmaye jinme mashoor Alhaj Mulla Mohammed Hussain bin Noor Bhai, Alhaj Sheikh Imran bin Syedi Sher Mohammed, Alhaj Abdul Rasool bin Noah, Sheikh Ali bin Qutbuddin, Alhaj Abdul Raheem bin Saleh bin Ahmed the,

Alhaj Abdul Rahim bin Saleh bin Ahmed aapke baad mansoob bhi huve jiski khabre shareef Hazrat moulana Fathullah saheb ke hi Roze mae hae

Aapke dor e mansubiat mae ikhwan bahut se shaher mae phele huve the, Ahmedabad, Baroda, Surat, Khambat, Dholka, Godhra, Sidhpur, Malwa ke Muqtalif gaon, aur Burhanpur, Aurangabad, Daulatabad, Hyderabad, in tammam muqamaat per jamaat thi, Aamil muqrar the aur bahut se muqam per masjid bhi thi, Syedi Mulla karamulla saheb har bilad ka dora karte, momineen ka haal jante uloom e deeni se unko waqif karate aur hikmataun ke khazane kholte

Aap hi ke Mubarak dor mae aap ne Syedi Alhaj Abdul Rasul bin Noah ko Hyderabad Dawat ki khidmat se qiyam karne bheja tha

Aap ne Irshad farmaya tha "wahan jo shareef qamire, lateef khulase, aur Nafees Johar hain, jo abhi tak chuppe huve hain baher nikale, unka zaher hone ka waqt agaya hae, aur tarteeb e deeni mae aane ka waqt agaya hae" yane un aala maratib ke buzrugaon ka zaher hona aur duniya mae aane ka waqt aya hae

Syedi Abdul Rasul bin Noah ne 1185 Hijri mae Hyderabad aakar do logoan ko taleem di, Syedi Mohammed Qasam bin Ali Mohammed jo ainda mansub huve aur Syedna Izzat Ali bin Mohammed Hussain jo Dai e Qaer munfarid huve aap hi ke shagird the, Syedi Abdul Rasul bin Noah bin Essa bhai ka inteqal hyderabad mae huva aap moulana Ikram Ali saheb ke Roze ke khreeb dafan hae Allah taala muqaddus kare aapko aur behtreen ajar de unki khidmataun ke badle

Syedi Almansoob Mulla Karamullah saheb bahut hi khoobi se 31 saal Dawat ki khidmat anjaam diye, aap bahut zaef (old) hochuke the, aapki qidmat aur qabiliyat ka andaza duwaat ke musharafat (letters) se milta hae

Syedna Dai Abdullah bin Ali ne aapko likha tha ke "tumhara, hamare nasdik bahut bulund martaba hae, tumhari koshish deen mae Allah ke pas maqbool aur mashkoor hae, tumhare nek aur aala aqlaq se sab khush hain aur ye keh, tammam Dawat ke maamlat mae tumko chahye ke Alhaj Abdul Raheem bin Saleh bin Ahmed per aetemad (rely) karo, woh tumhari zindagi mae bhi tumhara madadgar hain aur tumhare baad tumhare Khalifa aur logoan ke sardar honge

Syedi Mulla karamulla saheb apne inteqal se qabal Syedi Almansoob Abdul Raheem bin Saleh bin Ahmed ko muqrar farmaya, tammam Dawat ka kaam supurd kardiya aur aakherat ki taraf kuch kiye

Aapka khabre mubarak Barode mae hae, Aapka Roza hamare, ek saheb e khair bhai, ne naya banaya hae, Allah taala unko ajar e Azeem ata kare, aur hum sab per Mansub e Muqaddus ke nazrat wa taeedat jari rakhe

{Syedi Ali bin khutbuddin ka Ahmedabad ka mashoor waqae jo seerat ul Manaseeb mae moujud hae mae what'sapp per likha tha do waqt bheja hun agar koi khaeshmand hae padhna chahta hae to mujhe request bheje mae individually usko bhej dunga)

🍇🍃🍇🍃🍇🍃🍇🍃

3/1/16, 7:38:07 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🔘🔘🔘🔘🔘🔘🔘🔘

 السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Moulatena Fatema salwatullah aleha ki wiladat  20 Jamadil Aakher ke roz, بعثت baesat se panch saal qabal huvi, aur aap ka inteqal aaj hi ke roz 23 Jamadiul Awal 11 Hijri mae 28 saal ki umar e shareef mae huva

Nabi e kareem ka irshad hae ke meri beti Fatema insaani shakal mae "Hoor" hae

Nabi e kareem ne kaha tha ke Fatema ka naam isliye Fatema rakha ke Allah taala Moulatena Fatema se mohabbat karne walaun ko aag e jahannam se najat de di hae

Nabi e kareem ke nasdik Moulatena Fatema ki bahut badi izzat thi aur aap unko badi karamat dete the

Jab bhi Moulatena Fatema Nabi e kareem ke paas ati to aap uth kar khede hojate the, unki peshani (forhead) ko chumte aur apne bazu mae bithate

Aapki mashoor Hadees hae

الفاطمه بضعة مني فمن آذاها فقد آذاني، ومن آذاني فقد آذالله

Fatema mere jiggar ka tukda hae, jisne usko takleef di woh mujhe takleef di, aur jisne mujhe takleef pohunchai woh Allah taala ko takleef pohunchai

Moulatena Fatema syedatun Nisa ul Alameen hae, tammam jahan ki aurataun ki sardar hae, aapka bahut hi bulund muqam hae, aapke buzrug tareen naam mae "Fatir" naam hae jo sirf ahle batin jo bahut gehre batini uloom jante hae wohi us'se waqif hain, Allah taala humko bhi us batini martabe ki marafet ata kare

Ye sab kuch hokar bhi aap ki ek aurat ke huquq ko ada karne mae aapke jaisi koi misal nahi milti

Ek aurat, ek beti, ek biwi, aur maa inke tammam ke huquq ko bahut hi khubi se anjaam diye, beti ka farz nibhaya, shohar ka mukamil saath diya tammam biwi ke faraez anjaam di aur aulad ki is'se behter koi aur parwarish kiya kar sakta hae

Aapki zindagi ka sab ahem waqea woh aapka khalife awal ke pas jakar apne hibba (gifted) bagh e Fidak ka mutaleba (demand) karna hae, aur jo aapne hujjat pesh ki aur taqreer farmai woh tariq e Islam mae be misal hae inshallah ainda sirf uska zikar karunga

Rasulullah ne khud ke inteqal ke waqt Moulatena Fatema ko basharat (khush khabri) di thi keh tum ahle baet e Nabi mae sab se pehle mujh se aakar milogi (yane inteqal farmaegi)

Rasulullah ke inteqal ke baad Moulatena Fatema bahut ghumgeen rahti aur bahut bimar rahti, aap ki maut ek shahadat ki maut huvi jab keh aapke uper ek darwaza giraya gaya tha

Aapka inteqal theek Rasulullah ke inteqal se 70 roz baad huva jo uloom e batin jane walaun ke paas bahut khaas ahmiyat rakhti hae

In mubarak zawaat ke har amal fael baat ke peeche hazaraun khaas mane chupe huve hain, in tammam ki zindagiaan bahut gehre maqsad wa mane liye huve hain

Moulana Qazi un Nauman ibne Mohammed ne apne mashur "Qaside Mukhtara" mae saaf likha hae "dushmanaun ne Fatematus Zehra ko khatal kiya jiski wajeh se mere dil mae ranj ki aag bhadak uthi hae"

Kehte hae ke inteqal se qabal Moulatena Fatema ne Asma binte Umesh se farmaya ke mujhe ye baat nagawar (repulsive) dekhti hae keh mayat ki laash per kapda dalkar dafan ke liye lejate hae, is baat se mayat ke nuqush (body counters) nazar aata hain,

us waqt Janab e Asma binte Umaesh ne kha ke maine ek chez dekhi hae jo Habash (Ethopians) ke log karte hae, unhune naram baans (soft bamboo sticks) mangwai aur usse ek chatri (umbrella type cover) banaya jo ke janaze per rakhne se andar ki mayat nazar nahi aati, unhune usse Moulatena Fatema ko dikhaya, Syedat un Nisa ne usko bahut pasand kiya aur khud ke liye istemal karne ke liye hidayat di Habsha ke log is ko nash (نعش) kehte hain

Aap ne inteqal se pehle moulana Ali se khaesh farmai ke mere inteqal ke baad aap Amama binte Zainab se shaadi karlena woh mere bachaun ke liye bahut shafiq sabit hogi

Umme Salma farmati hae ke inteqal ke roz Moulatena Fatema ghar mae akele thi, aap ne gusul kiya, aur apne bister (bed) per karwat hokar seedha haath gaal ke neche rakha aur laet gai, jaisa ke Moulana Ali ne 400 adaab mae bhi farmaya hae  aur Umme Salma ko baher baith kar kamre ka darwaza bandh karne hukum diya, aur farmaya ke mae apne Rabb se munajaat kar rahi hun, tum ko agar andar aana ho to awaaz dena agar zinda huvi to mae jawab dongi aur agar jawab nahi mile to samajh lena ke mera inteqal hogaya hae

Umme Salma kehti hain ke mae aapki munajaat ki awaaz sunte rahi, magar woh ahista ahista dhimi (feeble) hoti gai aur jab bilkul bandh hogai to mae samajh gai ke woh waqt agaya hae jiska aapko intezar tha, aur aapki rooh e pak Allah ki rehmat ki taraf inteqal kar gai hae

Hazrat Ali ibne Abi Talib aur Asma binte Umesh ne gusul diya, aapki wasiyat ke hisaab se raat ki tareeki mae janaza uthaya gaya, janaze mae chand ahle baet aur mohibeen e ahle baet ke koi aur na tha, namaz e janaza, Hazrat Ali, Hasanain aur Abul Fazal Abbas ne padhi aur Jannat ul Baqi mae aapko dafan kiya gaya

Moulatena Fatema ki wafat per Moulana Ali ne ek marsiya irshad farmaya tha jiske alfaz ye the

Jab koi dost jama hote hain to unke liye judai bhi lazim hae,

judai ke alawa har musibat kam hae

mae ne Ahmed (Rasoolullah salwatullah aleh) ke baad Fatema ko kho diya

ye is baat ka subut hae ke dost hamesha nahi rahta,

Insaan chahta hae ke, uska dost hamesha rahe, magar ye tamana ko puri hone ka koi raasta nahi

Buzrugaun ko aur azeezaun ko, kho dena ek bahut badi musibat hae

   والحمدلله رب العالمين والصلاة والسلام على سيدنا محمد وعلى آله  أجمعين

3/3/16, 1:27:38 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 〰〰〰〰〰〰〰〰

〰〰〰〰〰〰〰〰

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

جمعة مبارك

Moulatena Fatema salwatullah aleha ka youm e wafat guzra aur jaisa ke mae ne zikar kiya tha "Bagh e Fidak" Ka waqea aapki zindagi ka sab se ahem tareen waqae hae

Agarche ye waqea bahut taweel hae aur is ki tafseel bahut ziyada hae jisper bahut sare majalis hosakte hain, mukhtasar mae mujh se jitna mumkin hoga likhunga takeh humko is ahem waqea ki ahmiyat ka andaza ho

Rasul kareem Mohammed e Mustafa Salal'lahu Alehe wa sallam ke inteqal ke baad ka, Alam e Islam mae khilafat e Awal ka ahem tareen waqae hae

Kaha jata hae ke Madine Munawara ke paas Yehudiyun (jews) se hasil kiya huva Rasulullah ka ek zati (personal) sarsabz bagh tha (lush green fertile land) jo Rasul e Khuda ne apni beti Moulatena Fatema ko apni zindagi mae "Hibba" (gift) kiya tha

Rasulullah ke baad jab janab e Abi Bakar logoan ke ijma (collective decision) se khalifa awal (first caliph) ban baithe to unhune "Fidak" per khabsa karliya (illegal forceful possession) ye khekar ke ye musalmanaun ki mil'kiyat (property) hae, Rasulullah ka koi waris ho nahi sakta hae, unhune is baat ki daleel (evidence) mae ye jhooti Hadees e Nabi pesh ki

نحن معاشر الأنبياء لا نرث ولا نورث

Hum Ambia ke groh, (group) na hum kisi ke waris hote hain aur na hi kisi ko hum waris karte hain

Pehle to Janab e khalife awal Abu Bakar ne Hadiye ka to zikar bhi nahi kiya balkeh is baat se bhi saaf inkar kardiya ke jitne bhi Ambia hain wo ne kisi ke waris hosakte hain aur na khud kisi ko waris karsakte hain, yane unka koi waris nahi hosakta hae

(refused to accept the inheritance right of Moulatena Fatema)

Sayeda e Nisa e A'lameen Moulatena Fatematus Zehra ne koran kareem ke is hukum per amal kiya

لا تنسى نصيبك في الدنيا

Tum duniya mae jo apna naseeb hae usko kabhi na bhulo yane na chodo,

Moulatena Fatema ne apne haq ke liye zabardast ahtejaj (protest) kiya, jab is baat ka koi natija nahi nikla to aap khud apne haq ke mutalebe ke liye masjid e Nabavi mae tashreef lae

Dukhtar e Rasul Sayeda e Nisa e Alameen, duniya ki tammam aurataun ki sardar, Wasi e Rasul moulana Ali ki zauja, Sayed e Shabab e ahle Janna, Imam e Hasan wa Husain ki waleda apne Haq ke liye ayi thi aur jab ye khabar pheli to pura Madina aapko sunne ke liye chala aya

Us waqt Moulatena Fatema ne Korani ayaat, Ahadees e Nabawi aur qate daleel wa baraheen (solid unrefutable arguments & facts) se laes (decorated) taqreer farmai ke tammam alam e Islam aaj tak bhi uski madah (tareef) kare baqaer nahi rahsakta

Islami tariq (history) mae shaed hi koi aisi taqreer suni gai hogi, Nabi ki beti thi, Ali ki biwi thi, tammam Aima (Imams) ta Qiyamat ki Maa hae, aapke kalaam ke kiya kehne hain

Sabse pehle to aapne Allah ki Hamd wa Sana ke saath khutba shru kiya hae, bahut taweel hamd irshad farmaya  

Phir farmaya ke ae logoan Allah tabaraka wa Taala ne hamari mohabbat wa taat tum per isiliye wajib ki hae ke tum.mae tafreqa (divisions) na hojae

Waledain ke saath neki karna isliye wajib kiya ke tum Allah ke gazab (anger) se mehfooz raho

Sile rahmi wa bhai char'gi (rishtedari ko barqarar rakhna) isliye muqrar kiya ke tumhari umrain badhe (age)

Khisas (badle mae saza dena) isliye muqrar kiya ke khoon rezi ruke (to stop bloodshed)

Khuda ka taqwa yane khuda ka khoof hi sab se behter she'aar (way, path) hae, aur Beshak khuda se darne wale uske bandaun mae, woh uloma e deen hi hain (deen ke aalim log hain)

Phir aap ne apna taruf karwaya ke logo tum jante ho mae "Fatema" Dukhtar e Rasul hun, hum kabhi ghalat nahi kehte, hum hi hain jinhune mushrekeen ke sar (heads) jhuka diye,

Hum hi se jahalat ki raat khatam huvi aur hidayat ka aaftab (suraj) tulu (risen) huva aur deen e Islam ke danke bachne lage (Islam spread like wild fire)

Arre tum to jahannam ke kinare per khede the, gumrah wa zaleel the, ganda pani pite the aur janwar ka chamda (hide) chabate (chew) the

Allah taala ne tum logoan ko mera walid e buzrug waar Mohammed e Mustafa ke zareeyeh se kufur ke andheriun se nikal kar Islam ki roshni ki taraf le aye   

Magar ab jab Rasul Akram ne duniya se parda farmaya (yane inteqal kiya) to batil aur gumrah logoan ne sar uthaya unki zabaan khul gai, gumnaam aur zaleel log ubhar (risen) ae, Rasulullah ke saath kiye huve ahad wa paiman (agreements promises) ko bhul gae

Rasul e khuda abhi dafan bhi nahi huve tha ki tum shaitaani kaamaun ki taraf aage badh gae, ahle baet e Rasul ke khilaf sazish karne lag gae

Saqt tajub hae hairat hae ke tumko kiya hogaya hae, halankeh tumhare pas khuda ki kitab "KORAN" moujud hae, itrat e ahle baet moujud hae

Bahut lamba kalaam hae jo shaed waqt ke hisaab se ek ghante se ziyada ki taqreer ho, mukhtasar ibteda ka bayan pesh kiya hun, asal to aapki hujjat (arguments) hae jisko sunne ke baad Khalife awal aur tammam log sharam wa zillat ke mare apne sar neeche jhuka liye

Inshallah jiska bayan hae ussi ke wasile se aapki us mareke ara taqreer (eloquent speech) ko aur  bayan karne ki koshish karunga inshallah

Zikar aur bhi hae

〰〰〰〰〰〰〰〰

3/5/16, 12:55:21 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🔳🔳🔳🔳🔳🔳🔳🔳

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Zikar ho raha tha us hujjat (arguments & debate) ka jo Moulatena Fatematus Zehra Salwatullah aleha ne "Bagh e Fidak" ke liye Caliphe awal, janab e Abu Bakar ke saamne masjid e Nabavi mae pesh kiye tha

Aap ne bahut zabardast, shaandar, lamba khutba irshad farmaya hae, mae bilkul hi mukhtasar mae uske chand ahem points pesh kar raha hun

Aap ne apne walid Rasulullah ki khidmataun ko ginane ke baad, Ahle baet ki tammam ter fazilat aur sharafat batana ke baad, Koran e kareem ke aejas (mojise) aur deen e Islam ki sharafat wa fauqiyat tammam adyan (religions) per waaze karne ke baad, maqsad e Islam aur deen ke ahkamaat ka asal maqsad kiya hae batane ke baad farmaya

"Ae logoan ab tum ye gumaan (assume) karte ho ke mere walid e buzrugwaar Nabi kareem ke wirse mae, mera koi haq nahi, kiya tum Islam ane ke baad bhi jaheliyat ke ahkaam pasand karte ho ?

Ae Abu khafa ke bete (Abi Bakar) kiya yehi baat Allah taala ki kitab mae hae "ke tum apne baap ki miraas (wirsa) hasil karo aur mae apne baap ki miraas na paun ?

kiya Koran mae ye nahi bayan kiya hae

وَوَرِثَ سُلَيْمَانُ دَاوُودَ

Sulaiman Nabi Dawood Nabi ke waris huve

Kiya Hazrat e Zakariya alehe salaam ne apne waris ke liye Dua nahi ki thi, jo unka aur Aal e Yakoob ka wirsa pae, jisko Koran bayan karta hae

 فَهَبْ لِي مِن لَّدُنكَ وَلِيًّا  يَرِثُنِي وَيَرِثُ مِنْ آلِ يَعْقُوبَ وَاجْعَلْهُ رَبِّ رَضِيًّ

Ae Allah tabaraka wa Taala tu tere paas se ek farzand mujhe ata farma jo mera aur Aale e Yakoob ka waris bane

Kiya koran e kareem mae miraas ke ahkaam nahi hain (inheritance laws) phir mae kaise apne walid ki waris nahi hosakti

Koran to kehta hae

 وَأُولُو الْأَرْحَامِ بَعْضُهُمْ أَوْلَىٰ بِبَعْضٍ فِي كِتَابِ اللَّهِ إِنَّ اللَّهَ بِكُلِّ شَيْءٍ عَلِيمٌ

Allah taala ki kitab koran ke hisaab se to baas rishtedar, baas se badhkar hain wirasat ke liye, Allah har baat ka jan'ne wala hae

Koran e kareem mae to sirf ek hi kisim ke wirse ki nafi (refusal) ki gai hae, yane do millat (religion) wale ek doosre ke waris nahi hosakte, to kiya mae نعوذبالله aur mere walid ek deen, ek millat per nahi the,?

shaed ae Abu Bakar tum Koran ko mere walid aur mere shohar Ali se ziyada samajhte ho

Ae khalifa jaan lo tum ne mera Haq gazab kiya hae, haq chehna hae aur ab Qiyamat ki ghadi hamare wade ki ghadi hae, woh din woh jagaah hamara aur tumhara darmiyaan Haq ka faisla hoga

Aapki ye la jawab, dil wa Dimaag ko jhinjod dene wali taqreer ko sunkar aur Korani daleelaun ko sunkar Abu bakar la jawab hogae the, Mohajir wa Ansar aur tammam ahle Madina sharam aur ruswai se apne mundi (heads) neeche jhuka liye

Inshallah ainda Moulatena Fatema ka khitab Ansar e Madina se, aur Janab e Abi Bakar ka jawab Dukhtar e Rasul se......

Inshallah zikar baqi hae. ...

3/7/16, 7:04:23 AM: Asif Hussain: Someone asked this question in my session.... Can you please give me some guidance on how to respond?

My son  is left handed. I have struggled against Ammi insisting that he do many things with his right hand but he cannot do them comfortably. There is also so much research suggesting that children should not be coerced to change their inherent handedness. This is how he was born, he cannot help it. Is he then dis honoring things such as food, water etc when he uses his dominant hand?  I just don't understand this and the reasons for suggesting he is less because of his left handedness. Can you help put this into perspective?

3/7/16, 7:44:23 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: Salaam Alaikum!

Asif I am also left handed in fact I had a slight effect of polio on my right hand but I recoverd it's not at all noticeable initially I used to do every thing with left hand but for eating food I was always reminded by everyone one at home and slowly I was able to eat with right hand but still hold spoon with left and pick things with left it's quite embarrassing at times people staring at you then I have to very conciously use right

I write with left and probably everyone from manaseeb and mullahs have seen me writing initially they used to tell me to change the habit but they were never scolding me as such there are many people who are lefties by birth one can't do much I have played all the games with left table tennis badminton cricket so this is it, you can make an effort in chod hood but if it's not done you have to accept the person

3/8/16, 11:14:57 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ☘🌹☘🌹☘🌹☘🌹

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

پہلی شب آپ سب کو مبارک 🌹

Moulatena Fatematus Zehra ki is saher angez (impressive) taqreer ko sunne ke baad tammam hazereen bahut ziyada mutasir hogae the, Janab Abi Bakar ko to kuch jawab hi nahi ban padh raha tha

Phir Moulatena Fatema "Ansar e Madina" ko khitab kiya aur farmaya

(Ansar Medine ke woh log jo Rasulullah ke Mecce se hijrat karne per maddad kiye the)

" Ae Islam ki hifazat karne walo, mere Haq ke liye ye tumhari kaisi susti hae, kiya Rasulullah ko tum ne ye kehte huve nahi suna ki

المرء يحفظ في ولده

Kisi shaqs ki hifazat uski aulad ki hifazat karke hoti hae,

Tum ne Rasul e Khuda ko hamari fazilat ke mutaliq bahut kuch kehte huve suna hoga, phir tum ye kaisa Aale Nabi (aulad e Nabi) per khulam khulla zulum hote huve dekh rahe ho aur khamosh ho

Tum ne kitna jaldi Rasulullah ke baad deen mae بدعت bidat shru kardi (deen wa shariat mae nai nai baatain paida karna)

Khreeb (near future) mae zalim log jaan jainge ke unki palat kitni buri hogi (yane Qiyamat ke roz unka anjaam bura hoga)

Ae logoan mae woh Nabi e munzir (darane wala) ki beti hun jo tum ko azab e shadeed se darata raha hae

Ab ae Ansar kiya tum unka muqable nahi karoge jinhune Rasulullah ko diya huva ahad (promise) toda hae

اتخشونهم فالله أحق أن تخشوه أن كنتم مومنين

Kiya tum unse darte ho, Allah hi ziyada haqdar hae ke usse dara jae, agar tum sache momineen ho

Ab tum apna kaam karo hum apna amal karte hain, tum bhi intezar karo hum bhi intezar karte hain

Khreeb tha ke log Abi Bakar ke khilaf awaaz uthate aur baqawat kardete, sab hi ki nazar khalifa per thi ke woh kiya jawab dete hain

Khalifa bade shattir (chalaak) the foran khede huve aur kehne lage

"Ae Rasul e Khuda ki Dukhtar (beti) yaqinan aapke walid (Rasulullah) momineen per bade shafiq wa meherban the, kamil Rehmat the, kafiraun ke liye shadeed the."

"Aur aapke shohar e mohtaram beshak Rasul ke bhai hain jisko Rasulullah har dost per mutaqadam (aage, preferred) rakhte the aur unhune (Moulana Ali ibne Abi Talib) bhi Rasulullah ke har mamle mae pura saath diya hae"

"Aur ye baat bhi bilkul sach hae ke ke Ahle baet e kiraam ko wohi shaqs dost rakhega jo nek bakht hoga, aur wohi unse dushmani, buqs wa kina rakhega jo badbakht hae

Ahle baet ek pakeezah itrat (khaandan) hain, aur Allah taala ke pasandida wa chuninda afraad hain

Ae behtreen Nisa e aalameen, ae Allah ke sab se behtreen Ambia ki Dukhtar, aap apne qol mae sabse sache hain, aap ko, na apne haq se roka jaiga, aur na aap sach bolne se baaz augi (you will not be denied your rights, nor you can be refrained from saying the truth)

Kasam ba'khuda mae ne Rasulullah ki rae se tajawus hargis nahi kiya (I have not gone against the Rasulullah opinion) na hi mae ne kabhi Rasulullah ki rae ke khilaf koi kaam kiya, ye baat bilkul sach hae ke mae ne Rasulullah ko ye kehte huve suna tha ke "hum groh (group) e Ambia, na kisi ko waris karte hain aur na hi kisi ke waris hote hain, hum groh e Ambia to kitab, Ilm, wa hikmat ko wirasat mae dete hain, yehi hamara maal hae, hum uske wali hain (caretaker) aur hamare baad waliyane Amar ko dete hain"

Phir Abi bakar ne kha mae ne Bagh e Fidak ki aamdani (income) Jungi ghode aur jung ke liye hathyaar (horses & weapons) khreedne ke liye maqsoos muqrar kiya hae takeh hum jihad karsake, aur phir aakhir mae asal baat per aa hi gaye ke mae ne ye sab sirf apni rae se nahi kiya hae balkeh logoan ke ijma se kiya hae (jis tarah se woh logoan ke ijma (decision) se khalifa bane the, Allah aur uske Rasul ke hukum se nahi)

Phir Dukhtar e Rasul ko khush karne ki koshish ki aur kha

"Meri jaan aur mera maal aapka hae, aapke saamne hazir hae, aur is baat mae mein zara bhi kanjoosi nahi karunga, aapka hukum mere maal mae nafiz hae (at your command hae) kiya aap ye samajhte hain ke mae aapke buzrug walid Nabi kareem Mohammed e Mustafa ke khilaf karunga

Moulatena Fatema salwatullah aleha Ne kha "Subhanallah tum khuda ke, khuda ke Rasul ke, khuda ki kitab ke, khilaf kar rahe ho, uske ahkaam ki khuli muqalefat kar rahe ho tum. Jhooti Hadees kehkar logoan ka ijma karliye, aur kehte ho ki Rasulullah ki rae ke khilaf nahi kar raha hun, ab Allah ki kitab faisla kun hae (final) hae

Ab mere liye "Sabar" hi munasib hae, aur jo baat tum kar rahe ho uske liye Allah se hi maddad chahungi

Aakhir mae Abi Bakar ne kha "Allah bhi sach hae, Allah ka Rasul bhi sach hae, khuda ki kitab bhi sach hae, aur aap bhi sach hain, mere aur aapke ke darmiyan ye musalman hain jo mujhe khalifa banaya hae, ye sab unki rae se huva hae sirf meri rae nahi"

Phir Moulatena Fatema ne logoan ko khitab kiya hae aur aakhir wahan se palat kar roze Nabi per jakar dua maangi hae jis'se tammam log sharminda hogae aur unke sar jhuk gae

Hazrat Moulana Ziaali saheb muqaddus ne is'se mauzu (subject) per aaj se 45 saal pehle ek bahut shaandar majlis farmai thi

Aap ne usme "wirasat" ki ahmiyat bhi samjhaya tha, wirasat insaani zindagi ka bahut ahem jus (part) hae, aur koran e kareem mae bahut tafseel se iske ahkamaat aye hain, usme humko bahut hi ahtiyat karna hae, Aaj ikhwaan mae issi wajeh se sab se ziyada jhagde aur ranjeesh (differences) hain

Insaan ko haq talab karna hae, uske liye hujjat karna hae, magar aakhri amal woh hae jo Moulatena Fatema salwatullah aleha Ne kiya "Sabar kiya aur Allah per chod diya" Allah sab se behter faisla karna wala hae

Ye khutba Arabi aur English translation ke saath net per moujud hae 16 pages ka hae jisko chahye mujhe request bheje mae Web address de dunga
