3/10/16, 10:34:19 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 💦💦💦💦💦💦💦💦

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

جمعة مبارك

Jalaluddin Rumi jo "Moulana Ruum" se mashoor hae ek zabardast aalim the, aapka farsee kalam bahut hae, aapke tashbihaat (examples, similies) bahut hi mashoor hain

aap ne duniya ki 'Hirs' wa lalaj e maal (greed) ke liye kiya hi behtreen tashbih (simili) di hae

Aap farmate hain ke zindagi ki kishti (boat) ko chalane ke liye zaroori hae keh kishti ke neeche itna pani ho ke khoobi se achi tarah pani ke uper kishti taer (float) sake us'se ziyada miqdar (quantity) pani ki zaroorat nahi, usse ziyada pani kishti ki ravani (floating) ke liye koi faidamand nahi, kishti ko zaroorat nahi

Zaroorat se ziyada maal ki hirs aur khaesh jab insaan ke dil mae dakhil hojati hae, to phir woh zindagi ki khrabi ka baas (reason) banti hae, ye aisa hae jaise pani agar kishti mae dakhil hojae to kishti ko dubo bhi sakti hae (can sink the ship)

Zindagi ke fitri aur haqeeqi maqasid ke liye (for basic needs & requirements of life) ba'qadre zaroorat maal lazim (limited wealth) hae,

Maal ahle deen, ahle emaan ke liye zareeyeh khair hota hae, zindagi ka maqsad nahi hota

(Acquiring Wealth should not be the aim of life, but goodness through wealth should be the aim)

Dil ke andar maal ki koi jagah nahi, mehnat, achai aur imaandari se kamaya huva maal ek rehmat hae ghalat maal, ya be

zaroorat maal zahmat

(Problem & tensions) hae

Issi baat ko Moulana Ruum ne is tarah samjhaya hae

Aap farmate hain keh sadaf (sea shell) ke andar ka moti (pearl) qinaat ki wajah se bana (qinaat jitni zaroorat utna hi lena) agar woh (sea shell) hirs aur lalaj ki wajeh se shell ka mu (mouth) barish ke pani ke liye ziyada der khula rakhta to pani itna ziyada andar aajata ki moti kabhi bhi ban sakta

Ziyada maal ki hirs ek bimari hae, uska ilaj qinaat se kiya jana chahye

(Qinaaat =Allah ne jo diya us per khush aur mutmain rahna, contented & satisfied)

Kuza (water container) ek zarf e mahdood hae (limited capacity) us mae kitna bhi ziyada pani dalo woh uski capacity ke hisaab se hi bharega, baki sab pani idhar udhar gir jaega, us'se kuze, ya kuze wale ko kiya faida

Allah taala hum ko utni hi daulat de jo hamare duniya ke saath deen ko bhi salamat rakh sake

Woh daulat kis kaam ki jo na khud ke kaam aye aur na hi doosraun ko koi faida de

woh paisa, woh daulat, paise wale ke pas sirf aur sirf ek number hae, ek value hae, kagaz ke tukdaun (pieces) ka hisaab hae, uski khadar to jab hae jab, woh khud ke, ya kisi aur ke ache, jaes, nek kaam mae kharch ho

Walid e muqaddus ko hum ne aksar ye kehte huve suna hae

"ke Dua ye karo ke aaj ke zamane mae ziyada paisa aur daulat na aye, aaj  paisa sirf khrabi la rahi hae, aulad ko bigad rahi hae, rishtedariun ko khatam kar rahi hae, insaan ko maqroor aur mutakabir bana rahi hae, deen ko khrab kar rahi hae,

Aaj kitne log hain jo unko di gai daulat ka sahi istemal kar rahe hain ?

Ae Allah hum ko hamare naseeb ki daulat zaroor ata kar aur saath mae uske sahi istemal ki tawfeeq bhi ata farma

الغني الأكبر الياءس عما في أيدي الناس

Sab se badi daulat woh doosraun ke pas jo maal wa daulat hae usse, be niyaz, be parwah hojane hae

(From the collection of walede Mohtarama Almafsuha Alhaja Ruquia ziaee saheba)

3/15/16, 1:05:18 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🕸🕸🕸🕸🕸🕸🕸🕸🕸

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Allah taala ke ata karda naematain مواهب الله be hisaab hain jinka shummar  (count) karna na mumkin hae

Magar agar insaan un naemataun ko taqseem kare to 2 bade kisim  جنس mae taqseem honge, ek jasdani (materialistic possession) hae, aur dosra nafsani (non physical, spiritual) hae

Insaan ke materialistic possessions mae sab se bada hissa uski daulat  (wealth) ka hae

Aur insaan ke nafsani possessions mae sab se badhkar possession woh Ilm hae

In do azeem naemataun mae insaan char kisim mae taqseem pate hain

Ek to woh khush naseeb hain jinko maal bhi mili hae aur ilm se bhi nawaza gaye hae

Aur ek woh hae jo in dono se mahrum hae (dono bhi nahi mili hae)

Ek ko sirf maal diya gaya hae to dosre ko sirf ilm se nawaza gaya

Woh jisko ilm aur maal dono se nawaza gaya hae, usko to Allah tabaraka wa taala ka beinteha shukur guzar hona chahye, chand hi log aise khush naseeb hote hain jinko dono jahan ki naematain naseeb hoti hae, aur unko utna hi mohtaat (careful) bhi hona chahye kiyunke jab ek aata hae to dosra apni raah leta hae, chand hi logoan ki ye qabiliyat hoti hae ke dono ko saath lekar chale, aisa insaan waqae tareef ke qabil hae

Maal, insaan ki duniya ki jismani zindagi ke liye kaam ata hae aur Ilm uske "Nafs" ko zinda karta hae, bedaar karta hae, aur Nafs ko aakherat yane maut ke baad ki zindagi mae hamesha baqi rakhta hae

Allah taala ne jis kisi ko bhi in naemataun se nawaza hae usper farz hae woh un ikhwan ka khyal rakhe jo in naemataun se mahrum hain

Aur jo bhi woh Allah taala ki di huvi naemataun mae se ikhwan per kharaj karta hae is baat ka Ikhwan per ahsaan hargis nahi jatana chahye, aur na usko haqeer samajhna chahye, chahe woh usko Ilm se nawaza ho, ya daulat dekar

Har insaan apni aulad ki parwarish aur tarbiyat ke liye maal wa daulat kharaj karta hae, apne inteqal ke baad maal wirse (inheritance) mae bhi chodta hae, is baat ka woh apne ahel wa aulad per kabhi bhi ahsaan nahi jatata hae kiyunke woh uska farz hae, theek issi tarah ek aalim ko bhi apne shagird per ahsaan nahi jatana chahye kiyunke haqeeqat mae woh shagird uska rohani beta hae, us ke saath bhi jismani aulad ki tarah shafaqat aur meherbani se pesh aana hae  

Issi rohani rishte ki ahmiyat  batane Nabi ne Ali se farmaya

يا علي انا وانت ابوا هذا الأمة

Ae Ali mae aur tum is ummat ke Maa Baap hain

Aur Rasulullah ne farmaya

المومن اخوالمومن من أبيه وأمه

Tammam Mommin apas mae bhai bhai hain apne rohani maa baap Rasulullah aur Moulana Ali ibn abi Talib Salawatullah alahe ki taraf se

Aur issi baat ki taraf ishara kiya khaleelullah Ibrahim Alehe salaam ne   

فمن تبعني فإنه مني

Jisne meri iteba ki, jisne mujhe follow kiya, mere hukum ko mana woh mujhe se hae,

Aur issi baat ki taraf Noah alehe salaam ko bhi takid ki gai jab ki Noah ne koran ki zabaan mae Allah taala se apni nasabi bete ke liye khaesh ki thi  

وَنَادَىٰ نُوحٌ رَّبَّهُ فَقَالَ رَبِّ إِنَّ ابْنِي مِنْ أَهْلِي

Ke ae Allah ye mera beta mera ahel hae (woh mera nasabi beta hae)

To Allah tabaraka wa taala ne kiya baleeq irshad farmaya

قَالَ يَا نُوحُ إِنَّهُ لَيْسَ مِنْ أَهْلِكَ إِنَّهُ عَمَلٌ غَيْرُ صَالِحٍ

Ae Noah woh tumhare ahel nahi balkeh woh to tumhara amal e qaer Saleh hae

Is ayaat se saaf zaher hae ke Allah taala ke nasdik jismani nisbat, jismani rishte se bahut badhkar aur bahut ziyada ahmiyat rakhna wala rohani rishta hae

Aur phir Koran e kareem ki is ayaat se to Allah taala ne saaf waze kardiya hae ki Qiyamat ke roz khoof ki ghadi mae jabkeh sur phooka jaega ye jismani rishte, ye nasabi taluqat koi kaam nahi ainge

Koran farmata hae

فَإِذَا نُفِخَ فِي الصُّورِ فَلَا أَنسَابَ بَيْنَهُمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ وَلَا يَتَسَاءَلُونَ

Jab ke Qiyamat ka Sur phooka jaega us waqt koi bhi rishta apas mae baqi nahi rahega aur na hi log ek doosre ko puchega

Is baat se saaf waze hogaya ke jismani rishta aakherat mae koi faida nahi deinga,

Nabi e kareem ki Hadees e mubarak  hae

كل نسب ينقطع يوم القيامة إلا نسبي

Har nasab har rishta Qiyamat ke din khatam hojaega siwae mere nasab ke, yane jisne mujh se rishta joda, taluq rakha, meri iteba ki bas wohi meri shafaat ka haq daar hae

Allah taala hum ko tawfeeq de ke hum Ilm ki fazilat ko samjhe ustad ki hurmat (respect & dignity) ko samjhe aur hamare sababi rohani maa baap ki qadar kare Waise hi jaise ke apne jismani maa baap ki karte hain balkeh us se bhi ziyada kiyunke jismani rishta tut sakta hae قطع hosakta magar rohani rishte woh abadi azali hae

🕸🕸🕸🕸🕸🕸🕸🕸

3/18/16, 1:43:00 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 💦💦💦💦💦💦💦

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

جمعة مبارك

Syedna wa Moulana Al'jamali Ali bin Hussain Almakrami 1392 Hijri 1972 AD Hindustan tashreef laye the us waqt aap hyderabad ki jamaat se vida (farewell) hote waqt bahut hi muqtasar magar nasihataun se bharpur taqreer farmae

Hamd wa salaat e nabi ke, wa fazilat ae ahle baet ke zikar ke baad aap ne irshad farmaya

Hum tumhare isteqbal (welcome) ka dil se shukriya ada karte hain, jis per naimatain ziyada ho usko shukoor guzaari bhi ziyada karna chahye

Allah taala tum ko aur hum ko shukur guzaari ki nek tawfeeq ata kare

Phir aap farmate hain

Ke tum ko chahye ke aamal e Sharia (ahkamaat e shariat) se qiyam karo, yeh عامال aamal tumhari hayat e abadi (eternal life) ke liye biej (seed) hain

Ilmi aur amali ibadat se qiyam karo woh tumhare "Nafs" ko tammam khrabiyun se pak karenge

Tum qor wa fikar karo (observe and think) ki tum kiyu is duniya mae aaye hain, aur tum ko kahan jana hae

Yeh duniya e kaseef (the lowly materialistic world) ka mamla bahut hi dushwar (difficult) aur mushkil hae

Inshallah tum  صراط مستقيم siraat e mustaqeem (the right path) per ho aur masboot raaste per ho

Magar ab seedhe raaste per chalne ki bajae, darwaze per hi ruke na raho, raaste per aage badhte jao, seedhe raaste per a'jana hi kafi nahi balkeh manzil tak pohunchne ke liye, us raaste per chalna bhi zaroori hae

Allah taala ka qol e mubarak hae keh tumhari khilqat (paedaesh) ka maqsad sirf ek hi hae aur woh hae Allah taala ki ibadat, aur apne nafs ko is qabil banana ke is duniya ko chodkar us daar e aakherat mae jane ke qabil hojae

Ye duniya ki adna zindagi ke liye Koran farmata hae

وَمَا هَٰذِهِ الْحَيَاةُ الدُّنْيَا إِلَّا لَهْوٌ وَلَعِبٌ وَإِنَّ الدَّارَ الْآخِرَةَ لَهِيَ الْحَيَوَانُ لَوْ كَانُوا يَعْلَمُونَ

Ye duniya ki zindagi to sirf khel tamasha hae, hamesha ki aur asal zindagi ka muqam woh dar e aakherat hae, kash ke log is baat ko jante

Aur Allah taala ka irshad e mubarak hae

من عمل صالحا من ذكر أو انثي وهو مومن فلنحيينه حياة طيبة

Keh jo mard ya aurat nek amal kiya aur woh mommin bhi hae, yane Emaan bhi laya hae to usko hum hayat e tayaba (achi zindagi) ata karenge

Aur hayat e tayaba woh aakherat ki abadi zindagi hi hae, duniya ki jismani zindagi kadurataun (mixed with problems difficulties & worries) ki zindagi hae

Is duniya ki zindagi mae sahet ke saath bimari hae

Ameeri ke saath fakhiri hae

Izzat ke saath zillat hae

Aman ke saath khoof hae

Duniya ki halet badalte hi rahti hae, isme itmenan wa sukoon na mumkin hae

Ikhwan kiraam jo uloom tum ko duwaat aur manaseeb ne sikhae hain woh poshida (hidden) khazane hain, un se iqtebas (derive, absorb adapt) karo aur din aur raat us ilm mae koshish karo, jid'do jahad karo (pura zor lagakar koshish karo)

Tum duniya ko ek khatam hone wali aarzi (temporary) chez khyal karo aur aakherat ko qarz aur maqsad (aim object and target) bana'lo ta'keh tum Allah ke pas "Muqam e Mehmood" hasil karain

Syedna Dai ne kha tum hamari in nasihataun ko tumhare safahat e qulub (dil ke kagaz) per likh lo, aur subah wa shaam unko apne aankhaun ke saamne rakho, hamari nasihat ko zahan nasheen Karlo aur tumhare baad har aane wale ke liye ye behtreen hadiya chodo, aur ye baat yaad rakho   

أن خير البنآء هوامقام التقوئ

وان خيرالاعمال ما هواذكئ

وان خير الطرق ما هواهدئ

وان خيرالاقوال ما قل ودل

Behtreen imarat (basne ka muqam abode) taqwa ka ghar hae

Behtreen amal pakeezgi e aamal hain (har amal ko behtreen tariqe se nafasat se karna)

Behtreen raasta hidayat ka raasta hae اهدنا الصراط المستقيم

Behtreen qol woh jo mukhtasar ho aur mufeed ho (one which is short & sweet) ba'as e rehnumai ho (means to guidance & salvation )

Allah taala humko tawfeeq de ke hum hamare ek azeem Dai ki nasihat ko dil se qabool kare aur us per amal kare

وما توفيقى الا بالله العلي العظيم حسبنا الله نعم المولي ونعم النصير

3/20/16, 11:29:01 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ☘☘☘☘☘☘☘☘

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Moulana Ali ibne abi Talib ka zaheri dor e khilafat bahut hi pareshaniun se ghira huva raha har taraf se muqalefat thi, khoon e Osman ka badla sab se bada mamla tha jiska natija jung e Jamal thi aur baad mae jung e Siffin aur phir kharijiun ke khilaf jung e Naherawan

Kaha jata hae ke jung e Jamal ke baad Muawiya ibne Abu Sufiyaan ne Ameer ul Momineen janab Ali ko bahut hi khrab khat (letter) likha aur usme Moulana Ali ko har tarah se dadaya wa dhamkaya gaya tha

Moulana Ali ibn abi Talib Salawatullah alahe ne bhi naraz hokar ghuse mae bahut saqt jawab Muawiya ko likha jisme aap ne apni shujaat (valour) aur jungaun mae apne bahaduri ka zikar kiya aur farmaya "Ae Muawiya ibne abi Sufiyaan mae wohi hun jiske haath per tere khaandan ke bade bade log khatal huve", iske alawa bhi aap ne apni bahut si fazilatain bayan farmayi

Aap ne ye khat apne qasid (messenger) janab e طرماح  Tirimah ke saath Ameer Muawiya ko bheja jo us Damishk (Damascus) Syria mae tha janab e Tirimah bahut hi bahadur, fasih zabaan wale (eloquent) aur hazir jawab (witty) the

Tirimah bahut unche khad (tall in height) ke the aur bahut bade uut (camel) per sawaari karte the (used to ride)

Aap jab Damascus Syria pohunche to Muawiya apne kuch saathi ke saath ek bagh mae tha jahan uska mahal bhi tha moujud tha

Tirimah bahut tezi se bagh mae dakhil huve to Muawiya ke saathi unko koi jahal Arab samajh kar unka mazaq udane lage

"Amr ibne Aas" jo Muawiya ka khaas musheer (adviser) tha be'inteha chalak tha, jisko Islamic history mae lomad (jackal) kehte hae, usne Tirimah se kaha ke "Aasman ki kiya khabar hae" (unki height ka mazaq udate huve kha)

Tirimah ne kiya hi baleeq Arabi mae jawab diya

نعم الله في السماء،  ملك الموت في الهواء، واميرالمومنين علي في القضاء،...........يا أهل اعداوة والشقاء

Allah ki naemat (meherbani) hae aasmaan mae, malak ul maut hae hawa mae, aur Ameer ul Momineen teri qaza hae (teri maut unke haath hae) Ae badbakht to ab balaun (musibat aur pareshniyun) ke liye tayar hoja

Arabi mae bahut hi baleeq zabaan mae jawab tha jiska english ya urdu mae ishar karna mumkin nahi

Amr ibne Aas samajh gaya ke ye koi mamuli insaan nahi jis'se uska sabeqa (confrontation) huva hae

Amr ne kha aap kahan se aa rahe hain ?

Tirimah ne farmaya mae us mommin ke pas se aa raha hun jo be inteha parhezgar, mutaqi, pak tinat hae, jiska zaher wa batin dono pak hain, jo Allah ka buzrug tareen banda hae

Amr ne kaha kahan jane ka irada hae

Tirimah ne farmaya ke aise badbakht muzi insaan ke pas jana hae jisko tum apne Ameer kehte ho (muzi=iza, takleef dene wala)

Amr ibne Aas ne Muawiya ko kehlaya ke ek bahut hi fasih zabaan wala bahadur aadmi aya hae,

Muawiya ne unhe mahal mae bulaya to wahan Yazeed bhi baitha huva tha aur cheekh (shouting) raha tha

Janab Tirimah ne anjaan bankar kha ke "ye kaun

badbakht aur badtameez insaan hae jo aisa cheekhta hae" ? Aur ye kaisa qabil hogaya ke masnad (throne) per baitha hae

Logoan ne kha ke ye wali e ahad (prince) "Yazeed" hae Muawiya ke beta

Tirimah ne farmaya Allah uska bura kare

Jab Tirimah Muawiya ke darbar mae pohunche to aapko hukum huva ke aap apne ju'te utarde (to remove the shoes)

Aap ne tajub se idhar udhar dekhe aur kha "kiya ye wadiye e muqaddus hae"

(aap is jumle mae koran ke us ayaat ki taraf ishara kiya, jis mae Musa Alehe salaam ko hukum huva tha ke apne ju'te utar do ye wadiye e muqaddus hae (bahut mubarak valley hae)

Phir Muawiya ko salaam karte huve kha ke "salaam alaik يا ملك العاصي gunahgaar badshah

Muawiya ne kha tu ne mujhe Ameer ul Momineen kiyu nahi kaha

Tirimahne ne kha, Hum momineen hain, aur hum ne tujhe hamare uper Ameer (leader) nahi banaya hae

Muawiya ne kaha, tu kiya laya hae ?

Kha ek beshqimat (invaluable) gira khadar khat liya hun

Muawiya ne kha tu mujhe khat kiyu nahi deta

Tirimah ne kaha mujhe tera farsh (floor) ke pather per khadam rakhna pasand nahi mae kaise dun

Muawiya ne kha acha to aisa kar mere Vazir Amr ibne Aas ko de de

Tirimah ne jawab diya ke Ameer zalim hae to vazeer qayan hae us'e kaise dun (qayan=amanat ko ada nahi karne wala)

Muawiya ne kha to phir mere bete Yazeed ko de de

Tirimah ne kha ke hum shaitaan se kiya khush hain ki uski aulad ko dain (hum tujh se yane Muawiya se hi khush nahi to phir tera bete yazeed jo bada shaitaan hae usko kaise dun)

Muawiya ne kaha acha aisa kar mere gulam (slave) ko de de

Tirimah ne kaha aise qabis gulam ko dun jo haram maal se khreeda gaya hae

Aakhir Muawiya be'zaar hogaya aur kaha aakhir ab mae ye khat tujh se kaise lu

Tirimah ne kaha ye koi mamuli insaan ka khat nahi Moulana Ali Ameer ul Momineen ka hae, uth kar tazeem ke saath puri izzat dete huve le

Muawiya majbooran khede hokar khat liya

Muawiya ne pucha ke bata Ali kaise hain ?

Tirimah ne farmaya

بحمدلله كالبدر الطالع حواليه أصحاب كالنجوم

woh to chamakte huve chand ki tarah hain aur unke ashaab taraun (stars) ki tarah hain, jab Ali unko hukum karte hain to dor kar woh hukum bajalate hain aur jab mana karte hain to kabhi bhi uske khilaf jurat nahi karte

Inshallah a'ge ka mukalema (dialogue) ainda,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,

3/20/16, 1:06:13 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ☘☘☘☘☘☘☘☘☘

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Bahut se logoan ki farmaesh per Tirimah ka waqae ke dosra hissa bhi bhej raha hun

☘☘☘☘☘☘☘☘

Zikar ho raha tha janab e Tirimah ke mukalema ka Muawiya ke darbar mae

Tirimah ke jawabat sunkar Muawiya pareshan hogaya tha, usne iqrar karte huve kha ke "Ae Arab to kis qadar fasih, wa baleeq kalaam karta hae

Tirimah ne kha abhi tu ne dekha hi kiya hae mere Moula ki hazrat mae tu mujh se kahi ziyada fasih, baleeq, najeeb, adeeb, shareef, khateeb moujud hain

Muawiya ne kha Ali se kehdene ke mae ne unke khilaf itni lashkar (fauj) tayar karli hae ke jo anaj (grain) ke bade bade zakhiraun (godown) se bhi ziyada hain

Tirimah ne kaha ke Ali ke pas "Malik E Ushtur" jaisa ek murq (cock) hae ke jo apne neze (long spear) ki nok (tip) se sare dane (grains) chug lega

Malik e Ushtur Moula Ali ke bahut hi mashoor fauj ke commander the jinhune ne Moula Ali ka sab hi jungaun mae saath diya aur bade karname dikhae, hamare pas aapka bahut bada martaba hae

Amr ibne Aas jo bahut chalak tha Muawiya ke kaan mae akar kaha ke ye Arab bahut lalchi (greedy) hote hain in ko kuch paisa dekar mu bandh kara de warna ye to tera bura haal kardega

Muawiya ne kha theek hae Amr tu hi Tirimah se baat kar

Amr ne Tirimah se kaha "agar Ameer Muawiya tujhe kuch tohfa de to kiya to qabool karega" ?

Tirimah mae hanste (laughing) huve kaha mae to uski jaan lene ka khaeshmand hun aur aap maal ki baat kar rahe ho,

Muawiya ne apni sakhawat dikhate huve kaha ke Tirimah ko dus hazar dirham de do, aur pucha agar zaroorat ho to aur ziyada kar'dun ?

Tirimah ne kaha agar tu ziyada bhi kardiya to kaunsa apne baap ke maal se de raha hae

Muawiya ne Amr ibne Aas se kaha ke aur dus hazar de de, phir aur sakhawat dikhate huve pucha ke kiya aur bhi ziyada kardu ?

Tirimah ne kaha jab dobara badha hi diya hae to teesri bar bhi sahi

Jab ye jumla tees hazar 30000 dirham Tirimah ke qabse mae agaya to Janab e Tirimah ne farmaya

هذا مال المسلمين من خزانة رب العالمين أخذه عبد من عباده الصالحين

Ye musalmanaun ka maal hae aur Allah taala ke khazane se hae jisko Allah taala ke nek saleheen bandaun mae se ek adna bande ne hazil kiya hae

Sab ko la jawab karke aap wahan se chale gae

Aapke baad ke waqeat mujhe kahi mille nahi kisi ko malum ho to batana jo mujhe khyal woh ye hae ki shaed aapko Shahid kiya gaya

Allah taala muqaddus kare aapki rooh e pak ko aur aapke nazrat hum per jari kare, ye tammam log bahut hi bade saheb e maratib hain Allah humko unki sahi marefat naseeb kare

Allah taala hum mae bhi aisi hi jurat aur himmat paida kar ke hum bhi apni maut aur paise ki lalaj ke saamne waise hi sabit khadam rahe aur har halat mae apne bade ka saath de

Hum ko chahye ke hum apne tammam mamlaat ko Allah bhrose chod dena chahye jaisa koran farmata hae

وَأُفَوِّضُ أَمْرِي إِلَى اللَّهِ إِنَّ اللَّهَ بَصِيرٌ بِالْعِبَادِ

Mae apne tammam mamlaat Allah taala ke supurd karta hun, Allah hi sab se behter nigaah (nazar) rakhne wala hae apne bandaun ke mamlaat per

3/24/16, 11:54:07 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 📀💿📀💿📀💿📀💿

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

جمعة مبارك

"Tawakul " توكل ye ek aisa lafz hae jo bahut ziyada waqt koran e kareem aur Ahadees e nabavi mae istemal huva hae

Hum sab apni apni samajh se tawakul ka matlab bhi kuch hadd tak samajhte hain aur tawakul karte bhi hain

Imam e Jaffar e Sadiq farmate hain ke tawakul ek aisa piyala hae ke jisper Allah ki mohar (seal) lagi hae aur us piyala se sirf mutawakeleen متوكلين pi sakte hain aur wohi uski mohar (seal) bhi tor (break) sakte hain

Koran farmata hae

وعلى الله فليتوكل كل المتوكلين

Aur bhrosa karne walaun ko Allah taala per hi bhrosa karna chahye

Aur phir farmaya

وعلي الله فتوكلوا أن كنتم مومنين

Agar tum mommin ho to Allah taala per hi bhrosa karo aetemad rakho

Phir farmaya

توكل على الحى الذى لا يموت

Tum us per tawakul karo jo hamesha zinda hae jisko maut nahi aati (yane Allah taala)

To emaan ki sab se ahem shart woh Allah taala per tawakul karna qarar pati hae

Imam e Jafar e Sadiq farmate hain ke tawakul emaan ki kunji (key) hae, aur emaan khuful (lock) hae tawakul ka

Imam e Jafar e Sadiq ne tawakul samjhane ke liye ek waqae ka zikar farmaya ke ek mommin e muqlis, nek insaan kisi aalim ke pas aya aur aalim se "tawakul" kiya hae samjhane kha

Aalim ne us'se kuch waqt rukne ke liye kha ke mae soch kar jawab deta hun

Dono khede huve the us waqt ek fakhir maangne wala aya aalim ne apne jeb (pocket) mae haath dala ek sikka tha jeb mae woh nikalkar fakhir ko de diya

Phir aalim ne us aadmi ko kaha ab tum pucho jo tum puchna chahte the ?

Us aadmi ne kaha " Ae aalim mae ye baat janta hun ke mera jo sawal tha "tawakul" ke taluq se uska jawab aap foran de sakte the magar aap ne aisa nahi kiya"

Aalim ne kaha sach hae magar mera kuch kalaam karne se pehle mere batini wajud mae bhi woh chez, woh kaifiyat ka hona zaroori hae, kiyunke Allah taala to batin ko bhi janta hae, dekhta hae

Mae kaise tum ko توكل samjhata jabke mere jeb mae ek sikka (coin) maujud tha

Baat ka Matlab ye tha ke mae khud kulli tor per Allah taala per tawakul nahi karu tab tak tum ko Allah per tawakul karne ki kaifyat kaise samjhata ye baat durust nahi thi, mere jeb mae ek sikka tha mera tawakul sabit nahi tha

Tawakul ka matlab yehi hae ke har mamle ko mukamil tor per Allah taala ke bhrose chod dena jaisa koran farmata hae

ومن يتوكل على الله فهو حسبه

Jo bhi Allah taala per bhrosa karega to Allah taala uske liye kafi hoga

Jaisa ke Nabi e kareem ne farmaya ke agar tum Allah per bhrosa rakho jaisa ke rakhna chahye to Allah taala tum ko ussi tarah rozi dega jis tarah woh parindaun (birds) ko rozi deta hae ke har roz subah woh bhuke paet jate hain aur shaam ko paet bhar kar wapas aate hain, woh Allah per tawakul karte hain aur Allah unko risq deta hae

Tawakul ke asal mana ye hain ke apne alawa kisi aur per apni kisi zaroorat ke waqt, Hajat ke waqt bhrosa karna aetemad karna aur jis per aap tawakul kar rahe hae wo mukamil bhrose ke qabil ho to phir متوكل mutawakil ke Dil mae sukoon hoga aur uska Nafs mutmaen hoga

Aur agar jisper tawakul kar raha hae usper pura itmenan aur bhrosa nahi hoga to uske Dil mae sukoon nahi hoga Nafs mutmaen nahi hoga

Hum sab tawakul karte hain, aur Allah taala per tawakul ka dawa bhi karte hain magar uski haqeeqat se puri tarah waqif nahi hain, hamara kitna tawakul Allah taala per hota hae aur kitna uske qaer per hota hae (apart from Allah subhanahu) Hum nahi jante aur na hi samajhte hain

Haqeeqat mae agar koi tawakul karta hae to woh Ambia alehe salaam aur Aulia Allah hi hain

Inshallah Ambia ke tawakul mae, aur hum gunahgaar momineen ke tawakul mae kiya farq (differences) hae aur kiya kami hae uska zikar ainda ............

💿📀💿📀💿📀💿📀

3/27/16, 8:11:49 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ✳✳✳✳✳✳✳✳

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

اللَّهُ خَالِقُ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَكِيلٌ

Allah taala hi har chez ka khaliq hae aur wohi har chez per Vakil (zimmedar) hae

Humme bhi zindagi mae Vakil se sabaqa (interaction) hota hae aur hum bhi hamare bahut se mamlaat Vakil ke supurd (handover) karte hain aur ussi ki soch aur aqal per bhrosa karte hae kiyunke woh hum se ziyada mamlaat se waqif hota hae aur hamari behteri chahta hae

Issi tarah humme bhi koran ne be hisaab jagah Allah taala ki zaat per tawakul karne ka hukum diya hae jaise ke farmaya

وَشَاوِرْهُمْ فِي الْأَمْرِ فَإِذَا عَزَمْتَ فَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى اللَّهِ إِنَّ اللَّهَ يُحِبُّ الْمُتَوَكِّلِينَ

Tum mamlaat mae logoan ki rae (advice) zaroor liya karo, agar phir tum paka irada karlo to sirf Allah tabaraka wa taala per hi tawakul karo

Aur farmaya

قُل لَّن يُصِيبَنَا إِلَّا مَا كَتَبَ اللَّهُ لَنَا هُوَ مَوْلَانَا وَعَلَى اللَّهِ فَلْيَتَوَكَّلِ الْمُؤْمِنُونَ

Kehdijiye ae Nabi ke nahi pohunchta hae hum ko hamara naseeb siwae uske jo Allah taala ne hamare liye muqrar kardiya hae, Allah hi hamara Moula hae aur humko Allah per hi tawakul karna chahye

Hamare bade sahife mae peer ke din ki Korani ayaat ki Dua hae woh puri توكل tawakul per hae, hum padhe to andaza hoga ke Allah taala ne humko kis tarah sirf ussi zaat e

وحده لا شريك له

per tawakul karne ka hukum diya hae

Hum sab hi tawakul karte kisi na kisi per bhrosa karte hain aur ussi se puri umeedain wabasta kardete hain ke woh hamara behtreen nigehbaan hoga

magar hamara tawakul naqis (defective) hae hum Allah taala ke siwae kisi aur per tawakul karte hain

Chote bache apni zarooriyat  ke liye tawakul karte hain magar unka tawakul unke Maa Baap per hota hae aur unke dil unse mutmaen hote hain

Issi tarah ek Gulam (slave) bhi tawakul karta hae apne aqa (master) per ke woh uski tammam zarooriyaat ko puri karega

Issi tarah Badshah ke khidmat guzaar, badshah per tawakul karte hain ke woh unki zarooriyaat puri karega aur unka behteeen Vakil hoga

Fauj ke sipahi (soldiers) apne commander per tawakul karte hain kiyumke woh unke tammam mamlaat ka Vakil hota hae

Aam logoan mae bhi hum agar dekhe to do kisim ke log hain, ek أغنياء daulat mand aur ek فقراء fakhir mohtaj miskeen

Daulat mand apne maal wa daulat (wealth & assets) per tawakul karte hain, magar phir bhi unke dil kabhi mutmaen nahi hote unki hirs wa lalaj (greed) unko aur ziyada ki talab ki taraf ubharti hae, aur us talab ki khaesh ko pura karne ke liye ussi maal aur daulat ke uper tawakul karte hain ussi daulat ke zareeyeh aur ziyada daulat kamate hain

Doosri kisim woh aam log, ghreeb log hain, jo apne fann (art, skills) per tawakul karte hain, ya phir apni jismani taqat, apne badan ki quwat per unka pura tawakul hota hae

Maa Baap bhi apne budhape aur zaefi mae apni jawan aulad per apne guzare ke liye tawakul karte hain unhi se umeedain wabasta karte hain

Is hadd tak insaan ka Allah ke siwae, qaer per tawakul hota hae ke fakhir, mohtaj, bheek maangne wala bhi logoan ki hamdardi wa sakhawat per tawakul karta hae ke log usko kuch na kuch khairàt de hi denge

Agar is hisaab se dekha gaya to hum mae se koi bhi insaan Allah taala per mukamil (in totality) tor per tawakul nahi karta hae, balkeh un asbab per hamara tawakul hota hae jisko Allah taala ne hamare naseeb ko hum tak pohunchane ka zareeyeh banaya hae

hamara in per tawakul karna aisa hi hae jaise ke ek kache dhage ka ya ek tinke (tiny particle) ka sahara lena, jo aisa bosida (fragile) sahara hae ke ek lamhe mae khatam hosakta hae

Hamara raat din ka mushaheda (observation) hae ke ek lamhe mae kaise insaan ke asbab tut jate hae khatam hojate hain

Kuwait ke invasion per logoan ka kiya haal huva, Hindustan mae Harshad mehta ke scam mae kitni maali (finacial) tabahi ayi, psunami mae logoan ke maal daulat aur assets ka kiya anjaam huva,

Insaan apni taqat aur hunar (skill) per ghamand karta hae jabke hamara raat din ka tajruba hae ki ek chote se hadese se insaan kisi qabil bhi nahi rahta,

Phir kiya hamara in fani chezaun per tawakul karna sahi hoga ?

Agar sahi ma'ne mae koi tawakul karta hae to woh Ambia alehe salaam hain, ya woh mommin hain jo unke naqsh e khadam per chalte hae jaisa ke koran kehta hae

لقد كان لكم في رسول الله أسوة حسنة

Tumhare liye Rasulullah mae behtreen namuna (example) hae, Rasulullah ki zindagi hum sab ke liye behtreen misaal hae  

Ambia alehe salaam tableeq e risalat mae mashqool rahe aur apne tammam ter duniya wa aakherat ki zaroorat ke liye Allah taala per tawakul kiye

Har insaan in do halataun k darmiyan hamesha hota hae, ya to tangi shidat ki pareshani mae hoga, ya phir woh khush haal hoga

Mommin e muqlis woh hota hae ke in dono halataun mae Allah taala per hi mukamil tawakul karta hae

Agar mommin sahet mand  tandrust, maal aur daulat bhi ho, izzat aur shohrat hasil ho, logoan mae maroof bhi ho,woh jo chahta hae, khaesh karta hae usko asaani se hasil kar sakta ho, phir bhi sacha mommin Allah taala per hi tawakul karega jaisa ke kisi hakim ne kaha

مبرياء من حوله وقوته إلا بالله

Woh allah taala ke siwae kisi ki bhi quwat wa taqat per bhrosa nahi karta

Jaisa Sulaiman Nabi ne farmaya tha

.

قَالَ هَٰذَا مِن فَضْلِ رَبِّي لِيَبْلُوَنِي أَأَشْكُرُ أَمْ أَكْفُرُ

Sulaiman Nabi ne kha tha ke ye mere parwardigaar ka fazal hae takeh mujhe aazmaya jae ke mae shukur ada karta hun ya phir mae kufrane naemat karta hun

Aur kafir woh hae jo apni quwat apni taqat apne maal wa daulat per bhrosa karta hae, aur samajhta hae ke woh jo kuch bhi duniya mae hasil kiya hae woh apni mehnat koshish hoshiyaari se kiya hae, uska tawakul asbab (intermediary) per hae woh Allah se mu phera huva hae jaisa ke Koran ne koran ki zabaan se kha jumla dohraya hae

قَالَ إِنَّمَا أُوتِيتُهُ عَلَىٰ عِلْمٍ عِندِي أ

Mujhe ye maal, mere ilm, aqalmandi wa samajhdari ki wajeh se mila hae

Aaj kahan hae woh Qaroon aur uska khazana jis khazane ki kunjiyaan (keys) 70 unt (camel) per uthae jate the, aaj na uske khazane hae na uske naam lene wale koi hae

Aaj hum apni aulad, apne maal aur daulat per tawakul karte hain, Qaroon jaisa duniya mae baqi na raha to hum kis ginti mae shammil hain

Allah taala hum ko tawfeeq de ke hum sahi manau mae Allah subhanahu per tawakul karna sikhe

Aur agar hum issi tarah qor karenge to humko malum hoga, ke na hamara tawakul sahi hae, na hi sabar hae, na hi shukur hae, na hamari taat sahi hae, aur na hi hamare kisi bhi baat mae Iqlas hae, hum sirf duniya ke hokar rahgae hain, hum deen se bhi sirf duniya hi chahte hain, hum aakherat ko samjhe hi nahi, jo chez samjhe nahi, jiski tahqeeq nahi kiye, jisper yaqeen e kamil nahi aya, to phir uski raqbat, uski khaesh, kaise mumkin hosakti hae

 وما توفيقي الا بالله، عليه توكلت وإليه انيب

✳✳✳✳✳✳✳✳

3/31/16, 12:33:57 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🍇🍇🍇🍇🍇🍇🍇🍇🍇

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

جمعة مبارك 🌹

Koran e kareem ke baad agar fasahat wa balaqat mae kisi kalaam ka muqam hae to woh Rasul e Khuda Mohammed e Mustafa Salallahu Alehe wa sallam ke kalaam ka hae

Aap  جوامع الكلم  aur  بدأءع الحكم yane aapka kalaam ja'me kalemaat (concise) aur nadir (rare, unique, remarkable) tha

Aur Rasulullah ke baad fasahat wa balaqat jameiyat (concise) e qol, andaz e khitabat (address) mustahkam dalael (strong firm arguments) mae Ali ke barabar duniya mae na koi huva, na hosakta hae

Rasulullah ne Moulana Ali ke liye farmaya علي عيبة علمي Ali mere uloom ke zarf yane bartan (container) hae عيبة us container ko kehte hain jisme insaan apne sab se Nafees khimti aur umda (artistic, beautiful, rare, precious) chezaun ko hifazat se rakhta hae

Moulana Ali salwatullah alehe woh the jinke pas Rasulullah ka tammam Ilm wa asraar (bhed, raaz ki baatain) aur hikmat ke khazane mehfooz the

Moulana Ali ibn abi Talib Salawatullah alahe ki fasahat wa balaqat aur kalaam ki jameiyat ke 9 kalemaat ka zikar karna hae

Teen kalemaat munajaat ke hain

(munajaat= Allah taala ki bargaah mae ahista ahista ajisi wa inkesari ke saath kalaam karna, hum jisko whispering ya sargoshi kehte hain)

Teen kalme Ilm ke hain aur

Teen kalme adab (literature) ke taluq se hae

Munajaat ke teen kalme hain

كفاني عزا أن تكون لي ربا

وكفاني فخرا أن أكون له عبدا

انت لي كما أحب توفقني كما تحب

Meri izzat ke liye ye baat kafi hae ke, Ae Allah to hi mere Rabb hae, yane palne wala hae

Aur mere liye yehi badi faqar (pride) ki baat hae aur mere liye kafi hae ki mae tera banda hun

Ae Allah tu mere liye waisa hi hae jaisa mae chahta hun bas tu mujhe tawfeeq de ke mae waisa hi banu jaisa tu mujhe chahta hae

Ilm ke taluq se Moulana Ali ke teen jumle hain

المرء مخبو تحت لسانه

أما ضاع امرء عرف قدره

تكلموا تعرفوا   

Har insaan apni zabaan ke neeche qaed (imprisoned) hae

Jab zabaan kholega to uski qadar malum hojaegi

Tum kalam karo to jaan jaoge, waqif hojaoge

Issi tarah adab mae Moula ke teen jumle hae

أنعم علي شئت تكن اميره

استغن عمن شئت تكن نظيره

واحتج الي من شئت تكن اسيره

Tu jis per chahe meherbani kar tu uska amir (leader) ban jaega

Tu jis se chahta hae be'niyaz hoja (indifferent) bas tu uske barabar ka hojaega (you will be equal in the eyes of each other)

Tu jis kisi se chahta hae, uska mohtaj aur zaroorat mand hoja (uske saamne haath phela) bas tu uska qaedi (prisoner) hojaega

Ye Moulana Ali ka bahut hi baleeq kalaam hae jiske padhne ka sahi lutf Arabi zabaan mae hi mumkin hae  kisi aur zabaan mae woh kalaam ki nudrat paida ho hi nahi sakti hae

Guzarish hae ke isko kai waqt padhye takeh us kalaam ki hikmat hum per waaze (clear) ho aur kalaam ka asar dil tak pohunche

Allah taala humko Moula e Kaenaat ke kalaam se nasihat lene ki tawfeeq de

🍇🍇🍇🍇🍇🍇🍇🍇

4/3/16, 2:13:55 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🔵🔵🔵🔵🔵🔵🔵🔵

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Barode ki jamaat e Sulaimani ke kabrastan ki ek dilchasp haqeeqat pesh hae

Kaha jata hae ke Barode ke kabrastan mae ek bahut hi khadeem bawli (well) hae jisko aaj se 46 saal pehle Mukaram Mulla Ashraf Nizami saheb marhum ne saaf karwaya tha

Us kuwe (well) per ek takhti (plaque) lagi huvi mili jisper Koran e kareem ki ye behtreen ayaat likhi thi

إِنَّ الْأَبْرَارَ يَشْرَبُونَ مِن كَأْسٍ كَانَ مِزَاجُهَا كَافُورًا ○ عَيْنًا يَشْرَبُ بِهَا عِبَادُ اللَّهِ يُفَجِّرُونَهَا تَفْجِيرًا○

Beshak Allah taala ke nek bande hain jo (jannat mae) ek piyale se aisi shrab peenge jisme kafoor ki milawat hogi, ye ek aisa jashma (pond) hoga jis'se Allah ke bande sairab (quenching their thirst) honge aur jis'se naherain phutingi

Is bawli (well) ka naam "Sulaimani bawli" hae iski tameer (construction) 1156 Hijri mae huvi taqreeben aaj se 281saal pehle huvi

Iski tameer char mommin mukhlis saqi bhaiyun ne ki thi jinke naam bhi us kuwe per kanda (engraved) hain

Ikhwan ke naam ye hain

Janab Jafar bhai, janab Sadiq bhai, Janab Hasan khan saheb aur janab Musaji saheb

Us takhti per Hindu calendar ke hisaab se bhi date likhi hae Sawant 1799

Allah taala un charo ikhwan ko is sadqe jariya ka bhetreen ajar de

من أيقن بالخلف جاد بالعطية

Jo aakherat mae Allah taala ki bargaah mae jaza wa sawab ka yaqeen rakhega woh duniya mae bakhshish karne mae saqi hoga

Kuwa khudwana ek aisa sawab e jaria hae jiska sawab un marhumeen ko us waqt tak milta hi rahega jab tak ke log usse faida uthate rahinge

Yaqeenan woh charo ikhwan e kareem us jannat ke chasme se sairab (quenching their thirst) ho rahe honge

Walid e muqaddus ne ek waqt mujhe raaste ke beech mae pada pather hatane kha ke kisi ko thokar na lag jae aur farmaya ke kamtar  se kamtar nekiyun mae raaste ka pather hatane hae aur badi se badi neki woh Allah ki raah mae apni jaan bhi de dena hae (shaheed hona)

Aaj us bauli ke taluq se mujhe ilm nahi ke moujud hae ya nahi aur kis haal mae hae

Allah taala un marhumeen ko maqferat kare aur unki khabraun per rehmat nazil farmae aur hum sab ko tawfeeq de ke aisi hi neki ki taraf aage badhe jo hamare liye behtreen toshe aakherat hojae

🔵🔵🔵🔵🔵🔵🔵🔵

4/5/16, 2:23:20 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🕋🕋🕋🕋🕋🕋🕋🕋

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

ماہ رجب المرجب کی آمد آپ سب کو بهت مبارک 🌹

Walid e muqaddus Hazrat Moulana Ziaali saheb ke woh bayanaat yaad aate hain jo aap Rajab ul Murajab ki fazilat mae hamesha farmate the

aapke bayanaat Moulana Imam Maad al Mustansir Billah ke majalis aur mukhtalif ahle Haq ki kitabaun se liye gae hain jo pesh hain

Nabi e kareem ka irshad hae ke Ramazan e shareef Allah ka mahina hae, Shaban mera mahina hae aur Rajab ul Murajab ae Ali tumhara mahina hae aur har Imam ka hae jo tumhare baad aane wale hae.

Rajab ul Murajab ke maane hi taazim (given respect) diye gaye ke hae jiski izzat aur hurmat humko hamari ibadataun se karna hae

Ye kamil 30 din ka mahina hae naqis 29 ka nahi, Islami mahinaun mae jo 30 din ka hota hae usse kamil (complete) kehte hain aur jo 29 din ka hota hae usko naqis (incomplete) kehte hain

Yeh char hurrum ke mahinaun mae se ek hae, Rajab ul haram, Ziqadatul haram, Zilhaj'jatul haram aur Moharrum ul haram, aur in mae Rajab ki infradiat (uniqueness) hae ke teen mahine saath hain, magar Rajab ul asab woh akela hae jo ek khaas baat ki taraf ishara hae

Ayaam e jaheliyat (period before Islam) mae bhi is mahine ki badi fazilat aur hurmat thi, isiliye us zamane mae bhi jahel Arab is mahine mae jung ko rok dete the

Is mahine ki pehli shab ki fazilat ke liye Moulae kaenat Moulana Ali Ibne Abi Talib ne farmaya hae ke mae har mommin se ye chahta hun ke woh in char raataun mae duniyavi mashaqil (worldly activities) se alag hojae, Pehli shab Rajab ul murajab,15 vi shab Shaban e Kareem, aur do Eidain ki raat, Idd ul Fiter, wa Eid ul Adha

Pehli raat mae Noah alehe salaam ka safar shru huva tha, aur aapne apne tammam saathiyaun ko us din ka Roza rakhne ka hukum diya tha

Is mahine ki ek makhsus Dua hae jo aam tor per hum fajar ki namaz ke baad padhte hain jiska ek khaas jumla hae keh "Allah taala hamare budhape (old age) per jahanam ki aag ko haram karde" (jahanam ki aag se bachae)

Is mahine ki tasbih bhi khaas tasbih hae jiska karte rahna bada hi fazilat ka baes hae

استغفراللہ يا ذالجلال والاكرام من جميع الذنوب والاثام  

Umrah kissi waqt bhi kiya ja sakta hae magar Is mahina ka Umrah karne ki badi fazilat hae jisko Umrah Rajabia kehte hain

Is mahine ka pehla Jumua tammam saal ke jumua mae sab se ziyada fazilat wala hae, jiske liye Syedna Jaffar farmate hain;

"Khair ki baataun ko jama karne wala hae aur barkataun ki barish lane wala hae"

Rajab ul murajab ki 15 tareeq "Salaat us Zawal" jo salaat e "Umme Dawood" bhi khelati hae, Imam Jaffar e Saddiq se riwayat hae us din ka roza rakhkar zohar wa asar ki namaz ke baad 'Dus Surat' padhkar dua karne mae badi fazilat hae, aur saath mae 13 aur 14 ka Roza karne mae bhi fazilat hae

Is maah ki 27 tareeq mae bahut badi fazilatain hae

Us roz ki subah Rasulullah mabus huve yaane Nabi banae gaye, jiski namaz wa ibadataun se qiyam ka sawab 20 saal ke aamal ke barabar hae

Moulana Ali Ibne Abi Talib ki paidaesh bhi ussi roz huvi thi

27 ke roze ki bhi bahut ahmiyat hae uske iftar ki bhi khaas Dua hae jo "Moti us sawalaat" ki Dua kehte hain us din Roze karna se Allah taala 60 saal ke gunahun ka kafara kardega, uske karz ki adaegi hogi aur uske mazaleem se usko darguzar kiya jaega

Is mahine ke taluq se Imam Jaffar e Saddiq se riwayat hae keh jis ne bhi is maah ki kissi bhi budh (Wednesday) roza rakhka iftar chawal aur shakkar (Rice & sugar, curd is not mentioned, dahi ka zikar nahi hae) se kiya to Allah taala uski rozi mae barkat wa kushadgi dega

Is maah ki ek badi fazilat yeh bhi hae ki Moulana Ali farmate hain ke, jis kissi ne is maah ke ek saal roze rakha, us'se aag e jahanam ek saal dur ki jaegi, jo do saal rakhega us'se do saal dur ki jaegi, aur is tarah jo 8 saal kiya usper jahanam ke darwaze band kardiye jainge aur jannat ke darwaze khol diye jainge aur jisne 9 saal kiye usko kaha jaega ab tumhara pichla hisaab khatam, ab naya amal shru karo

Allah taala humko in fazilataun ki batini marefat bhi ata kare takeh hum is maah e mubarak ki kama'haqa (what it deserves) khadar karsake aur uski barkataun ko puri tarah hasil karsake

Haqeer aap sab se Dua ke liye khaas multaji hae,

Allah taala aap ke, aur hamare naqis amaal ko qabool farmae

وآخر دعانا والحمد لله رب العالمين والصلاة والسلام على رسول الله وعلى آله وسلم

4/7/16, 1:59:22 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 💠💠💠💠💠💠💠💠💠

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

سأل کا سب سے مبارک جمعة  آپ سب کو مبارک

Deen e Islam mae jahan 7 Faraez e Deen ka zikar hae, wahan 12 sunnat e Deen bhi hain, aur Islam hi ek aisa deen hae ke, in roz marrah ke (daily routine) zindagi ke mamlaat ko bhi ek ahem jus (part) e deen qarar diya hae jisme 'Ifsha us Salaam', yane salaam ka bil jaher kehna (to express loudly) yane ba awaaz kehna hae uska baad agar ahmiyat batai gai hae to woh

برالوالدين

"Bir ul Waledain" hae

Yane Maa aur Baap ke saath nek suluk karna, acha bartau (behaviour) rakhna

Ye zabaan ka nuqs hae, kami hae, keh koi bhi Arabi lafz ka sahi tarjuma duniya ke kisi bhi zabaan mae nahi kiya ja sakta hae issi tarah se بر BIR, ka bhi sahi tarjuma mumkin hi nahi

Bir ul Waledain ke bhi 7 faraez wajib hae aur 12 sunnat hain

7 wajebaat woh hamare Roohani Baap aur Maa ke taluq se hae jo baap ke muqam per hamare Nabi hain aur Maa ke muqam per wasi e Nabi hae ya unke baad anewala har Imam hae aur unki Hujjat hain

Allah taala ka Irshad hae ;

ووصيناالانسان بوالديه احسانا حملته كرها ووضعته كرها

Hum ne insaan ko wasiyat (instructed) ki hae ke woh apne Maa Baap ke saath ahsaan ke saath sulook kare, aur is ayaat shareef mae to Maa ka apni aulad ko takleef per takleef uthate huve paida karne ka khaas zikar kiya hae, aur issi tarah doosri jagaah bhi Maa ki takleef ka dobara zikar farmaya

ووصيناالانسان بوالديه حملته أمه وهنا علي وهن

Hum ne insaan ko apne waledain ke liye wasiyat ki hae, uski Maa usko, hamal (pregnancy) ke dauran takleef uthate huve bojh per bojh uthaya hae, koran ne dono jagah bhi Maa ka aulad ko paida karne ke role ko badi ahmiyat di hae,

Jab Koran e kareem ne itni ahmiyat diya hae to Moulana Imam Maad al Mustansir Billah apne majalis mae irshad farmate hae ke Maa ko izzat wa karamat dena uska khyal rakhna hum per aur ziyada wajib hojata hae

Isi tarah12 sunnat e deen mae jisme Maa Baap ke saath kaise nek sulook karna hae us taluq se majalis e mustansirya mae bayan farmate hae

أن يكرم مثواهما

Maa Baap ke qiyam gaah, yane unka makan ya unki baithak ki jagaah ko karamat

Jab tum unko aata huve dekhe to foran unko izzat dete huve khade hojao aur unki har awaaz per لبيك 'labaek' khe kar foran aage badho (to answer all their calls immediately)

ويغض صوته عندما

Unke saamne apni awaaz hamesha neechi rakhe dhimi rakho (to keep your voice soft & low in their presence)

ويعظمهما ولا ينتهرهما

Unko puri tazeem de, puri respect aur obedience se pesh aye, unse kabhi bhi jhidak kar battameezi se baat na kare

ويخفض لهما جناح الذل من الرحمة

Unke liye apne dono baazuan ko puri tarah jhuka de, yane unke har zaroorat ke liye apne aap ko pesh pesh rakhe

Apne aap ko kamtar karle jhuk jae, zaleel karle, unke saamne rehmat ke saath pesh aye

din ki roshni mae unke aage na chale aur zulmat (andhere darkness) mae unke peeche na rahe, yane din mae unke peeche chale takeh unki tazeem wa takreem ho, aur raat ke andhere mae unke aage aage chal kar unko raasta bataye aur unki hifazat kare

ولا يبدي لآمر هما شي منالخلف

Unke kisi bhi hukum ki khilaf Warsi na kare, jaisa ke koran su're Luqman mae farmaya hae ke siwae is baat ke keh Allah ke saath shirk (Allah ke saath kisi ko shareek karne) khe to us waqt maa baap ki baat hargis nahi manna chahye

ولا يقول لواحد منهما "أف"

Unko kabhi bhi kisi halat mae bhi koi saqt Lafs (harsh words) na khe, jaise ke koran ka hukum hae

ولا تقل لهما أف ولا تنهرهما وقل لهما قولا كريما

Tum unko "uff" tak na kho aur na jhidko, aur agar kuch kehte bhi ho to bahut hi kareemi ke saath, narmi ke saath kaho,

Aur baujud unki za'eefi ke aur badi umar ke aur kitna bhi unke bimar rahne per har halat mae unki darazi e umar, lambi umar, aur sahet ke liye Dua karo, jis tarah se, ki woh tumhare liye, tumhare bachpan mae har halat mae tumhari darazi e umar aur sahet ke liye Dua karte the aur Dil se uske khaesmand rahte

Walid e muqaddus farmate the ke is baat ka sab se ziyada humko khyal rakhne chahye kiyunke aksar hum apne Maa baap ki saqt bimari aur takleef ki halat mae ya badi umar mae  ye jumla keh dete hain "Allah Rahem kare, yane Allah unko maut de, yane duniya ki takleef se najat de" ye baat aur kalemat aulad ko kabhi bhi apne maa baap ke liye nahi kehna chahye, woh Allah aur Rasul ke hukum ki nafarmani hae

Aur unki har choti aur badi baat aur zaroorat ko khush dili se,  طيب خاطر teeb e khatir (clean pure heart) puri kare, jis tarah woh tumhare bachpan mae tumhari har khaesh ko jitna unse mumkin hota puri karte aur behtreen andaz se tumhari tarbiyat kiye hae

Allah taala humko tawfeeq de ke hum, Bir ul Waledain ke ahkamat per puri tarah amal kare, aur Waledain ka Haq pura ada kare, takeh kal ke roz hamari aulad bhi hamare saath waise hi sulook kare

Tum hamesha unke Haq mae ye Dua karte raho

وقل رب ارحمهما كما ربياني صغيرا

Ae mere parwardigaar jis tarah unhune (waledain) ne bachpan mae mujhe pa'la hae parwarish ki hae to bhi unper hamesha Rahem farmata rahe

💠💠💠💠💠💠💠💠

4/10/16, 12:44:51 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🔘🔘🔘🔘🔘🔘🔘🔘

اسلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Aulia Allah aur duniya ke danishwar logoan (wise men) ke aqwal pesh e khidmat hain :

...........................................

Safar do kisim ke hote hain aur dono ke waaste toshe ki zaroorat hoti hae, duniya ke safar ke liye tosha saath rakho aur aakherat ke safar mae ja'ne se pehle hi tosha aage bhej do [Essa Masih]

......................................

khuda ke waaste jo kaam karo to usme bandaun ka khoof na rakho [Luqman Hakim]

.........................................

Ziyada suna karo aur kam bolo (listen more speak less) [luqman Hakim]

.........................................

Bewaqufaun se dosti na karo kiyunke mushkil waqt mae woh tumhari mushkil mae aur isafa karenge [luqman hakim]

.........................................

Jo shaqs bhi acha khane, ache pehne, aur sirf daulat mandaun ki sohbat mae baithne ki khaesh rakhta hae woh samajh le ke woh jahannam ke bahut khreeb hae [Owais Qarni]

...........................................

Jab jism maut hi ke liye hae to Allah taala ki raah mae shaheed hona hi sab se behter hae [Imam e Husain]

...........................................

Jo aalim sirf Ameeraun ke paas jae woh khuda ka dushman hae aur jo Ameer uloma ke paas ae woh khuda ke dost hain [Imam e Jafar e Sadiq]

........................................

Nek logoan ke liye maut rahat hae aur بد badd (khraab) logoan ki maut duniya walaun ke liye rahat hae [Imam e Jafar e Sadiq]

..........................................

Bimar Dil ki char nishanian hae;

Taat (obedience) ki mithaas ko nahi mehsoos karega

Uske dil mae khoof e khuda na rahega

Duniya aur duniya ki chezaun ko ibrat, yane sabaq lene ki nigah se nahi dekhega

Jo ilm ki baat sune ga usse samjhe ga nahi

..........................................

Sab se mushkil magar sab se bulund kaam teen hain ;

Tanhai mae (akele mae) parhezgari karna

Jis se darr aur khoof ho uske saamne bhi "Haq" baat kehna

Tangdasti (financial difficulties) mae bhi sakhawat (khair khairaat) karna

..................................

Jab koi kaam karo to yaad rakho ki khuda dekh raha hae

Jab koi baat karo to yaad rakho ke khuda sunn raha hae

Aur jab khamosh ho to yaad rakho ke khuda jaanta hae ki tum kiyu khamosh ho aur tumhare Dil mae kiya chal raha hae

.........................................

Jald baazi achi chez nahi laikin panch baataun mae jaldi karna achi baat hae;

Mehmaan ki khatir tawazu karna

Mayat ki tajhees, takfeen wa tadfeen karna

Baliq ladki ka Nikah karwana

Karz ka ada karna

Gunaah se toba karna

...............................

Doosraun ke ghum se bekhabar rahne wala insaan, insaan nahi hosakta [Sheikh Sadi]

...........................................

Har aadmi mae koi na koi aeb zaroor hote hae, aqalmand woh hae jo apna aeb khud mehsoos karta hae aur bewaquf woh hae jo khud apna aeb mehsoos nahi karta balkeh duniya mehsoos karti hae [Hafiz Shirazi]

........................................

Jo shaqs bhi inteqam (revenge) ke tareeqe per qor karte rahta hae uska zakhem hamesha taza rahta hae [Hakim Bu'Ali Sina]

.....................................

Dost hazar ho to bhi kam hain aur dushman ek bhi ho to bahut ziyada hae

...........................................

Apne mulazim (naukar) se apne raaz kehna usko malik banane ke barabar hae (Aristotle)

........................................

Ek aalim ke saath ek ghante ki guftagu dus saal ke mutalae (study) se ziyada mufeed hae

..........................................

Gaali ka jawab na do, kabutar kawe ki boli nahi bolsakta

............................................

Yaad rakho ke jo shaqs koi aisi chez ki tareef kare jo tum mae nahi ho, to woh aisi burai se bhi tumko mansub (connect) karsakta hae jo tum mae nahi ho [Euclid]

.........................................

Aisa aalim jo zahed na ho aur aisa zahed jo aalim na ho, deen ko in do logoan se shaitaan se ziyada fitne ka andesha hae   

.........................................

Dana aadmi woh hae jo apni khamiyaan (shortcomings) dekhe, aur nadaan woh hae jo apni khubiyun per fakher kare

Dana=wise man

Nadaan = ignorant

4/14/16, 1:40:11 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🌾☘🌾☘🌾☘🌾☘

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

جمعة مبارك

"Love the neighbour as thy self"

Ye ek bahut hi mashoor Qol hae Essa Masih alehe salaam ka Injeel mae jo Christianity mae doosra sab se ahem commandment tasavur kiya jata, hukum e toheed yane Allah taala ko manne ke baad

Deen e Islam ne in tammam Ambia ki kitabaun ke achaiyun ko samet liya hae (brought togather) aur Koran e kareem mae jama kardiya hae

Deen Islam mae "padosi" ki utni hi ahmiyat wa qadar hae jitna ke Christianity mae hae, balkeh mae kahunga ke usse bhi ziyada hae

Rasul e kareem aur ahle baet e kiram ne bahut se aqwal "padosi" ke huquq ke taluq se bayan kiye hain

Hamare pass deen e Islam mae itni ziyada ahmiyat hae ke Moula Ali farmate hain ke mujhe kabhi kabhi ye gumaan (dil mae khyal ana) hota ke Rasulullah padosi ko wirasat mae na shareek karde (inheritance)

Majalis e Mustansaria mae jahan deen ke 7 saat farayaz aur 12 bara sunatain bataye hain waha bara sunnataun mae  "HIFZ UL JAAR" padosi ki hifazat karna bhi shammil hae

Koran ne teen kisim ke padosiun ka zikar farmaya hae

وَالْجَارِ ذِي الْقُرْبَىٰ وَالْجَارِ الْجُنُبِ وَالصَّاحِبِ بِالْجَنبِ

 Ek rishtedar padosi, ek padosi, aur ek pados mae saath rahne wala jaise safar ka saathi

Saat kisim ke padosi ye hain;

Ek woh padosi jo mommin bhai bhi hae aur rishtedar bhi hae, uske teen haq bante hain padosi ka haq, mommin bhai ka haq aur rishtedar hone ka haq

Doosra woh padosi hae jo rishtedaar hae, magar hum mazhab hum aqeeda nahi (from different religion) uske do haq bante hain

Ek woh hae jo padosi hae aur hum mazhab, hum aqeeda bhi hae, magar rishtedaar nahi uske bhi do haq hain

Ek woh padosi bhi hae jo sirf padosi hae, na rishtedari hae aur na hi hum mazhab hae uska sirf ek hi haq banta hae

Ek padosi woh hae jo tumhare kishti (boat) mae saath raha, usko bhi padosi ka haq hae

Ek woh bhi hae jo tumhari sawari (ghoda unt gadha waqaera) per saath safar kiya, woh bhi padosi gina jaega

Aur ek padosi woh hae jo tumhare taleem yane istefade ke darmiyan saath raha jisko hum classmate kehenge chahe woh madrese ka ho ya deeni asbaq mae saath raha ho, aise padosi ki sab se ziyada hurmat aur ahmiyat hae, muqable mae doosre tammam padosi saàthiyun ke

padosi ke mutaliq Rasulullah ki Hadees hae

أكرم جارك وان كان كافرا أو أكرم ضيفك كان كافرا

Tum padosi ko karamat wa izzat do agarche woh kafir hi kiyu na ho aur mehmaan ko karamat do agarche ke woh فاجر fajir kiyu na ho

Padosi ke taluq se 12 adaab ye hain

Padosi apne padosi ke ghar mae tak jhak (peeping) na kare

padosi ki baataun ko chup kar na sunne

(Not to listen to the private conversation secretly)

Agar tumko unki koi khangi (private & personal) baat malum hojae to usko raaz hi rakhe

(If you come to know something of your neighbours which is private you should keep it to yourself)

Tum unse us mauzu  (subject) per baat mat karo jo woh sunna pasand nahi karte hain

Tum unko woh chez mat dikhaya karo jo woh dekhna pasand nahi karte

Koi choti choti zaroorat ki chez woh talab kare to us'se inkar na karo

Woh agar kisi bhi halat ya haisiyat se agar tum se kamtar hain to unper fakher aur kibir na karo

Aur agar woh tum se kisi bhi haisiyat, yane chahe ilm ho ya daulat, ya aur koi baat mae tum se badhkar aur aala ho to hargis unse hasad na karo

Agar woh pareshan haal ho to jitna bhi tum se mumkin ho tum unki maddad karo

Tumko agar unki koi raaz ki baat malum hojae to usko chupae aur raaz hi rakho, ya agar woh koi raaz tum per zaher kare to usko amanat rakho logoan per zaher mat karo

Unko kisi kisim ki bhi takleef na pohunchao jaise ke aaj kal hota hae TV zor se chalate hain ya cheek cheek kar baatain karte hain, ya raat der tak zor zor se baatain karte hae isme har woh baat shammil hae jis'se padosi ko takleef hoti hae

Aur padosi ke tumko takleef pohunchane per sabar karo aur thandak wa sharafat se usko samjhao

Yeh sab baatain Allah taala ki taraf se mommin ka imtehan hae, aur in baataun per sabar karna wohi taqwa hae

Moula Ali farmate hae Char baatain insaan ke liye badi badbaqti (curse) hae bura padosi, buri aulad, buri aurat (biwi) aur tang chota ghar (cramped house)

Aur Rasulullah ne Moulana Ali ko wasiyat (nasihat) ki keh ae farzand tum safar karne se pehle safar ke saathi ke ba're mae jaan lo malumaat karlo aur ghar khreedne se pehle padosi ko dekh lo unke bare mae jaan lo

Moulana Ali ne to is hadd tak pados ke taluq se kaha hae

جنبوا موتاكم في مدافنهم جار السوء  فإن الجار الصالح ينفع في الآخرة كما ينفع في الدنيا

Apne mayat ko bure padosi ke pas dafan karne se bachao kiyunke nek acha padosi aakherat mae bhi ussi tarah faida deta hae jis tarah duniya ki zindagi mae deta hae

Humko hamare deen per qaem rahna hae to in padosiun ke huquq ko janna chahye aur usper amal karna chahye

وما توفيقي الا بالله العلي العظيم

☘🌾☘🌾☘🌾☘🌾

4/17/16, 1:58:23 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🌸🍀🌸🍀🌸🍀🌸🍀

 السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Kiya hi behtreen kalam farmaya hae Imam e Jafar e Sadiq Salwatullah aleha ne عفو (affo) ke bare mae, yane kisi ko maaf karne ke bare mae

Inteqam wa badla lene ki puri qudrat aur takhat (power & strength) rakhte huve bhi kisi ko maaf karna woh sunnat (tariqa) hae Ambia wa Mursaleen ki

Maaf karne وعفو ke bare mae aap farmate hain ke "affo" ka matlab ye hota hae ke ghalti karne wale per zaher mae bhi ilzaam na rakhe, aur batin mae bhi yane Dil se bhi us ghalti ko bilkul bhul jae aur us ghalti karne wale per aur ziyada ahsaan kare aur achai se pesh ae

عفو و غفران

"Affo wa Ghufraan" ye do Allah taala ke sifaat mae se hain jo Allah Tabaraka wa taala ne apne chuninda (selected) bandaun mae rakhe hain

Allah taala Koran majeed mae farmata hae

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

وَلْيَعْفُوا وَلْيَصْفَحُوا أَلَا تُحِبُّونَ أَن يَغْفِرَ اللَّهُ لَكُمْ وَاللَّهُ غَفُورٌ رَّحِيمٌ

Tum ko chahye ke tum unke ghaltiyaun ko maaf kardo, darguzar kardo, agar tum ye chahte ho ke Allah taala tum ko maaf kare darguzar kare, Allah taala Ghufuroon Raheem hae

Jo ek mommin bhai ko maaf nahi karsakta, woh kaise umeed rakh sakta hae ke Allah taala usko maaf karega

Nabi e kareem ne farmaya ke jo tumhare saath bura pesh aye uske saath tum achai se pesh ao, jo tum se taluq tod de tum uske saath taluq jodo, jo tumhare saath zulum kare usko maaf kardo, jo tum ko dene se roke usko tum ata karo, jo tum se bura chale tum usse ahsaan ke saath pesh ao,

 العفو  

"Al affo" Maaf karna woh Allah ke bhed (secret) mae se ek bhed hae jo Allah ke khaas bandaun ke dilaun mae moujud hota hae, yane maaf karna har insaan ke bas ki baat nahi

Rasulullah ne farmaya ke kiya tum mae koi abu Zamzam ke jaisa banna nahi chahta ?

Logoan ne pucha ke Abu zamzam kaun hae ?

Aap ne farmaya ke ye woh shaqs hae jo har roz Subah uthkar kehta ke mae ne sadqa kardiya yane maaf kardiya un tammam logoan ko jo mere saath ghalat kiye bura kiye

Moulana Ali ibn abi Talib Salawatullah alahe farmate hain

Jaldi se maaf kardena kareem logoan ke aqlaq hain

Maaf karna ek behtreen ahsaan hae

Aur farmaya ke badtareen insaan woh hae jo logoan ki laqzish ko maaf na kare aur doosraun ke aeb ko poshida na rakhe

Do baataun ke sawab ko tolna bahut mushkil hae ek to "maaf karna" aur doosra kisi ke saath "adal" karna

Aur farmaya maaf karke kabhi nadim (regret), aur saza (punishment) dekar kabhi insaan ko khush nahi hona chahye   

 Walid hazrat muqaddus hamesha kehta ke tum kisi se badla lene se ye baat bahut behter ke tum apne mamle ko Allah per chod do woh behtreen badla lene wala hae tum agar badla loge to hosakta hae ke insaaf na karsako aur ulta khisas mae pakde jao

Allah humko tawfeeq de ke hum ye baat samjhe, ke maaf karna ziyada mushkil hae badla lene se aur har haal mae ziyada behter hae

Koran kehta hae

.فمن عفا واصلح فاجره  علي الله

Jis ne maaf kiya aur islah kiya uska ajar Allah taala ke pass hae

🌸🍀🌸🍀🌸🍀🌸🍀

4/20/16, 1:11:59 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🕌🕌🕌🕌🕌🕌🕌🕌

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

15 Rajab ul Murajab ki mubarakbaad pesh hae Allah taala hum sab ki duaon ko darje qabuliat baqshe

Syedna wa Moulana Qazi un Nauman ne kiya hi behtreen andaz mae ek mommin ke adab aqlaq ko samjhaya hae jab ke woh Imam ke bargah mae hazir ho, ya phir unki majlis mae baithe, ya unse kalam kare

Ya aise behtreen adaab wa aqlaq hae ke humko tammam Aulia Allah duwaat aur hudood e deen ki bargah mae unka khyal rakhna chahye

Allah taala ki bargah mae Namaz ke qiyam ke liye Koran farma raha hae

وقوموا لله قانتين

Tum Allah taala ki bargaah mae itaat (total obedience) ke saath khede hojao, theek issi tarah Aima ke saamne bhi humko kheda rahna hae kiyunke unke zareeyeh Allah taala ka taqrub (nearness) hasil hota hae

Farmate hain ke agar Imam ke saamne kheda ho to namaz ki tarah seedha hokar khede rahe aur pure adab aur ahteram ko pesh e nazar rakhe aur apni nazar neechi rakhe

Farmate hae ke Imam ke saamne khede rahe to idhar udhar na dekhe bechani ka ishar na kare, khamoshi aur wiqar ko ikhteyar kare

Agar Imam kalam karne ka moqe de to us waqt tak kalaam kare Jab tak woh usko sunn rahe hain agar unki tawajuh doosri taraf ho to khamosh hojae aur jab tak dobara kalaam ke liye ijazat na de kalam na kare

Jab Imam se kalam ho to dhimi (low soft) awaaz mae baat kare aur kisi halat mae bhi Imam ki awaaz se awaaz bulund na kare jaisa koran farmata hae

يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا لَا تَرْفَعُوا أَصْوَاتَكُمْ فَوْقَ صَوْتِ النَّبِيِّ وَلَا تَجْهَرُوا لَهُ بِالْقَوْلِ كَجَهْرِ بَعْضِكُمْ لِبَعْضٍ أَن تَحْبَطَ أَعْمَالُكُمْ وَأَنتُمْ لَا تَشْعُرُونَ

Ae emaan walo tum apni awaazain (voice) Nabi ki awaaz se unchi na karo aur tum jis tarah apas mae cheekh cheekh kar baat karte ho us tarah Nabi se baat na karo warna tumhare amaal gira diye jainge aur is baat ka tum ko ahsaas bhi nahi hoga

Aur agar Imam khud tum se mukhatib (address) ho to tum khamoshi se unke alfaz ko bahut qor se suno, Aulia Allah ke alfaz ilm, hikmat wa Danish (wisdom) ka khazana hote hain samajhne wale ke liye bahut saare faide usme poshida hote hain

Agar Imam kisi mehfil mae kisi shaqs se poshida guftagu karna chahta hae to jo log khreeb baithe hain unko dur hojana chahye

Imam ki majlis mae hazereen e majlis mae kisi ko jaes nahi ke woh apas mae poshida guftagu kare, ya Imam ko chodkar apas mae ek doosre se guftagu kare

Imam ki majlis mae hone wali tammam ter guftagu hazereen e majlis  ke zimme amanat hae  jaisa ki Hadees mae aya hae

أن المجالس امانات وان لم توتمن من فيها

Har majlis amanat hoti hae chahe majlis ke shuroka (participants) ko paband na bhi kiya gaya ho

Imam ke huzoor Mae hazir hone wale har aadmi ko chahye ke woh ladai jhagde behes mubahesa hujjat wa takrar se aeteraaz (avoid) kare

Imam ki majlis mae angdai lena jamai lena, ungliun ko todna (chatkana) ya beja be zaroorat harkat karna mayub baat hae aur agar Imam baithne kehe to ajisi inkesari fakhirana andaz mae baithe ye tammam baatain haram nahi hae lekin bure afaal hain be adabi hae, Imam ki majlis balkeh har ilm wa hikmat ki majlis is laeq hae ke in kamaun se bacha jae

Imam ke saamne logoan ki qibat karna, Aeb jui karna, beja gila shikwa karna takeh loqoan ko Imam ki nazar se gira dena bahut buri baat hae

Aulia Allah to mommineen ke aeb ko chupate (hide) hae unki purdah poshi karte hain, woh to darguzar se kaam lete hain

Ye ek badi haqeeqat hae ke Aulia Allah aur buzrugane deen momineen ke aeb aur laqzishaun ki purdah poshi karte hain wo aisa na karte to logoan ke bure kartoot (bad deeds) bad amaliyaan khuli kitab ki tarah sab logoan per zaher hojati

Hadees e shareef hae

لو تكاشفتم ما تدافنتم

Agar tum ek doosre ke bad amaliyun (khrab kaam) se waqif hojao to apne murdaun ko dafan karna bhi chod doge

Iska matlab ye hae ke agar logoan ke aeb zaher hojain to log ek doosre janaze mae hazari dene bhi nafrat karne lagenge

Kehna ka matlab yehi hae ke har insaan mae aeb hae tum uski purdah poshi karo

Isiliye moulana Ali ne farmaya hae ke mae kisi mommin ko burai karte huve dekhu to mae usse apni chadar se dhamp Lunga

Aur Imam e Zainulabideen farmate hae ke woh shaqs jo logoan ko mukamil janta hae woh unke saath zindagi nahi guzar sakta hae

Duniya mae koi insaan aisa nahi ki jisme koi aeb na ho koi kami na ho, Allah taala humko tawfeeq de ke hum apne aeb aur ghaltiyun ko durust kare banisbat doosraun ke aeb aur ghaltiyaun ko nikale

🕌🕌🕌🕌🕌🕌🕌🕌

4/21/16, 9:53:28 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 💦💦💦💦💦💦💦💦

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

جمعة مبارك 🌹

Nabi e kareem ka qol e mubarak hae Sadqa wa khairaat ke adaab ke taluq se

عطاوها قبلالصدقة المسألة

واخفاؤها مع العطاؤها

وكتمانها بعدالعطا

وان كان فرضا اظهره

Adaab e Sadqa ye hae ke maangne wale ke maangne se pehle dena (yane usko maangne ki sharmindagi se bacha lo)

[Ye baat jab hi mumkin hae jab insaan rishte daraun ikhwan e momineen padosi dost ahbab se taluq rakhta hae aur unki khabar lete rahta hae]

Khamoshi se chupa kar sadqa karna

Sadqa dene ke baad usko raaz rakhna logoan mae charcha nahi karna

Agar yeh uska dena (sadqa) farz hae to usko zaher kar sakta hae jaise ke zakat hae

Aur moulana Ali farmate hain ;

احي المعروف باماتته

Neki ko maut dekar zinda karo

Haqeeqat mae Neki karne wala us neki karne ka ziyada mohtaj hae banisbat usse jisper ahsaan kiya jata hae kiyunke ahsaan karne wale ko uska ajar sawab wa inam jo usne diya hae, ahsaan kiya hae, usse bahut ziyada milta hae isliye dene wale ko hargis lene wale se ahsaan ka shukriya talab nahi karna chahye

Isi baat ko koran e kareem ne kiya hi behtreen andaz mae bayan kiya hae

إِنْ أَحْسَنتُمْ أَحْسَنتُمْ لِأَنفُسِكُمْ وَإِنْ أَسَأْتُمْ فَلَهَا

Tum jo ahsaan kiye woh apne hi nafs apni hi jaan ke liye kiye aur jo tum ne bura kiya uska bhi baar (responsibility) tum hi per hae

Issi tarah Adaab e aleel (bimar) ke liye Rasul kareem ka qol e mubarak hae

دوام الحمد والثنا

استعمال التضرع والدعا

اظهارالعجز والفاقة لرب اسماء

واستعمال الدواءمع الاستعانة الخالق الدواء

Bimar ko chahye ke woh hamesha Allah taala ka Hamd wa sana (tareef) karta rahe

Aajisi wa tazaro zari ke saath Allah taala se Dua maange

Aapni aajisi wa majboori ka sirf apna rabbe subhanahu ke saamne is'har kare

Aur Allah tabaraka wa taala se maddad chahte huve dawa (medicine) ka istemal kare jo haqeeqat mae dawa ka bhi khaliq hae

Moulana Ali salwatullah alehe farmate hain

دواء كل داء كتمانه

Har marz ki dawa us marz ko logoan se chupana hae   

Allah taala Koran e majeed mae irshad farmata hae

واذا مرضت فهو يشفين

Jab tum bimar hote ho to woh (Allah taala) shifa (cure) deta hae

Allah taala hum ko tawfeeq de ke hum is deen ke falsafe wa nazriye ko samjhe aur us lihaz se amal kare

💦💦💦💦💦💦💦💦

4/22/16, 3:39:15 AM: Asif Hussain: SubhanAllah! Thank you Ishaq Bhai for these constant messages of enlightenment! Hope salaat zawaal went well for all of you!

4/23/16, 2:16:36 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ☘🌿☘🌿☘🌿☘🌿

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Imam Ahmed ibne Abdullah salwatullah alehe apne Rasael mae jo maruf (known as) hae "Rasael e Ikhwan us Safa" mae ek Hindustan ke musalmaan Badshah ka waqae bayan farmaya hae

Hindustan ke ek musalmaan Badshah jab maut ke khreeb huva to usne apne wali e ahad (Crown prince) jo uske baad Badshah hone wala tha usko bulakar nasihat ki

Badshah ne kaha ae mere farzand mae tumko 30 nasihatain karta hun usme se 10 tumhare Nafs aur aakherat ko behter banaegi

10 nasihatain tum ko duniya mae faida degi, achi pursukoon aur behter zindagi degi aur tumhari rozi mae ziyadati aur barkat ata karegi

Aur 10 nasihatain woh tumhari badshahat ko masboot banaegi aur tumhare mulk ki siyasat ko durust rakhegi

10 nasihatain jo tumhari Duniya ko behter karegi woh hain

1) sab se pehle tum ache Aqlaq (character) ikhteyar karo

2) ache adaab (manners) rakho

3) sacha wada karo aur apne ahad ko pura karo

صدق الوعد والوفاء بالعهد

 4) qudrat wa taqat rakhte huve bhi maaf karne wala bano

العفو عند القدرة

5 ) Hasad (jealousy) chod do aur khud mae woh qabiliyat (qualities) paida karo jis baat ki wajeh se tum doosraun se hasad karte ho

6 ) tum puri koshish ye karo ke tumhara koi dushman na ho, aur agar koi dushman ho bhi to tum usper itna ahsaan karo ke woh ahsaan uske liye saza banjae

7) Allah ne jo bhi tumko naemat ata ki hae chahe woh maal wa daulat ho, ya ilm wa fazal, tum uske ghalat aur beja istemal se bacho

8) tum apni shehwataun ko apni sharm wa haya aur murawat per qalib aane na do

9 ) tum duniya ko aakherat per kabhi bhi tarjih (prefence) na do

أن لا توثر دنياك علي آخرتك

Yaqinan Jab Allah Subhanahu tumhari is baat ko dekhega to tumko Duniya bhi ata kardega

Jaisa ke kaha gaya hae ke Allah taala ne duniya ko wahi وحي ki

Ae duniya jo tere peeche pada raha bas to bhi us'se puri khidmat le aur jisne meri khidmat ki (yane meri bandagi ki) bas ab to uski khidmat kar

يا دنيا من خدمك فاستخدميه، ومن خدمني  فاخدميه   

Kehne ka matlab ye hae ke jo insaan duniya ki shewataun ko, lazataun ko, maal aur daulat ko, hasil karne ke liye puri zindagi mehnat aur mashaqat mae padha raha ae duniya to usko aur mehnat mae, pareshani mae mubtela kar aur jisne Allah taala ki bandagi ki uski ae Duniya to khidmat kar

10) tum un mamlaat mae dakhal andazi na karo jisme tumhara, Allah taala ko dakhal andazi karna pasand nahi, tum unhi baataun mae mashqul raho jo Allah taala pasand farmate hae aur uski khushnudi ho

Allah taala hum ko tawfeeq de ke hum bhi in nasihataun per amal kare aur apni duniya ki zindagi ko khush gawar aur behter banae

🌿☘🌿☘🌿☘🌿☘

4/27/16, 10:52:08 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🌾🌿🌾🌿🌾🌿🌾🌿

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Aksar logoan ki farmaesh per us Hindustan ke Badshah ki wasiyat (nasihat) jo unhune apne wali e ahad ko farmaya tha uske 10 wasiyataun ka zikar pesh hae jo uske Nafs aur aakherat ko behter banaegi

1) sab se pehli aur sab se ahem (the first and the most important) woh Allah ki توحيد toheed karna hae, yane uska iqrar hae, Allah ka kiya tasavur karna, usko kaisa mana jae, aur uski khushnudi ki taraf Dua, tazaro zari, aur munajaat ke zareeyeh se aage badhna hae

2) Allah taala ke bheje huve Rasulaun ka iqrar karna unko sachana aur un tammam baataun ko qabool karna jo woh Allah taala ki taraf se leker aye hain.

الإقرار برسله وتصديقهم والقبول منهم   

3) Allah taala ki bheji huvi kitabain jo unper (rasulaun) per nazil ki gai thi uski تصديق tasdik karna

التصديق بالكتب المنزلة من عنده عليهم

4) "Namus" shariat e Mohammedi ki hifazat karna, uski pabandi karna, aur logoan ke saath sahi mamlaat karna

حفظ الناموس وسياسة الناس

5) logoan ke saath Allah ki khatir, tawazu se pesh ana, acha sulook karna aur mael milap rakhna aur fakher ko chod dena apni badai apne akad pan ko khatam kardena

التواضع لله وترك الفخر

6) "Zulum" wa "Jor" ko puri tarah chod dena

ترك الظلم والجور

Zulum ke ma'ne hote hae kisi bhi chez ko uske sahi muqam per nahi rakhna aur "Jor" جور kehte hae ziyadati karna yane maarna todna, dantna,badd kalami karna yane har woh baat karna jo saamne wala deserve nahi karta hae aur jiske karne ka aapko haq wa ikhteyar nahi hae,

Jo Allah ke bande per zulum karega to Allah tabaraka wa taala uska dushman hoga aur jiska Allah dushman hoga uske liye ruswai ke siwae chara na hoga

7) Aurataun se mael milap aur unki baithakaun mae baithna tarak kardena, unki baataun ki taraf kaan lehkana se mardaun ki aqal mae fasaad paida hojata hae

ترك المخالطة النساء والاجتماع معهن والاصغاءالي قولهن، فإنها تفسد عقول الرجال اذا اصغوا اليهن

8) Tum sharab aur har nashe ki chez ko chod do kiyunkeh woh tumhari aqal ki dushman hae, aur yaad rakho ki tumhari aqal batini hasiyat se Allah taala ki khalifa hae, jisne bhi Allah ke khalifa per kisi aur ko musalat kiya (gives away control) uski aqal chale jaegi, uska dushman usper ghalib ajaega aur Allah taala usko tabah wa taraj kardega (will totally destroy the person) aur jiski aqal chale gai to uska na deen baqi raha, na ilm, aur na uski murawat (sanjeedgi), na haya na muraqeba (concentration, or clarity of thought) aur jiski ye halat hojae to us insaan ki maut hi sabhaun ke liye behter hae

8) karamat ke saath pesh ana, sakhawat karna Nafs mae itni kushadgi paida karna ki kisi ko bhi asani se maaf karsako, aur ye ke har ek ke saath ahsaan achai fazal wa karam aur ahteram ke saath pesh aana chahe woh tumhara dost ho ya dushman

10) aur aakhri wasiyat ye hae ke qol ka sadiq hona hamesha sach kehna aur amanataun ko ada karna, chahe woh nek shaqs ki amanat ho ya phir kisi badd aur fajir ki ho

Ye behtreen nasihatain Imam Ahmed bin Abdullah  ne apni mashoor kitab  "Rasael e Ikhwan us Safa" mae bayan farmaya hae

🌾🌿🌾🌿🌾🌿🌾🌿

4/30/16, 2:03:24 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 💢💠💢💠💢💠💢💠

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Kisi Hakim ka kiya hi behtreen qol hae jismani zindagi aur uski maut ke liye, aur Nafsani, Roohani, Abadi, (eternal) zindagi ke taluq se

Kehte hain;

Jismani Zindagi kiya hae, siwae Nafs ka jism ko istemal karne ke

Aur Jismani maut kiya hae siwae us Nafs ka jism ko istemal karna chod dene ke

To malum ye huva ke "Nafs" hi asal chez hae jism ki itni ahmiyat nahi uska maqsad kuch aur hae, aur ye ke maut ke baad Nafs hi hamesha baqi rahta hae ussi ki aakherat mae zindagi hae, wohi taraqi karta hae, ussi ko jannat milti hae aakherat ki tammam naematain ussi Nafs ke liye hain

Issi baat ki wazahat koran e kareem ki ye ayaat karti hae

 يَا أَيَّتُهَا النَّفْسُ الْمُطْمَئِنَّةُ

 ارْجِعِي إِلَىٰ رَبِّكِ رَاضِيَةً مَّرْضِيَّةً

 فَادْخُلِي فِي عِبَادِي

 وَادْخُلِي جَنَّتِي

Ae Nafs e mutmaina (satisfied soul) palat aa apne Rabb ki taraf woh tujh se razi aur tu usse razi aur dakhil hoja mere bandaun mae aur dakhil hoja meri jannat mae

Nafs ki ahmiyat, uska maut ke baad baqi rahna aur maut kiyu rakhi gai uski kiya hikmat hae is haqeeqat ko kiya hi behtreen andaz mae misaal dekar Moulana Imam Ahmed ibne Abdullah salwatullah alehe ne farmaya hae

Aap farmate hain ke tum jism ko ek kishti (boat) khyal karo aur Nafs ko malah (kishti chalane wala captain) aur duniya ke tumhare nek amaal, ibadatain jo tum ne duniya mae kiye hain usko tum tumhara tijarat ka samaan samjho, duniya ko ek samandar khyal karo aur is duniya ki zindagi ko us dariya (sea) ke safar ka waqt, maut ko sahel (sea shore) khyal karo jiski taraf tumhara irada hae woh tumhara destination hae, aur aakherat tumhara wo muqam hae jahan tum woh samaan ki tijarat karoge aur jannat tumhara profit hae, kamai hae, jo tum samaan laye ho uski kamai hae aur Allah taala ko tum us mulk ka badshah khyal karo

Aap farmate hae ke tajir (businessmen) agar salamti (safety) ke saath dariya ka safar pura karle aur apne samaan ke saath sahel (coast) per pohunch jae to ab uske paas koi wajeh (reason) nahi ki woh (shore) per na utre (disembark) aur us shaher mae samaan na beche (sell) aur jab maal bechega tab hi to woh kamaega, chahe uska safar kitna bhi acha raha ho, kitna bhi safar mae maza (enjoy) kiya ho magar ultimately manzil hi uska maqsad hae jahan usko maal se nafa (profit) kamana hae, inam lena hae

Issi tarah ka mamla Nafs ka jism ke saath hae, jab insaan apni duniya ki zindagi puri karta hae nek amaal karke achi saaf suthri zindagi guzarta hae,  ache aqlaq se apne aapko arasta (decorate) karta hae, deeni aeteqadaat ko sahi aur durust rakhta hae, shariat ki pabandi karta hae, duniya ki tammam moujudaat e jismani ho ya roohani uske haqaeq ko jaan leta hae, aur jab ke woh apni umar ke aakhri hisse mae pohunchta hae to lazimi tor per uska jism kamzoor hone lagta hae, us waqt us Nafs ke liye koi tadbeer nahi, koi wajeh nahi ke jism ke saath baqi rahe, uske liye behteri issi mae hae ke jism se alag hojae aur wohi Nafs ka jism ko chodna uski jismani maut hae

Agar maut na hoti to kaise woh Nafs aasmaan ki bulundiyun per chadhta, kaise woh Malaeka ke zumre (group) mae shammil hosakta, aur kaise apne Rabb e Raheem se mulaqat karsakta

Ye theek issi tarah hae jaise ek janeen (embryo) 9 mahine maa ke paet mae badhne ke baad uske liye lazim hojata hae ke woh màa ke paet se baher nikle warna woh kaise ye wasi (vast) duniya ko dekh sakega, aur kaise ye duniya ki naemataun ko hasil karsakega, kaise woh apne organs jo usne apne maa ke paet mae banaya hae uska faida utha sakega

Issi liye kaha jata hae ke Maut ek Hikmat hae, Rehmat hae aur Naemat hae

كل نفس ذائقة الموت ثم إلينا ترجعون

Allah taala farmata hae, har Nafs ko maut ka maza chakna hae aur phir hamari hi taraf laut kar ana hae

يعلمون ظاهرا من الحياة الدنيا وهم عن الآخرة هم غافلون

Log zaheri duniya ki zindagi  ko jante hain aur aakherat se bilkul qafil (ignorant) hain

والآخرة خير وأبقى

Aakherat bahut behtar hae aur baqi rahne wali hae

Isiliye hum per lazim hae, zaroori hae, ke hum apne nafs ko ja'ne uske behter se behter banane ki koshish kare jis tarah hum apne jism ko behter, sahetmand, tandrust, wa khubsurat banane ki koshish karte hain

5/3/16, 1:41:42 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ☘🐾☘🐾☘🐾☘🐾

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Zikar huva tha "Hikmat e Maut" ke taluq se ke aakhir ye Maut kiyu rakhi gai hae ? Iska maqsad kiya ?  iske peeche raaz kiya ?

Saheb e Rasael e Ahmedia kiya hi behtreen asaan misaal dekar is baat ko samjhaya hae

Aap farmate hain ke har chez jo wajud (existance) mae aati hae, badhti (grows) hae, uski ek ibteda aur ek inteha hoti hae, (the beginning & the end) uski ek qayaat (purpose) hoti hae, jiski taraf woh taraqi karti hae aage badhti hae

Aap farmate hain ke مسقط نطفة (attachment of sperm with egg) woh zindagi ki ibteda hae, aur bache ki jismani wiladat (birth) woh uski inteha hae

Issi tarah se bache ki duniya mae wiladat bhi ek ibteda hae jiski inteha woh maut hae

Jis tarah se bache ka maa ke paet mae ibteda hone (growth of the embryo in mothers womb) ka faida woh bache ki wiladat (birth) ke baad hota hae, jaise ke bacha apni jismani quwat (strength) aur aaza (organs & limbs) ko paedaesh ke baad hi istemal karta hae, theek issi tarah ka mamla Nafs ka bhi hae ke woh apna pura faida jism ki qaed (freedom from physical dimensions) se azaad hone, chutne ke baad hi utha sakta hae

Kiyunke jismani maut hi insaan ke Nafs ki asal paedaesh hae

Jaisa ke kaha gaya hae jism ka marna woh hi asal Nafs ki paedaesh hae, theek ussi tarah jaisa maa ke paet ke bacha (embryo) ki paedaesh woh màa ke paet yane rahem (womb) se baher aana per hi hae

Jis tarah paedaesh mae badi hikmat hae, theek ussi tarah maut mae bhi badi hikmat hae

Jis tarah janeen (embryo) maa ke paet mae apni surat banata hae quwatain mukamil karta hae, apni khilqat ko masboot karta hae, lekin phir bhi woh in tammam baataun ka faida maa ke rahem mae nahi uthata, balkeh paedaesh ke baad duniya ki zindagi mae uthata hae

Issi tarah nafs bhi jism ke saath rahkar apni khilqat, banwat, surat e roohani, ko mukamil karta hae magar woh uska faida jism ko chodne ke baad, jismani maut ke baad hi aakherat mae uthata hae Issi liye kehte hae ke maut badi hikmat hae, bada poshida raaz hae

Baqa e abadi, hamesha ki zindagi (eternal life) woh jismani maut ke baad hi mumkin hae

To malum ye huva ke maut hi sabab hae (cause) hayat e abadi ki

Aur hayat (life) e jismani, duniya ki zindagi woh sabab banti hae maut ke liye haqeeqat mae

Qor kare, (think) agar insaan is duniya mae hi nahi aata to uske liye mumkin hi nahi ke usko maut aye

Isiliye insaan agar duniya ke wajud mae aye hae to lazim hogaya ke maut bhi zaroor aegi

To yaqeen karle ke maut ek rehmat hae, hikmat hae, naemat hae magar ye sab uske liye jisne apne 'Nafs' ko acha karliye tayar karliye mukamil karliye us aalam ke qabil bana liye

وان الدار الاخرة لهي الحيوان

Haqeeqat mae agar zindagi hae to woh Dar e aakherat mae hae kaash ke log is baat ko jante

Duniya ki zindagi to ek Aasmaesh hae, imtehan hae, har lamhe ghum hae, pareshani hae, takleef hae, dard hae, bimari hae, sadme hain....

Kash ki hum 'haqeeqi  zindagi', 'maut', 'Nafs' ke wajud aur aakherat ko hanare deeni nazriye se samjhe takeh duniya ka koi ghum, ghum na lage, koi takleef hokar bhi ahsaas na ho, koi pareshani, pareshan na kare
