6/9/16, 1:13:39 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ♢♢♢♢♢♢♢♢♢♢♢♢

*السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته*

*بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم*

*جمعة مبارك*   🌹

Allah taala ne Ramazan e shareef ko *Sabar* ka mahina banaya hae aur sabar ka ajar woh *Jannat* hae

Yeh hamdardi khlus mohabbat wa bhai'chargi (brotherhood) ka mahina hae

Is maah e mubarak mae har mommin ki rozi mae isafa kiya jata hae aur usme barkat hoti hae

Is mahine mae Rozedar ko iftar karane ka bada hi sawab hae, uske gunaah maaf honge aur jahannam ki aag se woh azad kiya jaega aur iske baujud Rozedar ke ajar mae bhi koi kami nahi ki jaegi

Har shaqs apni taqat ke hisaab se iftar karae agar ek ghunt doodh aur ek khajoor hi kiyu na ho aise shaqs ko Allah taala jannat ke houz se aisa sharbat pilaega ke woh phir kabhi piyasa na hoga

Ramazan e mubarak ka pehla hissa woh *REHMAT* ka hae, darmiyani (middle) hissa woh *MAQFERAT* hae aur aakhri hissa *"ITQE MIN NAR NAAR"* dozaq (jahannam hell) ki aag se azadi hae (10 din ke teen hisse jisko dahika kehte hain)

Insaan ko chahye ke apne khadim, naukar, gulam se is mahine mae kaam kam le (to reduce there burden of work) jo aisa karega Allah taala usko maaf karega aur jahannam se azad karega

Is mahina ki char qaslatain hae, do se tum Allah ko razi karoge aur do tum chod nahi sakte, do jis se Allah taala tum se razi hoga woh

*kalme shahadat*

            *لااله إلا الله*

ka padhna aur doosra Allah taala se *Isteqfar* ka talab karna hae

Do baatain tum nazar andaz nahi karsakte (one should not ignore) woh tumhara *Jannat ka sawal karna* hae aur *Jahannam se bachne ki ilteja karna*, aur yehi Hamari Shehrullah Ramazan ki tasbeeh hae

*لااله إلاالله أستغفر الله اللهم إني أسألك الجنة واعوذبك من النار*

Hum kaleme shahadat padhkar Allah taala ki toheed karte hain phir isteqfar yane maafi talab karte hain aur Dua maangte hae *"Ae Allah hum tujh se sawal karte hain Jannat ka aur panah mangte hae Jahannam se"*

Jis shaqs ke shaher e Ramazan mae gunaah maaf na huve to ab uske ainda saal Ramazan tak maaf hona ka imkan (chances) nahi siwae iske ke woh Haj per jae aur *Arafat* per jaane ka moqa mi'le aur wahan maqferat talab kare

Rasul e khuda ne farmaya ke har chez ki zakat hae aur badan ki zakat woh Roza rakhna hae

*Rasulullah ne janab Asama bin Zaid* ko nasihat farmate huve kha _"tum Jannat ka raasta ikhteyar karo aur idhar udhar mat hato"_

*Asama* ne arz kiya ke _ye jannat ka raasta kaise tae (cover) kiya jae ?_

Rasulullah ne farmaya _uska asan tariqa ye hae, keh_

_garmi ke dinaun mae piyasa rahna yane Roza rakhna, aur apne Nafs ko duniya ki lazataun se dur rakhna, Ae Osama, Roza rakhna jahannam se bachane wali dhal (shield) hae_

Aap ne ek waqt farmaya ke roza ye nahi hae ke tum khana pina chod do balke roza har woh baat ko tark (discard) kardena hae, avoid karna hae jo Allah taala ko napasand ho

Aap hi ne farmaya ke dil ka roza zabaan ke Roze se ziyada behter hae aur zabaan ka roza paet (stomach) ke roze se bahut behter hae

Aur phir farmaya ke tumhare *Nafs* ka bhi roza hae aur woh tumhare *Hawaas e khumsa* (5 senses) ko gunahaun se bure aur khrab kaam se dur rakhna hae aur tammam asbab e shar (things which leads to gunah) se Dil ko khali rakhna hae isiliye kehte hain ki _'Dil ko gunah ke bare mae sochne se bhi dur rakhna, khane ko paet se rokne se ziyada behter hae'_

*صوم النفس عن لذات الدنيا أنفع الصيام*

Nafs ko duniya ki lazataun se rokna woh sab se acha roza hae

Allah taala ka bada ahsaan hae keh hamare gunahun ki maqferat ke liye itne asbab aur zareeyeh Allah taala ne  banaye hae aur itni sahulat ata farmai hae

Allah taala ka shukur aur ahsaan hae ke usne hamare liye Ramazan e kareem ka mahina banaya hae aur usme Rozaun ko rakha jis'se hamare Nafs wa jism ki safai hae, Ae Allah tabaraka wa Taala humko rozaun ke karne per maddad farma hum apne tammam azaa (limbs & organs) ko gunahun se bach'ain aur un azaa ko sirf teri jin baataun mae khushi ho ussi mae kaam mae lae

Hum apne kanaun (ears) se koi laqo (useless) behuda aur bekaar baat na sune, aankhun (eyes) se koi buri aur haram chez ko na dekhein, haram chez ki taraf haath na badhaein, aur koi buri jagaah khadam na uthain, jis'se hum ko Allah Rasul aur shariat ne manna kiya huva hae aur hamara kalaam sirf Allah Rasul aur walian e Amar (Imam) ki farmabardari aur taat mae hi ho

Hamare tamman aamal mae, na riyakari ho, na dikhawa ho, na shohrat (popularity) ho balkeh sirf aur sirf Allah taala ki khushi razamandi aur uski taraf irada ho,

Ae Allah Humko taqat aur himmat de ke hum is mahine ko teri ibadat se bhar'dain, uske awqat ko teri hi farmabardari aur taat mae besar (spend) kardain, din mae Roza rakhne ki taqat de aur raat mae jaag kar ibadat karne ki aur teri bargaah mae ajizi, aah wa zari (humility & repentence) khushu wa khuzu ke saath pura karein

Ae Allah mujhe, susti, kaheli, ghaflat, bezaargi, aur uske jaise tammam baataun se mehfooz rakh takeh mae puri khushdili aur itmenan se teri ibadat karsaku   

*اللهم ارزقني قيام ليلها وصيام نهارها صبرا وإيمانا واحتسابا واجعل ثوابي علي ذلك الجنة*  

♢♢♢♢♢♢♢♢♢♢♢♢

6/12/16, 8:29:51 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🍃🍃🍃🍃🍃🍃🍃🍃🍃

*السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته*

*بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم*

*Moulana Ali ibn e Abi Talib* farmate hain *عابد* abid (ibadat guzar bande) ki teen nishani hae, *Namaz, Zakat, aur Roza*.

Aap ne apni aulad aur ahle baet ko wasiyat farmate keh

_mae tum ko Allah ke taqwa ki wasiyat karta hun, aur Zakat ke ada karne ki takid karta hun, woh Allah ke qusse (anger wrath) ko thanda karti hae_

Rasulullah ka irshad hae keh jo koi Allah ki baqshish mae se ek hissa (zakat) khush dili se ada kare to uske maal mae kabhi bhi nuqsan nahi hoga

Aur phir farmaya ke zameen ho ya darya kisi ka bhi maal barbaad nahi hota siwae uska jisne Zakat e maal ada nahi kiya

*Zakat* ke zareeyeh tum apne maal ko mehfooz karlo

*Sadqe* ke zareeyeh apne bimaraun ka ilaj kiya karo

*Duaon* se balaun aur musibataun ko (calamities) ko roko

*Saqawat* se apne Nufus ko rihai dilao

*Moulana Imam e Baqar* Salwatullah alehe farmate hain

Zakat dene se maal hargis kam nahi hota chahe woh zameen per ho ya dariya mae, woh maal hargis tabah wa halak bhi nahi hosakta jiski Zakat barabar ada kardi gai hae

Rasulullah ka irshad hae ke Zakat ada karne se maal ghat'ta nahi, (does not reduce) aur Zakat rok rakhne se maal badhta nahi (and if you reduce zakat your wealth will not increase)

Koran e majeed mae irshad hae

يَمْحَقُ اللَّهُ الرِّبَا وَيُرْبِي الصَّدَقَاتِ وَاللَّهُ لَا يُحِبُّ كُلَّ كَفَّارٍ أَثِيمٍ

Allah taala suud سود {usury the action of lending money at unreasonable high rate of interest unethical immortal monetary loan which is unfair & abusive} ko mita deta hae khatam kardeta aur khairaat aur sadqa mae barkat paida karta hae usko badhata hae aur Allah taala kisi na shukre gunahgaar ko dost nahi rakhta

*Moulana Ali Salwatullah alehe* farmate hae ke mae ne Rasulullah se suna hae mommin ka Sadqa yane Zakat, shaitan ke jabde (jaws) ko cheer kar (tearing the jaws) nikalta hae aur poshida sadqa (khair khairat) woh rab ke qusse (anger wrath) ko thanda karta hae aur tum jab sadqa do to seedhe haath se do is khadar chupa (hide) kar ki baye haath ko bhi khabar na ho

*Farz Sadqa* woh *Zakat* hae jisko alaniya (openly) Imam e waqt ye unke muqrar karda Duwaat ko dena hae

Sadqa farz ke alawa jo tatawa hae jisko hum khair khairaat kehte hain usme insaan ko iqteyar hae ke woh dena chahte hae to de aur nahi dena chahe nahi de aur chupa kar dena woh sab se behter wa afzal hae

*Moulana Ali Ibne Abi Talib* ka irshad hae phode, phunsi, dubna, jalna deewar girne se zakhmi hona, is tarah se 70 bimariun ko Sadqa dafa karta hae (gives protection)

Allah taala ne apne bandaun per apni kitab e kareem ke zareeyeh Zakat farz kiya hae, aur usko pure hisaab se ada karne wala mutaqi aur ameen khelata hae

Allah taala ka irshad hae Zakat ke liye

وَمَا آتَيْتُم مِّن رِّبًا لِّيَرْبُوَ فِي أَمْوَالِ النَّاسِ فَلَا يَرْبُو عِندَ اللَّهِ وَمَا آتَيْتُم مِّن زَكَاةٍ تُرِيدُونَ وَجْهَ اللَّهِ فَأُولَٰئِكَ هُمُ الْمُضْعِفُونَ

Jo tum suud (usury) dete ho ke woh logoan ke maal mae badhe to Allah taala ke nasdik usme badhai nahi hoti magar tum jo Zakat dete ho usse Allah taala ki razamandi bhi hasil hoti hae aur ussi ki barkat se logoan ka maal behisab badhta hae

Zakat ka Haq pura ada karne se Nafs mae nishaat (satisfaction, contentment) aur fazilat paida hoti hae

*Moulana Imam Hakim Be Amrillah* ne *Moulana Ali* se riwayat ki hae ke Rasul e khuda ne mommin ko apne Imam se apne maal ki Zakat Jo wajib hoti hae chuppane se mana kiya aur farmaya ke ye harkat *نفاق* nifaq hae

Aur farmaya ki jis per Zakat wajib ho aur usne ada nahi kiya to Allah taala uski adaegi baqaer uski Namaz nahi qabool karta aur issi tarah dhoke aur fareb se kamaya huva sadqa bhi qabool nahi karta, aur jo shaqs haram kaamaun se nahi rukta uski Zakat bhi qabool nahi karta

Allah taala humko in buraiyun se mahfoos rakhe aur is mubarak farz e deen Zakat jiski ahmiyat namaz ke baad hae uska paband banae

🍃🍃🍃🍃🍃🍃🍃🍃

6/13/16, 4:09:21 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: <‎video omitted>

6/14/16, 1:39:58 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■

□□□□□□□□□□□□□□□□□□□

*السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته*

*بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم*

Allah ka Ahsaan hae ke Shehrullah ka pehla Dahika (10 days) mukamil huve

Aaj 11 Shehrullah e mauzam youm e wafat hae *'Fateh Uloom' Hazrat Moulana Almansub Fatehullah saheb ibne al Mansub ul Kareem Moulana Farhat Ali saheb muqaddus* ka

Aapki paedaesh *3* Shaban e kareem *1284* Hijri Barode mae Jumua ke mubarak din huvi aap apne buzrug bhai *Syedna Dai Gulam Hussain Saheb Muqaddas* se umar mae 10 saal chote the

Aap bachpan mae 7 saal ki umar mae Koran e majeed mukamil karliye the aur saath hi sahife ki puri duain yaad kar liye the

Aapko 11 saal ki umar mae *Dar ul uloom Deoband* bheja gaya tha jahan per Syedna Dai Gulam Hussain, saheb Moulvi Yakoob Ali saheb aur Mulla Gayasuddin saheb pehle se hi taleem hasil kar rahe the magar ek saal mae aap saqt bimar hogae aur bahut hi buri halat mae aapko wapas hyderabad laya gaya tha phir dobara aap wapas ja na sake

Ilm ke shoq mae aap Hyderabad mae bhi awaam ke bade bade uloma ke pas Farsee Arabi Adab (literature) Falsafa Mantaq (logic) Hadees Tafseer aur iske alawa bahut se aur subjects mae maharat hasil karliye aapki Ilmi parwaz itni thi ke aap _aalim fazil kamil_ (grading in Arabic madresas) ki sab kitabain padh liye the

Aap ne ek dukan Gulzar houz charminar ke khreeb  kholi thi jisme Aurangabad ka mashoor kapda _Mashru_ uske alawa aap lahore ke mashoor doctor Mohammed shareef ki dawaun ki agency bhi liye the, aap subah 11 baje dukan jate aur Esha ki namaz padhkar wapas aate aur Esha ke baad der raat 10 baje tak asbaq lete aur issi tarah Fajar se pehle aur fajar ke baad bhi sabaq lete

Moulvi Abbas Saheb aapka hulye mubarak (features) ka zikar karte hain ke aapke chehre mubarak mae zabardast nooraniyat aur kashish thi khad (height) darmiyani tha aur (stout) the, ghani aur lambi dadhi thi, rang gora tha peshani  chodi thi aur haath paer aapke bade masboot the, aap hamesha chadavi juta (mojri) pehente, ghar se baher nikalte to hamesha safeed Amama pehente aur lambe malmal ke safeed kurte pehente aur sardi mae kashmiri shawl dal lete

Aapka chehra itna roobdar tha ke mahela ho ya koi majlis ya mehfil ho log aapse mutasir hokar hi rahte aur aapki shaqsiyat har mehfil mae numaya rahti (stand out) aap milaun (miles) paidal chalte aapki chal ki rafter bahut khaas andaz per thi aur jab bhi guftagu farmate to chehre per muskurahat numaya hoti

Aapka libas rahen sahen  (lifestyle) khana pina bahut hi sada (plain) thi nashte mae do hyderabadi kulche aur ek piyala doodh lete aapke kapde ek musalman dhobi dhota magar namaz ke kapde aap khud ghar mae dhote aur pak karte aur aap kapde kabhi bhi istari (ironing) nahi karte the

Aap baal hamesha pure nikal dete (bald) aur apne madrese ke shagirdaun ko bhi yehi salah dete (advice)

Aap awaam ke ilmi aur adabi mahifilaun mae aur majalis aur taqreebat mae bhi bahut ziyada shirkat karte the

*1310* mae aapko namaz ki Fushat mili jab ke aapki umar shareef *26* saal thi

Aap apne asbaq mae, waaz wa nazihat mae, majalis aur taqareer mae, bahut hi sada aam fahem alfaz istemal karte aur zabaan mae zara bhi takaluf na hota

Aapke ghar aur dukan per bade bade aalim fazil log sufiya pandit sadhu sab hi aate aur behtreen ilmi wa adabi mehfilain jamti aur sab hi uloma aapki Ilmi fazilat ka iqrar karte

Nizam the 7th Asaf Jahi Mir Osman Ali Pasha ke pas bhi aapki bahut qadar thi thode thode waqt se aapke pas *خاصہ* (thal mae mewa khane ke muqtalif dish dry fruit's etc) bhejte jaisa ke aam tor per Badshahaun ka tariqa raha hae ke is tarah uloma ki khadar karte

Aapki, kin kin khubiyun ka zikar kare, aapka sab se bada wasf (quality) woh aapki Ilm ki kaifiyat thi, aap bahut zabardast aalim the, aur apne Ilm se aise aise aalim paida kiye hae jo Dawat e Hadiya ki saalha saal tak khidmat anjaam di hae jinme numaya naam (well known names) *Hazrat Moulana Ishak saheb muqaddus* ka hae, jinhune 28 Dawat e haq ki aala haqaeq ki kitabain Hazrat Moulana Fathullah saheb ke pas hi darsan padhi thi, aur aapke alawa *Hazrat Moulana Shakir saheb* aur Ras ul hudood *Moulvi Abbas Saheb muqaddus* bhi aapke shagird e rashid rahe hain

Roz mara ke masael (issues) e zindagi aap bahut hi asan tariqe se Korani ayaataun ki roshni mae samjhate aisa malum hota ke aap Koran e natiq ka ek zinda namuna hae

*Ittehad ul muslemeen* jo hyderabad ki mashoor political party hae uska bhi buniyaadi nazreeh aap ne hi pesh kiya tha aur party ko establish karne mae aapka bahut bada dakhal raha aap committee ke member bhi the aur ta hayat (lifelong) qazin (treasurer) bhi rahe

Aapki apne shagirdaun se itni ziyada mohabbat aur khlus tha aur is khadar aap unka khyal rakhte ke shaed maa baap bhi apni aulad ka itna ziyada khyal nahi rakhte

Madresa *"Fakhriya"* jo boarding school tha uske sarparast (Headmaster) aur nigran (caretaker) aap hi the aapki ye kaifiyat ye thi ki bachaun ki taleem ke alawa, shagirdaun ke khane pine dawa libaas balkeh har baat ka aap khyal rakhte, is hadd tak ke sardi ke din bachaun ke gusul aur wazu ke liye aap fajar se pehle sabke liye pani tak khud garam karte.

Aapke asbaq aur waaz bahut hi shaandar hote bahut hi aam faham (simple & easy to understand) aur  asaan alfaz mae samjhate, korani Ayaat, Ahadees wa aqwal aur roz marah ki baataun se misaal dekar mushkil se mushkil mazameen ko asani se samjha dete aisa ke sune wala usko hamesha yaad rakhte

Is tarah ke aapke be hisaab misaal hain jiske zareeyeh korani Ayaat, taweel wa haqaeq ke unche unche mushkil mazameen samjha diye aur logoan ke zahen nashin karwadiye jo Moulvi Abbas Saheb muqaddus ne aapki biography mae shammil kiya hae jiska naam aap ne

*مفاتيح الحكمه وينابيع الرحمه*

mae shammil kiye jisko mere nasdik har bacha jawan budhe ilm ke shaeq (shoq rakhne wala) ko padhna hi chahye

Sahifat us Salaat mae aapki ek Arabi munajaat bhi hae jo ke  *"Muqamus"* (5 versed) hae jo qaside

      *يامن ينادي في الضمير فيسمع*

      *انت المعد لكل ما يتوقع*

 _"ya man yunadiya fis zameer fa' yasmau"_

 per aapke ashaar lagae hain

          *يامن ينادي من مناد يدمع*

           *يامن يناجي من مناج يجزع*

Ye ashaar aapka Arabi zabaan per ubur (mastery) aur aala khyalat ki taraf ishara karte hain

Aapke *"Mabda Maad"* ke behtreen bayanat ko bhi *Begum Atiya fayzee* ne note kiye hae jo kitab ki shakal mae maujud hae jiska naam *"Aab E Hayat"* hae jo ek behtreen aapki Ilmi yaadgaar hae

Aapki tameeri (construction) ki yaadgaar mae Hyderabad ka jamaat khana *Aywaan e Fathi* hae jo *1335* hijri mae tameer huva jo aapke mubarak naam se mausum (named) hae aur aaj bhi 100 saal ke baad bhi qaem hae aur log us'se faida utha rahe hain

Hazrat Moulana Fathullah saheb ka inteqal  71 saal ki umar mae Baroda mae huva aapke buzrug bhai Syedna Dai Ghulam Hussain saheb aapke tadfeen ke wali huve

Aapki khabre mubarak *Syedi Almansub Abdul Raheem bi Saleh bin Ahmed* ke bazu hae

Allah taala ki rehmatain ho aapki khabre mubarak per aur aapke nazrat hum sab per hamesha jari wa sari rahein

Syedna Dai Gulam Hussain saheb ne "Ahiya us salf" mae jo aapki tareef farmai hae woh aapki zindagi ka mahasal (summing up)

*المجتهد في ذات الله، العالم الاواه فتح الله*

*Allah taala ki zaat ke liye koshish karne wale zabardast aalim Fathullah*

Aapka aur *Syedi Almansub Abdul Raheem bin Saleh bin Ahmed* ka mazar e mubarak Hazrat Moulana Ishak saheb muqaddus ke daur (period) mae tameer huva Hazrat Ishak saheb ne Abdul Raheem ke naam ki munasebat se aapki khabre shareef per ye ayaat likhai

        *وكان بالمومنين رحيما*

 *Woh mommineen ke saath Raheem the*

aur Moulvi Abbas Saheb ko kaha ke Hazrat Fathullah Saheb ke liye aap ayaat tajvis (suggest) karo

*Moulvi Mukaram Ras ul hudood Abbas Saheb muqaddus* ne ye ayaat pesh ki

*ما يفتح الله للناس من رحمة فلا ممسك لها*

Jab Allah taala logoan ke liye Rehmat ka darwaza khol deta hae to phir us'e koi bhi shaqs bandh nahi karsakta

Yehi ayaat aap ke khabre shareef per likhai gai

Aap apni zindagi mae Rehmat the aur aaj bhi aapki Rehmat hae Aaj bhi aapka Ilmi faiz jari hae aur inshallah ta Qiyamat rahega

●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●

Aapke roze mubarak ke kuch tasveer bhi bhej raha hun

6/16/16, 1:22:23 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 💧💧💧💧💧💧💧💧💧

*السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته*

*بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم*

*الله تعالی آپکو شہراللہ مبارک کے جمعة  کی برکتوں سے نوازے*🌹

Kehte hae ke suli (gallows) per bhi neend ajati hae, Rasulullah ne *neend* ko *maut* ki bhen kaha hae,

neend woh aisi maut hae, jis'se be'daar (hoshyaar) hone ki umeed rahti hae jab ke maut woh hamesha ki abadi (eternal) neend hae Isiliye jis tarah neend insaan per ghalib aa hi jati theek ussi tarah Insaan apne aap ko na chahte huve bhi maut ke hawale kar hi deta hae

*Shaher e Ramazan ul mubarak* mae jo hamari sab se ziyada mutasir hone wali chez hae woh *neend* hi hae, raat, din ho jati hae, be'waqt sona aur jaagna hota hae, mukhtasar mukhtasar (small durations) tukdaun mae neend ka lena hota hae Allah taala ka karam hae ke rozedar ki neend ko bhi ibadat qarar diya hae

Raat mae jaag kar ibadat ke liye Rasul e Khuda ka ek qol hae ke baad Salaat al Isha yane raat ke khane ke baad kuch hissa sokar (sleep) phir uske baad uthkar ibadat karna chahye ye baat bahut afzal aur aala hae, banisbat (compared to) musalsil jaagne ke, sokar dobara uthkar ibadat karna niya'hat hi mushkil kaam hae

Imam e Jafar e Sadiq farmate hain keh tum *معتبرين* yane hoshyaar wa ba'hosh (alert) rahne wali neend lo, *غافلين* ghafeleen ki tarah na so (sleep) jaisa ke log be'sudh be hiss deen wa duniya ki parwah kiye baqaer neend lete hae

Moulana Ali salwatullah alehe farmate hain

*نوم علي يقين خير من صلاة في شك*

Yaqeen wa marefat ke saath sona halat e shak mae namaz padhne se bahut behter aur afzal hae

Insaan ko apni jismani thakan utarne ke liye sona chahye duniya se ghafil, susti wa kaheli ki wajeh se ghafil aur be'niyaz nahi sona chahye

Rasul e Khuda ka irshad hae ke meri aankh soti hae Dil nahi sota

Imam farmate hae ke tum apni neend se tumhare nigehbaan *"Malaeka"* jo tumhare amaal (deeds) ka hisaab rakhte hain unke bojh (work) ko tum halka karte ho kiyunke tum neend ki halat mae apne nafs ko shehwataun se bacha lete ho tum neend ki wajeh se gunaah se bach jate ho is tarah un farishtaun ka kaam bhi tumhari neend ki wajeh se halka (kam) hota hae

Imam farmate hain ke neend bahut behter hae usse ke tum jaag kar burayaun mae, ghalat aur haram kaamaun mae padh jao aap kehte hae ke tum zabaan ko bura bolne se rok sakte ho haath pau ko bhi khabu mae rakh sakte ho magar kiya tum kaan (ears) ko burai sunne se rok sakte ho, is lihaz se neend behter hae

Moulana Ali Salwatullah alehe kiya khoob farmate hain

*بيس الغريم النوم ينفي قصير العمر*

ke neend kitni buri chez hae jo choti si khaleel (limited) zindagi ko aur kam (reduce) kardeti hae aur saath mae ek bahut bade ajar aur sawab ko bhi khatam kardeti hae [yane neend na lekar jaag kar Allah ki ibadat karke bahut bada ajar aur sawab insaan hasil karsakte the]

Imam farmate hain ke tum neend se is baat ko jano ke haqeeqat ye hae ke tum apni kisi baat per bhi qudrat nahi rakhte na harkat per aur na sukoon per tum aajis ho, zaeef ho, sirf Allah taala ka hukum aur uski taqdeer hi tum per chalti hae

Tum neend se maut per daleel (pointer) lo aur ghaflat se be'daar hojao ke ek din woh ghaflat ki neend (maut) bhi tum per warid hokar rahegi

Jo bhi Insaan apne faraez, sunnat aur nawafil ke ada kiya baqaer so gaya woh ghafeleen ki neend liya woh bade nuqsaan mae raha

Aur jisne bhi apne faraez sunnatain aur wajebaat ko ada karke soya woh neend uski achi neend hae mehmood neend hae,

Imam Jafar e Sadiq farmate hae ke bahut kam log hain aaj ke zamane mae jo mehmood (pasandida) neend leta hain yane apne tammam mamlaat faraez waqaera ko puri tarah ada karke neend lete ho

Aur jo shaqs deen ki aur apne faraez wa wajebaat ki parwah nahi karta uske liye to uski neend hi behter hae is lihaz se ke woh neend mae gunaah se to bach jaega jo woh jaagte huve be'dari mae kar guzarta (would have indulged in the vices, if he was awake)

Imam e Jafar e Sadiq farmate hain ke ziyada neend ziyada pene (drinking excess liquids) se paida hoti hae aur ziyada piyas ziyada khane se hoti hae, aur ziyada khana aur pina Nafs ko Allah ki taat se dur kardeta hae, aur shehwaat (forbidden desires) ki taraf lejata hae, dil ko saqt banata, fikar aur soch ko khrab karta hae, aur insaan ko khushu aur khuzu se dur kardeta hae

*كثرة الأكل والنوم يفسدان النفس ويجلبان المضرة*  

Bahut ziyada khana aur sona Nafs mae fasad (disharmony imbalance) paida karti hae aur khrabi ko jald khenj leati hae

Tum apni har neend ko apni aakhri neend khyal karo, tum Allah taala ka zikar ziyada se ziyada karo apni Zabaan se aur apne Dil se bhi

Jab tum apni neend se hoshyaar hote ho to shaitaan tum se kehta hae ke _"arre, abhi tum sote raho (keep sleeping) abhi raat bahut lambi hae, bahut baki hae"_ is se uska maqsad sirf ek hi hae ke tum ko woh *استغفار بالاسحار* yane fajar aur fajar se pehle ibadat karne, Dua mangne, Allah ki bargaah mae munajaat karne se rokna hae jiske liye Allah se darne wale khoof e khuda rakhne wale bande shoq karte hain

Rasul e khuda ka qol hae ke rozedar ki neend bhi ibadat hae is baat mae ek bareek nukta (point) hae aur woh ye hae ki Roza din mae rakha jata hae to ye ishara din ki neend ke liye hae raat ko to jaag kar Allah taala ki ibadat karna hae tatawaat se qiyam karna hae

Rasul e khuda ka ye qol ki meri aankh soti hae Dil hamesha jaagta hae usper yaad aya ke walid Hazrat muqaddus farmate the keh;

Hazrat Ishak Saheb muqaddus jab bhi neend lete aur kehte ke mae 15 minute mae ya 20 minute, neend lekar uthta hun to aap hamesha bilkul sahi us waqt per bedaar hojate aur raat ki neend ka bhi yehi aalam tha ke aap barabar jo waqt kehta wohi waqt hoshyaar hojate aur aapke inteqal per bhi aapko 'brain heamoraege" huva tha, unconscious the, hoshyaar hone ki, bedaar hone ki, doctor ke nasdik koi umeed aur imkaan (possibility) na tha magar jab Hazrat Ziaali saheb Bambai se ae aur aapko awaaz diye aap hoshyaar huve sab ahle khaandan se mile baat bhi kiye wasiyat kiye aur ikhwan se Khudahafizi kiye

 Ye aarifaun ki aalimaun ki neend hoti hae ye kaifiyat to hamare Duwaat wa Manasib ki hae, to phir Aima, Ambia, Aulia Allah ki kaifiyat kiya hogi us ka andaza hum nahi karsakte, ye woh log hae jiske khabse (control) mae maut hoti hae to neend kiya

Humko in baataun ko samajhne ke liye hamari ghaflat wa jahalat ki neend se bedaar hona hoga hoshyaar hona hoga aur is maah e mubarak se behter aur badhkar aur kaunsa moqa hosakta hae,

Allah hum sab ko tawfeeq de ke hum neend bhi waise le jo Allah Rasul aur Aulia Allah ne humko bataya hae

Inshallah, neend ka zikar aur bhi hae.........

(Ye mazmoon last year likha tha kuch logoan ki khaesh per sabke liye dobara bhej raha hun, nasihat dohrae (repeat) jane per yaqinan faida hi deti hae)

6/18/16, 1:29:35 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕

*السلام علیکم و رحمة الله و بركاته*

*بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم*

*Koran e kareem* mae irshad hae

*وَمِنْ آيَاتِهِ مَنَامُكُم بِاللَّيْلِ وَالنَّهَارِ وَابْتِغَاؤُكُم مِّن فَضْلِهِ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَآيَاتٍ لِّقَوْمٍ يَسْمَعُونَ*

Aur Allah ki nishaniyun mae raat aur din mae tumhara *sona* (sleep) bhi hae aur talash karna hae Allah taala ke fazal ka jo log sunte hae unke liye in tammam baataun mae badi nishaniyun hae

Hakim e ummat *Rasulullah* ne kiya hi hakimana qol neend ke liye kaha hae

_Meri aankhein soti hae magar dil jaagta hae_ aur aaj science bhi yehi kehti hae ke Dil wa Dimaag neend mae bhi chalte hae active rahta hae

*Rasulullah* farmate hae ke neend bhi saat kisim ki hae

1] *Ghaflat ki neend* woh neend jo koi shaqs jahan Allah Rasul ka zikar ho raha ho, Ilm wa Hikmat ka bayan ho raha ho us majlis us mehfil mae ghafil so jata hae

 2]        *naum us shaqawat نوم الشاوة* woh saqt dili ki neend hae jo insaan Namaz ke waqt Allah tabaraka wa taala ki ibadat ke waqt mae lete hae

3] *naum ul laanat نوم اللعنت* jo subah Fajar suraj nikalne ke baad sota hae unper Allah taala ki laanat hae.

4] *naum ul uqubat نوم العقوبة* yane Fajar ki Namaz ke waqt per sote rahna woh saza aur azab ka mustahaq hae (deserves severe punishment)

5] *naum ul rahat نوم الراحت* waqt e *Qailula* ke yane dopher ke khane ke baad chand minute ke liye sona (taking a short nap after lunch)

6] *Naum ul ruqsat (permitted) نوم الرخصت* yane us waqt sone ki ijazat hae aur woh Namaz e Esha ke baad ka waqt hae

Aur aakhri kisim hae

7] *naum ul hasrat نوم الحسرة* yane khaesh ko puri karne ki, umeed ki neend, miya wa biwi ke qurbat (closeness) ki khaesh, jiske liye Jumua ki raat tarqeeb (preferred) dilai gai hae

Insaan apni 1/3 zindagi sone mae guzarta hae to uske liye bahut zaroori hae ke in sab baataun ka bahut khyal rakhe

Mukhtalif *Aima* (imams) se riwayat ayi hae ke insaan ko in auqaat (time) mae neend bilkul nahi lena chahye

Fajar se suraj nikalne tak, balke raqbat ayi hae ke suraj nikalne se 2 ghante pehle uthna chahye yane fajar ke waqt se 1 ghante pehle aur duain padhna hae aur *Shafa ki Namaz* se qiyam karna chahye kehte hae ke jo aisa karta hae uski rozi khenj aati hae aur fajar ke baad rozi ki talash ki tiyari karna chahye

Asar ke baad, yane asar ka waqt zawal se taqreeban 4 ghante tak rahta hae yane qabal maghrib nahi sona chahye aur maghrib esha ke darmiyan mae sona bhi acha nahi

*Syedna Dai Gulam Hussain saheb* ne *Asbaq ul Arbayèen* mae panch kisim ke sone se manna farmate hae

* _Suraj ke nikalne ke baad_

* _bilkul maghrib se pehle_

* _adhe dhup aur adhe chaun mae (half sunlight half shadow)_

* _Namaz e Esha se pehle_

* _kisi darwaze ki chaukhat (threshold) per_

Syedna Dai ne kiya hi Hikmat ki baatain neend ke taluq se *Chahel Sabaq* mae farmai hae, farmate hain

Ziyada khana aur pina neend ki ziyadati ka sabab banta hae aur neend ki ziyadati insaan ko sust (lazy) aur zahen ko khrab kardeti hae

*Imam e Jafar e Sadiq* farmate hain 3 baataun se Allah taala ko saqt nafrat hae

1) _bahut ziyada aur be moqa sona_

2) _baqaer kisi wajeh be moqa bahut ziyada hasna_ (laughing without any valid reason at wrong place and time)

3) _insaan ke paet bhra ho to bhi khate jana_ (to keep eating on a full stomach)

*Qailula* yane dophar ke khane ke baad thoda sona hae aaj science bhi uske faide ko tasleem karti hae ke sahet ke liye behtreen baat hae aur is baat ko offices mae strongly recommend kiya ja raha hae  jisko *power nap* bhi kehte hae

*Imam Mohammed e Baqaer* farmate hae ke agar insaan ko raat mae jagna hi hae to in char baataun mae se ek baat ke liye jage  

*Salat ul lail* _raat mae namaz ke liye qiyam karne_

_Raat mae *Koran e majeed* ki tilawat ke liye_

_*Ilm علم* ko hasil karne, padhne likhne ke liye_

_Ya phir apni nayi shaadi shuda biwi ke saath waqt guzarne_

Insaan jab bister per sone ke liye lete (lie down) to apne tammam din ke kaam aur ahwaal per qor wa fikar kar'le, jo kaam usne Allah ki na khushi narazgi mae kiye, ya insaani aqlaq wa adat ke khilaf kiye hain us'se toba kare, isteqfar talab kare

*Hukoma wa Atiba* (philosophers & doctors) bhi yehi kehte hain ke insaan ko suraj nikalne se, kam se kam do ghante pehle uthna chahye aur yehi fitrat hae yehi baat natural hae isiliye tammam parinde, wa haiwaan (animals) us waqt hi bedaar (wake up) hote hae aur jo is baat ki pabandi nahi karta to khrab asraat uski jismani sahet aur zaheni fikar aur khyalat per ghalib aate hain

Allah, Rasul wa Aulia Allah ne bahut hi tafzeel se neend ke taluq se ahkamaat, adaab tor tariqe bayan farmadiye hain

Moulana Ali ne apne khutbaat mae, hamare Nafs ke saath neend mae kiya mamlaat guzarte hain uska bhi zikar farmaya hae aur Duwaat ne uski bahut tafseel bayan ki hae,

Allah taala humko tawfeeq de ke hum neend wa bedaari ke ahkamaat per amal kare jisse hamari neend bhi ibadat ka darjah hasil karle

Inshallah ainda zikar, insaan ko kaise sona chahye (postures) aur kis halat mae sona chahye .........................

6/20/16, 5:23:15 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 💢💢💢💢💢💢💢💢💢

*السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته*

*بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم*

Aaj ki *17 Shehrullah ki mubarak Shab* ki mubarakbaad qabool karna aur duaon mae shareek rakhna

*Koran e kareem* ka irshad e mubarak hae

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

لَّقَدْ كَانَ لَكُمْ فِي رَسُولِ اللَّهِ أُسْوَةٌ حَسَنَةٌ لِّمَن كَانَ يَرْجُو اللَّهَ وَالْيَوْمَ الْآخِرَ وَذَكَرَ اللَّهَ كَثِيرًا

_Tumhare liye Allah ke Rasul ki paervi (follow) karna mae hi behtari aur achai hae, uske liye jo bhi Allah ki janib umeed rakhta hae, aur roz e Qiyamat ki umeed rakhta ho, aur Allah taala ka zikar kasrat se karte raho_

Hum ko zindagi ke har mamle mae *Sunnat e Nabi* yane Nabi ke batae huve raaste per chalna hae aur wohi sab se behter raasta hae

Allah taala ka irshad hae;

وَمِن رَّحْمَتِهِ جَعَلَ لَكُمُ اللَّيْلَ وَالنَّهَارَ لِتَسْكُنُوا فِيهِ وَلِتَبْتَغُوا مِن فَضْلِهِ وَلَعَلَّكُمْ تَشْكُرُونَ

_Aur Allah taala ki ye Rehmat hae ke usne tumhare liye raat aur din banae takeh tum raat mae sukoon (sleep aram) ikhteyar karo aur din mae uske fazal (rozi) ko talash karo takeh tum shukur guzar bano_

*Nabi e kareem* ne zindagi ke har mamle mae hidayat di hae to yaqeenan raat mae kaise aram kare yane kaise *neend* le uski bhi hidayat di hae

Kin auqaat (timing) mae insaan ko neend lena chahye ka zikar hochuka hae ab zikar karna hae ke insaan ko kaise sona chahye

*Rasul e Khuda* ka irshad hae ke tum ko seedhe janib (on your right side) sar (head) ke neeche seedha haath rakhkar sona chahye aur baaz jagah riwayat ye bhi ayi ke chehra qibla rukh ho jis tarah ek murde ko qibla rokh karke khabar mae litaya jata hae

Issi tarah Rasul khuda ne paet per (sleeping face down on stomach) sone ke liye bhi saqti se mana farmaya hae, ek waqae ye bhi sunne mae aya ke aap ne ek waqt ek aadmi ko aisa sote huve dekha to pau (legs) se maar kar usko utha diya aur kaha ke ye jahannamiyun ka sona hae,

Issi tarah Moulae kaenat moulana Ali ne bhi farmaya ke tum kisi ko aisa sote huve dekho to usko bedaar kardo (wake him up)

Aisa nahi hae ke insaan baye janib (left side) ya peeth (back) per nahi so sakta hae magar behter amal yehi hae, kam se kam sone ki ibteda aise kare doosre janib karwat (turn) lene koi ghalat baat nahi hae isiliye *Ashaab e Kahef* ke liye Koran mae Allah taala keh raha hae

وَتَحْسَبُهُمْ أَيْقَاظًا وَهُمْ رُقُودٌ وَنُقَلِّبُهُمْ ذَاتَ الْيَمِينِ وَذَاتَ الشّمال

_Log gumaan kar rahe the ke woh jaag rahe hain magar haqeeqat mae wo so rahe the hum unko seedhe aur baye karwat (turned them left & right in their sleep) dete rahe,_ warna unke jism mae khrabi paida hojati

Aaj medical science bhi yehi kehti hae ke _the best position to sleep is on the right side with your right hand under your right cheek_ aur iski wajeh ye bayan karte hain ke is'se stomach aur intestines ka pressure heart per nahi padhte hae jiski wajeh se breathing asan hoti hae iske alawa bhi bahut se faida bayan kiye hain

Paet (stomach) per sone ko aaj science bhi bahut khrab samajhti hae unka kehna hae ke is'se _Temporal dyspnea_ hota hae yane anxiety breathing problems, panic attacks etc

Uske alawa face down on stomach sone se *SIDS "sudden infant death syndrome"* yane bache ka achanak baqaer (without) kisi scientific medical reason ke khatam hojane ke incident bahut ziyada hote hae balke study kehti hae ke 7 times increase hojate hain

Kisi Hakim ka qol hae ke mommin seedhe taraf sota hae Badshah Sultan aur ahle Sarwat (maaldar log) woh baye taraf sote hae aur Aulia Allah, Ambia alehe salaam peeth per sote hain aur neend mae bhi unki aankh khuli hi rahti hae

Aima aur Aulia Allah ke aur bhi aqwal hae neend aur sone ke taluq se

Rasulullah ka irshad hae ke tum bawazu (wazu karke) sona aur uske be hisaab faida aye hain isi tarah miswak (brushing & cleaning of teeth) ke liye bhi hukum aya hae

Sone se pehle mukhtalif duaon aur tasbihaat ka zikar bhi Aima aur Duwaat se bahut aye hain inshallah uska zikar kisi aur waqt per

Rasulullah ka tariqa tha ke aap sona se qabal bister ko saaf karte jhatakte (dusting) the aur aap saqt zameen (hard surface) per khajoor ke pataun (date leaves) se bane bister per kambal (blanket) dalkar aram karna pasand karte aur aaj science bhi yehi kehti hae ke hard surface per sona hi sab se behter hae agar aap back pain neck pain spondylitis jaise takaleef ko avoid karna chahte hain

Aaj jab science apne tajrube (experiments) se ye sab baatain kehti hae to hum yaqeen karte hain amal karte hain, Rasulullah ne 1400 saal pehle kaha usko hum nazar andaz (ignore) karte rahe hain  

Rasulullah ne jo bhi bataya hae woh *وحي* wahi ke zareeyeh *khaliq e Kaenaat*  (creator of universes) *Allah taala* ki taraf se ayi huvi hae

*Kiya banane wala (creator) ziyada jaanta hae, ya jisko banaya gaya (created) ?*

Kiya hum Rasulullah ke har hukum ke liye Duniya ki science ki tasdik (acceptance) ke liye thedengae (wait karenge) ?

Science abhi deen se bahut peeche hae balkeh mae kahunga ke koi muqabela hi nahi hae, kidhar ek insaan ki aqal aur samajh aur kidhar banane wale ka diya huva Ilm

Jo baat 1400 saal pehle Rasul ne kahi Koran ne kaha aaj kuch, kuch baatain duniya walaun ko samajh mae a'rahi hae

Afsoos ke hum jab science kehti hae, tasleem karti hae, to amal karte hae adapt karte hae sahi mante hae ye hamare _Emaan ki, Aqeede ki aur Yaqeen ki kamzoori hae_

Allah taala farmata hae

وَعَسَىٰ أَن تَكْرَهُوا شَيْئًا وَهُوَ خَيْرٌ لَّكُمْ وَعَسَىٰ أَن تُحِبُّوا شَيْئًا وَهُوَ شَرٌّ لَّكُمْ وَاللَّهُ يَعْلَمُ وَأَنتُمْ لَا تَعْلَمُونَ

_Is baat mae tajub nahi ke ek chez tum ko napasand aye aur buri lage magar woh tumhare haq mae achi ho behter ho aur ajab nahi ke koi chez tum ko bahut pasand aye aur woh tumhari liye buri ho nuqsaan de ho Allah taala hi behter janta hae sab baataun ko, tum kuch nahi jante_

Duniya ki science sirf jism aur duniya ke mamlaat tak tahqeeq karsakti unke pas roohaniyat ka koi tasawur nahi *Nafs* ke wajud ka ilm nahi jabke hamare nasdik *Nafs* hi asal chez hae aur *maut ke baad ki zindagi* hi asal zindagi hae

Science aur medical science duniya ki zindagi ko kitna bhi acha banade insaan ki umar ko kitna bhi badha de, kiya woh is  zindagi ke pareshaniun, bimariun, takaleef, fikaraun se dur karsakti hae ?

To phir aisi zindagi ko chand saal badhakar kiya hasil  

Ab jiska aqeeda kamzoor ho Allah aur Rasulullah ki baataun per yaqeen puri tarah na ho to phir kaise uski duaon ki qabooliyat hogi kahan iqlaas paida hoga kaise uska amal Allah qabool karega

Allah taala humko *Daemi Emaan* (hamesha aur hae haal mae rahne wala) ata kar aur *Sacha Yaqeen* (firm faith and belief) un tammam baataun per jo Rasulullah ne Allah taala ki taraf se hamare pas le aya hae takeh hamare duaon ke qabooliyat ke raaste khul jae aur hamare har amal Allah taala ki bargaah mae maqbool ho

💢💢💢💢💢💢💢💢💢

*Koran e kareem* mae kai kisim ki neend ka zikar hae uske stages ke lihaz se, uske depth ke hisab se, inshallah Shehrullah ke baad uska bhi zikar karne ki koshish karunga

6/23/16, 7:24:09 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🐾🍃🐾🍃🐾🍃🐾🍃

سلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم  

*SALAAT  صلواة  Namaz*

Kitni ziyada ahmiyat bayan ki gayi hae *Namaz* ki Koran e majeed aur Aulia Allah ke aqwal mae

Allah taala ne jitne bhi faraez hum per wajib wa farz kiye hain unme sab se afzal wa Aala *Namaz* hi hae

Momineen ki qurbani aur muhaqeneen (yaqeen rakhne wale) ki ibadat *Namaz* hi hae.

Allah taala se qurbat (nearness) ka sab se behter zareeyah woh *Namaz* hi hae

Hamare Nafs ko *Namaz* johardar (enlighten) karti hae, usme badi khubi aur achai paida hoti hae. Namazi is duniya mae laqzish se sambhal jata hae gunahaun se bach jata hae, aur aakherat ke ranj wa ghum aur pareshani se bhi mahfuz hojata hae.

Hamare *Nafs* ko Namaz bilquwa *بالقوة* (passive) se bilfael *بالفعل* (active) ki taraf le jati hae.

*Moulana Hakim be Amrillah* ne *Rasoolallah* se riwayat ki hae ke tum apne *'Nufus'*ko apne aamal se najat dilao aur sab se behter amal *Namaz* hi hae, tumhare deen ka chehra Namaz hae.

*Imam e Jafar e Sadiq* farmate hain ki mae Allah ki marefat ke baad kisi chez ko *Namaz* se ziyada afzal nahi janta

*Namaz* ko chodne wale (nahi padhne wale) ka deen e Islam mae koi hissa nahi, naseeb nahi.

Momin jab Namaz mae hota hae to woh Allah taala se sab se ziyada khareeb hota hae.

Moulana Ali Ibn Abi Talib riwayat karte hain Rasulallah se,

_Jis ne kamil *Wazu* ki, *Namaz* achi tarah ada ki, apne maal ki *Zakat* hisaab se ada ki, apne *Ghusse* (anger) ko pi gaya, zaban ko khabu mae rakha, neki aur bhalai ka kaam kiya, apne Rab se apne gunahun ki maafi chahi, apne ahle baet (family members) ka khayal rakha, bus usne Emaan ke usool aur haqaeq ko kamil karliye, ab uske liye *Jannat ke darwaze* khule hain_

Ek riwayat Rasulallah se hae keh _Jannat mae ek jhad (tree) hae jiski jad (roots) se ablaq (black & white) ghode (horses) niklenge jinki lugaam sone ki aur zeen (saddle) moti aur yaqut ki hogi aur Jannat mae "Ahle iliyeen" un ghodoun (horses) per sawaar honge, us waqt Jannat ke neeche ke darje (level) wale puchenge keh in logoan ko ye karamat (privilege) kis liye di gai?_

 _jawab milega ye log raat mae ibadat se qiyam karte the jab tum sote the, yeh Roza rakhte the jab tum khate pite the, yeh Sadqa karte the jab tum kanjusi karte the, yeh log Allah ki raah mae Jihad karte the jab tum buzdil bante the (showed your cowardice)_

Jis kisi ne bhi gunaah kiya aur sharminda huva, ghalti ka ahsaas kiya to usko chahiye ke kamil wazu kare aur aise muqam per nikal jaye jahan usko koi nahi dekhta ho, phir do rakat Namaz padhe aur Dua maange ke ae Allah mere falan falan (so & so) gunah ko maaf karde uski woh Namaz us gunah ka kaffara hogi, woh gunah jo bande (insaan) aur mabud (jiski ibadat ki jati hae) ke darmiyan huve honge, ahkam Ilahi ki nafarmani mae huve honge woh maaf honge, woh gunah hargiz nahi jo bande aur bande ke darmiyan (amongst the people) huve zulm aur taddi (refusal) se huve, woh gunah hargiz maaf nahi honge, siwae iske ke mazlum, zalim ko maaf karde, ya phir us bande ka haq pura ada karde.

Moulana Ali Ibn Abi Talib farmate hain _Namaz ek tarazu (weighing scale) hae jo jitne dega utna lega_

Namazi jab Namaz ke liye khada hota hae to aasman se Rehmat nazil hoti hae aur Farishte usko gheir lete hain (suround him), agar Namazi yeh janta hota ke usko Namaz mae kiya mil raha hae to Namaz se apna chehra kabhi nahi phirata, hamesha Namaz ki halat mae hi rehna pasand karta.

Allah ke nazdik sab se ziyada nek amal Namaz hi hae, tamaam Ambia ki vasiyat (nasihat) bhi yehi hae

Jab ek banda Namaz mae sajda deta hae to Iblees chilata hae ke afsoos ke is (insaan) ne taat ki (has been obedient) aur mae ne nafarmani ki

Masjid ke padosi ki Namaz Masjid mae hi honi chahye, Masjid barkataun aur saadataun ke nazil hone ki jagah hae.

Masjid mae Namaz ke intezar mae baithna bhi ibadat hae aur qibla rukh baithna sunnat e Rasul hae.

Masjid apni veerani (loneliness) ki Allah se shikayat karti hae aur koi Namazi aata hae to khush hojati hae, jaisa ke tum tumhare koi ghaeb (absent) aziz (relative) ke wapas aane per khush hote ho

Masjid mae hathyar (arms) lagana mana hae, khareed wa farokht (trading) karna jaez nahi, zor se baat karna bura hae, har hafta masjid mae khushbu (incense, Agar or buqur) dena chahiye, masjid ko gandagi se pak wa saaf rakhne hae, jis ne Masjid ko izzat di uska ahteram kiya, Allah taala u'se Qiyamat ke din haste (smiling) huve milega

Moulana Ali alahe salaam farmate hain ke jab Masjid mae dakhil ho to ye dua zaroor padhe

       *بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم*

*بسم لله وبالله إلسلام عليك أيها النبى ورحمة الله وبركاته السلام علينا وعلى  عبادالله الصالحين*

Aur Masjid mae dakhil ho, to do rakat "Thayatul Masjid" zaroor padhe

Allah taala hum sab ko is ahem farize deen "NAMAZ" ka paband banae

🍃🐾🍃🐾🍃🐾🍃🐾

6/24/16, 5:51:55 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

جمعة مبارك 🌹

21 شب شهر رمضان المبارك آپ سب کو بہت مبارک ہو، آج یوم شہادت ہے مولاے کائنات مولانا علی ابن ابی طالب کی، آج کے دن کے وسیلے سے اللہ تعالی همارے گناهوں کو معاف فرما

Aap Agar *Moulae Kaenat Ali ibne Abi Talib* ke _Khutbaat, Aqwal, wa Ashar_ ka mutalea (study) karenge to malum hoga ke in tammam mae aap ka ek hi maqsad hae ek hi paigham hae ke is fani Duniya ki haqeeqat ko waze karna, aur aakherat ki asliyat aur sachai ko saamne lana aur us maut ke baad ki  aakherat ki zindagi ko kaisa is duniya ki fani zindagi ke zareeyeh behter banaya ja sakta hae batana aur samjhana

Moulae e mushkil kusha ka ye ek aisa qol hae jo humko is fani aur adna Duniya ki talq (bitter) haqeeqat ko hamare saamne khol kar daldeti hae, Duniya ki kadwi (bitter) sachai ko saamne lati hae aur humko deen wa aakherat ki taraf raqib (incline) karti hae

 ye mubarak Qol (saying) mae teen saal se *youme shahadat* e Moulana Ali aur youme *Qadeer* bhejta aya hun sach to ye hae ki is qol ki yaad dihani har roz bhi ho to kam hae ye humko duniya ke dhoke wa fareb se mehfooz rakhe ga aur adna duniya ki raqbat se dur karega

Allah taala hum sab ko *Moulana Ali ibn abi Talib ki waliyat* per qayem rakhe aur *Ahle baet* ki mohabbat per khatama bil khair kar

Kiya hi behtreen nasihat farmai hae Moulae kaenat ne ;

Ek roz *Moulana Ali* ne ek sahabi e Rasoolullah, *Jabir bin Abdullah al Ansari* ko lambi lambi saans (heavy breathing) lete dekh kar pucha

_Ae Jabir tum ye lambi lambi thandi saans, kiya is Duniya ke liye lae rahe ho ?_

Janab e Jabbir ne arz kiya _haan ae Moula yehi baat hae_

Imam e Ali, Wasi e Rasoolullah ne farmaya ae Jabir suno (listen)

_Insaan ki puri zindagi ka dar o madar (dependence) saat 7 baataun per hae_

_Aur unhi saat 7 chezaun per lazataun (pleasures, Indulgences) ka khatema bhi hae, us se badhkar koi lazzat (enjoyment pleasure) nahi_

1) _khane ki chez_

2) _mashrubat, pi'ne ki chez (drinks)_

3) _libaas (clothes, dress) pehne ke kapde_

4) _laz'zat e Nikah (sexual pleasures)_

5) _Sawari (ride)_

6) _Sunghne ki chez (smell)_

7) _Sunne ki chez (Hearing: music & songs)_

_Ae Jabir tum zara in chezaun ki haqeeqat per ghor karo (ponder & think on the realities of these pleasures)_

_Zameen per khane ki chez mae sab se achi woh *shehed (Honey)* hae, jo ke ek makhi (insect, bee) ka luab e dhen (saliva) hae_

_Pe'ne (drink) mae sab se achi chez *pani* hae jo ke aasman se nazil hota hae aur zameen per pather wa chatanaun (rocks) se takrate huve mara mara phirta hae_

_Behtreen *libas* woh *Dibaj* (silk) hae jo ke ek keede (insect, silk worm) ka luab (secretion) hae_

_Behtreen *mankuhat* (jisse Nikah kiya jata hae) woh *aurat* hae, Duniya wale uski jis chez ko achi nigah wa lazat se dekhte hain wohi uske jism ki sab se ziyada gandi jagaah (sharamgaah) hae jiski taraf dekhne se roka gaya hae_

_Sab se behtreen *sawari* (ride) *ghoda (horse)* hae jo khatal khital (used in wars and fights) ke kaam a'ta hae_

_Behtreen *sunghne (perfume)* ki chez woh *mushk (musk)* hae jo keh ek janwar, haran (deer) ke naaf (naval, belly button) ka sukha huva khoon hae (Dried blood)_

_Aur *sunne ki (hearing)* sab se achi chez woh *gana bajane (songs and music)* jiska sunna Allah taala ke nasdik ek bahut bada gunah hae_

_*Ae Jabir* tum aisi chezaun ke liye aur aisi duniya ke liye thandi saans (cold breaths) le rahe ho_

*Jabbir bin Abdullah al Ansari* farmate hain keh is irshad e mubarak ke sunne ke baad mae ne kabhi bhi is Duniya ka khyal aur na hi uski khaesh kiya

Allah taala hum ko bhi is Duniya ki haqeeqat ko samajhne ki tawfeeq de aur is dhoke, fareb wa kadurat ki duniya se dur rakhe

Hadees e shareef hae

الدنيا جيفة وطلابها كلابا

 Duniya ek mur'daar (carcass) hae aur uska talab karne wala woh kutta (dog) hae

Moulana Ali farmate hain:

طالب الأخرة يدرك أمله وياتيه من الدنيا ما قدرله

Aakherat ko chahne wala apne asal murad wa maqsad ko hasil karleta hae aur saath mae uski taqdeer mae jo bhi Duniya mae usko milna likha hota hae woh bhi usko mil hi jata hae

ومن أصلح أمر الأخرة ،أصلح الله له أمر الدنيا

Jisne apne aakherat ke mamlaat durust karliye, Allah taala uske duniya ke mamlaat sawaar dega, behter kardega

الدنيا بأموال، والأخرى بالأعمال

Duniya ki zindagi maal se hae aur aakherat amal se hae.

انك مخلوق للأخرة فاعمل لها

Tum aakherat ke maqlooq  ho aur ussi ke liye amal karo (means that our real existance is Nafsani Roohani)

ما يدرك أحدا ما يريد من الآخرة إلا يترك ما يشتهي من الدنيا

Tum aakherat ki pasandida chezaun ko hasil nahi karsakte jab tak ke tum Duniya ki pasandida chezaun ko tark (discard, leave behind) na kardo

Allah' ta'ala hum ko aisi Duniya se mehfuz rakh jiski khaesh aur raqbat, sirf aur sirf hamari zindagi mae zawal hi lasakti hae

*Kaash ke hum ye baat samajh sakte.*

Allah tabaraka wa Taala aaj ki raat ki barkat se hum ko ye tawfeeq de ke hum ye samajh sake ke ye duniya ki lazatain aarzi aur adna hae aur aakherat ki zindagi hi asal zindagi hae

وَمَا هَٰذِهِ الْحَيَاةُ الدُّنْيَا إِلَّا لَهْوٌ وَلَعِبٌ وَإِنَّ الدَّارَ الْآخِرَةَ لَهِيَ الْحَيَوَانُ لَوْ كَانُوا يَعْلَمُونَ

Ye duniya ki zindagi sirf khel aur tamasha hae aur hamesha ki zindagi ka muqam to aakherat ka ghar hae agar log is baat ko jante

●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●

6/25/16, 8:45:47 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🕸🕸🕸🕸🕸🕸🕸🕸🕸

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Aaj 21 Shehrullah e mubarak ka din hae aur aaj hi Moulae kaenat Moulana Ali ibn abi Talib Salawatullah alahe, ibne Muljim ki talwaar ki zarb (maar) ki wajeh se Shahadat hasil farmaye

Aapki nasihataun ko yaad karne aur usper amal karne se bheter aapke liye kiya khiraj e aqeedat (homage) hosakta hae

*Kumael ibn Ziyad* aapke mashoor sahabi the jisko Rasulullah ki ata ki huvi Dua bahut hi mashoor hae farmate hain ke ek roz Moulae Kaenat ne mera haath pakda aur khabrastan ke ek kone mae le chale

Jab hum ek su'ni veeran (desolate) jagah mae baith gaye to aap ne irshad farmaya;

Ae *kumael* momin ka dil ek bartan ki tarah hote hae aur nekiyaun aur achaiyaun us bartan mae rakhne ki chez hoti hae

Yaad rakho ki Ilm maal se bahut behter hae Ilm tumhari hifazat karta hae aur maal ki hifazat tum karte ho

Ilm amal ko pak karta hae aur maal kharch karne se ghat (reduce) jata hae

Ilm aalim ko zindagi mae taat guzar (obedient) banata hae aur usku un baataun se a'raasta (decorate) karta hae jo usko uski maut ke baad ki zindagi ko achi aur asaan karti hae

Maal ke khatam hone per maaldar ki duniyavi zindagi mae zawal (decline) aur khrabi aajati hae aur woh zinda rahte huve bhi murda hojate hae aur Uloma (aalim log) apni zindagi mae bhi aur uske baad bhi aakherat mae bhi hamesha zinda rahte hae

Ae Kumael tum khana shru karte waqt yeh kaho

  بسم الله الذي لا يضر مع اسمه دآء و فيه شفاء من جميع الاسواء

Mae shru karta hun Allah ke naam ke saath woh hasti jiske ke naam ke saath koi marz nuqsaan nahi pohuncha sakta aur Allah ke naam mae har marz (illness) se shifa (cure) hae

Ae Kumael jab tum khana khao to logoan ko bhi khana khilao usme kanjoosi kabhi na karo, is baat mae koi shak nahi ke tum logoan ke razzak (provider) nahi ho, magar Allah taala tum ko is baat ka sawab zaroor ata karega ke tum zareeyeh bane

Ae Kumael tum jab khana kha lo to bulund awaaz mae *الحمدلله  "Alhamdulillah"* zaroor kaho is'se tumhara ajar (sawab) ziyada hoga

Ae Kumael tum apne aqlaq ko nek banau aur apne saathiyun se khush Dili aur ache se milo aur apne khadim aur naukar ko kabhi  jhidko mat (never abuse or insult)

Ae Kumael apne paet (stomach) ko khane se pura mat bhro pani ke liye kuch jagah chod do aur kuch hawa ki jolani (circulation of air) ke liye bhi rakho

Ae Kumael sahet (health) ka daromadar kam khane aur kam pine se hae

Ae Kumael to kuch bhook (hunger) ko baqi rakhkar dastarkhan se uth ja

Ae Kumael Zakat ki adaegi momineen mae bhai chargi wa mohabbat, aur rishtedari mae barkat ka baaz hoti hae

Ae Kumael to momineen ke saath khrabat (relation closeness) ko badha aur tum rishtedaraun per hamesha meherbaan raho

Ae Kumael tum sadqa karo, Allah taala ke paas sadqe ka bahut bada ajar hae

Ae Kumael mommin ki behtreen araesh (beauty, quality) woh tawazu  (humility & respect for others) hae, aur tawazu ki khubsoorti, logoan ki khata (mistakes) ko darguzar (ignore) karne, ache aqlaq rakhna, shafaqat wa meherbani se pesh aana, aur qil wa qaal yane, bakwaas aur betuki baat aur be'ja kalaam se bachna hae.

Ae kumael to dikhave se bach

Ae kumael tum deen ke mamle mae khuda ke liye agar kisi se behes wa mubhasa (argument & debate) karo to aqalmand se hi karo bewaquf wa jahel  se ahtiyat karo yeh bahut hi ahem aur zaroori baat hae

Ae Kumael tu nalaeq se munazera (debate) mat kar, aur to unke saath aisa hoja jaisa ke Allah taala Koran mae farmata hae

وَإِذَا خَاطَبَهُمُ الْجَاهِلُونَ قَالُوا سَلَامًا

Jab jahel log unko muqatib hote hain (kalaam karte hain) to woh bas Salaam karte huve guzar jaate hae

Ae Kumael tum har haal mae sach kaho Mutaqeen ka bojh utha (burden of being honest; mutaqeen)  faseqeen se dur rahe, aur qaen (amanat mae chori karne wala) ka kabhi saath na de

To har haal mae pak daman rahe sabar aur tahamul se har mamle mae kaam le

Ae Kumael teri mohtajgi aur teri bechaeni ko logoan per kabhi zaher na kar, usko poshida rakh, izzat ke saath sabar kar, aur is baat ke sawab ki umeed sirf Allah taala se rakh

Ae Kumael tere bhaiyaun mae, sacha bhai woh hae jo shidat ki takleef mae bhi tera saath na chode, aur tere koi gunaah mae mubtela hone per woh kabhi Khamosh bhi na rahe (tujh ko tambih kare, aur haq baat samjhae)

Ae Kumael momin, momin ka aina hota hae, kiyunke woh uska har halat mae saath deta hae, uski mohtajgi ko rokta hae aur uski har halat ko bardasht karta hae

Jaan ae Kumael momin aapas mae bhai bhai hain, koi baat koi chez bhaiyaun ke darmiyan hael (in between) nahi asakti (there could never be anything possible which can create differences between brothers)

Ae kumael tu Allah taala ka uski tammam naemataun ke ata karne per shukur ada karte rahe

Ae kumael to har shidat aur takleef mae ye tilawat kar;

لا حول ولا قوة الا بالله العلي العظيم

yeh tere liye kafi hoga, aur har naemat per "Alhamdullillah" kehe, is'se teri naemataun mae ziyadati hogi, aur jab teri risq wa rozi mae kami hojae to tu Allah taala se Isteqfar talab kar Allah taala teri risq mae wusat (kushadgi) dega

aur ae Kumael jab Shaitan tere dil mae "was wase" paida kare to us waqt to khe

  اعوذباللہ القوى من الشيطان الغوى واعوذ بمحمد الرضى من شر ما قدر وقضى واعوذ بالله الناس من شر الجنة والناس أجمعين

_Mae Allah taala se panah maangta hun jo gumraah shaitan se bahut ziyada taqatwar aur qawi (strong) hae, aur Mohammed Al Razi Salwatullah alehe se, har burai se jo Qaza aur Qadar hochuki hae, aur mae panah maangta hun Allah taala se un tammam Ins wa Jinn ke shar (burai) se_

Ae kumael Allah ki naemataun se koi zamana khali nahi, tum Allah taala ki *Hamd, Majd (buzrugi), Tasbeeh, Taqdees, Shukoor aur uske Zikar* se ghafil na raho

Ae kumael Faraez ki adaegi mae koi riyayat (exclusion) nahi aur Nuwafil ki adaegi mae koi sakhti aur shidat nahi

Ae kumael to is baat per bhi qor kar (think) keh to kiyu aur kis liye Namaz padh raha hae aur agar to yeh nahi jana to teri Namaz ki qaboliyat mae farakh ajaega

Ae kumael dil ki baat zabaan se zaher hoti hae, aur tera dil qiza (your diet) se banta hae, bas to zara qor kar ke to apne jism wa dil ko kiya qiza (food) khilaya, agar woh Halal na thi to Allah taala teri *Ibadat, Tasbeeh, wa Shukur* ko kabhi bhi qabool nahi karega

Ae kumael samajh le aur jaan le maqlooq mae kisi ki bhi amanat ki adaegi ko tark (avoid) karne ki kisi ko bhi ijazat nahi

Phir *Moulae kaenat Moulana Ali Ibn Abi Talib* ne farmaya

_Mae kasam khata hun ke mae Rasulullah ki wafat se kuch waqt pehle suna ke Rasul e khuda ne takid ki, aur teen martaba farmaya, Ae Abul Hasan (Moulana Ali ki kuniyat hae) amanat ko ada karo, chahe woh kisi nek ki ho ya fajir ki, chahe woh kam ho ya ziyada, yaha tak keh woh sui ke nake (hole of the needle) ke barabar dhaga (thread) kiyu na ho (kitni bhi mamuli chez kiyu na ho agar amanat hae to usko lotana hi hae)_

Allah taala humko tawfeeq de keh hum moula ke in nasihataun ke paband bane jinme qor wa fikar karne wale ke liye bade bade raaz wa haqaeq poshida hae

*وما توفيقى الا بالله العلي العظيم*

_Tawfeeq wahi hae jo Allah Ali ul Azeem ki taraf se hae_

🕸🕸🕸🕸🕸🕸🕸🕸🕸

6/26/16, 5:07:16 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🍁🍁🍁🍁🍁🍁🍁🍁

*السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته*

*بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم*

*أپ سب کو ليلة القدر کی آمد الله تعالی بہت مبارک کرے*

Buzrugane deen se hamesha sunte aye hain ke insaan ke bade se bade gunah ki maqferat ke liye do hi moqe Allah taala ne rakhe hae

Ek Haj ke ayaam mae *ARFE* ke Roz, muqam e *ARAFAT* per jae aur toba kare aur Allah tabaraka wa Taala se maqferat talab kare

Aur ek aaj ki Woh mubarak tareen raat  *ليلة القدر*  hae yane *Qadar wali raat* kehte hain jo *23 wi raat* hae Shehrullah e Mauzam se.

Hadees e shareef hae;

ما تقرب العبد الي الله أفضل من سجود خفي

_Banda Allah taala se sab se ziyada khreeb poshida SAJDE ki halat mae hota hae_

 *Sajde* hi ki halat mae humko Allah taala ki bargaah mae apni toba pesh karna hae isteqfar karna hae gidgid'ana hae aankhun se aansu (tears) bahana hae

*Moulana Ali ibn abi Talib* Salawatullah alahe farmate hain ;

نعم العبادة السجود والركوع

_Sab se behtreen ibadat woh Ruku wa Sujood hae_.

وأفة الصلاة الرياء

_Aur farmaya, sab se badi khrabi aur afat ibadat ki woh ibadat mae dikhawa karna hae_

*Imam Jafar e Sadiq* salwatullah alehe farmate hae;

_Jisne sahi mane mae Allah taala ki bargaah mae Sajda kiya, woh hargis, hargis, kabhi bhi nuqsan mae nahi rahega, agarche ke uska woh *SAJDA,* Allah ki bargaah mae uski zindagi mae ek hi waqt kiyu na huva ho_

Aur woh shaqs kabhi kamiyaab nahi huva jisne Sajde mae Allah ke siwae kisi aur ka khyal kiya, kisi aur ki taraf tawaju kiya usne apne Nafs ke saath dhoka kiya, woh ghafil raha, be parwah raha, is baat se jo Allah tabaraka wa Taala ne us bande ke liye uske Sajde mae kiya hi behtreen ajar e azeem wa be hisaab sawab rakha hae is duniya ki zindagi mae bhi wa aakherat mae bhi

Jisne *SAJDE*  ko acha kiya, khalis Allah taala ke liye kiya usko kabhi bhi Allah taala se duri nahi hosakti.

Aur Jisne *SAJDE* ke adaab ka khyal nahi rakha, uski hurmat (respect & dignity) ko zaye kiya (disregard kiya), apne Dil ko apne khyalaat ko Allah ke siwae kisi aur se jod  (connect) diya, to usko Allah se taqrub (closeness) kabhi bhi hasil nahi hoga

Tum Allah ko puri tawazo aur hurmat ke saath *SAJDA*  do, apne aap ko zaleel (degrade) karte huve uski bargaah mae, ye jaante huve aur pura ahsaas rakhte huve ke :

_Allah taala ne tum ko issi mitti (dust of the earth) se paida kiya hae, us mitti se jisko tum jaisi maqlooq raundhte huve, khundalte huve, apne paer (feet) se usper chalte hain, aur tum ko Allah taala ne tarkeeb (systematically organised) diya hae us Nutfe (sperm) se jisko har koi gandi nigah se dekhta hae, aur tum ko paida kiya wahan se jahan tum kuch bhi na the_

شيء مزكورا

_Koi aisi chez na the jiska zikar kiya ja'sake_

Allah taala ne *SAJUD* ka maqsad yehi rakha hae ke tum Dil se Allah taala se sabse ziyada khreeb hojao, apne andaruni zameer ke jasbe ke saath apni Rooh ke sàath

Jo bhi Allah se khreeb huva woh doosre tammam ter khilqaat (created) se dur hogaya (usko kisi aur maqlooq ki hajat nahi rahegi)

Tum agar zaheri *SAJDE* per hi qor karo to tum ko malum  hoga ke woh tum ko har dekhe jaane wali chez se dur kardeta hae

Jis tarah tumhari aankhaun se tammam zaheri dekhe jane wali chezain *SAJDE* mae chup jati hain, issi tarah Allah taala chahta hae ke batin mae bhi tumhara Dil wa Dimaag se Allah ke siwae har chez tum se chup jae,  dur hojae.

Agar banda apne Dil ko *SAJDE* mae kisi aur chez ke khreeb kiya, usse taluq joda to yaqinan woh us chez se khreeb huva aur Allah taala se dur huva

Allah taala ka irshad e mubarak hae ;

ما جعل الله لرجل من قلبين في جوفه

_Nahi banaya Allah taala ne kisi bhi Insaan ke seene mae do (2) Dil, woh ek hi waqt mae do ko khush nahi karsakta_ yane Allah taala aur uske saath kisi aur ko

*Hadees e Qudsi hae* Allah tabaraka wa Taala farmata hae ke mae jab bhi dekhta hun apne bande ke Dil ki taraf, bas mae jaan janta hun uski kaifiyat ko, agar woh meri mohabbat iqlaas ke saath karta hae mere khatir meri taat mae hae, meri khushi aur razamandi mae hae, to us waqt mae uska wali (zimedar, caretaker) hojata hun uske maamlat ki durustagi ka uske zindagi ke tammam mamlaat ka, aur mae us bande ke hamesha khreeb rahta hun

Aur jo bhi Insaan apni Namaz mae, Sajde mae, mere siwae kisi aur ke taraf mashqul hojata hae woh sirf apne aap se apne Nafs se thatta mazaaq kar raha hae, bas uska naam us diwan (volume) mae likha jaega jisme *خاسرين* yane nuqsan uthane wale qusur waar bandaun ke naam likhe jate hae

*Moulana Ali ibn abi Talib* ne ek waqt apni khud ki shaan mae khutba diya, aur farmaya keh  _"Mae Awaal hun, mae Aakhir hun, mae Zaher hun, mae Batin hun"_, aapke alfaz aise the ke logoan ko aapki khudai ke dawe ka khyal jata, us waqt aap mimber se neeche tashreef laye aur zameen ki raet (sand) per apna chehra rakh rakh diya, phir aapne farmaya _Mae Allah taala ka ajis BANDA hun, tum mujhe Allah ka banda samajh kar, tasleem karke, mujhe tum jo chahe kehna keh sakte ho "Allah O Akbar"_

Hamari ye halat hae, ke us Allah tabaraka wa Taala ki marefat to kiya karsakte hain bahut dur ki baat hae, humko to hamari ajis bande hone ka bhi sahi ahsaas nahi hae

Ae Allah humko hamare ajis wa majboor bande hone ka sahi ahsaas karwade takeh hamara *SAJDA* uski bargaah mae sahi mane mae *SAJDA* ho

سجد وجهي البالي الفاني، لوجهك الدائم الباقي، سجد وجهي الذليل لوجهك العزيز الجليل، سجد وجهي الفقير لوجهك الغني الكبير

Mae Sajda karta hun apne bosida (fragile) aur fani (khatam hone wale) chehre ke saath us zaat ko jo hamesha Qaem wa Daem aur baqi rahne wali hae,

us chehre se Sajda karta hun jo zaleel hae usko Sajda karta hun jo bada hi taqat wa khudrat wala hae jo jaleel hae,

mae us chehre se Sajda karta hun jo Faqir, aajis wa mohtaj hae maangne wala hae, usko jo ghani (jiski koi zaroorat baqi na ho) aur kabir hae, be niyaz hae, jo kisi ka mohtaj nahi  

Ae Allah aaj ki azeem mubarak raat hamara *سجدون* *SAJDAUN* ko teri bargaah mae qabuliat ka darja ata farma

وما توفيقى الا بالله العلي العظيم

🍁🍁🍁🍁🍁🍁🍁🍁

6/26/16, 1:42:17 PM: Asif Hussain: AsSalaamAlaykum Ishaq Bhai. Lailatul Qadr aap sab ko boht Mubarak. Please remember us in your prayers

6/27/16, 9:24:49 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🔳🔳🔳🔳🔳🔳🔳🔳

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Allah taala ka fazal wa ahsaan hae ke humko ek aur *قدروالی khadar wali* raat naseeb huvi Allah tabaraka wa taala hamare naqis (defective) amaal aur tuti phuti duaon ko qabool farmae  

 25 Shehrullah e Mauzam 1005 Hijri youm e wafat hae Syedna wa Moulana *Dai Humam us Zaman Syedna Sulaiman ibne Syedna Hasan bin Syedna Yusuf bin Sulaiman saheb ka*

Aap ki seerat (history) e mubaraka ko bilkul hi mukhtasar mae pesh karna hae

Aap daur e *Tayabi ke 27* wae Dai hae aur daur *Mohammedi* ko khatam karne wale aur daur e *Qaemi* ki ibteda karne wale hain jiski ibteda aapke farzand 28 wae Dai e mustaqar *Syedna Jafar* se huvi

Aapki paedaesh e mubarak 27 shawal e kareem 961 Hijri ko *Dar e Sadaan* (aapke dada ka makan) qile *Tayba* Yemen mae huvi

Aapke walid Syedna Hasan per aapke dada Syedna Yusuf ne Dai ki nas kardi thi magar aapke dada hi ki zindagi mae aur Syedna Sulaiman ke bachpan mae hi aapka inteqal hogaya aur aap Dai e Qaer Munfareed huve (one who could not become an active Dai)

Aapki waleda *Syedti Zainab ibne Musa ibne Sulaiman jo Syedna Yusuf* ki bhetiji hoti thi sahebe martaba Aalema fazele bibi thi jinka shummar us waqt ke Hudood e Dawat mae hota tha

Syedna Sulaiman saheb 5 saal ki umar mae yateem hogae the aapki tarbiyat wa taleem aapke dada aur aapki waleda ke pas huvi

5 saal ki umar mae aap Koran padhna shru kiye apke pehle ustad miya Malik ibne Qutub the

5 saal mae aapki taharat e fitri bhi ki gai (musalman kiya gaya)

8 saal ki umar mae aap Koran e majeed khatam farmaya aapke dada Syedna Yusuf ne khushi mae ek badi dawat ki aur ek gae (cow) ki zabihat ki jo ek khaas baat ki taraf ishara tha

9 saal mae aap ne Koran e Majeed ko hifz (by heart) karliye aur Sahifatus Salaat ki puri duain yaad karli aur namaz salaat ke paband hogae

Aap ne Dada Syedna Yusuf ke peeche Arfe ki namaz padhi aur issi saal Syedna Yusuf apne pote ko khud padhana shru kiye

Daswae 10 saal *Idd e Qadeer* ke mubarak din dada ne Ahadees e Nabawi ki kitab _Shahab un Nabawi_ aur _Kitab ut Tahara_ jo _Syedna Qazi un Nauman_ ki mashoor kitab hae padhane shru ki

Aap bahut hi tezi se apni zahanat (intelligence) aur zakawat (sharpness,  understanding) ki wajeh se ilm ke madareej (levels) tae kar rahe tha

974 Hijri jab aap 13 saal ke the aapke dada Syedna Yusuf ne aap se is Koran e Kareem ki ayaat ke mane (meaning) aur tafseer puchi,

*وعلي الله قصد السبيل*

Aur Allah hi per seedhi raah dikhana hae

Syedna Hummam ne bahut hi behtreen andaz mae is ayaat ki tashreeh aur tafseer ki jisse aapke dada be inteha khush huve aur apne pote mae woh buzrugiyat ke asaar (signs) nazar aagae jisse se aapki aankhen thandi huvi

Aur ussi saal jabke aapki umar 13 saal thi 16 Zilhaja ko aapke dada *Syedna Yusuf bin Sulaiman saheb* ka Yemen mae inteqal farmae

Aapke dada ke inteqal ke baad aap ka pura khandaan  Yemen ko chod diya aur Hindustan Sidhpur ka irada kiye

Umar ke 14 saal mae aap Hindustan pohunche Hindustan ke port (ghogha) per aapko *Syedna Jalal ibne Hasan* ke inteqal ki khabar mili aur Syedna *Dawood bin Ajab Shah* ka aapke baad Dai hone ki itela (news) mili

Aap Sidhpur 975 ki pehli Mohurram ko pohuncha

Jamadil awal 975 aap Sidhpur se Ahmedabad jo us zamane mae Dawat ka markaz tha Syedna Dawood bin Ajab Shah ki khidmat mae gaye

Sydney Dawood aapka bahut hi khushi se isteqbal kiye aur khud hi Syedna Sulaiman ko taleem dena shru kiye

Sab se pehle aapko kitab _"Daem ul Islam"_ aur _Mukhtaser ul Asaar_ padhana shru kiye

Ek waqt aap Ahmedabad se Sidhpur kuch kaam se gaye magar bahut jadi hi wapas Ahmedabad aagae us waqt Syedna Dawood ne mazaq mae bahut lateef andaz mae Koran ki ye Ayaat padhi

وما اعجلك عن قومك يا موسى

_Ae Musa tum apni qom ke pas se kiyu itni jaldi chale aye ?_

Janab Syedna Sulaiman ne bhi Koran ki hi ayaat se foran jawab diya

 عجلت اليك ربي لترضي

_Aapke pas jald isliye aya keh aap khush ho_

Kiya hi behtreen jawab Syedna Hummam ne itni kam umri mae diya

Syedna Dawood ne aapko Musa e daur khekar ye bhi bata diya ke agar aap Musa e daur hain to aapka ek dushman Firaun (Pharaoh) bhi yaqinan hoga jisse aapko muqabela karna hoga

14 saal ki umar mae *"Lailatul khadar"* mae Syedna Dawood ne aapka Ahed E Shareef (Misaq) liya

15 saal mae aap Shariat aur Seerat ki bahut si kitabain padh rahe tha aur aap manzoom (poetic form) mae ashaar kehna shru kiye aur Rasulullah aur Ahle Baet e Nabi ki shaan mae Qaside manqebat aur muqtalif ashar kehna shru kiye

17 saal ki umar mae aap _Rasaele Ahmedia jo Imam Ahmed bin Abdullah hamare 9th_ Imam ki kitab hae jo  _"Rasa'ele Ikhwan us Safa"_ ke naam se maruf hae woh aapne padha

18 saal mae aapko Namaz ba jamaat padhane ki Fushat ata ki gai aur Sidhpur ke tammam Hudood e Dawat per aapko foq (supercede) kardiya gaya (us waqt Sidhpur mae sab se badi jamaat thi)

19 saal mae aapko Syedna Dawood ne kitab _Taj Ul Aqaed wa Madan ul Fawaed_ jo hamare 5th Daur e Tayabi ke Dai *Syedna Ali bin Mohammed bin Walid* ki likhi huvi hae woh padhane shru kiye

Ye kitab hamare ahle Haq ke sahi aqeeda (beliefs) kiya hona chahye unme se 100 aqeede aap ne samjhae hain

Is kitab ke liye Syedna Sulaiman Saheb likhte hae ke ye kitab meri *Surat e Roohani* ko sab se ziyada munawar aur roshan karne wali sabit huvi

Umar e shareef ke 20th saal mae aapka Nikah Idd e Qadeer ke roz fajar mae Alhura Khadija binte Noah se huva jo Syedna Dawood ki bhetiji thi aur shaadi ke baad widai pehli Mohurram ko huvi

Aapke Zindagi ke tammam ahem mamlaat kisi na Kisi mubarak din anjaam pae hain

Agar aap qor kare to aapki zindagi aur Rasulullah ki zindagi mae bahut si baatain mumasil (similar) hain jaise aapka bachpan mae Yateem hona, zaher (poison) se shahadat hasil karna iske alawa aur bhi bahut se baatain common hain

Hum Syedna Sulaiman saheb ki ziyarat karte hain, hum zaheri khabre shareef ko chumte hain magar batini ziyarat bahut badhkar hae aala hae aur woh aapki marefat hae, aapke maratib ko jan'na hae, aap ki azeem khidmat ko samajhna hae, aap apne waqt ke Imam ke Dai e azeem ki haisiyat se batini tor per kiya kaam anjam farmaye hain woh asal hae aur Duwaat kehte hain ke jo kaam Imam ko karna tha woh aap ne Dai ki haisiyat se kiye

*Syedna Dai Ali bin Hussain Almakrami* ne aapki jab ziyarat ki to aapki tareef mae kiya hi baleeq baat kehi thi *حجاب حجاب خير المرسلين* *"Hijaab e Hijaab khair ul Mursalina"* jo Ilme haqaeq se waqif hain woh jante hae ke ye aapke kitne bade muqam ki taraf ishara hae

Aap ne ye farmaya tha ke

_"Syedna Sulaiman mae Nubuwat ke tammam Qasail e Mehmooda (good qualities required for nubuwat) maujud the"_

Nubuwat ke Qasail e Mehmooda 46 hain (qualities or virtues required for nubuwat) jo tammam ke tammam aap mae maujud the

Aapki Seerat e mubaraka per bahut kitabain likhi gai hae aur urdu mae bhi moujud hain, *Hazrat Moulana Shakir saheb muqaddus ki likhi *"Zia ul Emaan"* ek behtreen kitab hae uske alawa *Syedna Dai Ali bin Hussain Almakrami ka likha Risala "Al Shahab e la'mea"* jiska urdu tarjuma bhi hae iski alawa aapki wiladat ke 400 saala jashan 1361 per jo muqtaleef buzrugaane deen ne tahqeeqi mazameen (researched articles) likhe hain unme *Mukaram Ras ul hudood Moulvi Abbas Saheb* ka mazmun *Syedna Sulaiman Saheb ke Ashaar* per hamari baseerat ko roshan kardeta haain Syedna Sulaiman saheb ne *11954 Ashaar* (verses) kehe hae jo 6 volumes mae Syedna Jafar ne ek jagah naqal (copy) kiya hae

 Allah humko tawfeeq de ke hum in kitabaun ko padhkar aapki batini tor per bhi ziyarat se mushraaf hojae

Inshallah aapka zikar aur bhi hae...............

🔳🔳🔳🔳🔳🔳🔳🔳

6/28/16, 1:29:54 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ▫▪▫▪▫▪▫▪▫

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Aaj 25 Shehrullah youm e wafat hae *Syedna Dai Sulaiman ibne Syedna Hasan qadasalahu arwahuma*

Aapki zindagi ke bees saal tak ka mukhtasar zikar kal huva tha aage ka zikar maqsood hae

Aapke ki shaan badi hi nirali thi, aapke Muqeem aapke ustad aur aapko Dai banane wale *Dai Syedna Dawood ibne Ajab Shah* aapke liye apne ghar walaun ko farmate _kiya tum log samajthe ho ke Sulaiman mere pas padhne aate hain, arre nahi, nahi, Sulaiman to mujhe padhane aate hain_ aur farmate ke unki Maa ne ek _Noor ka tukda_ jana hae (gave birth to)"

23 saal ki umar mae Syedna Dawood bin Ajab Shah ne aapko Yemen bhejne ka irada kiya takeh aap apne Dada *Syedna Yusuf bin Sulaiman* ke muqam ko Yemen mae sambal le

14 Rajab 984 Hijri ko Syedna Sulaiman saheb ko Syedna Dawood ne Hindustan se Yemen ke liye bheja aur us waqt farmaya _"mae tum ko ek khaas maqsad ke liye bhej raha hun aur woh maqsad tumhare siwae koi pura nahi karsakta hae"_

Jazeere Yemen ke ravana hote waqt aapki umar 24 saal thi aur us waqt Syedna Dawood ne aapko tammam Yemen ke Hudood e Dawat per fauq (promoted over) kardiya tha siwae Syedi Ali bin Idrees al Sumbuli ke aur aapko Jazeere Yemen (deeni territory) ka pura itlaq (power) diya tha ke aap wahan jaisa chahain karsakte hae baqaer Hindustan se ijazat liye

Umar ke 25 saal aap 20 Rabiul awal 985 Taiba Yemen pohunche Syedi Idrees ne aapka khair maqdam (welcome) kiya aur Yemen ke tammam Hudood per fauq kiya

26 saal ki umar aap Haj wa ziyarat e Nabi se mushraaf huve aap wapasi ke raaste per the ke Yemen mae Syedi Idrees bin Sumbuli ka inteqal ki khabar mili aur aapko Yemen ki dawat ko sambhalne ki wasiyat ki hae malum huva aap wasiyat ke hisaab se Taiba aye aur Syedna Dawood bin Ajab Shah ko sab baataun ki khabar bheji aur aapke ahkaam ke muntazir rahe

27 saal ki umar mae aap ne Yemen ke Haras aur uske atraaf ke tammam ilaqe jahan momineen rahte the do'ra (tour) kiye, aur sab momineen aapki taat kiye    

 Issi saal Syedna Dawood bin Ajab Shah ka Hindustan se mushraf (musharaf, letter of senior hudood like Dai is called so) mila aapko Syedna Idrees ki taziyat thi aur saath hi mubarakbaad aur khushi ka ishaar tha ke aapko pure Jazeere ka itlaq (power) mila hae

Syedna Dawood ne aapko yehi bhi likha tha ke hum yehi baat aapke liye chahte the aur aapko Hindustan se bhejne ka maqsad bhi yehi tha

Issi saal aapki waleda *Zainab binte Musa* bhi Hindustan se Yemen ayi aapka bahut bada muqam tha aur Hudood e kiraam mae shummar hota tha

988 Hijri umar ke 28 saal mae aapko ek farzand paida huve jinka naam aap ne *Yusuf* rakha jinki tareeq e paedaesh bhi 27 shawal thi jo aapki ki bhi tareeq e paedaesh thi aur issi saal aapki buzrug waleda ka Yemen mae inteqal bhi huva (Syedna Yusuf baad mae Dai e qaer munfareed huve)

Umar ke 30 wae saal aapke halaat khrab hone shru huve Yemen jo turkey hukumat ke control mae tha uska *Governor Hasan turkey* tha aur Dawat ke mamlaat *Ameer Mohammed bin Ismail aur Abdullah almehfuz* ke haataun mae the "teeno bhi bade  *منافق* munafiq the Dawat ke dushman the Syedna hummam in teeno se bahut hi narmi aur ahtiyat se bartau (behave) karte takeh momineen ko nuqsaan na pohunche

Issi saal mae aapne ek kitab *"Muktatabat Al Hasana"* jisme aap ne apni wiladat se leker aakhri umar tak ka ahwaal likha hae us waqt ke halaat ke ek lamba chapter hae

30 saal ki umar se aapke mushkilat ka saqt tareen daur shru huva magar aap ne Syedna Dawood ke hukum ke mutabiq kaam kiye aur halaat per sabar farmate rahe

Inshallah aapke zindagi ka aage ka ahwaal aapke youme wiladat 27 shawal ko likhunga

11 Shaban ko aapke tadfeen ka din tha uska ahwaal is mazmun ka baad hi bhejne ki koshish karunga

 ....................................
