9/8/16, 12:01:11 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: *SECOND PART*

💢💦💢💦💢💦💢💦

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

جمعة مباركة  🌹

                *خبر الشبلي*

Zikar huva tha *Imam e Zainul Abedeen* aur Janab e *Shibli* ka, *Hajj* ke arkaan ke taluq se

Imam ne kha ae Shibli kiya tum *Mina* ke maidan mae gaya the ?

Shibli ne kha, haan ae Moula

Imam ne farmaya Kiya tu Mina ke maidan mae ye niyat ki thi keh tu logoan ko apni dil, zabaan, haath, se aman wa amaan mae rakhega

Kiya to ne *Arafat* ke maidan mae *Jabal e Rehmat* per chadha tha ?

Shibli ne kha haan ae Moula mae Arafat per gaya tha

Kiya ae shibli tu *Arfe* ke maidan mae khada hokar ye qor kiya ke Allah taala ki marefat tammam uloom (knowledge) mae sab se aala aur badhkar hae aur kiya tu ne us waqt ye yaqeen hasil kiya ke tera sahife aamal, (record of deeds) Allah taala ke khabse aur qudrat mae hae, aur woh tere zameer ki poshida baataun se bhi waqif aur ba'khabar hae

Ae Shibli kiya tu ne *Jabal e Rehmat* per chadhte huve ye niyat aur irada kiya tha ke tu har mommin mard aur aurat per rahem karega har muslim mard wa aurat se mohabbat wa ulfat rakhega

kiya tum ne *Wadiye Numra* ke pas ye niyat ki thi ke tum apne *Nafs* ko farma bardari karne tak tokte rahoge aur buri baataun se us waqt tak rokte rahoge jab tak ke woh ruk na jae

Kiya tu ne *Musdalefa* per raat guzari aur wahan se kankar (pebbles) chun kar uthaya aur  *مشعر حرام* *Mashar e Haraam* Mina mae aye aur *Masjid e Kheef* mae do rakat namaz padhi us waqt kiya tum ne ye niyat ki ke tum siwae Allah taala ke, aur apne gunahun ke, kisi ka bhi khoof nahi rakhoge

Imam ne kaha tum ne namaz mae niyat ki thi ke ye namaz shukrane ki hae mushkilaat ko dur karti hae aur tum ko asani aur sahulat pohunchati hae

aur kiya tum *Alamayeen* ke darmiyan chalte waqt apne dil aur zabaan ko seedhe baye janib mael (incline) to nahi kiya ?

kiya tu ne us waqt ye azm aur irada kiya tha ke tu har masiyat (gunaah) jahalat aur bekar ilm aur bure amal se apne aap ko dur rakhega

Aur kiya tu *Jumraun* (3 shaitaan) ko marte waqt ye aqeeda rakha tha ke tu tere dushman Iblees ko maar raha hae aur har gunaah bure ilm wa amal se chutkara hasil kiye ho ?

Aur kiya tu ne sar mundate (hair removal) waqt ye aqeeda rakha ke ab tere sa're gunaah maaf hogae aur ab tu aisa hi be'gunah hogaya jaisa ke tu apni paedaesh ke waqt tha

kiya tum ne *zabihat* karte waqt ye niyat ki ke tum ne *طمع* Tama (hirs lalaj greed) ke gale (neck) per churi (knife) chalai hae, sachi parhezgari se apna taluq qaem kiya hae aur Sunnat e Ibrahimi ki paervi ki   

Phir Imam ne kha Kiya tu Mina pohunch kar kankariyaan mari, kiya sar ke baal mundwaye, apni qurbani ko zabah kiya, masjid Kheef mae namaz padhi, Mecce Mauzama wapas huva aur Tawaf e Ifaza kiya, us waqt tum ne niyat ki ke tu ne Allah taala ki Rehmat hasil kiya, Allah taala ki taat ki taraf tawajuh ki, Allah ke hudood se apna taluq qaem kiya, Allah taala ke bade farz ko ada kiya aur usse qurbat hasil huvi

Is tarah Imam ne sa're arkaan e *Hajj* aur mauqaf (places where *Haji* had to stop for certain deeds) bayan kardiye aur har baat per janab e Shibli afsoos karte rah gae aur kehte rahe, Ae Imam, mae ne aisi tu niyat nahi kiya tha aur aisa aqeeda nahi rakha

Imam ne kha, na tu ne, ahram bandha, na hi tawaf kiya, na hi sa'ee ki, na hi muqam e Ibrahim per namaz padhi, na hi Hajar e Aswad ko chuma, na Mina gaya, na Arafat per gaya, na hi Jumraun ko mara na hi sar mundwaya, na hi teri zabihat huvi

Ae Shibli tu ne in tammam arkan ko ada hi nahi kiya, ja palat ja, tu ne to *HAJJ* hi nahi kiya

Janab e Shibli ne apni sari kothaiyun (mistakes) per bahut azurda (saddened & relented) huve, bahut afsoos kiya, bahut roye aur phir Imam Alehe Salaam ke pas taleem hasil karke dobara doosre saal pure yaqeen aur marefat ke saath Hajj e maqbool ada kiya

Allah taala humko bhi woh marefat ata kar jo Shibli ne hasil ki, takeh hamara bhi Haj e maqbool ho

°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°

_mae ye bayan bilkul mukhtasar mae kiya hun, Imam ka kalam bahut lamba hae_

°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°

9/9/16, 1:14:46 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🕋🕋🕋🕋🕋🕋🕋🕋

*السلام علیکم و رحمة الله و بركاته*

*بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم*

               *يوم عرفة مبروك*

*فَإِذَا أَفَضْتُم مِّنْ عَرَفَاتٍ فَاذْكُرُوا اللَّهَ*

*Jab tum Muqam e Arfaat se niklo (Musdalefa ki taraf) to Allah Taala ka zikar karo (kasrat se)*

Aap sab ko Arfe ke mubarak tareen din ki tabreek pesh hae, Allah taala hum sab ki Duain qabool kare, Duaon mae yaad rakhne ki aap sab se ilteja hae

*Muqam e Arfaat kiya hae ?*

*Syedna Dai Gulam Husain saheb* ne kitab *Qutrun Nida* mae farmaya hae ;

Allah taala ne ek badi muddat ke baad *Adam Alehe Salaam* ki toba ko qabool farmaya jab ke Adam ne *Mohammed e Mustafa Salallahu Alehe wa Sallam* ki shafa'at talab ki aur Allah ne unhe hukum diya ke jis tarah mere *Arsh* ke atraaf tawaaf diya jata hae waise hi tum *Kabe* ke atraaf tawaf do

Adam Hindustan (Sarandeep Sri Lanka) se Mecce Mauzama ki taraf aye aur wahan aapko *حوا Haw'wa* mili jo Adam ki talaash mae Jeddah se wahan ayi huvi thi aur muqam e Arfaat per Arfe ke roz dono ki mulaqat huvi aur dono ka taruf *عرف* huva aur ek doosre ko pehchane isiliye is mubarak muqam ka naam *Arfaat* rakha gaya

aur jab dono *Mina* ki taraf palte to irshad huva ke *"apni kisi tamanna ka ishaar karo"* Adam ne kaha ki meri tamana ye hae ke mujhe maaf kiya jae aur mujh per *رحم* rahem kiya jae isiliye us muqam ka naam *Mina* ya *Muna* jiska arabi mae matlab hota hae *Tamanna ya Arzu* isliye us muqam ka naam *مني Mina* rakha gaya

Adam ko maaf karne ke baad Allah taala ne Adam per *وحى* ki *"ae Adam mae tere liye sara Ilm char kalemat mae jama kardeta hun"*

(1) _Ek mere liye hae_

(2) _Ek mere aur tere darmiyan hae_

(3) _Ek tere liye hae_ aur

(4) _Ek tere aur logoan ke darmiyaan hae_

_mere liye jo hae woh yeh hae_

       *فتعبدني لا تشرك بي شياء*

_Sirf meri hi ibadat kar aur mere saath kisi ko shareek na kar_

 jo baat tere liye hae

      *فاجزيك بعملك ما تكون اليه*

_"Mae tujhe tere amal ka badla zaroor daunga (agar acha hae to sawaab aur bura hae to azaab)"_

_Jo baat tere aur mere darmiyan jo hae_

      *فمنك الدعاء ومني الإجابة*

_"Tere kaam Dua karna hae aur mera kaam usko qabool karna hae"_

_Aur aakhri baat jo tere aur logoan ke darmiyan hae_

       *فإن ترضي للناس ما ترضي لنفسك*

_Tu logoan ke liye wohi baat pasand kar jo tu khud ke liye pasand karta hae_

Allah taala dono manaseeb e kiraam Hazrat Moulana Almansub Syedi *Ibrahim saheb* wa Hazrat Moulana Almansub Syedi *Gulam Hussain* saheb ko sahet wa aafiyat se rakhe aur humko unki taat mae rakhe aur unki duaon mae khususan kal ke mubarak din shareek rakhe, *Ameen !*

🕋🕋🕋🕋🕋🕋🕋🕋🕋

9/10/16, 11:47:46 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: □■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته🌹

*بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم*  🌹

*ليلة العيد الأضحى و يوم العيد الأضحئ مبارك* 🌹

■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□

Jo shaqs ek waqt *Hajj e Baitullah* se musharaf hota hae phir uske Dil mae dobara balkeh mutawatir (repeatedly) har saal Hajj per jane ki khaesh paida hojati hae

Agarche ki *Mecce Mauzama* ki sar'zameen banjar (dry) hae, khud Quran farma raha hae

*رَّبَّنَا إِنِّي أَسْكَنتُ مِن ذُرِّيَّتِي بِوَادٍ غَيْرِ ذِي زَرْعٍ عِندَ بَيْتِكَ الْمُحَرَّمِ*

 Janab e *Ibrahim khaleelullah* ne kaha tha _"Ae Allah taala mae meri zuriyat (aulad) ko aisi wadi (valley of Mecca) mae basaya hae jahan kheti nahi hoti jo tere mubarak ghar Baithullah ke khreeb hae_

jahan koi chez ki paidawaar nahi, na hi khet hain, na hi darakht, na hi nadi wa na'le, magar phir bhi Allah taala ne aisi jazebiyat (attraction) us muqam mae rakha hae ki har musalman ki khaesh hoti hae ke us mubarak muqam ki ziyarat usko naseeb ho

Kiya hi behtreen manzar hota hae jab tammam Haji safaed Ahram ke do kapde pahen kar *Haram e Baitullah* ka ruq karte hain, dil wa dimaag per ajeeb kaefiyat chah'jati hae, jab ke har Haji *TALBIH* kehna shru karta hae aur Mecce ki sar zameen is mubarak alfaz se gunj uthti hae

 *اللهم لبيك، لبيك لا شريك لك، لبيك ان الحمد ونعمة لك، والملك لا شزيك لك*

Ya bada hi rikhat amez (heart touching) manzar hota hae jab ke lakhaun Haji ek saath talbiha kehta huve Baitullah ki taraf aage badhte hain,

Har Haji ko us waqt tak ye char kalemaat 'Talbih' kehte rahna hae jab tak ke woh kabatullah ko na dekh le

Aur jaise hi Kabatullah ko dekh le to usko talbiha khatam karna hae aur ye kehna shru karna hae

            *لا اله الا الله، الله أكبر*

 Aur ye Dua bhi padhte jae

   *اللهم زد هذا البيت تشريفا وتعظيماوزد من شرفه وعظمته*

*Ya Allah, to is ghar ki azmat wa sharafat ko aur ziyada kar*

In char kalemat e Talbih woh sunnat e Nabawi hae,

Aur Ahle baet e kiraam ne is Dua me aur isafa (additions) kiya hae

*لبيك ذالمعارج، لبيك داعيا الي دار السلام، لبيك غفار الذنوب، لبيك مرعوب والمزغوب اليك، لبيك ذوجلال والاكرام، لبيك اله الخلق، لبيك كاشف الكرب*

Imam e *Jaffar e Sadiq* salwatullah alehe farmate hain Haji ke liye ke tum har namaz e farz wa sunnat ke baad labaek kho aur jab tum ko sawari lekar uthe, ya phir tum bulundi per chadho, ya phir wadi mae utro, ya phir jab tum neend se bedar ho

Imam e *Jafar e Sadiq* farmate hain ke Allah taala tak pohunchne ke jitne bhi raaste hain unme *Hajj* se badhkar koi raasta nahi, siwae iske keh koi shaqs Allah ki raah mae *Shaheed* hojae

Aur imam e *Jafar e Sadiq* farmate hain ke Allah taala ne *Ibrahim Khaleelullah* alehe salaam per wahi nazil ki thi

*ان طهرا بيتي للطاءفين والعاكفين والركع والسجود*

Is ayaat ke nuzul ke waqt Allah taala ne 170 Rahmatain Baitullah e mubarak per nazil ki

 Usme se *60 Tawaf* dene walaun ke liye

*50 Aakefeen* ke liye (aetekaf baithne walaun ke liye)

*40 Namaz* padhne walaun ke liye

*20 Kabatullah ko dekhne walaun* ke liye, ye Allah taala ki rahimi aur kareemi hae ke Kabatullah ko sirf dekhne walaun ke liye bhi Rahmatain ata ki hain

Haji ke liye Rasulullah ka qol e mubarak hae jab tum tamman Manasik e Hajj ada karlo ab tum ek imarat bana chuke ho, (ek achi roohani surat ki tashkil de chuke ho, image create kiye ho) isko munhaddim (destroy) na karna, ab tum mazi (past) ki fikar na karo aur mustaqbil (future) mae nek amal karo

Allah Tabaraka wa taala ka lakh, lakh, shukur wa ahsaan hae, ke usne aise asbab (factors) banae hain hamare gunahaun ki maqferat ke liye

Allah taala hum sabko ye ahem fareeze *"Hajj"* ke ada karne ki tawfeeq de aur uske karne ki iste'taat paida karde

Walid e muqaddus Hazrat Moulana *Ziaali Saheb* muqaddus ke alfaz kaan mae gunjte hae, Jab bhi aap Haj ke asbaq lete to ye alfaaz se bayan ki ibteda karte

*"Ek mommin ka inteqal karke kafan pehen kar khabar mae jana aur ek Haji ka Ahram ke do kapde pehen kar Hajj per jana dono barabar hain"*

Allah taala hum ko is hikmat ki baat aur uske peeche poshida raaz, uski haqeeqat se waqif karae takeh hamara zahari Hajj, woh batini Hajj bhi hojae.

*والحمد لله رب العالمين والصلاة والسلام على سيدنا محمد وعلى آله الطيبين الطاهرين وسلم عليهم أجمعين*

■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□

9/13/16, 4:22:38 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🌹🌿🍁🍃🌹🌿🍁🍃

*السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته*

*بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم*

Allah taala ka bada ahsaan aur karam hae ke *Hajj* mukamil huva aur hamare Ikhwan ki khair ki khabar hae hum bhi har roz Dua e Ratib mae unki sahet wa aafiyat, wa salaamti ke saath watan lautne ki Dua karte hain

*Haji* apne do  sufaed chadar ke Ahram se hil (complete his arkan of removing hair & performing zabihat) huva hoga aur apne roz ke libaas ko ikhteyar kiya hoga

Ye libaas bhi badi hi ajeeb chez hae insaan ki soch, fikar, khyalaat, mood, uska uthna, baithne (actions) sab hi baataun per asar andaz hota hae, balkeh insaan ko saamne wale shaqs ki jo chez sab se ziyada mutazir karti hae, woh uski surat wa shakal ke baad uska libaas hi hae,

Allah taala ki kiya hi badi hikmat aur raaz is baat mae poshida hoga ke jo *Hajj* ke liye hukum kiya gaya keh do safaed kapde pehne aur woh bhi baqaer sile huve ho

Ye baat ek Haji hi batasakta hae jo woh in do kapdaun ko pehen kar mehsoos karta hae, yaqinan, inkesari, bandagi, Allah ke saamne ajisi, ikhwan ke saath barabari wa hamdardi ko mehsoos to yaqinan karta hi hoga, aur uska batin to Aulia Allah hi batasakte hain ki kiya uske saath pesh aata hae is *Ahram* ke pehen'ne se

Shariat (islamic laws) mae libaas ki bahut ahmiyat hae *Moulana Ali ibn Abi Talib salawatullah alehe* jab bhi koi libaas pehnte to ye irshad farmate

*بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم*

*الحمد لله الذي رزقني من الرياش ما اتجمل به في الناس ووارى سوءتى وستر عورتى الحمد لله رب العالمين*

Tammam Hamd wa tareef Allah hi ke liye hae jis ne mujhe yeh kimti libaas ata farmaya jisme mae logoan ke saamne acha nazar aunga aur tammam Hamd us Allah ke liye hae jisne meri sittir poshi ki hae (covered my nakedness) aur tammam Hamd wa tareef us Allah ke liye hae jo sa're jahan ka Rabb hae

Aur *Moulana Ali* ne farmaya ke Rasul e khuda bhi yehi padhte the jab aap libaas pehnte the

Moulana Ali ne ek waqt ek libaas khreeda jab aap ne aasteen (sleeves) ko dekha ke woh wrist se ziyada lambi hain aur issi tarah uski lambai ankle se ziyada lambi hae to aap ne usko kaat dala (trimmed its length)

*Imam e Baqaer Salwatullah alehe* farmate, keh jo bhi libaas takhnau (wrist & ankle) se neeche hoga to woh hissa jahanam mae hoga

*Moulana Ali* hamesha do libaas ek saath khreedte the aur dono libaas mae se ek ko pehle pasand karne ka ikhteyar apne gulam (slave) *Moulana Cumber* ko dete, woh apni marzi se pasand karleta to phir aap doosra khud ke liye rakh lete

Rasulullah ki mashoor Hadees hae

*من اتخذ شعرافليحسن اليه،*

*من اتخذ زوجة فليكرمها،*

 *من اتخذ نعلا فليستجدها،*

 *من اتخذ دابة فليستفرهها،*

 *ومن اتخذ ثوبا فلينضفه*

Jo shaqs bhi lambe baal (long hair) rakhe to woh usko achi tarah rakhe, saaf suthre aur jama kar rakhe (groom the hair)

Jo Biwi ikhteyar kare, yaane shaadi kare to usko izzat se rakhe karamat de (give her respect & keep her dignity)

Jo shaqs bhi juta (shoes) rakhe to woh usko naya rakhe, yaane saaf polished aur bilkul nai condition mae rakhe

Aur jo jaanwar rakhe to ache kisim ka rakhe (keep a good breed)

Aur jo libaas rakhe to usko saaf suthra (neat, clean & tidy) rakhe

Allah taala hum ko libaas ke zaheri ahkam ka paband banae

Shariat e Mohammedi mae libaas ki bahut ahmiyat hae jiska hum khyaal nahi karte hain aur us se hamari zindagi mae jo khrabi aati hae uska humko ahsaas bhi nahi aur na andaza hae

Allah taala hamare tamman *Hajiyun* ko sahet wa afiyat se apne watan wapis lautae

*والحمدلله رب العالمين ولا حول ولا قوة الا بالله العلي العظيم*

💐🌹🍃🍁🌹💐🍃🍁
